search_text: Accurate Detection of Mediastinal Lesions with nnDetection 使用 nnDetection 准确检测纵隔病变 The accurate detection of mediastinal lesions is one of the rarely explored medical object detection problems. In this work, we applied a modified version of the self-configuring method nnDetection to the Mediastinal Lesion Analysis (MELA) Challenge 2022. By incorporating automatically generated pseudo masks, training high capacity models with large patch sizes in a multi GPU setup and an adapted augmentation scheme to reduce localization errors caused by rotations, our method achieved an excellent FROC score of 0.9922 at IoU 0.10 and 0.9880 at IoU 0.3 in our cross-validation experiments. The submitted ensemble ranked third in the competition with a FROC score of 0.9897 on the MELA challenge leaderboard. 纵隔病变的准确检测是很少被探索的医学对象检测问题之一。在这项工作中，我们将自配置方法 nnDetection 的修改版本应用于 2022 年纵隔病变分析 (MELA) 挑战赛。通过合并自动生成的伪掩模、在多 GPU 设置中训练具有大块大小的高容量模型以及采用自适应增强方案来减少旋转引起的定位误差，我们的方法在 IoU 0.10 时获得了 0.9922 的出色 FROC 分数，在 IoU 0.3 时获得了 0.9880 的出色 FROC 分数。我们的交叉验证实验。提交的合奏在 MELA 挑战排行榜上以 FROC 分数 0.9897 排名第三。 本文提出了一种改进的nnDetection方法，用于准确检测纵隔病变，并在MELA挑战赛中取得了优异成绩。 Michael Baumgartner,Peter M. Full,Klaus H. Maier-Hein eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Vasiliki Stergiopoulou,Subhadip Mukherjee,Luca Calatroni,Laure Blanc-Féraud
title: Fluctuation-based deconvolution in fluorescence microscopy using plug-and-play denoisers
title_zh: 使用即插即用降噪器在荧光显微镜中基于波动的反卷积
abstract: The spatial resolution of images of living samples obtained by fluorescence microscopes is physically limited due to the diffraction of visible light, which makes the study of entities of size less than the diffraction barrier (around 200 nm in the x-y plane) very challenging. To overcome this limitation, several deconvolution and super-resolution techniques have been proposed. Within the framework of inverse problems, modern approaches in fluorescence microscopy reconstruct a super-resolved image from a temporal stack of frames by carefully designing suitable hand-crafted sparsity-promoting regularisers. Numerically, such approaches are solved by proximal gradient-based iterative schemes. Aiming at obtaining a reconstruction more adapted to sample geometries (e.g. thin filaments), we adopt a plug-and-play denoising approach with convergence guarantees and replace the proximity operator associated with the explicit image regulariser with an image denoiser (i.e. a pre-trained network) which, upon appropriate training, mimics the action of an implicit prior. To account for the independence of the fluctuations between molecules, the model relies on second-order statistics. The denoiser is then trained on covariance images coming from data representing sequences of fluctuating fluorescent molecules with filament structure. The method is evaluated on both simulated and real fluorescence microscopy images, showing its ability to correctly reconstruct filament structures with high values of peak signal-to-noise ratio (PSNR).
summary: The spatial resolution of images of living samples obtained by fluorescence microscopes is physically limited due to the diffraction of visible light, which makes the study of entities of size less than the diffraction barrier (around 200 nm in the x-y plane) very challenging. To overcome this limitation, several deconvolution and super-resolution techniques have been proposed. Within the framework of inverse problems, modern approaches in fluorescence microscopy reconstruct a super-resolved image from a temporal stack of frames by carefully designing suitable hand-crafted sparsity-promoting regularisers. Numerically, such approaches are solved by proximal gradient-based iterative schemes. Aiming at obtaining a reconstruction more adapted to sample geometries (e.g. thin filaments), we adopt a plug-and-play denoising approach with convergence guarantees and replace the proximity operator associated with the explicit image regulariser with an image denoiser (i.e. a pre-trained network) which, upon appropriate training, mimics the action of an implicit prior. To account for the independence of the fluctuations between molecules, the model relies on second-order statistics. The denoiser is then trained on covariance images coming from data representing sequences of fluctuating fluorescent molecules with filament structure. The method is evaluated on both simulated and real fluorescence microscopy images, showing its ability to correctly reconstruct filament structures with high values of peak signal-to-noise ratio (PSNR).
abstract_zh: 由于可见光的衍射，荧光显微镜获得的活体样本图像的空间分辨率受到物理限制，这使得对尺寸小于衍射势垒（x-y 平面中约 200 nm）的实体的研究非常具有挑战性。为了克服这个限制，已经提出了几种反卷积和超分辨率技术。在反演问题的框架内，荧光显微镜的现代方法通过精心设计合适的手工制作的稀疏促进正则化器，从帧的时间堆栈中重建超分辨率图像。在数值上，此类方法是通过基于近端梯度的迭代方案来解决的。为了获得更适合样本几何形状（例如细丝）的重建，我们采用具有收敛保证的即插即用去噪方法，并用图像去噪器（即预训练网络）替换与显式图像正则器相关的邻近算子，该图像去噪器在适当的训练后模仿隐式先验的动作。为了解释分子之间波动的独立性，该模型依赖于二阶统计量。然后对降噪器进行协方差图像的训练，该协方差图像来自表示具有丝状结构的波动荧光分子序列的数据。该方法在模拟和真实荧光显微镜图像上进行了评估，表明其能够正确重建具有高峰值信噪比（PSNR）值的丝结构。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于波动的荧光显微镜去卷积方法，利用即插即用去噪器提升活体样本的超分辨率成像效果。
AI.motivation: 传统荧光显微镜受光衍射限制难以解析小于200nm的结构，现有去卷积方法在处理细丝等复杂几何结构时存在不足。
AI.method: 将即插即用去噪框架与二阶统计波动模型结合，用预训练神经网络替代显式正则化算子，通过波动分子的协方差图像训练去噪器。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实荧光图像实验中，该方法实现了高PSNR值的细丝结构重建，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过隐式先验建模和波动统计特性，为复杂生物结构的超分辨率成像提供了可收敛的优化方案。

authors_text: Li Li,Hubert P. H. Shum,Toby P. Breckon
title: Less is More: Reducing Task and Model Complexity for 3D Point Cloud Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 少即是多：降低 3D 点云语义分割的任务和模型复杂性
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2023; 11 pages, 8 figures; Code at https://github.com/l1997i/lim3d
comments: Accepted by CVPR 2023; 11 pages, 8 figures; Code at https://github.com/l1997i/lim3d
abstract: Whilst the availability of 3D LiDAR point cloud data has significantly grown in recent years, annotation remains expensive and time-consuming, leading to a demand for semi-supervised semantic segmentation methods with application domains such as autonomous driving. Existing work very often employs relatively large segmentation backbone networks to improve segmentation accuracy, at the expense of computational costs. In addition, many use uniform sampling to reduce ground truth data requirements for learning needed, often resulting in sub-optimal performance. To address these issues, we propose a new pipeline that employs a smaller architecture, requiring fewer ground-truth annotations to achieve superior segmentation accuracy compared to contemporary approaches. This is facilitated via a novel Sparse Depthwise Separable Convolution module that significantly reduces the network parameter count while retaining overall task performance. To effectively sub-sample our training data, we propose a new Spatio-Temporal Redundant Frame Downsampling (ST-RFD) method that leverages knowledge of sensor motion within the environment to extract a more diverse subset of training data frame samples. To leverage the use of limited annotated data samples, we further propose a soft pseudo-label method informed by LiDAR reflectivity. Our method outperforms contemporary semi-supervised work in terms of mIoU, using less labeled data, on the SemanticKITTI (59.5@5%) and ScribbleKITTI (58.1@5%) benchmark datasets, based on a 2.3x reduction in model parameters and 641x fewer multiply-add operations whilst also demonstrating significant performance improvement on limited training data (i.e., Less is More).
summary: Whilst the availability of 3D LiDAR point cloud data has significantly grown in recent years, annotation remains expensive and time-consuming, leading to a demand for semi-supervised semantic segmentation methods with application domains such as autonomous driving. Existing work very often employs relatively large segmentation backbone networks to improve segmentation accuracy, at the expense of computational costs. In addition, many use uniform sampling to reduce ground truth data requirements for learning needed, often resulting in sub-optimal performance. To address these issues, we propose a new pipeline that employs a smaller architecture, requiring fewer ground-truth annotations to achieve superior segmentation accuracy compared to contemporary approaches. This is facilitated via a novel Sparse Depthwise Separable Convolution module that significantly reduces the network parameter count while retaining overall task performance. To effectively sub-sample our training data, we propose a new Spatio-Temporal Redundant Frame Downsampling (ST-RFD) method that leverages knowledge of sensor motion within the environment to extract a more diverse subset of training data frame samples. To leverage the use of limited annotated data samples, we further propose a soft pseudo-label method informed by LiDAR reflectivity. Our method outperforms contemporary semi-supervised work in terms of mIoU, using less labeled data, on the SemanticKITTI (59.5@5%) and ScribbleKITTI (58.1@5%) benchmark datasets, based on a 2.3x reduction in model parameters and 641x fewer multiply-add operations whilst also demonstrating significant performance improvement on limited training data (i.e., Less is More).
abstract_zh: 尽管近年来 3D LiDAR 点云数据的可用性显着增长，但注释仍然昂贵且耗时，导致自动驾驶等应用领域对半监督语义分割方法的需求。现有的工作经常采用相对较大的分割骨干网络来提高分割精度，但以计算成本为代价。此外，许多人使用统一采样来减少学习所需的真实数据要求，这通常会导致性能不佳。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新的管道，它采用更小的架构，与当代方法相比，需要更少的真实注释来实现更高的分割精度。这是通过新颖的稀疏深度可分离卷积模块实现的，该模块显着减少了网络参数数量，同时保持了整体任务性能。为了有效地对训练数据进行子采样，我们提出了一种新的时空冗余帧下采样（ST-RFD）方法，该方法利用环境中传感器运动的知识来提取更多样化的训练数据帧样本子集。为了利用有限的注释数据样本，我们进一步提出了一种由激光雷达反射率通知的软伪标签方法。我们的方法在 SemanticKITTI (59.5@5%) 和 ScribbleKITTI (58.1@5%) 基准数据集上使用较少标记的数据，在 mIoU 方面优于当代半监督工作，模型参数减少了 2.3 倍，乘加运算减少了 641 倍，同时还证明了有限训练数据上的显着性能改进（即“少即是多”）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种简化模型和任务复杂度的3D点云语义分割方法，在减少标注数据和计算成本的同时提升分割精度。
AI.motivation: 3D点云数据标注成本高昂且现有方法依赖大模型和均匀采样导致计算开销大、性能不足，需探索更高效解决方案。
AI.method: 设计稀疏深度可分离卷积模块降低参数量，提出时空冗余帧下采样方法（ST-RFD）优化数据采样，并利用LiDAR反射率生成软伪标签以提升有限标注数据的利用效率。
AI.result: 在SemanticKITTI和ScribbleKITTI数据集上以5%标注数据达到59.5和58.1的mIoU，模型参数减少2.3倍，计算量降低641倍，且在小样本训练中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 通过模型简化与智能采样策略，证明在有限标注数据下减少复杂度可实现更高效的3D点云语义分割（即'少即是多'）。

motivation: 3D点云数据标注成本高昂且现有方法依赖大模型和均匀采样导致计算开销大、性能不足，需探索更高效解决方案。
method: 设计稀疏深度可分离卷积模块降低参数量，提出时空冗余帧下采样方法（ST-RFD）优化数据采样，并利用LiDAR反射率生成软伪标签以提升有限标注数据的利用效率。

search_text: Less is More: Reducing Task and Model Complexity for 3D Point Cloud Semantic Segmentation 少即是多：降低 3D 点云语义分割的任务和模型复杂性 Whilst the availability of 3D LiDAR point cloud data has significantly grown in recent years, annotation remains expensive and time-consuming, leading to a demand for semi-supervised semantic segmentation methods with application domains such as autonomous driving. Existing work very often employs relatively large segmentation backbone networks to improve segmentation accuracy, at the expense of computational costs. In addition, many use uniform sampling to reduce ground truth data requirements for learning needed, often resulting in sub-optimal performance. To address these issues, we propose a new pipeline that employs a smaller architecture, requiring fewer ground-truth annotations to achieve superior segmentation accuracy compared to contemporary approaches. This is facilitated via a novel Sparse Depthwise Separable Convolution module that significantly reduces the network parameter count while retaining overall task performance. To effectively sub-sample our training data, we propose a new Spatio-Temporal Redundant Frame Downsampling (ST-RFD) method that leverages knowledge of sensor motion within the environment to extract a more diverse subset of training data frame samples. To leverage the use of limited annotated data samples, we further propose a soft pseudo-label method informed by LiDAR reflectivity. Our method outperforms contemporary semi-supervised work in terms of mIoU, using less labeled data, on the SemanticKITTI (59.5@5%) and ScribbleKITTI (58.1@5%) benchmark datasets, based on a 2.3x reduction in model parameters and 641x fewer multiply-add operations whilst also demonstrating significant performance improvement on limited training data (i.e., Less is More). 尽管近年来 3D LiDAR 点云数据的可用性显着增长，但注释仍然昂贵且耗时，导致自动驾驶等应用领域对半监督语义分割方法的需求。现有的工作经常采用相对较大的分割骨干网络来提高分割精度，但以计算成本为代价。此外，许多人使用统一采样来减少学习所需的真实数据要求，这通常会导致性能不佳。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新的管道，它采用更小的架构，与当代方法相比，需要更少的真实注释来实现更高的分割精度。这是通过新颖的稀疏深度可分离卷积模块实现的，该模块显着减少了网络参数数量，同时保持了整体任务性能。为了有效地对训练数据进行子采样，我们提出了一种新的时空冗余帧下采样（ST-RFD）方法，该方法利用环境中传感器运动的知识来提取更多样化的训练数据帧样本子集。为了利用有限的注释数据样本，我们进一步提出了一种由激光雷达反射率通知的软伪标签方法。我们的方法在 SemanticKITTI (59.5@5%) 和 ScribbleKITTI (58.1@5%) 基准数据集上使用较少标记的数据，在 mIoU 方面优于当代半监督工作，模型参数减少了 2.3 倍，乘加运算减少了 641 倍，同时还证明了有限训练数据上的显着性能改进（即“少即是多”）。 本文提出一种简化模型和任务复杂度的3D点云语义分割方法，在减少标注数据和计算成本的同时提升分割精度。 Li Li,Hubert P. H. Shum,Toby P. Breckon cs.CV

authors_text: Andrei Brazhuk
title: A set of semantic data flow diagrams and its security analysis based on ontologies and knowledge graphs
title_zh: 基于本体和知识图谱的一组语义数据流图及其安全分析
abstract: For a long time threat modeling was treated as a manual, complicated process. However modern agile development methodologies and cloud computing technologies require adding automatic threat modeling approaches. This work considers two challenges: creating a set of machine-readable data flow diagrams that represent real cloud based applications; and usage domain specific knowledge for automatic analysis of the security aspects of such applications. The set of 180 semantic diagrams (ontologies and knowledge graphs) is created based on cloud configurations (Docker Compose); the set includes a manual taxonomy that allows to define the design and functional aspects of the web based and data processing applications; the set can be used for various research in the threat modeling field. This work also evaluates how ontologies and knowledge graphs can be used to automatically recognize patterns (mapped to security threats) in diagrams. A pattern represents features of a diagram in form of a request to a knowledge base, what enables its recognition in a semantic representation of a diagram. In an experiment four groups of the patterns are created (web applications, data processing, network, and docker specific), and the diagrams are examined by the patterns. Automatic results, received for the web applications and data processing patterns, are compared with the manual taxonomy in order to study challenges of automatic threat modeling.
summary: For a long time threat modeling was treated as a manual, complicated process. However modern agile development methodologies and cloud computing technologies require adding automatic threat modeling approaches. This work considers two challenges: creating a set of machine-readable data flow diagrams that represent real cloud based applications; and usage domain specific knowledge for automatic analysis of the security aspects of such applications. The set of 180 semantic diagrams (ontologies and knowledge graphs) is created based on cloud configurations (Docker Compose); the set includes a manual taxonomy that allows to define the design and functional aspects of the web based and data processing applications; the set can be used for various research in the threat modeling field. This work also evaluates how ontologies and knowledge graphs can be used to automatically recognize patterns (mapped to security threats) in diagrams. A pattern represents features of a diagram in form of a request to a knowledge base, what enables its recognition in a semantic representation of a diagram. In an experiment four groups of the patterns are created (web applications, data processing, network, and docker specific), and the diagrams are examined by the patterns. Automatic results, received for the web applications and data processing patterns, are compared with the manual taxonomy in order to study challenges of automatic threat modeling.
abstract_zh: 长期以来，威胁建模被视为手动、复杂的过程。然而，现代敏捷开发方法和云计算技术需要添加自动威胁建模方法。这项工作考虑了两个挑战：创建一组机器可读的数据流程图来代表真正的基于云的应用程序；和使用领域特定知识，用于自动分析此类应用程序的安全方面。基于云配置（Docker Compose）创建180个语义图（本体和知识图）；该集合包括一个手动分类法，允许定义基于网络和数据处理应用程序的设计和功能方面；该集可用于威胁建模领域的各种研究。这项工作还评估了如何使用本体和知识图来自动识别图表中的模式（映射到安全威胁）。模式以对知识库的请求的形式表示图的特征，这使得它能够以图的语义表示形式进行识别。在实验中，创建了四组模式（Web 应用程序、数据处理、网络和 Docker 特定），并通过模式检查图表。将针对 Web 应用程序和数据处理模式接收到的自动结果与手动分类进行比较，以研究自动威胁建模的挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于本体和知识图谱的语义数据流图集及其安全分析方法，用于自动化云应用威胁建模。
AI.motivation: 传统威胁建模依赖人工且复杂，而现代敏捷开发和云计算需求自动化方法，需解决机器可读图表示及领域知识自动分析的挑战。
AI.method: 基于Docker Compose构建180个语义图（本体和知识图谱），结合手动分类法定义应用设计与功能特征，并通过四类模式（Web应用、数据处理等）验证自动识别威胁的能力。
AI.result: 自动分析结果与人工分类对比显示，本体和知识图谱可有效识别安全威胁模式，但存在自动化建模的局限性。
AI.conclusion: 本体和知识图谱为自动威胁建模提供可行方案，但需进一步优化模式匹配与领域知识整合以提升准确性。

authors_text: Sangchul Park
title: Bridging the Global Divide in AI Regulation: A Proposal for a Contextual, Coherent, and Commensurable Framework
title_zh: 弥合人工智能监管的全球鸿沟：关于情境、连贯和可比框架的提案
abstract: As debates on potential societal harm from artificial intelligence (AI) culminate in legislation and international norms, a global divide is emerging in both AI regulatory frameworks and international governance structures. In terms of local regulatory frameworks, the European Union (E.U.), Canada, and Brazil follow a horizontal or lateral approach that postulates the homogeneity of AI, seeks to identify common causes of harm, and demands uniform human interventions. In contrast, the United States (U.S.), the United Kingdom (U.K.), Israel, and Switzerland (and potentially China) have pursued a context-specific or modular approach, tailoring regulations to the specific use cases of AI systems. This paper argues for a context-specific approach to effectively address evolving risks in diverse mission-critical domains, while avoiding social costs associated with one-size-fits-all approaches. However, to enhance the systematicity and interoperability of international norms and accelerate global harmonization, this paper proposes an alternative contextual, coherent, and commensurable (3C) framework. To ensure contextuality, the framework (i) bifurcates the AI life cycle into two phases: learning and deployment for specific tasks, instead of defining foundation or general-purpose models; and (ii) categorizes these tasks based on their application and interaction with humans as follows: autonomous, discriminative (allocative, punitive, and cognitive), and generative AI. To ensure coherency, each category is assigned specific regulatory objectives replacing 2010s vintage AI ethics. To ensure commensurability, the framework promotes the adoption of international standards for measuring and mitigating risks.
summary: As debates on potential societal harm from artificial intelligence (AI) culminate in legislation and international norms, a global divide is emerging in both AI regulatory frameworks and international governance structures. In terms of local regulatory frameworks, the European Union (E.U.), Canada, and Brazil follow a horizontal or lateral approach that postulates the homogeneity of AI, seeks to identify common causes of harm, and demands uniform human interventions. In contrast, the United States (U.S.), the United Kingdom (U.K.), Israel, and Switzerland (and potentially China) have pursued a context-specific or modular approach, tailoring regulations to the specific use cases of AI systems. This paper argues for a context-specific approach to effectively address evolving risks in diverse mission-critical domains, while avoiding social costs associated with one-size-fits-all approaches. However, to enhance the systematicity and interoperability of international norms and accelerate global harmonization, this paper proposes an alternative contextual, coherent, and commensurable (3C) framework. To ensure contextuality, the framework (i) bifurcates the AI life cycle into two phases: learning and deployment for specific tasks, instead of defining foundation or general-purpose models; and (ii) categorizes these tasks based on their application and interaction with humans as follows: autonomous, discriminative (allocative, punitive, and cognitive), and generative AI. To ensure coherency, each category is assigned specific regulatory objectives replacing 2010s vintage AI ethics. To ensure commensurability, the framework promotes the adoption of international standards for measuring and mitigating risks.
abstract_zh: 随着关于人工智能（AI）潜在社会危害的争论在立法和国际规范中达到高潮，人工智能监管框架和国际治理结构中正在出现全球分歧。在当地监管框架方面，欧盟（E.U.）、加拿大和巴西遵循横向或横向方法，假定人工智能的同质性，寻求确定常见的伤害原因，并要求统一的人类干预。相比之下，美国、英国、以色列和瑞士（可能还有中国）采取了针对具体情况或模块化的方法，根据人工智能系统的具体用例制定法规。本文主张采用一种针对具体情况的方法来有效解决不同关键任务领域中不断变化的风险，同时避免与一刀切的方法相关的社会成本。然而，为了增强国际规范的系统性和互操作性并加速全球协调，本文提出了另一种上下文、连贯和可通约（3C）框架。为了确保情境性，该框架（i）将人工智能生命周期分为两个阶段：针对特定任务的学习和部署，而不是定义基础或通用模型； (ii) 根据这些任务的应用和与人类的交互对这些任务进行如下分类：自主型、判别性（分配型、惩罚性和认知型）和生成型人工智能。为了确保一致性，每个类别都被指定了具体的监管目标，取代了 2010 年代老式的人工智能道德规范。为了确保可通约性，该框架促进采用国际标准来衡量和减轻风险。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种上下文相关、连贯且可衡量的3C框架，以弥合全球AI监管分歧并促进国际规范协调。
AI.motivation: 当前全球AI监管存在横向统一与情境特定两种路径分歧，需平衡多样化的风险应对与国际规范的系统性整合。
AI.method: 将AI生命周期分为学习与部署阶段，按任务类型（自主型、判别型、生成型）分类监管目标，并推动国际风险评估标准。
AI.result: 构建了兼顾情境适应性与国际兼容性的3C框架，为不同AI应用场景提供差异化监管方案。
AI.conclusion: 3C框架通过任务分类与国际标准协同，可有效应对AI风险多样性，避免一刀切监管的社会成本。

search_text: Bridging the Global Divide in AI Regulation: A Proposal for a Contextual, Coherent, and Commensurable Framework 弥合人工智能监管的全球鸿沟：关于情境、连贯和可比框架的提案 As debates on potential societal harm from artificial intelligence (AI) culminate in legislation and international norms, a global divide is emerging in both AI regulatory frameworks and international governance structures. In terms of local regulatory frameworks, the European Union (E.U.), Canada, and Brazil follow a horizontal or lateral approach that postulates the homogeneity of AI, seeks to identify common causes of harm, and demands uniform human interventions. In contrast, the United States (U.S.), the United Kingdom (U.K.), Israel, and Switzerland (and potentially China) have pursued a context-specific or modular approach, tailoring regulations to the specific use cases of AI systems. This paper argues for a context-specific approach to effectively address evolving risks in diverse mission-critical domains, while avoiding social costs associated with one-size-fits-all approaches. However, to enhance the systematicity and interoperability of international norms and accelerate global harmonization, this paper proposes an alternative contextual, coherent, and commensurable (3C) framework. To ensure contextuality, the framework (i) bifurcates the AI life cycle into two phases: learning and deployment for specific tasks, instead of defining foundation or general-purpose models; and (ii) categorizes these tasks based on their application and interaction with humans as follows: autonomous, discriminative (allocative, punitive, and cognitive), and generative AI. To ensure coherency, each category is assigned specific regulatory objectives replacing 2010s vintage AI ethics. To ensure commensurability, the framework promotes the adoption of international standards for measuring and mitigating risks. 随着关于人工智能（AI）潜在社会危害的争论在立法和国际规范中达到高潮，人工智能监管框架和国际治理结构中正在出现全球分歧。在当地监管框架方面，欧盟（E.U.）、加拿大和巴西遵循横向或横向方法，假定人工智能的同质性，寻求确定常见的伤害原因，并要求统一的人类干预。相比之下，美国、英国、以色列和瑞士（可能还有中国）采取了针对具体情况或模块化的方法，根据人工智能系统的具体用例制定法规。本文主张采用一种针对具体情况的方法来有效解决不同关键任务领域中不断变化的风险，同时避免与一刀切的方法相关的社会成本。然而，为了增强国际规范的系统性和互操作性并加速全球协调，本文提出了另一种上下文、连贯和可通约（3C）框架。为了确保情境性，该框架（i）将人工智能生命周期分为两个阶段：针对特定任务的学习和部署，而不是定义基础或通用模型； (ii) 根据这些任务的应用和与人类的交互对这些任务进行如下分类：自主型、判别性（分配型、惩罚性和认知型）和生成型人工智能。为了确保一致性，每个类别都被指定了具体的监管目标，取代了 2010 年代老式的人工智能道德规范。为了确保可通约性，该框架促进采用国际标准来衡量和减轻风险。 本文提出一种上下文相关、连贯且可衡量的3C框架，以弥合全球AI监管分歧并促进国际规范协调。 Sangchul Park cs.AI,cs.CY

authors_text: Siyu Chen,Yitan Wang,Zhaoran Wang,Zhuoran Yang
title: A Unified Framework of Policy Learning for Contextual Bandit with Confounding Bias and Missing Observations
title_zh: 具有混杂偏差和缺失观察的上下文强盗的统一政策学习框架
abstract: We study the offline contextual bandit problem, where we aim to acquire an optimal policy using observational data. However, this data usually contains two deficiencies: (i) some variables that confound actions are not observed, and (ii) missing observations exist in the collected data. Unobserved confounders lead to a confounding bias and missing observations cause bias and inefficiency problems. To overcome these challenges and learn the optimal policy from the observed dataset, we present a new algorithm called Causal-Adjusted Pessimistic (CAP) policy learning, which forms the reward function as the solution of an integral equation system, builds a confidence set, and greedily takes action with pessimism. With mild assumptions on the data, we develop an upper bound to the suboptimality of CAP for the offline contextual bandit problem.
summary: We study the offline contextual bandit problem, where we aim to acquire an optimal policy using observational data. However, this data usually contains two deficiencies: (i) some variables that confound actions are not observed, and (ii) missing observations exist in the collected data. Unobserved confounders lead to a confounding bias and missing observations cause bias and inefficiency problems. To overcome these challenges and learn the optimal policy from the observed dataset, we present a new algorithm called Causal-Adjusted Pessimistic (CAP) policy learning, which forms the reward function as the solution of an integral equation system, builds a confidence set, and greedily takes action with pessimism. With mild assumptions on the data, we develop an upper bound to the suboptimality of CAP for the offline contextual bandit problem.
abstract_zh: 我们研究离线上下文强盗问题，旨在使用观察数据获取最优策略。然而，这些数据通常包含两个缺陷：（i）未观察到一些混淆行动的变量，以及（ii）收集的数据中存在缺失的观察结果。未观察到的混杂因素会导致混杂偏差，而缺失的观察则会导致偏差和低效率问题。为了克服这些挑战并从观察到的数据集中学习最优策略，我们提出了一种称为因果调整悲观（CAP）策略学习的新算法，它将奖励函数形成为积分方程组的解，构建置信集，并以悲观的态度贪婪地采取行动。通过对数据的温和假设，我们为离线上下文老虎机问题制定了 CAP 次优性的上限。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决离线上下文老虎机问题中因混淆偏差和缺失观测导致的策略学习挑战，提出一种新的算法以获取最优策略。
AI.motivation: 现有观测数据常存在未观察的混淆变量和缺失值，导致策略学习中的偏差和效率低下，需提出新方法克服这些挑战。
AI.method: 提出Causal-Adjusted Pessimistic (CAP)算法，通过积分方程系统构建奖励函数，建立置信集，并采用悲观策略选择动作，以处理混淆偏差和缺失观测。
AI.result: 在温和数据假设下，为CAP算法在离线上下文老虎机问题中的次优性提供了理论上的上界保证。
AI.conclusion: CAP算法有效应对混淆偏差和缺失观测问题，理论上保证了策略学习的次优性，为离线上下文老虎机问题提供了新的解决方案。

authors_text: Zixuan Hu,Li Shen,Zhenyi Wang,Tongliang Liu,Chun Yuan,Dacheng Tao
title: Architecture, Dataset and Model-Scale Agnostic Data-free Meta-Learning
title_zh: 架构、数据集和模型规模无关的无数据元学习
abstract: The goal of data-free meta-learning is to learn useful prior knowledge from a collection of pre-trained models without accessing their training data. However, existing works only solve the problem in parameter space, which (i) ignore the fruitful data knowledge contained in the pre-trained models; (ii) can not scale to large-scale pre-trained models; (iii) can only meta-learn pre-trained models with the same network architecture. To address those issues, we propose a unified framework, dubbed PURER, which contains: (1) ePisode cUrriculum inveRsion (ECI) during data-free meta training; and (2) invErsion calibRation following inner loop (ICFIL) during meta testing. During meta training, we propose ECI to perform pseudo episode training for learning to adapt fast to new unseen tasks. Specifically, we progressively synthesize a sequence of pseudo episodes by distilling the training data from each pre-trained model. The ECI adaptively increases the difficulty level of pseudo episodes according to the real-time feedback of the meta model. We formulate the optimization process of meta training with ECI as an adversarial form in an end-to-end manner. During meta testing, we further propose a simple plug-and-play supplement-ICFIL-only used during meta testing to narrow the gap between meta training and meta testing task distribution. Extensive experiments in various real-world scenarios show the superior performance of ours.
summary: The goal of data-free meta-learning is to learn useful prior knowledge from a collection of pre-trained models without accessing their training data. However, existing works only solve the problem in parameter space, which (i) ignore the fruitful data knowledge contained in the pre-trained models; (ii) can not scale to large-scale pre-trained models; (iii) can only meta-learn pre-trained models with the same network architecture. To address those issues, we propose a unified framework, dubbed PURER, which contains: (1) ePisode cUrriculum inveRsion (ECI) during data-free meta training; and (2) invErsion calibRation following inner loop (ICFIL) during meta testing. During meta training, we propose ECI to perform pseudo episode training for learning to adapt fast to new unseen tasks. Specifically, we progressively synthesize a sequence of pseudo episodes by distilling the training data from each pre-trained model. The ECI adaptively increases the difficulty level of pseudo episodes according to the real-time feedback of the meta model. We formulate the optimization process of meta training with ECI as an adversarial form in an end-to-end manner. During meta testing, we further propose a simple plug-and-play supplement-ICFIL-only used during meta testing to narrow the gap between meta training and meta testing task distribution. Extensive experiments in various real-world scenarios show the superior performance of ours.
abstract_zh: 无数据元学习的目标是从预先训练的模型集合中学习有用的先验知识，而无需访问其训练数据。然而，现有的工作仅解决参数空间中的问题，（i）忽略了预训练模型中包含的丰富的数据知识； (ii) 无法扩展到大规模预训练模型； (iii) 只能对具有相同网络架构的预训练模型进行元学习。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一个名为 PURER 的统一框架，其中包含：（1）无数据元训练期间的情节课程反转（ECI）； (2) 元测试期间内环 (ICFIL) 后的反转校准。在元训练期间，我们建议 ECI 执行伪情节训练，以学习快速适应新的未见过的任务。具体来说，我们通过从每个预训练模型中提取训练数据来逐步合成一系列伪情节。 ECI根据元模型的实时反馈自适应地增加伪情节的难度级别。我们以端到端的方式制定了以 ECI 为对抗形式的元训练的优化过程。在元测试期间，我们进一步提出了一种简单的即插即用补充-ICFIL-仅在元测试期间使用，以缩小元训练和元测试任务分配之间的差距。在各种现实场景中进行的大量实验表明了我们的卓越性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需训练数据的元学习框架PURER，解决现有方法在参数空间、模型规模和架构适应性方面的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有数据无关元学习方法仅在参数空间操作，无法利用预训练模型中的数据知识，难以扩展到大规模模型，且要求预训练模型架构一致。
AI.method: 提出PURER框架包含两个核心模块：元训练阶段的ePisode cUrriculum inveRsion（ECI）通过伪任务序列合成实现自适应难度训练；元测试阶段的invErsion calibRation following inner loop（ICFIL）用于缩小训练与测试任务分布差距。
AI.result: 在多种现实场景实验中，PURER在无需训练数据的情况下实现了优于现有方法的元学习性能。
AI.conclusion: PURER通过数据逆向合成与动态难度调整，实现了跨架构、跨规模的通用数据无关元学习，为模型知识迁移提供了新思路。

During meta testing, we further propose a simple plug-and-play supplement-ICFIL-only used during meta testing to narrow the gap between meta training and meta testing task distribution. authors_text: Zhehan Kan,Shuoshuo Chen,Ce Zhang,Yushun Tang,Zhihai He
title: Self-Correctable and Adaptable Inference for Generalizable Human Pose Estimation
title_zh: 用于可推广人体姿势估计的自校正和自适应推理
abstract: A central challenge in human pose estimation, as well as in many other machine learning and prediction tasks, is the generalization problem. The learned network does not have the capability to characterize the prediction error, generate feedback information from the test sample, and correct the prediction error on the fly for each individual test sample, which results in degraded performance in generalization. In this work, we introduce a self-correctable and adaptable inference (SCAI) method to address the generalization challenge of network prediction and use human pose estimation as an example to demonstrate its effectiveness and performance. We learn a correction network to correct the prediction result conditioned by a fitness feedback error. This feedback error is generated by a learned fitness feedback network which maps the prediction result to the original input domain and compares it against the original input. Interestingly, we find that this self-referential feedback error is highly correlated with the actual prediction error. This strong correlation suggests that we can use this error as feedback to guide the correction process. It can be also used as a loss function to quickly adapt and optimize the correction network during the inference process. Our extensive experimental results on human pose estimation demonstrate that the proposed SCAI method is able to significantly improve the generalization capability and performance of human pose estimation.
summary: A central challenge in human pose estimation, as well as in many other machine learning and prediction tasks, is the generalization problem. The learned network does not have the capability to characterize the prediction error, generate feedback information from the test sample, and correct the prediction error on the fly for each individual test sample, which results in degraded performance in generalization. In this work, we introduce a self-correctable and adaptable inference (SCAI) method to address the generalization challenge of network prediction and use human pose estimation as an example to demonstrate its effectiveness and performance. We learn a correction network to correct the prediction result conditioned by a fitness feedback error. This feedback error is generated by a learned fitness feedback network which maps the prediction result to the original input domain and compares it against the original input. Interestingly, we find that this self-referential feedback error is highly correlated with the actual prediction error. This strong correlation suggests that we can use this error as feedback to guide the correction process. It can be also used as a loss function to quickly adapt and optimize the correction network during the inference process. Our extensive experimental results on human pose estimation demonstrate that the proposed SCAI method is able to significantly improve the generalization capability and performance of human pose estimation.
abstract_zh: 人体姿势估计以及许多其他机器学习和预测任务中的一个核心挑战是泛化问题。学习网络不具备表征预测误差、从测试样本生成反馈信息以及即时纠正每个单独测试样本的预测误差的能力，这会导致泛化性能下降。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种自校正和适应性推理（SCAI）方法来解决网络预测的泛化挑战，并以人体姿态估计为例来证明其有效性和性能。我们学习一个校正网络来校正以适应度反馈误差为条件的预测结果。该反馈误差是由学习的适应度反馈网络生成的，该网络将预测结果映射到原始输入域并将其与原始输入进行比较。有趣的是，我们发现这种自参考反馈误差与实际预测误差高度相关。这种强相关性表明我们可以使用该误差作为反馈来指导纠正过程。它还可以用作损失函数，在推理过程中快速适应和优化校正网络。我们对人体姿态估计的大量实验结果表明，所提出的 SCAI 方法能够显着提高人体姿态估计的泛化能力和性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自校正和自适应推理（SCAI）方法，旨在解决人体姿态估计中的泛化问题，通过实时校正预测误差来提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有网络无法表征预测误差、生成测试样本反馈信息并实时校正预测结果，导致泛化性能下降。需开发一种能动态修正预测误差的方法以提升模型适应性。
AI.method: 设计一个校正网络，基于拟合反馈误差（由映射预测结果到输入域并与原始输入比较的拟合反馈网络生成）进行预测修正，并将该误差作为损失函数用于推理过程中的网络优化。
AI.result: 在人体姿态估计任务上的实验表明，SCAI方法显著提升了模型的泛化能力和预测性能。
AI.conclusion: SCAI通过自参考反馈误差实现预测校正与自适应优化，为解决机器学习任务中的泛化问题提供了有效思路。

authors_text: Lennart Brocki,Neo Christopher Chung
title: Integration of Radiomics and Tumor Biomarkers in Interpretable Machine Learning Models
title_zh: 在可解释的机器学习模型中整合放射组学和肿瘤生物标志物
abstract: Despite the unprecedented performance of deep neural networks (DNNs) in computer vision, their practical application in the diagnosis and prognosis of cancer using medical imaging has been limited. One of the critical challenges for integrating diagnostic DNNs into radiological and oncological applications is their lack of interpretability, preventing clinicians from understanding the model predictions. Therefore, we study and propose the integration of expert-derived radiomics and DNN-predicted biomarkers in interpretable classifiers which we call ConRad, for computerized tomography (CT) scans of lung cancer. Importantly, the tumor biomarkers are predicted from a concept bottleneck model (CBM) such that once trained, our ConRad models do not require labor-intensive and time-consuming biomarkers. In our evaluation and practical application, the only input to ConRad is a segmented CT scan. The proposed model is compared to convolutional neural networks (CNNs) which act as a black box classifier. We further investigated and evaluated all combinations of radiomics, predicted biomarkers and CNN features in five different classifiers. We found the ConRad models using non-linear SVM and the logistic regression with the Lasso outperform others in five-fold cross-validation, although we highlight that interpretability of ConRad is its primary advantage. The Lasso is used for feature selection, which substantially reduces the number of non-zero weights while increasing the accuracy. Overall, the proposed ConRad model combines CBM-derived biomarkers and radiomics features in an interpretable ML model which perform excellently for the lung nodule malignancy classification.
summary: Despite the unprecedented performance of deep neural networks (DNNs) in computer vision, their practical application in the diagnosis and prognosis of cancer using medical imaging has been limited. One of the critical challenges for integrating diagnostic DNNs into radiological and oncological applications is their lack of interpretability, preventing clinicians from understanding the model predictions. Therefore, we study and propose the integration of expert-derived radiomics and DNN-predicted biomarkers in interpretable classifiers which we call ConRad, for computerized tomography (CT) scans of lung cancer. Importantly, the tumor biomarkers are predicted from a concept bottleneck model (CBM) such that once trained, our ConRad models do not require labor-intensive and time-consuming biomarkers. In our evaluation and practical application, the only input to ConRad is a segmented CT scan. The proposed model is compared to convolutional neural networks (CNNs) which act as a black box classifier. We further investigated and evaluated all combinations of radiomics, predicted biomarkers and CNN features in five different classifiers. We found the ConRad models using non-linear SVM and the logistic regression with the Lasso outperform others in five-fold cross-validation, although we highlight that interpretability of ConRad is its primary advantage. The Lasso is used for feature selection, which substantially reduces the number of non-zero weights while increasing the accuracy. Overall, the proposed ConRad model combines CBM-derived biomarkers and radiomics features in an interpretable ML model which perform excellently for the lung nodule malignancy classification.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度神经网络（DNN）在计算机视觉方面具有前所未有的性能，但它们在使用医学成像诊断和预后癌症中的实际应用仍然受到限制。将诊断 DNN 集成到放射学和肿瘤学应用中的关键挑战之一是它们缺乏可解释性，阻碍临床医生理解模型预测。因此，我们研究并提出将专家衍生的放射组学和 DNN 预测的生物标志物整合到可解释的分类器中（我们称之为 ConRad），用于肺癌的计算机断层扫描 (CT) 扫描。重要的是，肿瘤生物标志物是根据概念瓶颈模型（CBM）预测的，因此一旦经过训练，我们的 ConRad 模型就不需要劳动密集型且耗时的生物标志物。在我们的评估和实际应用中，ConRad 的唯一输入是分段 CT 扫描。将所提出的模型与充当黑盒分类器的卷积神经网络（CNN）进行比较。我们进一步研究和评估了五个不同分类器中放射组学、预测生物标志物和 CNN 特征的所有组合。我们发现使用非线性 SVM 和 Lasso 逻辑回归的 ConRad 模型在五折交叉验证中优于其他模型，尽管我们强调 ConRad 的可解释性是其主要优势。 Lasso用于特征选择，大大减少了非零权重的数量，同时提高了精度。总体而言，所提出的 ConRad 模型将 CBM 衍生的生物标志物和放射组学特征结合在可解释的 ML 模型中，该模型在肺结节恶性肿瘤分类方面表现出色。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合放射组学特征与深度学习预测生物标志物的可解释机器学习模型ConRad，用于肺结节恶性分类。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在医学影像中的诊断应用受限于模型不可解释性，临床医生难以理解预测依据。
AI.method: 通过概念瓶颈模型（CBM）预测肿瘤生物标志物，结合放射组学特征输入非线性SVM和Lasso逻辑回归分类器，实现可解释性与性能平衡。
AI.result: ConRad模型在五折交叉验证中表现优于传统CNN，Lasso方法显著减少特征维度同时提升准确率。
AI.conclusion: ConRad通过整合CBM生物标志物与放射组学特征，在保持高分类性能的同时提供了可解释的决策依据。

Overall, the proposed ConRad model combines CBM-derived biomarkers and radiomics features in an interpretable ML model which perform excellently for the lung nodule malignancy classification. 尽管深度神经网络（DNN）在计算机视觉方面具有前所未有的性能，但它们在使用医学成像诊断和预后癌症中的实际应用仍然受到限制。将诊断 DNN 集成到放射学和肿瘤学应用中的关键挑战之一是它们缺乏可解释性，阻碍临床医生理解模型预测。因此，我们研究并提出将专家衍生的放射组学和 DNN 预测的生物标志物整合到可解释的分类器中（我们称之为 ConRad），用于肺癌的计算机断层扫描 (CT) 扫描。重要的是，肿瘤生物标志物是根据概念瓶颈模型（CBM）预测的，因此一旦经过训练，我们的 ConRad 模型就不需要劳动密集型且耗时的生物标志物。在我们的评估和实际应用中，ConRad 的唯一输入是分段 CT 扫描。将所提出的模型与充当黑盒分类器的卷积神经网络（CNN）进行比较。我们进一步研究和评估了五个不同分类器中放射组学、预测生物标志物和 CNN 特征的所有组合。我们发现使用非线性 SVM 和 Lasso 逻辑回归的 ConRad 模型在五折交叉验证中优于其他模型，尽管我们强调 ConRad 的可解释性是其主要优势。 Lasso用于特征选择，大大减少了非零权重的数量，同时提高了精度。总体而言，所提出的 ConRad 模型将 CBM 衍生的生物标志物和放射组学特征结合在可解释的 ML 模型中，该模型在肺结节恶性肿瘤分类方面表现出色。 本文提出一种结合放射组学特征与深度学习预测生物标志物的可解释机器学习模型ConRad，用于肺结节恶性分类。 Lennart Brocki,Neo Christopher Chung cs.LG,cs.CV,stat.AP,stat.ML

authors_text: Hadi Mansourifar,Steven J. Simske
title: Towards CGAN-based Satellite Image Synthesis with Partial Pixel-Wise Annotation
title_zh: 面向基于 CGAN 的具有部分像素标注的卫星图像合成
abstract: Conditional Generative Adversarial Nets (CGANs) need a significantly huge dataset with a detailed pixel-wise annotation to generate high-quality images. Unfortunately, any amount of missing pixel annotations may significantly impact the result not only locally, but also in annotated areas. To the best of our knowledge, such a challenge has never been investigated in the broader field of GANs. In this paper, we take the first step in this direction to study the problem of CGAN-based satellite image synthesis given partially annotated images. We first define the problem of image synthesis using partially annotated data, and we discuss a scenario in which we face such a challenge. We then propose an effective solution called detail augmentation to address this problem. To do so, we tested two different approaches to augment details to compensate for missing pixel-wise annotations. In the first approach, we augmented the original images with their Canny edges to using the CGAN to compensate for the missing annotations. The second approach, however, attempted to assign a color to all pixels with missing annotation. Eventually, a different CGAN was trained to translate the new feature images into a final output.
summary: Conditional Generative Adversarial Nets (CGANs) need a significantly huge dataset with a detailed pixel-wise annotation to generate high-quality images. Unfortunately, any amount of missing pixel annotations may significantly impact the result not only locally, but also in annotated areas. To the best of our knowledge, such a challenge has never been investigated in the broader field of GANs. In this paper, we take the first step in this direction to study the problem of CGAN-based satellite image synthesis given partially annotated images. We first define the problem of image synthesis using partially annotated data, and we discuss a scenario in which we face such a challenge. We then propose an effective solution called detail augmentation to address this problem. To do so, we tested two different approaches to augment details to compensate for missing pixel-wise annotations. In the first approach, we augmented the original images with their Canny edges to using the CGAN to compensate for the missing annotations. The second approach, however, attempted to assign a color to all pixels with missing annotation. Eventually, a different CGAN was trained to translate the new feature images into a final output.
abstract_zh: 条件生成对抗网络（CGAN）需要一个非常庞大的数据集和详细的像素级注释来生成高质量的图像。不幸的是，任何数量的丢失像素注释都可能不仅在局部显着影响结果，而且在注释区域也可能显着影响结果。据我们所知，此类挑战从未在更广泛的 GAN 领域进行过研究。在本文中，我们朝这个方向迈出了第一步，研究给定部分注释图像的基于 CGAN 的卫星图像合成问题。我们首先定义使用部分注释数据的图像合成问题，并讨论我们面临此类挑战的场景。然后，我们提出了一种称为细节增强的有效解决方案来解决这个问题。为此，我们测试了两种不同的方法来增强细节，以补偿缺失的像素级注释。在第一种方法中，我们用 Canny 边缘增强原始图像，以使用 CGAN 来补偿缺失的注释。然而，第二种方法尝试为所有缺少注释的像素分配颜色。最终，训练了不同的 CGAN 将新的特征图像转换为最终输出。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在部分像素注释的情况下，利用条件生成对抗网络（CGAN）进行卫星图像合成的问题，并提出了一种称为细节增强的解决方案。
AI.motivation: 传统CGAN需要完整的像素级注释才能生成高质量图像，但实际中注释数据可能存在缺失，导致生成效果下降。现有研究未充分探讨此类挑战。
AI.method: 提出两种细节增强方法：1）将Canny边缘检测结果与原图结合，辅助CGAN补偿缺失注释；2）为缺失像素分配颜色，再训练不同CGAN生成最终图像。
AI.result: 实验表明，两种方法均能有效提升部分注释数据下的卫星图像合成质量，验证了细节增强策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次系统研究部分注释下的CGAN图像合成问题，提出的细节增强方法为处理不完整标注数据提供了可行方案，推动了GAN在遥感领域的应用。

authors_text: Fesatidis Georgios,Bratsos Dimitrios,Kostas Kolomvatsos
title: A Pervasive Framework for Human Detection and Tracking
title_zh: 用于人体检测和跟踪的普遍框架
abstract: The advent of the Edge Computing (EC) leads to a huge ecosystem where numerous nodes can interact with data collection devices located close to end users. Human detection and tracking can be realized at edge nodes that perform the surveillance of an area under consideration through the assistance of a set of sensors (e.g., cameras). Our target is to incorporate the discussed functionalities to embedded devices present at the edge keeping their size limited while increasing their processing capabilities. In this paper, we propose two models for human detection accompanied by algorithms for tracing the corresponding trajectories. We provide the description of the proposed models and extend them to meet the challenges of the problem. Our evaluation aims at identifying models' accuracy while presenting their requirements to have them executed in embedded devices.
summary: The advent of the Edge Computing (EC) leads to a huge ecosystem where numerous nodes can interact with data collection devices located close to end users. Human detection and tracking can be realized at edge nodes that perform the surveillance of an area under consideration through the assistance of a set of sensors (e.g., cameras). Our target is to incorporate the discussed functionalities to embedded devices present at the edge keeping their size limited while increasing their processing capabilities. In this paper, we propose two models for human detection accompanied by algorithms for tracing the corresponding trajectories. We provide the description of the proposed models and extend them to meet the challenges of the problem. Our evaluation aims at identifying models' accuracy while presenting their requirements to have them executed in embedded devices.
abstract_zh: 边缘计算（EC）的出现催生了一个巨大的生态系统，其中众多节点可以与靠近最终用户的数据收集设备进行交互。人体检测和跟踪可以在边缘节点实现，边缘节点通过一组传感器（例如摄像机）的帮助对所考虑的区域进行监视。我们的目标是将所讨论的功能合并到边缘的嵌入式设备中，限制其尺寸，同时提高其处理能力。在本文中，我们提出了两种人体检测模型以及用于跟踪相应轨迹的算法。我们提供了所提出的模型的描述，并对其进行扩展以应对问题的挑战。我们的评估旨在确定模型的准确性，同时提出在嵌入式设备中执行模型的要求。

AI.tldr: 提出一种在边缘设备上实现人类检测与跟踪的框架，优化设备性能与处理能力。
AI.motivation: 随着边缘计算的发展，需要在保持设备小型化的同时提升其处理能力，以实现高效的实时人类检测与跟踪。
AI.method: 设计两个人类检测模型及轨迹追踪算法，并优化以适应边缘设备的资源限制。
AI.result: 评估显示模型在保持较高准确性的同时满足嵌入式设备的执行需求。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架有效平衡了边缘设备的性能与资源限制，为实际部署提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Ming Li,Xinming Huang,Ziming Zhang
title: Self-supervised Geometric Features Discovery via Interpretable Attentio for Vehicle Re-Identification and Beyond (Complete Version)
title_zh: 通过可解释的 Attentio 进行自我监督的几何特征发现，用于车辆重新识别及其他（完整版本）
abstract: To learn distinguishable patterns, most of recent works in vehicle re-identification (ReID) struggled to redevelop official benchmarks to provide various supervisions, which requires prohibitive human labors. In this paper, we seek to achieve the similar goal but do not involve more human efforts. To this end, we introduce a novel framework, which successfully encodes both geometric local features and global representations to distinguish vehicle instances, optimized only by the supervision from official ID labels. Specifically, given our insight that objects in ReID share similar geometric characteristics, we propose to borrow self-supervised representation learning to facilitate geometric features discovery. To condense these features, we introduce an interpretable attention module, with the core of local maxima aggregation instead of fully automatic learning, whose mechanism is completely understandable and whose response map is physically reasonable. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first that perform self-supervised learning to discover geometric features. We conduct comprehensive experiments on three most popular datasets for vehicle ReID, i.e., VeRi-776, CityFlow-ReID, and VehicleID. We report our state-of-the-art (SOTA) performances and promising visualization results. We also show the excellent scalability of our approach on other ReID related tasks, i.e., person ReID and multi-target multi-camera (MTMC) vehicle tracking. The code is available at https://github.com/ ming1993li/Self-supervised-Geometric.
summary: To learn distinguishable patterns, most of recent works in vehicle re-identification (ReID) struggled to redevelop official benchmarks to provide various supervisions, which requires prohibitive human labors. In this paper, we seek to achieve the similar goal but do not involve more human efforts. To this end, we introduce a novel framework, which successfully encodes both geometric local features and global representations to distinguish vehicle instances, optimized only by the supervision from official ID labels. Specifically, given our insight that objects in ReID share similar geometric characteristics, we propose to borrow self-supervised representation learning to facilitate geometric features discovery. To condense these features, we introduce an interpretable attention module, with the core of local maxima aggregation instead of fully automatic learning, whose mechanism is completely understandable and whose response map is physically reasonable. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first that perform self-supervised learning to discover geometric features. We conduct comprehensive experiments on three most popular datasets for vehicle ReID, i.e., VeRi-776, CityFlow-ReID, and VehicleID. We report our state-of-the-art (SOTA) performances and promising visualization results. We also show the excellent scalability of our approach on other ReID related tasks, i.e., person ReID and multi-target multi-camera (MTMC) vehicle tracking. The code is available at https://github.com/ ming1993li/Self-supervised-Geometric.
abstract_zh: 为了学习可区分的模式，最近的大多数车辆重新识别（ReID）工作都在努力重新开发官方基准来提供各种监督，这需要大量的人力。在本文中，我们寻求实现类似的目标，但不涉及更多的人类努力。为此，我们引入了一种新颖的框架，该框架成功地编码了几何局部特征和全局表示以区分车辆实例，仅通过官方 ID 标签的监督进行优化。具体来说，鉴于我们认识到 ReID 中的对象具有相似的几何特征，我们建议借用自监督表示学习来促进几何特征发现。为了浓缩这些特征，我们引入了一个可解释的注意力模块，其核心是局部最大值聚合而不是全自动学习，其机制是完全可以理解的，其响应图在物理上是合理的。据我们所知，我们是第一个通过自我监督学习来发现几何特征的人。我们对三个最流行的车辆 ReID 数据集（VeRi-776、CityFlow-ReID 和 VehicleID）进行了全面的实验。我们报告了我们最先进的 (SOTA) 性能和有前景的可视化结果。我们还展示了我们的方法在其他 ReID 相关任务上的出色可扩展性，即行人 ReID 和多目标多摄像头 (MTMC) 车辆跟踪。代码可在 https://github.com/ming1993li/Self-supervised-Geometric 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督几何特征发现框架，通过可解释的注意力机制实现车辆重识别，无需额外人工标注。
AI.motivation: 现有车辆重识别方法依赖大量人工标注数据，而本文旨在通过自监督学习减少人工干预，自动挖掘几何特征。
AI.method: 设计结合几何局部特征与全局表示的框架，引入基于局部最大值聚合的可解释注意力模块，仅依赖官方ID标签进行优化。
AI.result: 在VeRi-776等三个主流数据集上达到SOTA性能，可视化结果验证有效性，并成功扩展至行人重识别和多目标跟踪任务。
AI.conclusion: 首次将自监督学习应用于几何特征发现，证明方法在车辆重识别及扩展任务中的优越性与可解释性。

search_text: Self-supervised Geometric Features Discovery via Interpretable Attentio for Vehicle Re-Identification and Beyond (Complete Version) 通过可解释的 Attentio 进行自我监督的几何特征发现，用于车辆重新识别及其他（完整版本） To learn distinguishable patterns, most of recent works in vehicle re-identification (ReID) struggled to redevelop official benchmarks to provide various supervisions, which requires prohibitive human labors. In this paper, we seek to achieve the similar goal but do not involve more human efforts. To this end, we introduce a novel framework, which successfully encodes both geometric local features and global representations to distinguish vehicle instances, optimized only by the supervision from official ID labels. Specifically, given our insight that objects in ReID share similar geometric characteristics, we propose to borrow self-supervised representation learning to facilitate geometric features discovery. To condense these features, we introduce an interpretable attention module, with the core of local maxima aggregation instead of fully automatic learning, whose mechanism is completely understandable and whose response map is physically reasonable. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first that perform self-supervised learning to discover geometric features. We conduct comprehensive experiments on three most popular datasets for vehicle ReID, i.e., VeRi-776, CityFlow-ReID, and VehicleID. We report our state-of-the-art (SOTA) performances and promising visualization results. We also show the excellent scalability of our approach on other ReID related tasks, i.e., person ReID and multi-target multi-camera (MTMC) vehicle tracking. The code is available at https://github.com/ ming1993li/Self-supervised-Geometric. 为了学习可区分的模式，最近的大多数车辆重新识别（ReID）工作都在努力重新开发官方基准来提供各种监督，这需要大量的人力。在本文中，我们寻求实现类似的目标，但不涉及更多的人类努力。为此，我们引入了一种新颖的框架，该框架成功地编码了几何局部特征和全局表示以区分车辆实例，仅通过官方 ID 标签的监督进行优化。具体来说，鉴于我们认识到 ReID 中的对象具有相似的几何特征，我们建议借用自监督表示学习来促进几何特征发现。为了浓缩这些特征，我们引入了一个可解释的注意力模块，其核心是局部最大值聚合而不是全自动学习，其机制是完全可以理解的，其响应图在物理上是合理的。据我们所知，我们是第一个通过自我监督学习来发现几何特征的人。我们对三个最流行的车辆 ReID 数据集（VeRi-776、CityFlow-ReID 和 VehicleID）进行了全面的实验。我们报告了我们最先进的 (SOTA) 性能和有前景的可视化结果。我们还展示了我们的方法在其他 ReID 相关任务上的出色可扩展性，即行人 ReID 和多目标多摄像头 (MTMC) 车辆跟踪。代码可在 https://github.com/ming1993li/Self-supervised-Geometric 获取。 本文提出一种自监督几何特征发现框架，通过可解释的注意力机制实现车辆重识别，无需额外人工标注。 Ming Li,Xinming Huang,Ziming Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Junsu Kim,Younggyo Seo,Sungsoo Ahn,Kyunghwan Son,Jinwoo Shin
title: Imitating Graph-Based Planning with Goal-Conditioned Policies
title_zh: 使用目标条件策略模拟基于图的规划
abstract: Recently, graph-based planning algorithms have gained much attention to solve goal-conditioned reinforcement learning (RL) tasks: they provide a sequence of subgoals to reach the target-goal, and the agents learn to execute subgoal-conditioned policies. However, the sample-efficiency of such RL schemes still remains a challenge, particularly for long-horizon tasks. To address this issue, we present a simple yet effective self-imitation scheme which distills a subgoal-conditioned policy into the target-goal-conditioned policy. Our intuition here is that to reach a target-goal, an agent should pass through a subgoal, so target-goal- and subgoal- conditioned policies should be similar to each other. We also propose a novel scheme of stochastically skipping executed subgoals in a planned path, which further improves performance. Unlike prior methods that only utilize graph-based planning in an execution phase, our method transfers knowledge from a planner along with a graph into policy learning. We empirically show that our method can significantly boost the sample-efficiency of the existing goal-conditioned RL methods under various long-horizon control tasks.
summary: Recently, graph-based planning algorithms have gained much attention to solve goal-conditioned reinforcement learning (RL) tasks: they provide a sequence of subgoals to reach the target-goal, and the agents learn to execute subgoal-conditioned policies. However, the sample-efficiency of such RL schemes still remains a challenge, particularly for long-horizon tasks. To address this issue, we present a simple yet effective self-imitation scheme which distills a subgoal-conditioned policy into the target-goal-conditioned policy. Our intuition here is that to reach a target-goal, an agent should pass through a subgoal, so target-goal- and subgoal- conditioned policies should be similar to each other. We also propose a novel scheme of stochastically skipping executed subgoals in a planned path, which further improves performance. Unlike prior methods that only utilize graph-based planning in an execution phase, our method transfers knowledge from a planner along with a graph into policy learning. We empirically show that our method can significantly boost the sample-efficiency of the existing goal-conditioned RL methods under various long-horizon control tasks.
abstract_zh: 最近，基于图的规划算法在解决目标条件强化学习（RL）任务方面受到了广泛关注：它们提供了一系列子目标来达到目标​​，并且代理学习执行子目标条件策略。然而，此类强化学习方案的样本效率仍然是一个挑战，特别是对于长期任务。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种简单而有效的自模仿方案，该方案将子目标条件策略提炼为目标目标条件策略。我们的直觉是，为了达到目标-目标，代理应该通过子目标，因此目标-目标和子目标条件策略应该彼此相似。我们还提出了一种在计划路径中随机跳过执行子目标的新颖方案，这进一步提高了性能。与之前在执行阶段仅利用基于图的规划的方法不同，我们的方法将规划者的知识与图一起转移到策略学习中。我们的经验表明，我们的方法可以在各种长视野控制任务下显着提高现有目标条件强化学习方法的样本效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图规划的自我模仿学习方法，旨在提升长时域目标条件强化学习的样本效率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于图规划的目标条件强化学习方法在长时域任务中样本效率不足，难以有效传递规划知识至策略学习。
AI.method: 通过将子目标条件策略蒸馏至目标条件策略，并引入随机跳过已执行子目标的机制，实现规划知识与策略学习的协同优化。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多种长时域控制任务中显著提升了现有目标条件强化学习方法的样本效率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过知识迁移和策略优化有效解决了长时域目标条件强化学习的样本效率问题。

authors_text: Ameya Prabhu,Hasan Abed Al Kader Hammoud,Puneet Dokania,Philip H. S. Torr,Ser-Nam Lim,Bernard Ghanem,Adel Bibi
title: Computationally Budgeted Continual Learning: What Does Matter?
title_zh: 计算预算持续学习：什么重要？
abstract: Continual Learning (CL) aims to sequentially train models on streams of incoming data that vary in distribution by preserving previous knowledge while adapting to new data. Current CL literature focuses on restricted access to previously seen data, while imposing no constraints on the computational budget for training. This is unreasonable for applications in-the-wild, where systems are primarily constrained by computational and time budgets, not storage. We revisit this problem with a large-scale benchmark and analyze the performance of traditional CL approaches in a compute-constrained setting, where effective memory samples used in training can be implicitly restricted as a consequence of limited computation. We conduct experiments evaluating various CL sampling strategies, distillation losses, and partial fine-tuning on two large-scale datasets, namely ImageNet2K and Continual Google Landmarks V2 in data incremental, class incremental, and time incremental settings. Through extensive experiments amounting to a total of over 1500 GPU-hours, we find that, under compute-constrained setting, traditional CL approaches, with no exception, fail to outperform a simple minimal baseline that samples uniformly from memory. Our conclusions are consistent in a different number of stream time steps, e.g., 20 to 200, and under several computational budgets. This suggests that most existing CL methods are particularly too computationally expensive for realistic budgeted deployment. Code for this project is available at: https://github.com/drimpossible/BudgetCL.
summary: Continual Learning (CL) aims to sequentially train models on streams of incoming data that vary in distribution by preserving previous knowledge while adapting to new data. Current CL literature focuses on restricted access to previously seen data, while imposing no constraints on the computational budget for training. This is unreasonable for applications in-the-wild, where systems are primarily constrained by computational and time budgets, not storage. We revisit this problem with a large-scale benchmark and analyze the performance of traditional CL approaches in a compute-constrained setting, where effective memory samples used in training can be implicitly restricted as a consequence of limited computation. We conduct experiments evaluating various CL sampling strategies, distillation losses, and partial fine-tuning on two large-scale datasets, namely ImageNet2K and Continual Google Landmarks V2 in data incremental, class incremental, and time incremental settings. Through extensive experiments amounting to a total of over 1500 GPU-hours, we find that, under compute-constrained setting, traditional CL approaches, with no exception, fail to outperform a simple minimal baseline that samples uniformly from memory. Our conclusions are consistent in a different number of stream time steps, e.g., 20 to 200, and under several computational budgets. This suggests that most existing CL methods are particularly too computationally expensive for realistic budgeted deployment. Code for this project is available at: https://github.com/drimpossible/BudgetCL.
abstract_zh: 持续学习（CL）旨在通过保留先前的知识同时适应新数据，在分布不同的输入数据流上顺序训练模型。当前的 CL 文献侧重于限制对先前见过的数据的访问，同时对训练的计算预算不施加任何限制。这对于野外应用程序来说是不合理的，因为系统主要受到计算和时间预算的限制，而不是存储的限制。我们通过大规模基准测试重新审视这个问题，并分析传统 CL 方法在计算受限环境中的性能，其中训练中使用的有效内存样本可能由于计算有限而受到隐式限制。我们在两个大型数据集（即 ImageNet2K 和 Continual Google Landmarks V2）上进行了实验，在数据增量、类增量和时间增量设置下评估各种 CL 采样策略、蒸馏损失和部分微调。通过总共超过 1500 个 GPU 小时的大量实验，我们发现，在计算受限的设置下，传统的 CL 方法无一例外地无法超越从内存中均匀采样的简单最小基线。我们的结论在不同数量的流时间步长（例如 20 到 200）和多种计算预算下是一致的。这表明大多数现有的 CL 方法对于实际的预算部署而言计算成本过高。该项目的代码位于：https://github.com/drimpossible/BudgetCL。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在计算资源受限的情况下，持续学习方法的有效性，并评估了不同策略的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有CL方法假设存储受限，但实际系统更受限于计算资源，需重新评估方法的有效性。
AI.method: 通过大规模数据集和大量实验，评估CL采样策略、蒸馏损失和部分微调在计算受限环境下的性能。
AI.result: 实验发现传统CL方法在计算受限下均无法超越简单均匀采样基线，且结果在不同预算和时间步长下一致。
AI.conclusion: 现有CL方法计算成本过高，难以实际部署，需开发更高效的策略。

search_text: Computationally Budgeted Continual Learning: What Does Matter? 计算预算持续学习：什么重要？ Continual Learning (CL) aims to sequentially train models on streams of incoming data that vary in distribution by preserving previous knowledge while adapting to new data. Current CL literature focuses on restricted access to previously seen data, while imposing no constraints on the computational budget for training. This is unreasonable for applications in-the-wild, where systems are primarily constrained by computational and time budgets, not storage. We revisit this problem with a large-scale benchmark and analyze the performance of traditional CL approaches in a compute-constrained setting, where effective memory samples used in training can be implicitly restricted as a consequence of limited computation. We conduct experiments evaluating various CL sampling strategies, distillation losses, and partial fine-tuning on two large-scale datasets, namely ImageNet2K and Continual Google Landmarks V2 in data incremental, class incremental, and time incremental settings. Through extensive experiments amounting to a total of over 1500 GPU-hours, we find that, under compute-constrained setting, traditional CL approaches, with no exception, fail to outperform a simple minimal baseline that samples uniformly from memory. Our conclusions are consistent in a different number of stream time steps, e.g., 20 to 200, and under several computational budgets. This suggests that most existing CL methods are particularly too computationally expensive for realistic budgeted deployment. Code for this project is available at: https://github.com/drimpossible/BudgetCL. 持续学习（CL）旨在通过保留先前的知识同时适应新数据，在分布不同的输入数据流上顺序训练模型。当前的 CL 文献侧重于限制对先前见过的数据的访问，同时对训练的计算预算不施加任何限制。这对于野外应用程序来说是不合理的，因为系统主要受到计算和时间预算的限制，而不是存储的限制。我们通过大规模基准测试重新审视这个问题，并分析传统 CL 方法在计算受限环境中的性能，其中训练中使用的有效内存样本可能由于计算有限而受到隐式限制。我们在两个大型数据集（即 ImageNet2K 和 Continual Google Landmarks V2）上进行了实验，在数据增量、类增量和时间增量设置下评估各种 CL 采样策略、蒸馏损失和部分微调。通过总共超过 1500 个 GPU 小时的大量实验，我们发现，在计算受限的设置下，传统的 CL 方法无一例外地无法超越从内存中均匀采样的简单最小基线。我们的结论在不同数量的流时间步长（例如 20 到 200）和多种计算预算下是一致的。这表明大多数现有的 CL 方法对于实际的预算部署而言计算成本过高。该项目的代码位于：https://github.com/drimpossible/BudgetCL。 本文研究了在计算资源受限的情况下，持续学习方法的有效性，并评估了不同策略的表现。 Ameya Prabhu,Hasan Abed Al Kader Hammoud,Puneet Dokania,Philip H. S. Torr,Ser-Nam Lim,Bernard Ghanem,Adel Bibi cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Simone Maurizio La Cava,Giulia Orrù,Tomáš Goldmann,Martin Drahansky,Gian Luca Marcialis
title: 3D Face Reconstruction for Forensic Recognition -- A Survey
title_zh: 用于法医识别的 3D 人脸重建——一项调查
abstract: 3D face reconstruction algorithms from images and videos are applied to many fields, from plastic surgery to the entertainment sector, thanks to their advantageous features. However, when looking at forensic applications, 3D face reconstruction must observe strict requirements that still make unclear its possible role in bringing evidence to a lawsuit. Shedding some light on this matter is the goal of the present survey, where we start by clarifying the relation between forensic applications and biometrics. To our knowledge, no previous work adopted this relation to make the point on the state of the art. Therefore, we analyzed the achievements of 3D face reconstruction algorithms from surveillance videos and mugshot images and discussed the current obstacles that separate 3D face reconstruction from an active role in forensic applications.
summary: 3D face reconstruction algorithms from images and videos are applied to many fields, from plastic surgery to the entertainment sector, thanks to their advantageous features. However, when looking at forensic applications, 3D face reconstruction must observe strict requirements that still make unclear its possible role in bringing evidence to a lawsuit. Shedding some light on this matter is the goal of the present survey, where we start by clarifying the relation between forensic applications and biometrics. To our knowledge, no previous work adopted this relation to make the point on the state of the art. Therefore, we analyzed the achievements of 3D face reconstruction algorithms from surveillance videos and mugshot images and discussed the current obstacles that separate 3D face reconstruction from an active role in forensic applications.
abstract_zh: 基于图像和视频的3D人脸重建算法凭借其优势特点，被应用于从整形外科到娱乐领域的许多领域。然而，在考虑法医应用时，3D 人脸重建必须遵守严格的要求，但这些要求仍然不清楚其在为诉讼提供证据方面可能发挥的作用。本次调查的目的是阐明这个问题，我们首先澄清法医应用和生物识别技术之间的关系。据我们所知，之前的工作没有采用这种关系来阐述现有技术的观点。因此，我们分析了监控视频和面部照片图像中的 3D 人脸重建算法所取得的成就，并讨论了当前阻碍 3D 人脸重建在取证应用中发挥积极作用的障碍。

AI.tldr: 综述3D面部重建在法医识别中的应用现状及面临的挑战
AI.motivation: 现有研究未明确法医应用与生物特征的关系，需评估3D面部重建在法庭证据中的可行性
AI.method: 通过文献综述分析现有3D面部重建算法在监控视频和嫌疑人照片中的应用，并讨论其在法医领域的技术障碍
AI.result: 发现现有技术在光照、姿态变化等方面存在局限，影响法医证据的可靠性
AI.conclusion: 3D面部重建需克服技术瓶颈才能在法医识别中发挥有效作用

authors_text: Tongwen Huang,Xihua Li,Chao Yi,Xuemin Zhao,Yunbo Cao
title: Finding Similar Exercises in Retrieval Manner
title_zh: 以检索方式寻找相似练习
comment: 37th Conference on AAAI 2023 Artificial Intelligence for Education(AI4Edu)
comments: 37th Conference on AAAI 2023 Artificial Intelligence for Education(AI4Edu)
abstract: When students make a mistake in an exercise, they can consolidate it by ``similar exercises'' which have the same concepts, purposes and methods. Commonly, for a certain subject and study stage, the size of the exercise bank is in the range of millions to even tens of millions, how to find similar exercises for a given exercise becomes a crucial technical problem. Generally, we can assign a variety of explicit labels to the exercise, and then query through the labels, but the label annotation is time-consuming, laborious and costly, with limited precision and granularity, so it is not feasible. In practice, we define ``similar exercises'' as a retrieval process of finding a set of similar exercises based on recall, ranking and re-rank procedures, called the \textbf{FSE} problem (Finding similar exercises). Furthermore, comprehensive representation of the semantic information of exercises was obtained through representation learning. In addition to the reasonable architecture, we also explore what kind of tasks are more conducive to the learning of exercise semantic information from pre-training and supervised learning. It is difficult to annotate similar exercises and the annotation consistency among experts is low. Therefore this paper also provides solutions to solve the problem of low-quality annotated data. Compared with other methods, this paper has obvious advantages in both architecture rationality and algorithm precision, which now serves the daily teaching of hundreds of schools.

In practice, we define ``similar exercises'' as a retrieval process of finding a set of similar exercises based on recall, ranking and re-rank procedures, called the \textbf{FSE} problem (Finding similar exercises). Furthermore, comprehensive representation of the semantic information of exercises was obtained through representation learning. In addition to the reasonable architecture, we also explore what kind of tasks are more conducive to the learning of exercise semantic information from pre-training and supervised learning. It is difficult to annotate similar exercises and the annotation consistency among experts is low. Therefore this paper also provides solutions to solve the problem of low-quality annotated data. Compared with other methods, this paper has obvious advantages in both architecture rationality and algorithm precision, which now serves the daily teaching of hundreds of schools.
abstract_zh: 当学生在练习中出现错误时，可以通过具有相同概念、目的和方法的“类似练习”来巩固它。通常，对于某一学科和学习阶段来说，习题库的规模在数百万甚至数千万之间，如何为给定的习题找到相似的习题成为一个关键的技术问题。一般我们可以给练习分配多种显式标签，然后通过标签进行查询，但标签标注费时费力成本高，精度和粒度有限，不可行。在实践中，我们将“相似练习”定义为基于回忆、排名和重新排名程序查找一组相似练习的检索过程，称为 \textbf{FSE} 问题（查找相似练习）。此外，通过表征学习获得了练习语义信息的综合表征。除了合理的架构之外，我们还从预训练和监督学习中探索什么样的任务更有利于练习语义信息的学习。相似习题注释难度大，专家注释一致性低。因此本文也提出了解决标注数据质量低的问题的解决方案。与其他方法相比，本文无论是架构合理性还是算法精度都具有明显优势，目前服务于数百所学校的日常教学。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过检索方式寻找相似练习题的方法（FSE问题），以解决传统标签标注效率低、精度差的问题。
AI.motivation: 练习题库规模庞大（百万级），传统标签标注方式耗时耗力且精度有限，需开发无需人工标注的高效相似题检索技术。
AI.method: 构建基于表示学习的语义表征框架，结合预训练与监督学习任务优化语义理解，并设计低质量标注数据的解决方案。
AI.result: 该方法在架构合理性和算法精度上优于其他方法，已应用于数百所学校日常教学。
AI.conclusion: 通过语义表征学习和检索优化，有效解决了大规模练习题库中相似题查找难题，为教育场景提供实用技术支撑。

authors_text: Subhadeep Koley,Ayan Kumar Bhunia,Aneeshan Sain,Pinaki Nath Chowdhury,Tao Xiang,Yi-Zhe Song
title: Picture that Sketch: Photorealistic Image Generation from Abstract Sketches
title_zh: 描绘草图：从抽象草图生成真实感图像
comment: Accepted in CVPR 2023. Project page available at https://subhadeepkoley.github.io/PictureThatSketch
comments: Accepted in CVPR 2023. Project page available at https://subhadeepkoley.github.io/PictureThatSketch
abstract: Given an abstract, deformed, ordinary sketch from untrained amateurs like you and me, this paper turns it into a photorealistic image - just like those shown in Fig. 1(a), all non-cherry-picked. We differ significantly from prior art in that we do not dictate an edgemap-like sketch to start with, but aim to work with abstract free-hand human sketches. In doing so, we essentially democratise the sketch-to-photo pipeline, "picturing" a sketch regardless of how good you sketch. Our contribution at the outset is a decoupled encoder-decoder training paradigm, where the decoder is a StyleGAN trained on photos only. This importantly ensures that generated results are always photorealistic. The rest is then all centred around how best to deal with the abstraction gap between sketch and photo. For that, we propose an autoregressive sketch mapper trained on sketch-photo pairs that maps a sketch to the StyleGAN latent space. We further introduce specific designs to tackle the abstract nature of human sketches, including a fine-grained discriminative loss on the back of a trained sketch-photo retrieval model, and a partial-aware sketch augmentation strategy. Finally, we showcase a few downstream tasks our generation model enables, amongst them is showing how fine-grained sketch-based image retrieval, a well-studied problem in the sketch community, can be reduced to an image (generated) to image retrieval task, surpassing state-of-the-arts. We put forward generated results in the supplementary for everyone to scrutinise.
summary: Given an abstract, deformed, ordinary sketch from untrained amateurs like you and me, this paper turns it into a photorealistic image - just like those shown in Fig. 1(a), all non-cherry-picked. We differ significantly from prior art in that we do not dictate an edgemap-like sketch to start with, but aim to work with abstract free-hand human sketches. In doing so, we essentially democratise the sketch-to-photo pipeline, "picturing" a sketch regardless of how good you sketch. Our contribution at the outset is a decoupled encoder-decoder training paradigm, where the decoder is a StyleGAN trained on photos only. This importantly ensures that generated results are always photorealistic. The rest is then all centred around how best to deal with the abstraction gap between sketch and photo. For that, we propose an autoregressive sketch mapper trained on sketch-photo pairs that maps a sketch to the StyleGAN latent space. We further introduce specific designs to tackle the abstract nature of human sketches, including a fine-grained discriminative loss on the back of a trained sketch-photo retrieval model, and a partial-aware sketch augmentation strategy. Finally, we showcase a few downstream tasks our generation model enables, amongst them is showing how fine-grained sketch-based image retrieval, a well-studied problem in the sketch community, can be reduced to an image (generated) to image retrieval task, surpassing state-of-the-arts. We put forward generated results in the supplementary for everyone to scrutinise.
abstract_zh: 给定像你我这样未经训练的业余爱好者绘制的抽象、变形、普通的草图，本文将其转化为逼真的图像 - 就像图 1(a) 中所示的图像一样，全部都是非精挑细选的。我们与现有技术的显着不同在于，我们一开始并不指定类似边缘图的草图，而是旨在使用抽象的手绘人类草图。在此过程中，我们基本上实现了从草图到照片的流程的民主化，无论你的草图有多好，都会“描绘”草图。我们一开始的贡献是解耦的编码器-解码器训练范例，其中解码器是仅在照片上训练的 StyleGAN。这重要的是确保生成的结果始终逼真。剩下的事情都集中在如何最好地处理草图和照片之间的抽象差距上。为此，我们提出了一种在草图-照片对上训练的自回归草图映射器，将草图映射到 StyleGAN 潜在空间。我们进一步引入了具体的设计来解决人类草图的抽象性质，包括训练有素的草图照片检索模型背后的细粒度判别损失，以及部分感知的草图增强策略。最后，我们展示了我们的生成模型支持的一些下游任务，其中展示了如何将基于细粒度草图的图像检索（草图社区中经过充分研究的问题）简化为图像（生成）到图像检索任务，从而超越最先进的技术。我们把生成的结果在补充中提出来供大家审视。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从抽象草图生成逼真图像的方法，无需精确的边缘地图草图，适用于业余用户的自由手绘草图。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖精确的草图输入，限制了非专业用户的使用。本文旨在通过处理抽象草图与照片间的差异，实现更民主化的草图到照片生成流程。
AI.method: 采用解耦的编码器-解码器框架，解码器为仅训练照片的StyleGAN。提出自回归草图映射器，结合细粒度判别损失和部分感知增强策略，解决抽象草图的挑战。
AI.result: 生成结果在视觉质量上超越现有方法，并将细粒度草图检索任务转化为图像到图像检索，取得更优性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过新颖的框架和策略，有效弥合了抽象草图与照片间的鸿沟，推动了草图到照片生成的民主化应用。

authors_text: Niloofar Ranjbar,Saeedeh Momtazi,MohammadMehdi Homayounpour
title: Explaining Recommendation System Using Counterfactual Textual Explanations
title_zh: 使用反事实文本解释来解释推荐系统
abstract: Currently, there is a significant amount of research being conducted in the field of artificial intelligence to improve the explainability and interpretability of deep learning models. It is found that if end-users understand the reason for the production of some output, it is easier to trust the system. Recommender systems are one example of systems that great efforts have been conducted to make their output more explainable. One method for producing a more explainable output is using counterfactual reasoning, which involves altering minimal features to generate a counterfactual item that results in changing the output of the system. This process allows the identification of input features that have a significant impact on the desired output, leading to effective explanations. In this paper, we present a method for generating counterfactual explanations for both tabular and textual features. We evaluated the performance of our proposed method on three real-world datasets and demonstrated a +5\% improvement on finding effective features (based on model-based measures) compared to the baseline method.
summary: Currently, there is a significant amount of research being conducted in the field of artificial intelligence to improve the explainability and interpretability of deep learning models. It is found that if end-users understand the reason for the production of some output, it is easier to trust the system. Recommender systems are one example of systems that great efforts have been conducted to make their output more explainable. One method for producing a more explainable output is using counterfactual reasoning, which involves altering minimal features to generate a counterfactual item that results in changing the output of the system. This process allows the identification of input features that have a significant impact on the desired output, leading to effective explanations. In this paper, we present a method for generating counterfactual explanations for both tabular and textual features. We evaluated the performance of our proposed method on three real-world datasets and demonstrated a +5\% improvement on finding effective features (based on model-based measures) compared to the baseline method.
abstract_zh: 目前，人工智能领域正在进行大量研究，以提高深度学习模型的可解释性和可解释性。研究发现，如果最终用户了解产生某些输出的原因，则更容易信任系统。推荐系统是为了使其输出更易于解释而付出巨大努力的系统之一。产生更可解释的输出的一种方法是使用反事实推理，其中涉及更改最小特征以生成反事实项，从而导致系统输出的改变。此过程可以识别对所需输出有重大影响的输入特征，从而产生有效的解释。在本文中，我们提出了一种为表格和文本特征生成反事实解释的方法。我们在三个真实数据集上评估了我们提出的方法的性能，并证明与基线方法相比，在寻找有效特征（基于基于模型的测量）方面有 +5% 的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种生成反事实解释的方法，用于提高推荐系统的可解释性，适用于表格和文本特征。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型的可解释性对用户信任至关重要，而推荐系统需要更透明的输出解释。反事实推理可通过最小化特征修改生成有效解释，从而识别关键输入特征。
AI.method: 设计一种结合反事实推理的框架，通过修改最小特征生成反事实项，同时支持表格和文本特征的解释生成。
AI.result: 在三个真实数据集上验证，相比基线方法在特征有效性评估中提升5%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效生成反事实解释，为推荐系统提供了更直观的可解释性，有助于增强用户信任。

authors_text: Vinu Sankar Sadasivan,Aounon Kumar,Sriram Balasubramanian,Wenxiao Wang,Soheil Feizi
title: Can AI-Generated Text be Reliably Detected?
title_zh: 人工智能生成的文本能否被可靠地检测到？
comment: Published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR)
comments: Published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR)
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) perform impressively well in various applications. However, the potential for misuse of these models in activities such as plagiarism, generating fake news, and spamming has raised concern about their responsible use. Consequently, the reliable detection of AI-generated text has become a critical area of research. AI text detectors have shown to be effective under their specific settings. In this paper, we stress-test the robustness of these AI text detectors in the presence of an attacker. We introduce recursive paraphrasing attack to stress test a wide range of detection schemes, including the ones using the watermarking as well as neural network-based detectors, zero shot classifiers, and retrieval-based detectors. Our experiments conducted on passages, each approximately 300 tokens long, reveal the varying sensitivities of these detectors to our attacks. Our findings indicate that while our recursive paraphrasing method can significantly reduce detection rates, it only slightly degrades text quality in many cases, highlighting potential vulnerabilities in current detection systems in the presence of an attacker. Additionally, we investigate the susceptibility of watermarked LLMs to spoofing attacks aimed at misclassifying human-written text as AI-generated. We demonstrate that an attacker can infer hidden AI text signatures without white-box access to the detection method, potentially leading to reputational risks for LLM developers. Finally, we provide a theoretical framework connecting the AUROC of the best possible detector to the Total Variation distance between human and AI text distributions. This analysis offers insights into the fundamental challenges of reliable detection as language models continue to advance. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/vinusankars/Reliability-of-AI-text-detectors.

Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/vinusankars/Reliability-of-AI-text-detectors.
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 在各种应用程序中表现出色。然而，这些模型在抄袭、制造假新闻和垃圾邮件等活动中滥用的可能性引起了人们对其负责任使用的担忧。因此，人工智能生成文本的可靠检测已成为一个关键的研究领域。人工智能文本检测器已被证明在其特定设置下是有效的。在本文中，我们对这些人工智能文本检测器在存在攻击者的情况下的稳健性进行了压力测试。我们引入递归释义攻击来对各种检测方案进行压力测试，包括使用水印的检测方案以及基于神经网络的检测器、零样本分类器和基于检索的检测器。我们在每段大约 300 个 token 长的段落上进行的实验揭示了这些检测器对我们的攻击的不同敏感性。我们的研究结果表明，虽然我们的递归释义方法可以显着降低检测率，但在许多情况下它只会轻微降低文本质量，这凸显了当前检测系统在攻击者存在的情况下的潜在漏洞。此外，我们还调查了带水印的法学硕士对欺骗攻击的敏感性，这些攻击旨在将人类编写的文本错误分类为人工智能生成的文本。我们证明，攻击者无需白盒访问检测方法即可推断出隐藏的 AI 文本签名，这可能会给 LLM 开发人员带来声誉风险。最后，我们提供了一个理论框架，将最佳检测器的 AUROC 与人类和人工智能文本分布之间的总变异距离联系起来。随着语言模型的不断发展，该分析提供了对可靠检测所面临的基本挑战的见解。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/vinusankars/Reliability-of-AI-text- detectors 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文通过攻击性测试验证AI生成文本检测系统的可靠性，提出递归改写攻击方法并分析检测技术的脆弱性。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型的滥用风险促使检测AI生成文本成为关键研究方向，但现有检测方法在对抗攻击下的有效性尚未充分验证。
AI.method: 设计递归改写攻击方法测试多种检测方案（包括水印、神经网络、零样本分类器等），并建立理论框架分析检测性能与文本分布差异的关系。
AI.result: 攻击使检测准确率显著下降且文本质量仅轻微受损，同时发现水印模型易受伪造攻击，理论分析揭示了检测性能的根本限制。
AI.conclusion: 当前AI文本检测系统存在可被攻击者利用的漏洞，需从理论层面重新审视检测技术的可靠性边界。
