authors_text: Ziqiao Peng,Haoyu Wu,Zhenbo Song,Hao Xu,Xiangyu Zhu,Jun He,Hongyan Liu,Zhaoxin Fan
title: EmoTalk: Speech-Driven Emotional Disentanglement for 3D Face Animation
title_zh: EmoTalk：语音驱动的 3D 人脸动画情感解脱
abstract: Speech-driven 3D face animation aims to generate realistic facial expressions that match the speech content and emotion. However, existing methods often neglect emotional facial expressions or fail to disentangle them from speech content. To address this issue, this paper proposes an end-to-end neural network to disentangle different emotions in speech so as to generate rich 3D facial expressions. Specifically, we introduce the emotion disentangling encoder (EDE) to disentangle the emotion and content in the speech by cross-reconstructed speech signals with different emotion labels. Then an emotion-guided feature fusion decoder is employed to generate a 3D talking face with enhanced emotion. The decoder is driven by the disentangled identity, emotional, and content embeddings so as to generate controllable personal and emotional styles. Finally, considering the scarcity of the 3D emotional talking face data, we resort to the supervision of facial blendshapes, which enables the reconstruction of plausible 3D faces from 2D emotional data, and contribute a large-scale 3D emotional talking face dataset (3D-ETF) to train the network. Our experiments and user studies demonstrate that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods and exhibits more diverse facial movements. We recommend watching the supplementary video: https://ziqiaopeng.github.io/emotalk
summary: Speech-driven 3D face animation aims to generate realistic facial expressions that match the speech content and emotion. However, existing methods often neglect emotional facial expressions or fail to disentangle them from speech content. To address this issue, this paper proposes an end-to-end neural network to disentangle different emotions in speech so as to generate rich 3D facial expressions. Specifically, we introduce the emotion disentangling encoder (EDE) to disentangle the emotion and content in the speech by cross-reconstructed speech signals with different emotion labels. Then an emotion-guided feature fusion decoder is employed to generate a 3D talking face with enhanced emotion. The decoder is driven by the disentangled identity, emotional, and content embeddings so as to generate controllable personal and emotional styles. Finally, considering the scarcity of the 3D emotional talking face data, we resort to the supervision of facial blendshapes, which enables the reconstruction of plausible 3D faces from 2D emotional data, and contribute a large-scale 3D emotional talking face dataset (3D-ETF) to train the network. Our experiments and user studies demonstrate that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods and exhibits more diverse facial movements. We recommend watching the supplementary video: https://ziqiaopeng.github.io/emotalk
abstract_zh: 语音驱动的 3D 面部动画旨在生成与语音内容和情感相匹配的逼真面部表情。然而，现有的方法经常忽视情感面部表情或无法将它们与语音内容分开。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种端到端神经网络来分解语音中的不同情绪，从而生成丰富的 3D 面部表情。具体来说，我们引入了情感解缠编码器（EDE），通过具有不同情感标签的交叉重构语音信号来解开语音中的情感和内容。然后采用情感引导特征融合解码器来生成具有增强情感的 3D 说话脸部。解码器由解开的身份、情感和内容嵌入驱动，从而生成可控的个人和情感风格。最后，考虑到 3D 情感说话人脸数据的稀缺性，我们求助于面部混合形状的监督，这使得能够从 2D 情感数据重建可信的 3D 人脸，并提供大规模 3D 情感说话人脸数据集（3D-ETF）来训练网络。我们的实验和用户研究表明，我们的方法优于最先进的方法，并表现出更多样化的面部动作。我们建议观看补充视频：https://ziqiaopeng.github.io/emotalk

AI.tldr: 本文提出EmoTalk方法，通过语音驱动生成具有情感解耦能力的3D面部动画，解决现有方法在情感表情生成中的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有语音驱动3D面部动画方法未能有效解耦情感与语音内容，导致生成表情单一且缺乏情感控制能力。
AI.method: 设计情感解耦编码器（EDE）通过跨情感标签的语音信号重建分离情感与内容；采用情感引导的特征融合解码器生成3D面部，并结合身份、情感和内容嵌入实现可控风格；利用面部blendshapes监督机制和构建3D-ETF数据集提升生成效果。
AI.result: 实验和用户研究显示该方法在情感表达多样性上优于现有技术，生成更自然的面部运动，且数据集贡献推动了相关研究。
AI.conclusion: EmoTalk通过情感解耦与数据集构建有效提升了语音驱动3D面部动画的情感表现力，为可控表情生成提供了新思路。

search_text: EmoTalk: Speech-Driven Emotional Disentanglement for 3D Face Animation EmoTalk：语音驱动的 3D 人脸动画情感解脱 Speech-driven 3D face animation aims to generate realistic facial expressions that match the speech content and emotion. However, existing methods often neglect emotional facial expressions or fail to disentangle them from speech content. To address this issue, this paper proposes an end-to-end neural network to disentangle different emotions in speech so as to generate rich 3D facial expressions. Specifically, we introduce the emotion disentangling encoder (EDE) to disentangle the emotion and content in the speech by cross-reconstructed speech signals with different emotion labels. Then an emotion-guided feature fusion decoder is employed to generate a 3D talking face with enhanced emotion. The decoder is driven by the disentangled identity, emotional, and content embeddings so as to generate controllable personal and emotional styles. Finally, considering the scarcity of the 3D emotional talking face data, we resort to the supervision of facial blendshapes, which enables the reconstruction of plausible 3D faces from 2D emotional data, and contribute a large-scale 3D emotional talking face dataset (3D-ETF) to train the network. Our experiments and user studies demonstrate that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods and exhibits more diverse facial movements. We recommend watching the supplementary video: https://ziqiaopeng.github.io/emotalk 语音驱动的 3D 面部动画旨在生成与语音内容和情感相匹配的逼真面部表情。然而，现有的方法经常忽视情感面部表情或无法将它们与语音内容分开。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种端到端神经网络来分解语音中的不同情绪，从而生成丰富的 3D 面部表情。具体来说，我们引入了情感解缠编码器（EDE），通过具有不同情感标签的交叉重构语音信号来解开语音中的情感和内容。然后采用情感引导特征融合解码器来生成具有增强情感的 3D 说话脸部。解码器由解开的身份、情感和内容嵌入驱动，从而生成可控的个人和情感风格。最后，考虑到 3D 情感说话人脸数据的稀缺性，我们求助于面部混合形状的监督，这使得能够从 2D 情感数据重建可信的 3D 人脸，并提供大规模 3D 情感说话人脸数据集（3D-ETF）来训练网络。我们的实验和用户研究表明，我们的方法优于最先进的方法，并表现出更多样化的面部动作。我们建议观看补充视频：https://ziqiaopeng.github.io/emotalk 本文提出EmoTalk方法，通过语音驱动生成具有情感解耦能力的3D面部动画，解决现有方法在情感表情生成中的不足。 Ziqiao Peng,Haoyu Wu,Zhenbo Song,Hao Xu,Xiangyu Zhu,Jun He,Hongyan Liu,Zhaoxin Fan cs.CV,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Peipei Li,Rui Wang,Huaibo Huang,Ran He,Zhaofeng He
title: Pluralistic Aging Diffusion Autoencoder
title_zh: 多元老化扩散自动编码器
abstract: Face aging is an ill-posed problem because multiple plausible aging patterns may correspond to a given input. Most existing methods often produce one deterministic estimation. This paper proposes a novel CLIP-driven Pluralistic Aging Diffusion Autoencoder (PADA) to enhance the diversity of aging patterns. First, we employ diffusion models to generate diverse low-level aging details via a sequential denoising reverse process. Second, we present Probabilistic Aging Embedding (PAE) to capture diverse high-level aging patterns, which represents age information as probabilistic distributions in the common CLIP latent space. A text-guided KL-divergence loss is designed to guide this learning. Our method can achieve pluralistic face aging conditioned on open-world aging texts and arbitrary unseen face images. Qualitative and quantitative experiments demonstrate that our method can generate more diverse and high-quality plausible aging results.
summary: Face aging is an ill-posed problem because multiple plausible aging patterns may correspond to a given input. Most existing methods often produce one deterministic estimation. This paper proposes a novel CLIP-driven Pluralistic Aging Diffusion Autoencoder (PADA) to enhance the diversity of aging patterns. First, we employ diffusion models to generate diverse low-level aging details via a sequential denoising reverse process. Second, we present Probabilistic Aging Embedding (PAE) to capture diverse high-level aging patterns, which represents age information as probabilistic distributions in the common CLIP latent space. A text-guided KL-divergence loss is designed to guide this learning. Our method can achieve pluralistic face aging conditioned on open-world aging texts and arbitrary unseen face images. Qualitative and quantitative experiments demonstrate that our method can generate more diverse and high-quality plausible aging results.
abstract_zh: 面部老化是一个不适定问题，因为多个看似合理的老化模式可能对应于给定的输入。大多数现有方法通常会产生一种确定性估计。本文提出了一种新颖的 CLIP 驱动的多元老化扩散自动编码器（PADA）来增强老化模式的多样性。首先，我们采用扩散模型通过顺序去噪反向过程生成各种低水平的老化细节。其次，我们提出了概率老化嵌入（PAE）来捕获不同的高级老化模式，它将年龄信息表示为公共 CLIP 潜在空间中的概率分布。文本引导的 KL 散度损失旨在指导这种学习。我们的方法可以实现以开放世界老化文本和任意未见过的面部图像为条件的多元面部老化。定性和定量实验表明，我们的方法可以产生更加多样化和高质量的合理老化结果。

AI.tldr: 解决面部衰老生成中多样性不足的问题，生成多种合理的衰老模式。
AI.motivation: 现有方法生成单一衰老结果，无法满足多样化需求。
AI.method: 采用扩散模型生成低级衰老细节，并引入PAE在CLIP潜在空间中表示年龄信息，结合文本引导的KL散度损失。
AI.result: 实验显示生成更多样且高质量的衰老结果。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效提升面部衰老生成的多样性。

authors_text: Blerta Veseli,Sneha Singhania,Simon Razniewski,Gerhard Weikum
title: Evaluating Language Models for Knowledge Base Completion
title_zh: 评估语言模型以完成知识库
comment: Data and code available at https://github.com/bveseli/LMsForKBC
comments: Data and code available at https://github.com/bveseli/LMsForKBC
abstract: Structured knowledge bases (KBs) are a foundation of many intelligent applications, yet are notoriously incomplete. Language models (LMs) have recently been proposed for unsupervised knowledge base completion (KBC), yet, despite encouraging initial results, questions regarding their suitability remain open. Existing evaluations often fall short because they only evaluate on popular subjects, or sample already existing facts from KBs. In this work, we introduce a novel, more challenging benchmark dataset, and a methodology tailored for a realistic assessment of the KBC potential of LMs. For automated assessment, we curate a dataset called WD-KNOWN, which provides an unbiased random sample of Wikidata, containing over 3.9 million facts. In a second step, we perform a human evaluation on predictions that are not yet in the KB, as only this provides real insights into the added value over existing KBs. Our key finding is that biases in dataset conception of previous benchmarks lead to a systematic overestimate of LM performance for KBC. However, our results also reveal strong areas of LMs. We could, for example, perform a significant completion of Wikidata on the relations nativeLanguage, by a factor of ~21 (from 260k to 5.8M) at 82% precision, usedLanguage, by a factor of ~2.1 (from 2.1M to 6.6M) at 82% precision, and citizenOf by a factor of ~0.3 (from 4.2M to 5.3M) at 90% precision. Moreover, we find that LMs possess surprisingly strong generalization capabilities: even on relations where most facts were not directly observed in LM training, prediction quality can be high.
summary: Structured knowledge bases (KBs) are a foundation of many intelligent applications, yet are notoriously incomplete. Language models (LMs) have recently been proposed for unsupervised knowledge base completion (KBC), yet, despite encouraging initial results, questions regarding their suitability remain open. Existing evaluations often fall short because they only evaluate on popular subjects, or sample already existing facts from KBs. In this work, we introduce a novel, more challenging benchmark dataset, and a methodology tailored for a realistic assessment of the KBC potential of LMs. For automated assessment, we curate a dataset called WD-KNOWN, which provides an unbiased random sample of Wikidata, containing over 3.9 million facts. In a second step, we perform a human evaluation on predictions that are not yet in the KB, as only this provides real insights into the added value over existing KBs. Our key finding is that biases in dataset conception of previous benchmarks lead to a systematic overestimate of LM performance for KBC. However, our results also reveal strong areas of LMs. We could, for example, perform a significant completion of Wikidata on the relations nativeLanguage, by a factor of ~21 (from 260k to 5.8M) at 82% precision, usedLanguage, by a factor of ~2.1 (from 2.1M to 6.6M) at 82% precision, and citizenOf by a factor of ~0.3 (from 4.2M to 5.3M) at 90% precision. Moreover, we find that LMs possess surprisingly strong generalization capabilities: even on relations where most facts were not directly observed in LM training, prediction quality can be high.
abstract_zh: 结构化知识库 (KB) 是许多智能应用程序的基础，但众所周知，它并不完整。最近提出了用于无监督知识库完成（KBC）的语言模型（LM），然而，尽管初步结果令人鼓舞，但有关其适用性的问题仍然存在。现有的评估常常存在不足，因为它们只评估流行的主题，或者从知识库中采样已经存在的事实。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种新颖的、更具挑战性的基准数据集，以及一种为对 LM 的 KBC 潜力进行实际评估而定制的方法。为了进行自动化评估，我们策划了一个名为 WD-KNOWN 的数据集，它提供了维基数据的无偏见随机样本，包含超过 390 万条事实。第二步，我们对知识库中尚未包含的预测进行人工评估，因为只有这样才能真正洞察现有知识库的附加值。我们的主要发现是，先前基准的数据集概念存在偏差，导致 KBC 的 LM 性能系统性高估。然而，我们的结果也揭示了 LM 的优势领域。例如，我们可以对 Wikidata 的关系进行显着补全：nativeLanguage 的关系为 ~21（从 260k 到 5.8M），精度为 82%；usedLanguage 的关系为 ~2.1（从 210 万到 6.6M），精度为 82%；citizenOf 的关系为 ~0.3（从 4.2M 到 5.3M），精度为 90%精度。此外，我们发现 LM 具有惊人的强大泛化能力：即使对于大多数事实在 LM 训练中没有直接观察到的关系，预测质量也可以很高。

AI.tldr: 该论文评估了语言模型在知识库补全任务中的表现，提出了一种新的基准数据集和评估方法。
AI.motivation: 现有评估方法因仅关注热门主题或已有事实而存在偏差，无法真实反映语言模型的知识库补全能力。
AI.method: 构建了WD-KNOWN数据集（包含390万Wikidata事实）进行自动化评估，并通过人工评估未收录事实以验证模型增值能力。
AI.result: 发现先前基准存在系统性高估，但语言模型在特定关系（如nativeLanguage）补全中表现优异，精度达82%且数据量提升21倍，并展现出良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 语言模型在知识库补全中具有潜力，但需更客观的评估体系，其效果依赖于具体关系及训练数据覆盖程度。

Our key finding is that biases in dataset conception of previous benchmarks lead to a systematic overestimate of LM performance for KBC. However, our results also reveal strong areas of LMs. We could, for example, perform a significant completion of Wikidata on the relations nativeLanguage, by a factor of ~21 (from 260k to 5.8M) at 82% precision, usedLanguage, by a factor of ~2.1 (from 2.1M to 6.6M) at 82% precision, and citizenOf by a factor of ~0.3 (from 4.2M to 5.3M) at 90% precision. Moreover, we find that LMs possess surprisingly strong generalization capabilities: even on relations where most facts were not directly observed in LM training, prediction quality can be high. 结构化知识库 (KB) 是许多智能应用程序的基础，但众所周知，它并不完整。最近提出了用于无监督知识库完成（KBC）的语言模型（LM），然而，尽管初步结果令人鼓舞，但有关其适用性的问题仍然存在。现有的评估常常存在不足，因为它们只评估流行的主题，或者从知识库中采样已经存在的事实。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种新颖的、更具挑战性的基准数据集，以及一种为对 LM 的 KBC 潜力进行实际评估而定制的方法。为了进行自动化评估，我们策划了一个名为 WD-KNOWN 的数据集，它提供了维基数据的无偏见随机样本，包含超过 390 万条事实。第二步，我们对知识库中尚未包含的预测进行人工评估，因为只有这样才能真正洞察现有知识库的附加值。我们的主要发现是，先前基准的数据集概念存在偏差，导致 KBC 的 LM 性能系统性高估。然而，我们的结果也揭示了 LM 的优势领域。例如，我们可以对 Wikidata 的关系进行显着补全：nativeLanguage 的关系为 ~21（从 260k 到 5.8M），精度为 82%；usedLanguage 的关系为 ~2.1（从 210 万到 6.6M），精度为 82%；citizenOf 的关系为 ~0.3（从 4.2M 到 5.3M），精度为 90%精度。此外，我们发现 LM 具有惊人的强大泛化能力：即使对于大多数事实在 LM 训练中没有直接观察到的关系，预测质量也可以很高。 该论文评估了语言模型在知识库补全任务中的表现，提出了一种新的基准数据集和评估方法。 Blerta Veseli,Sneha Singhania,Simon Razniewski,Gerhard Weikum cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Vladimir Dvorkin,Audun Botterud
title: Differentially Private Algorithms for Synthetic Power System Datasets
title_zh: 综合电力系统数据集的差分私有算法
abstract: While power systems research relies on the availability of real-world network datasets, data owners (e.g., system operators) are hesitant to share data due to security and privacy risks. To control these risks, we develop privacy-preserving algorithms for the synthetic generation of optimization and machine learning datasets. Taking a real-world dataset as input, the algorithms output its noisy, synthetic version, which preserves the accuracy of the real data on a specific downstream model or even a large population of those. We control the privacy loss using Laplace and Exponential mechanisms of differential privacy and preserve data accuracy using a post-processing convex optimization. We apply the algorithms to generate synthetic network parameters and wind power data.
summary: While power systems research relies on the availability of real-world network datasets, data owners (e.g., system operators) are hesitant to share data due to security and privacy risks. To control these risks, we develop privacy-preserving algorithms for the synthetic generation of optimization and machine learning datasets. Taking a real-world dataset as input, the algorithms output its noisy, synthetic version, which preserves the accuracy of the real data on a specific downstream model or even a large population of those. We control the privacy loss using Laplace and Exponential mechanisms of differential privacy and preserve data accuracy using a post-processing convex optimization. We apply the algorithms to generate synthetic network parameters and wind power data.
abstract_zh: 虽然电力系统研究依赖于现实世界网络数据集的可用性，但由于安全和隐私风险，数据所有者（例如系统运营商）对于共享数据犹豫不决。为了控制这些风险，我们开发了用于合成生成优化和机器学习数据集的隐私保护算法。以真实世界的数据集作为输入，算法输出其嘈杂的合成版本，这保留了特定下游模型甚至大量模型的真实数据的准确性。我们使用差分隐私的拉普拉斯和指数机制来控制隐私损失，并使用后处理凸优化来保持数据准确性。我们应用这些算法来生成综合网络参数和风力发电数据。

AI.tldr: 开发差分隐私算法生成合成电力系统数据集，解决数据共享中的隐私问题。
AI.motivation: 电力系统研究需要真实数据，但数据所有者因隐私和安全风险不愿共享，需隐私保护方法。
AI.method: 结合差分隐私的拉普拉斯和指数机制，以及后处理凸优化，生成保持准确性的合成数据。
AI.result: 成功生成合成网络参数和风力发电数据，验证方法在隐私保护与数据效用间的平衡。
AI.conclusion: 提出的算法有效平衡隐私保护与数据效用，促进电力系统研究的数据共享。

authors_text: Lianyu Wang,Meng Wang,Daoqiang Zhang,Huazhu Fu
title: Model Barrier: A Compact Un-Transferable Isolation Domain for Model Intellectual Property Protection
title_zh: Model Barrier：用于模型知识产权保护的紧凑型不可转移隔离域
abstract: As scientific and technological advancements result from human intellectual labor and computational costs, protecting model intellectual property (IP) has become increasingly important to encourage model creators and owners. Model IP protection involves preventing the use of well-trained models on unauthorized domains. To address this issue, we propose a novel approach called Compact Un-Transferable Isolation Domain (CUTI-domain), which acts as a barrier to block illegal transfers from authorized to unauthorized domains. Specifically, CUTI-domain blocks cross-domain transfers by highlighting the private style features of the authorized domain, leading to recognition failure on unauthorized domains with irrelevant private style features. Moreover, we provide two solutions for using CUTI-domain depending on whether the unauthorized domain is known or not: target-specified CUTI-domain and target-free CUTI-domain. Our comprehensive experimental results on four digit datasets, CIFAR10 & STL10, and VisDA-2017 dataset demonstrate that CUTI-domain can be easily implemented as a plug-and-play module with different backbones, providing an efficient solution for model IP protection.
summary: As scientific and technological advancements result from human intellectual labor and computational costs, protecting model intellectual property (IP) has become increasingly important to encourage model creators and owners. Model IP protection involves preventing the use of well-trained models on unauthorized domains. To address this issue, we propose a novel approach called Compact Un-Transferable Isolation Domain (CUTI-domain), which acts as a barrier to block illegal transfers from authorized to unauthorized domains. Specifically, CUTI-domain blocks cross-domain transfers by highlighting the private style features of the authorized domain, leading to recognition failure on unauthorized domains with irrelevant private style features. Moreover, we provide two solutions for using CUTI-domain depending on whether the unauthorized domain is known or not: target-specified CUTI-domain and target-free CUTI-domain. Our comprehensive experimental results on four digit datasets, CIFAR10 & STL10, and VisDA-2017 dataset demonstrate that CUTI-domain can be easily implemented as a plug-and-play module with different backbones, providing an efficient solution for model IP protection.
abstract_zh: 由于科学技术的进步源于人类的智力劳动和计算成本，保护模型知识产权（IP）对于鼓励模型创建者和所有者变得越来越重要。模型 IP 保护涉及防止在未经授权的域上使用经过良好训练的模型。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种称为紧凑不可传输隔离域（CUTI-domain）的新方法，它充当阻止从授权域到未经授权域的非法传输的屏障。具体来说，CUTI域通过突出授权域的私有风格特征来阻止跨域传输，导致对具有不相关私有风格特征的未授权域的识别失败。此外，根据未授权域是否已知，我们提供了两种使用 CUTI 域的解决方案：目标指定的 CUTI 域和目标无关的 CUTI 域。我们在四位数据集、CIFAR10和STL10以及VisDA-2017数据集上的综合实验结果表明，CUTI域可以轻松实现为具有不同主干网的即插即用模块，为模型IP保护提供有效的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CUTI-domain的紧凑型不可转移隔离域方法，用于保护模型知识产权，防止模型在未授权领域被非法使用。
AI.motivation: 随着模型训练成本增加，保护模型知识产权变得至关重要，需防止模型在未授权领域被滥用。
AI.method: 通过提取授权域的私有风格特征构建CUTI-domain，使模型在未授权域因特征不匹配而失效；提供两种方案：目标指定型和无目标型。
AI.result: 在四个数字数据集、CIFAR10/STL10及VisDA-2017上验证，CUTI-domain可作为插件模块高效实现，有效阻止非法跨域迁移。
AI.conclusion: CUTI-domain为模型知识产权保护提供了高效且易于集成的解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Kamil Faber,Dominik Zurek,Marcin Pietron,Nathalie Japkowicz,Antonio Vergari,Roberto Corizzo
title: From MNIST to ImageNet and Back: Benchmarking Continual Curriculum Learning
title_zh: 从 MNIST 到 ImageNet 并返回：持续课程学习的基准测试
abstract: Continual learning (CL) is one of the most promising trends in recent machine learning research. Its goal is to go beyond classical assumptions in machine learning and develop models and learning strategies that present high robustness in dynamic environments. The landscape of CL research is fragmented into several learning evaluation protocols, comprising different learning tasks, datasets, and evaluation metrics. Additionally, the benchmarks adopted so far are still distant from the complexity of real-world scenarios, and are usually tailored to highlight capabilities specific to certain strategies. In such a landscape, it is hard to objectively assess strategies. In this work, we fill this gap for CL on image data by introducing two novel CL benchmarks that involve multiple heterogeneous tasks from six image datasets, with varying levels of complexity and quality. Our aim is to fairly evaluate current state-of-the-art CL strategies on a common ground that is closer to complex real-world scenarios. We additionally structure our benchmarks so that tasks are presented in increasing and decreasing order of complexity -- according to a curriculum -- in order to evaluate if current CL models are able to exploit structure across tasks. We devote particular emphasis to providing the CL community with a rigorous and reproducible evaluation protocol for measuring the ability of a model to generalize and not to forget while learning. Furthermore, we provide an extensive experimental evaluation showing that popular CL strategies, when challenged with our benchmarks, yield sub-par performance, high levels of forgetting, and present a limited ability to effectively leverage curriculum task ordering. We believe that these results highlight the need for rigorous comparisons in future CL works as well as pave the way to design new CL strategies that are able to deal with more complex scenarios.
summary: Continual learning (CL) is one of the most promising trends in recent machine learning research. Its goal is to go beyond classical assumptions in machine learning and develop models and learning strategies that present high robustness in dynamic environments. The landscape of CL research is fragmented into several learning evaluation protocols, comprising different learning tasks, datasets, and evaluation metrics. Additionally, the benchmarks adopted so far are still distant from the complexity of real-world scenarios, and are usually tailored to highlight capabilities specific to certain strategies. In such a landscape, it is hard to objectively assess strategies. In this work, we fill this gap for CL on image data by introducing two novel CL benchmarks that involve multiple heterogeneous tasks from six image datasets, with varying levels of complexity and quality. Our aim is to fairly evaluate current state-of-the-art CL strategies on a common ground that is closer to complex real-world scenarios. We additionally structure our benchmarks so that tasks are presented in increasing and decreasing order of complexity -- according to a curriculum -- in order to evaluate if current CL models are able to exploit structure across tasks. We devote particular emphasis to providing the CL community with a rigorous and reproducible evaluation protocol for measuring the ability of a model to generalize and not to forget while learning. Furthermore, we provide an extensive experimental evaluation showing that popular CL strategies, when challenged with our benchmarks, yield sub-par performance, high levels of forgetting, and present a limited ability to effectively leverage curriculum task ordering. We believe that these results highlight the need for rigorous comparisons in future CL works as well as pave the way to design new CL strategies that are able to deal with more complex scenarios.
abstract_zh: 持续学习（CL）是最近机器学习研究中最有前途的趋势之一。其目标是超越机器学习中的经典假设，开发在动态环境中具有高鲁棒性的模型和学习策略。 CL 研究的格局分为几个学习评估协议，包括不同的学习任务、数据集和评估指标。此外，迄今为止采用的基准仍然与现实场景的复杂性相距甚远，并且通常是为了突出特定于某些策略的功能而定制的。在这种情况下，很难客观地评估策略。在这项工作中，我们通过引入两个新颖的 CL 基准来填补图像数据上 CL 的这一空白，这些基准涉及来自六个图像数据集的多个异构任务，具有不同的复杂性和质量级别。我们的目标是在更接近复杂的现实场景的共同点上公平地评估当前最先进的 CL 策略。我们还构建了基准，以便根据课程以复杂性递增和递减的顺序呈现任务，以便评估当前的 CL 模型是否能够利用跨任务的结构。我们特别注重为 CL 社区提供严格且可重复的评估协议，用于衡量模型在学习时泛化和不遗忘的能力。此外，我们提供了广泛的实验评估，表明流行的 CL 策略在受到我们的基准挑战时，会产生低于标准的表现、高水平的遗忘，并且有效利用课程任务排序的能力有限。我们相信，这些结果凸显了未来 CL 工作中进行严格比较的必要性，并为设计能够处理更复杂场景的新 CL 策略铺平了道路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两个新的持续学习基准，通过多异构图像任务评估模型在复杂现实场景中的泛化与记忆保持能力。
AI.motivation: 现有持续学习基准过于简单且缺乏现实复杂性，难以客观比较不同策略的性能。
AI.method: 构建包含六个图像数据集的多任务基准，按复杂度递增/递减顺序排列任务，并设计可复现的评估协议。
AI.result: 主流持续学习策略在基准测试中表现不佳，存在显著遗忘问题且难以有效利用课程任务顺序。
AI.conclusion: 需建立更严格的比较标准，并开发能处理复杂场景的新持续学习策略。

search_text: From MNIST to ImageNet and Back: Benchmarking Continual Curriculum Learning 从 MNIST 到 ImageNet 并返回：持续课程学习的基准测试 Continual learning (CL) is one of the most promising trends in recent machine learning research. Its goal is to go beyond classical assumptions in machine learning and develop models and learning strategies that present high robustness in dynamic environments. The landscape of CL research is fragmented into several learning evaluation protocols, comprising different learning tasks, datasets, and evaluation metrics. Additionally, the benchmarks adopted so far are still distant from the complexity of real-world scenarios, and are usually tailored to highlight capabilities specific to certain strategies. In such a landscape, it is hard to objectively assess strategies. In this work, we fill this gap for CL on image data by introducing two novel CL benchmarks that involve multiple heterogeneous tasks from six image datasets, with varying levels of complexity and quality. Our aim is to fairly evaluate current state-of-the-art CL strategies on a common ground that is closer to complex real-world scenarios. We additionally structure our benchmarks so that tasks are presented in increasing and decreasing order of complexity -- according to a curriculum -- in order to evaluate if current CL models are able to exploit structure across tasks. We devote particular emphasis to providing the CL community with a rigorous and reproducible evaluation protocol for measuring the ability of a model to generalize and not to forget while learning. Furthermore, we provide an extensive experimental evaluation showing that popular CL strategies, when challenged with our benchmarks, yield sub-par performance, high levels of forgetting, and present a limited ability to effectively leverage curriculum task ordering. We believe that these results highlight the need for rigorous comparisons in future CL works as well as pave the way to design new CL strategies that are able to deal with more complex scenarios. 持续学习（CL）是最近机器学习研究中最有前途的趋势之一。其目标是超越机器学习中的经典假设，开发在动态环境中具有高鲁棒性的模型和学习策略。 CL 研究的格局分为几个学习评估协议，包括不同的学习任务、数据集和评估指标。此外，迄今为止采用的基准仍然与现实场景的复杂性相距甚远，并且通常是为了突出特定于某些策略的功能而定制的。在这种情况下，很难客观地评估策略。在这项工作中，我们通过引入两个新颖的 CL 基准来填补图像数据上 CL 的这一空白，这些基准涉及来自六个图像数据集的多个异构任务，具有不同的复杂性和质量级别。我们的目标是在更接近复杂的现实场景的共同点上公平地评估当前最先进的 CL 策略。我们还构建了基准，以便根据课程以复杂性递增和递减的顺序呈现任务，以便评估当前的 CL 模型是否能够利用跨任务的结构。我们特别注重为 CL 社区提供严格且可重复的评估协议，用于衡量模型在学习时泛化和不遗忘的能力。此外，我们提供了广泛的实验评估，表明流行的 CL 策略在受到我们的基准挑战时，会产生低于标准的表现、高水平的遗忘，并且有效利用课程任务排序的能力有限。我们相信，这些结果凸显了未来 CL 工作中进行严格比较的必要性，并为设计能够处理更复杂场景的新 CL 策略铺平了道路。 本文提出两个新的持续学习基准，通过多异构图像任务评估模型在复杂现实场景中的泛化与记忆保持能力。 Kamil Faber,Dominik Zurek,Marcin Pietron,Nathalie Japkowicz,Antonio Vergari,Roberto Corizzo cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: René Haas,Inbar Huberman-Spiegelglas,Rotem Mulayoff,Stella Graßhof,Sami S. Brandt,Tomer Michaeli
title: Discovering Interpretable Directions in the Semantic Latent Space of Diffusion Models
title_zh: 发现扩散模型语义潜在空间中的可解释方向
abstract: Denoising Diffusion Models (DDMs) have emerged as a strong competitor to Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs). However, despite their widespread use in image synthesis and editing applications, their latent space is still not as well understood. Recently, a semantic latent space for DDMs, coined `$h$-space', was shown to facilitate semantic image editing in a way reminiscent of GANs. The $h$-space is comprised of the bottleneck activations in the DDM's denoiser across all timesteps of the diffusion process. In this paper, we explore the properties of h-space and propose several novel methods for finding meaningful semantic directions within it. We start by studying unsupervised methods for revealing interpretable semantic directions in pretrained DDMs. Specifically, we show that global latent directions emerge as the principal components in the latent space. Additionally, we provide a novel method for discovering image-specific semantic directions by spectral analysis of the Jacobian of the denoiser w.r.t. the latent code. Next, we extend the analysis by finding directions in a supervised fashion in unconditional DDMs. We demonstrate how such directions can be found by relying on either a labeled data set of real images or by annotating generated samples with a domain-specific attribute classifier. We further show how to semantically disentangle the found direction by simple linear projection. Our approaches are applicable without requiring any architectural modifications, text-based guidance, CLIP-based optimization, or model fine-tuning.
summary: Denoising Diffusion Models (DDMs) have emerged as a strong competitor to Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs). However, despite their widespread use in image synthesis and editing applications, their latent space is still not as well understood. Recently, a semantic latent space for DDMs, coined `$h$-space', was shown to facilitate semantic image editing in a way reminiscent of GANs. The $h$-space is comprised of the bottleneck activations in the DDM's denoiser across all timesteps of the diffusion process. In this paper, we explore the properties of h-space and propose several novel methods for finding meaningful semantic directions within it. We start by studying unsupervised methods for revealing interpretable semantic directions in pretrained DDMs. Specifically, we show that global latent directions emerge as the principal components in the latent space. Additionally, we provide a novel method for discovering image-specific semantic directions by spectral analysis of the Jacobian of the denoiser w.r.t. the latent code. Next, we extend the analysis by finding directions in a supervised fashion in unconditional DDMs. We demonstrate how such directions can be found by relying on either a labeled data set of real images or by annotating generated samples with a domain-specific attribute classifier. We further show how to semantically disentangle the found direction by simple linear projection. Our approaches are applicable without requiring any architectural modifications, text-based guidance, CLIP-based optimization, or model fine-tuning.
abstract_zh: 去噪扩散模型（DDM）已成为生成对抗网络（GAN）的强大竞争对手。然而，尽管它们在图像合成和编辑应用程序中广泛使用，但它们的潜在空间仍然没有得到很好的了解。最近，DDM 的语义潜在空间（被称为“$h$-space”）被证明可以以类似于 GAN 的方式促进语义图像编辑。 $h$ 空间由扩散过程所有时间步长的 DDM 降噪器中的瓶颈激活组成。在本文中，我们探索了 h 空间的属性，并提出了几种在其中寻找有意义的语义方向的新方法。我们首先研究用于揭示预训练 DDM 中可解释语义方向的无监督方法。具体来说，我们表明全局潜在方向作为潜在空间中的主要组成部分出现。此外，我们提供了一种通过对降噪器的雅可比行列式进行谱分析来发现图像特定语义方向的新颖方法。潜在的代码。接下来，我们通过在无条件 DDM 中以监督方式寻找方向来扩展分析。我们演示了如何通过依赖真实图像的标记数据集或通过使用特定于域的属性分类器注释生成的样本来找到这些方向。我们进一步展示了如何通过简单的线性投影在语义上解开找到的方向。我们的方法无需任何架构修改、基于文本的指导、基于 CLIP 的优化或模型微调即可适用。

AI.tldr: 本文研究扩散模型的语义潜在空间（h-space）特性，并提出多种方法发现其中的可解释语义方向，以实现更有效的图像编辑。
AI.motivation: 尽管扩散模型在图像生成领域广泛应用，但其潜在空间的语义可解释性仍不明确，而h-space为语义编辑提供了新方向。
AI.method: 通过无监督主成分分析、图像特定方向的雅可比矩阵谱分析、以及有监督的标注数据/分类器引导方法，在h-space中发现语义方向，并通过线性投影实现语义解耦。
AI.result: 提出的方法无需模型修改或微调，成功在预训练扩散模型中识别出可解释的语义方向，并实现可控的图像编辑。
AI.conclusion: 本文为理解扩散模型潜在空间提供了新视角，提出的无监督和有监督方法可有效挖掘语义方向，推动其在图像编辑等任务中的应用。

authors_text: Yuhao Chen,Xin Tan,Borui Zhao,Zhaowei Chen,Renjie Song,Jiajun Liang,Xuequan Lu
title: Boosting Semi-Supervised Learning by Exploiting All Unlabeled Data
title_zh: 通过利用所有未标记数据促进半监督学习
abstract: Semi-supervised learning (SSL) has attracted enormous attention due to its vast potential of mitigating the dependence on large labeled datasets. The latest methods (e.g., FixMatch) use a combination of consistency regularization and pseudo-labeling to achieve remarkable successes. However, these methods all suffer from the waste of complicated examples since all pseudo-labels have to be selected by a high threshold to filter out noisy ones. Hence, the examples with ambiguous predictions will not contribute to the training phase. For better leveraging all unlabeled examples, we propose two novel techniques: Entropy Meaning Loss (EML) and Adaptive Negative Learning (ANL). EML incorporates the prediction distribution of non-target classes into the optimization objective to avoid competition with target class, and thus generating more high-confidence predictions for selecting pseudo-label. ANL introduces the additional negative pseudo-label for all unlabeled data to leverage low-confidence examples. It adaptively allocates this label by dynamically evaluating the top-k performance of the model. EML and ANL do not introduce any additional parameter and hyperparameter. We integrate these techniques with FixMatch, and develop a simple yet powerful framework called FullMatch. Extensive experiments on several common SSL benchmarks (CIFAR-10/100, SVHN, STL-10 and ImageNet) demonstrate that FullMatch exceeds FixMatch by a large margin. Integrated with FlexMatch (an advanced FixMatch-based framework), we achieve state-of-the-art performance. Source code is at https://github.com/megvii-research/FullMatch.
summary: Semi-supervised learning (SSL) has attracted enormous attention due to its vast potential of mitigating the dependence on large labeled datasets. The latest methods (e.g., FixMatch) use a combination of consistency regularization and pseudo-labeling to achieve remarkable successes. However, these methods all suffer from the waste of complicated examples since all pseudo-labels have to be selected by a high threshold to filter out noisy ones. Hence, the examples with ambiguous predictions will not contribute to the training phase. For better leveraging all unlabeled examples, we propose two novel techniques: Entropy Meaning Loss (EML) and Adaptive Negative Learning (ANL). EML incorporates the prediction distribution of non-target classes into the optimization objective to avoid competition with target class, and thus generating more high-confidence predictions for selecting pseudo-label. ANL introduces the additional negative pseudo-label for all unlabeled data to leverage low-confidence examples. It adaptively allocates this label by dynamically evaluating the top-k performance of the model. EML and ANL do not introduce any additional parameter and hyperparameter. We integrate these techniques with FixMatch, and develop a simple yet powerful framework called FullMatch. Extensive experiments on several common SSL benchmarks (CIFAR-10/100, SVHN, STL-10 and ImageNet) demonstrate that FullMatch exceeds FixMatch by a large margin. Integrated with FlexMatch (an advanced FixMatch-based framework), we achieve state-of-the-art performance. Source code is at https://github.com/megvii-research/FullMatch.
abstract_zh: 半监督学习（SSL）由于其在减轻对大型标记数据集的依赖方面的巨大潜力而​​引起了极大的关注。最新的方法（例如 FixMatch）结合使用一致性正则化和伪标签来取得显着的成功。然而，这些方法都浪费了复杂的示例，因为所有伪标签都必须通过高阈值来选择以滤除噪声标签。因此，预测不明确的示例不会对训练阶段做出贡献。为了更好地利用所有未标记的示例，我们提出了两种新技术：熵意义损失（EML）和自适应负学习（ANL）。 EML将非目标类的预测分布纳入优化目标，以避免与目标类竞争，从而生成更多高置信度的预测来选择伪标签。 ANL 为所有未标记的数据引入了额外的负伪标签，以利用低置信度示例。它通过动态评估模型的 top-k 性能来自适应地分配该标签。 EML和ANL没有引入任何额外的参数和超参数。我们将这些技术与 FixMatch 集成，并开发了一个简单但功能强大的框架，称为 FullMatch。对几个常见 SSL 基准（CIFAR-10/100、SVHN、STL-10 和 ImageNet）的大量实验表明，FullMatch 大幅超过 FixMatch。与 FlexMatch（一种基于 FixMatch 的高级框架）集成，我们实现了最先进的性能。源代码位于 https://github.com/megvii-research/FullMatch。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为FullMatch的半监督学习框架，通过利用所有未标记数据提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督方法（如FixMatch）因依赖高阈值筛选伪标签而浪费了大量模糊预测样本，未能充分利用所有未标记数据。
AI.method: 提出熵意义损失（EML）和自适应负样本学习（ANL）技术，EML通过引入非目标类分布避免竞争，ANL为低置信度样本生成负伪标签并动态分配。
AI.result: 在CIFAR、SVHN、ImageNet等基准测试中，FullMatch显著优于FixMatch，结合FlexMatch后达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: FullMatch通过有效利用所有未标记数据，在无需额外参数的情况下提升了半监督学习效果。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种名为FullMatch的半监督学习框架，通过利用所有未标记数据提升模型性能。

search_text: Boosting Semi-Supervised Learning by Exploiting All Unlabeled Data 通过利用所有未标记数据促进半监督学习 Semi-supervised learning (SSL) has attracted enormous attention due to its vast potential of mitigating the dependence on large labeled datasets. The latest methods (e.g., FixMatch) use a combination of consistency regularization and pseudo-labeling to achieve remarkable successes. However, these methods all suffer from the waste of complicated examples since all pseudo-labels have to be selected by a high threshold to filter out noisy ones. Hence, the examples with ambiguous predictions will not contribute to the training phase. For better leveraging all unlabeled examples, we propose two novel techniques: Entropy Meaning Loss (EML) and Adaptive Negative Learning (ANL). EML incorporates the prediction distribution of non-target classes into the optimization objective to avoid competition with target class, and thus generating more high-confidence predictions for selecting pseudo-label. ANL introduces the additional negative pseudo-label for all unlabeled data to leverage low-confidence examples. It adaptively allocates this label by dynamically evaluating the top-k performance of the model. EML and ANL do not introduce any additional parameter and hyperparameter. We integrate these techniques with FixMatch, and develop a simple yet powerful framework called FullMatch. Extensive experiments on several common SSL benchmarks (CIFAR-10/100, SVHN, STL-10 and ImageNet) demonstrate that FullMatch exceeds FixMatch by a large margin. Integrated with FlexMatch (an advanced FixMatch-based framework), we achieve state-of-the-art performance. Source code is at https://github.com/megvii-research/FullMatch. 半监督学习（SSL）由于其在减轻对大型标记数据集的依赖方面的巨大潜力而​​引起了极大的关注。最新的方法（例如 FixMatch）结合使用一致性正则化和伪标签来取得显着的成功。然而，这些方法都浪费了复杂的示例，因为所有伪标签都必须通过高阈值来选择以滤除噪声标签。因此，预测不明确的示例不会对训练阶段做出贡献。为了更好地利用所有未标记的示例，我们提出了两种新技术：熵意义损失（EML）和自适应负学习（ANL）。 EML将非目标类的预测分布纳入优化目标，以避免与目标类竞争，从而生成更多高置信度的预测来选择伪标签。 ANL 为所有未标记的数据引入了额外的负伪标签，以利用低置信度示例。它通过动态评估模型的 top-k 性能来自适应地分配该标签。 EML和ANL没有引入任何额外的参数和超参数。我们将这些技术与 FixMatch 集成，并开发了一个简单但功能强大的框架，称为 FullMatch。对几个常见 SSL 基准（CIFAR-10/100、SVHN、STL-10 和 ImageNet）的大量实验表明，FullMatch 大幅超过 FixMatch。与 FlexMatch（一种基于 FixMatch 的高级框架）集成，我们实现了最先进的性能。源代码位于 https://github.com/megvii-research/FullMatch。 本文提出一种名为FullMatch的半监督学习框架，通过利用所有未标记数据提升模型性能。 Yuhao Chen,Xin Tan,Borui Zhao,Zhaowei Chen,Renjie Song,Jiajun Liang,Xuequan Lu cs.CV

authors_text: Tomas da Veiga,Giovanni Pittiglio,Michael Brockdorff,James H. Chandler,Pietro Valdastri
title: Six-degree-of-freedom Localization Under Multiple Permanent Magnets Actuation
title_zh: 多永磁驱动下的六自由度定位
comment: Under second round of review at Robotics and Automation Letters
comments: Under second round of review at Robotics and Automation Letters
abstract: Localization of magnetically actuated medical robots is essential for accurate actuation, closed loop control and delivery of functionality. Despite extensive progress in the use of magnetic field and inertial measurements for pose estimation, these have been either under single external permanent magnet actuation or coil systems. With the advent of new magnetic actuation systems comprised of multiple external permanent magnets for increased control and manipulability, new localization techniques are necessary to account for and leverage the additional magnetic field sources. In this letter, we introduce a novel magnetic localization technique in the Special Euclidean Group SE(3) for multiple external permanent magnetic field actuation and control systems. The method relies on a milli-meter scale three-dimensional accelerometer and a three-dimensional magnetic field sensor and is able to estimate the full 6 degree-of-freedom pose without any prior pose information. We demonstrated the localization system with two external permanent magnets and achieved localization errors of 8.5 ? 2.4 mm in position norm and 3.7 ? 3.6? in orientation, across a cubic workspace with 20 cm length.
summary: Localization of magnetically actuated medical robots is essential for accurate actuation, closed loop control and delivery of functionality. Despite extensive progress in the use of magnetic field and inertial measurements for pose estimation, these have been either under single external permanent magnet actuation or coil systems. With the advent of new magnetic actuation systems comprised of multiple external permanent magnets for increased control and manipulability, new localization techniques are necessary to account for and leverage the additional magnetic field sources. In this letter, we introduce a novel magnetic localization technique in the Special Euclidean Group SE(3) for multiple external permanent magnetic field actuation and control systems. The method relies on a milli-meter scale three-dimensional accelerometer and a three-dimensional magnetic field sensor and is able to estimate the full 6 degree-of-freedom pose without any prior pose information. We demonstrated the localization system with two external permanent magnets and achieved localization errors of 8.5 ? 2.4 mm in position norm and 3.7 ? 3.6? in orientation, across a cubic workspace with 20 cm length.
abstract_zh: 磁驱动医疗机器人的定位对于精确驱动、闭环控制和功能交付至关重要。尽管在使用磁场和惯性测量进行位姿估计方面取得了广泛进展，但这些都是在单个外部永磁体驱动或线圈系统下进行的。随着由多个外部永磁体组成的新型磁驱动系统的出现，以增强控制和可操作性，需要新的定位技术来解释和利用额外的磁场源。在这封信中，我们介绍了特殊欧几里得群 SE(3) 中的一种新颖的磁定位技术，用于多个外部永磁场驱动和控制系统。该方法依赖于毫米级三维加速度计和三维磁场传感器，能够在没有任何先验位姿信息的情况下估计完整的6自由度位姿。我们演示了带有两个外部永磁体的定位系统，并实现了 8.5 ? 的定位误差。位置标准为 2.4 毫米，标准位置为 3.7 毫米3.6？沿方向，穿过长度为 20 厘米的立方体工作空间。

AI.tldr: 提出一种适用于多永磁体驱动系统的六自由度定位方法
AI.motivation: 现有技术多针对单一磁体或线圈，多磁体系统需要新方法以提升控制与操作精度
AI.method: 利用毫米级三维加速度计和磁场传感器，在SE(3)框架下无需先验信息估计六自由度姿态
AI.result: 实验显示位置误差8.5±2.4mm，方向误差3.7±3.6度，在20cm立方工作空间内有效
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效支持多永磁体驱动系统，为医疗机器人精准控制提供新方案

authors_text: Ruihai Wu,Chuanruo Ning,Hao Dong
title: Learning Foresightful Dense Visual Affordance for Deformable Object Manipulation
title_zh: 学习可变形对象操作的有远见的密集视觉可供性
abstract: Understanding and manipulating deformable objects (e.g., ropes and fabrics) is an essential yet challenging task with broad applications. Difficulties come from complex states and dynamics, diverse configurations and high-dimensional action space of deformable objects. Besides, the manipulation tasks usually require multiple steps to accomplish, and greedy policies may easily lead to local optimal states. Existing studies usually tackle this problem using reinforcement learning or imitating expert demonstrations, with limitations in modeling complex states or requiring hand-crafted expert policies. In this paper, we study deformable object manipulation using dense visual affordance, with generalization towards diverse states, and propose a novel kind of foresightful dense affordance, which avoids local optima by estimating states' values for long-term manipulation. We propose a framework for learning this representation, with novel designs such as multi-stage stable learning and efficient self-supervised data collection without experts. Experiments demonstrate the superiority of our proposed foresightful dense affordance. Project page: https://hyperplane-lab.github.io/DeformableAffordance
summary: Understanding and manipulating deformable objects (e.g., ropes and fabrics) is an essential yet challenging task with broad applications. Difficulties come from complex states and dynamics, diverse configurations and high-dimensional action space of deformable objects. Besides, the manipulation tasks usually require multiple steps to accomplish, and greedy policies may easily lead to local optimal states. Existing studies usually tackle this problem using reinforcement learning or imitating expert demonstrations, with limitations in modeling complex states or requiring hand-crafted expert policies. In this paper, we study deformable object manipulation using dense visual affordance, with generalization towards diverse states, and propose a novel kind of foresightful dense affordance, which avoids local optima by estimating states' values for long-term manipulation. We propose a framework for learning this representation, with novel designs such as multi-stage stable learning and efficient self-supervised data collection without experts. Experiments demonstrate the superiority of our proposed foresightful dense affordance. Project page: https://hyperplane-lab.github.io/DeformableAffordance
abstract_zh: 理解和操纵可变形物体（例如绳索和织物）是一项具有广泛应用的重要但具有挑战性的任务。困难来自于可变形物体的复杂状态和动力学、多样的配置和高维动作空间。此外，操纵任务通常需要多个步骤才能完成，贪婪的策略很容易导致局部最优状态。现有的研究通常使用强化学习或模仿专家演示来解决这个问题，但在建模复杂状态或需要手工制定专家策略方面存在局限性。在本文中，我们研究使用密集视觉可供性的可变形对象操纵，并对不同状态进行泛化，并提出一种新颖的有远见的密集可供性，它通过估计长期操纵的状态值来避免局部最优。我们提出了一个学习这种表示的框架，具有新颖的设计，例如多阶段稳定学习和无需专家的高效自监督数据收集。实验证明了我们提出的有远见的密集可供性的优越性。项目页面：https://hyperplane-lab.github.io/DeformableAffordance

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于前瞻密集视觉可操作性的新方法，用于解决可变形物体（如绳索和织物）的操控问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在建模复杂状态或依赖手工设计专家策略时存在局限性，且贪心策略易陷入局部最优。需开发一种能泛化到多样状态并避免局部最优的操控框架。
AI.method: 提出前瞻密集可操作性框架，包含多阶段稳定学习和无需专家的高效自监督数据收集，通过估计长期操控状态值避免局部最优。
AI.result: 实验验证了所提方法在可变形物体操控任务中的优越性，优于现有强化学习和模仿学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过前瞻密集视觉可操作性有效解决了可变形物体操控的复杂状态建模和局部最优问题，具有广泛的应用潜力。

We propose a framework for learning this representation, with novel designs such as multi-stage stable learning and efficient self-supervised data collection without experts. Experiments demonstrate the superiority of our proposed foresightful dense affordance. Project page: https://hyperplane-lab.github.io/DeformableAffordance 理解和操纵可变形物体（例如绳索和织物）是一项具有广泛应用的重要但具有挑战性的任务。困难来自于可变形物体的复杂状态和动力学、多样的配置和高维动作空间。此外，操纵任务通常需要多个步骤才能完成，贪婪的策略很容易导致局部最优状态。现有的研究通常使用强化学习或模仿专家演示来解决这个问题，但在建模复杂状态或需要手工制定专家策略方面存在局限性。在本文中，我们研究使用密集视觉可供性的可变形对象操纵，并对不同状态进行泛化，并提出一种新颖的有远见的密集可供性，它通过估计长期操纵的状态值来避免局部最优。我们提出了一个学习这种表示的框架，具有新颖的设计，例如多阶段稳定学习和无需专家的高效自监督数据收集。实验证明了我们提出的有远见的密集可供性的优越性。项目页面：https://hyperplane-lab.github.io/DeformableAffordance 本文提出一种基于前瞻密集视觉可操作性的新方法，用于解决可变形物体（如绳索和织物）的操控问题。 Ruihai Wu,Chuanruo Ning,Hao Dong cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Yuxuan Shi,Lingxiao Yang,Wangpeng An,Xiantong Zhen,Liuqing Wang
title: Parameter-Free Channel Attention for Image Classification and Super-Resolution
title_zh: 用于图像分类和超分辨率的无参数通道注意
abstract: The channel attention mechanism is a useful technique widely employed in deep convolutional neural networks to boost the performance for image processing tasks, eg, image classification and image super-resolution. It is usually designed as a parameterized sub-network and embedded into the convolutional layers of the network to learn more powerful feature representations. However, current channel attention induces more parameters and therefore leads to higher computational costs. To deal with this issue, in this work, we propose a Parameter-Free Channel Attention (PFCA) module to boost the performance of popular image classification and image super-resolution networks, but completely sweep out the parameter growth of channel attention. Experiments on CIFAR-100, ImageNet, and DIV2K validate that our PFCA module improves the performance of ResNet on image classification and improves the performance of MSRResNet on image super-resolution tasks, respectively, while bringing little growth of parameters and FLOPs.
summary: The channel attention mechanism is a useful technique widely employed in deep convolutional neural networks to boost the performance for image processing tasks, eg, image classification and image super-resolution. It is usually designed as a parameterized sub-network and embedded into the convolutional layers of the network to learn more powerful feature representations. However, current channel attention induces more parameters and therefore leads to higher computational costs. To deal with this issue, in this work, we propose a Parameter-Free Channel Attention (PFCA) module to boost the performance of popular image classification and image super-resolution networks, but completely sweep out the parameter growth of channel attention. Experiments on CIFAR-100, ImageNet, and DIV2K validate that our PFCA module improves the performance of ResNet on image classification and improves the performance of MSRResNet on image super-resolution tasks, respectively, while bringing little growth of parameters and FLOPs.
abstract_zh: 通道注意力机制是一种广泛应用于深度卷积神经网络中的有用技术，可提高图像处理任务（例如图像分类和图像超分辨率）的性能。它通常被设计为参数化子网络并嵌入到网络的卷积层中以学习更强大的特征表示。然而，当前的通道注意力引入了更多的参数，因此导致更高的计算成本。为了解决这个问题，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种无参数通道注意力（PFCA）模块来提高流行图像分类和图像超分辨率网络的性能，但完全消除了通道注意力的参数增长。在CIFAR-100、ImageNet和DIV2K上的实验验证了我们的PFCA模块分别提高了ResNet在图像分类上的性能和MSRResNet在图像超分辨率任务上的性能，同时带来的参数和FLOPs的增长很小。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无参数的通道注意力模块（PFCA），用于提升图像分类和超分辨率任务的性能，同时避免增加模型参数和计算量。
AI.motivation: 现有通道注意力机制会引入额外参数和计算成本，导致模型复杂度增加，因此需要一种无需参数且高效的通道注意力方法。
AI.method: 设计参数-free的通道注意力模块（PFCA），通过全局特征重标定机制替代传统可学习参数模块，完全消除参数增长。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-100、ImageNet和DIV2K数据集上，PFCA分别提升ResNet分类精度和MSRResNet超分辨率性能，且参数量和FLOPs几乎无增长。
AI.conclusion: PFCA模块在保持模型轻量化的同时有效提升性能，为图像处理任务提供了高效且通用的通道注意力解决方案。

authors_text: Hao Yang,Lanqing Hong,Aoxue Li,Tianyang Hu,Zhenguo Li,Gim Hee Lee,Liwei Wang
title: ContraNeRF: Generalizable Neural Radiance Fields for Synthetic-to-real Novel View Synthesis via Contrastive Learning
title_zh: ContraNeRF：通过对比学习实现从合成到真实的小说视图合成的可推广神经辐射场
abstract: Although many recent works have investigated generalizable NeRF-based novel view synthesis for unseen scenes, they seldom consider the synthetic-to-real generalization, which is desired in many practical applications. In this work, we first investigate the effects of synthetic data in synthetic-to-real novel view synthesis and surprisingly observe that models trained with synthetic data tend to produce sharper but less accurate volume densities. For pixels where the volume densities are correct, fine-grained details will be obtained. Otherwise, severe artifacts will be produced. To maintain the advantages of using synthetic data while avoiding its negative effects, we propose to introduce geometry-aware contrastive learning to learn multi-view consistent features with geometric constraints. Meanwhile, we adopt cross-view attention to further enhance the geometry perception of features by querying features across input views. Experiments demonstrate that under the synthetic-to-real setting, our method can render images with higher quality and better fine-grained details, outperforming existing generalizable novel view synthesis methods in terms of PSNR, SSIM, and LPIPS. When trained on real data, our method also achieves state-of-the-art results.
summary: Although many recent works have investigated generalizable NeRF-based novel view synthesis for unseen scenes, they seldom consider the synthetic-to-real generalization, which is desired in many practical applications. In this work, we first investigate the effects of synthetic data in synthetic-to-real novel view synthesis and surprisingly observe that models trained with synthetic data tend to produce sharper but less accurate volume densities. For pixels where the volume densities are correct, fine-grained details will be obtained. Otherwise, severe artifacts will be produced. To maintain the advantages of using synthetic data while avoiding its negative effects, we propose to introduce geometry-aware contrastive learning to learn multi-view consistent features with geometric constraints. Meanwhile, we adopt cross-view attention to further enhance the geometry perception of features by querying features across input views. Experiments demonstrate that under the synthetic-to-real setting, our method can render images with higher quality and better fine-grained details, outperforming existing generalizable novel view synthesis methods in terms of PSNR, SSIM, and LPIPS. When trained on real data, our method also achieves state-of-the-art results.
abstract_zh: 尽管最近的许多工作已经研究了针对未见过的场景的基于 NeRF 的可泛化新颖视图合成，但他们很少考虑许多实际应用中所需要的合成到真实的泛化。在这项工作中，我们首先研究合成数据在合成到真实的新颖视图合成中的影响，并令人惊讶地观察到使用合成数据训练的模型往往会产生更清晰但不太准确的体积密度。对于体积密度正确的像素，将获得细粒度的细节。否则，将会产生严重的伪影。为了保持使用合成数据的优势，同时避免其负面影响，我们建议引入几何感知对比学习来学习具有几何约束的多视图一致特征。同时，我们采用跨视图注意力，通过跨输入视图查询特征来进一步增强特征的几何感知。实验表明，在合成到真实的设置下，我们的方法可以渲染具有更高质量和更好细粒度细节的图像，在 PSNR、SSIM 和 LPIPS 方面优于现有的可概括的新颖视图合成方法。当使用真实数据进行训练时，我们的方法也取得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ContraNeRF方法，通过对比学习解决合成数据到真实场景的新型视角合成问题，提升神经辐射场（NeRF）的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有研究较少关注合成数据到真实场景的泛化问题，而实际应用中该能力至关重要。作者发现合成数据训练的模型虽生成更清晰图像，但体积密度准确性不足，导致细节缺失或严重伪影。
AI.method: 引入几何感知对比学习，学习多视角一致特征并加入几何约束；结合跨视角注意力机制，通过跨视图特征查询增强几何感知能力。
AI.result: 在合成到真实场景设置下，该方法在PSNR、SSIM、LPIPS指标上优于现有方法，且在真实数据训练时达到SOTA水平。
AI.conclusion: 通过对比学习与几何约束结合，ContraNeRF有效融合了合成数据与真实数据的优势，在新型视角合成任务中取得更优结果。

authors_text: Michael Filler,Benjamin Reinhardt
title: Nanomodular Electronics
title_zh: 纳米模块化电子产品
abstract: It may be possible to reinvent how microelectronics are made using a two step process: (1) Synthesizing modular, nanometer-scale components -- transistors, sensors, and other devices -- and suspending them in a liquid "ink" for storage or transport; (2) Using a 3D-printer-like machine to create circuits by placing and wiring the components. Developments in nanotechnology, colloidal chemistry, precision additive manufacturing, and computer vision suggest this new process is possible. Herein, we describe a roadmap to these nanomodular electronics, which could enable a "fab in a box" and make fabricating microelectronics as straightforward as printing this document.
summary: It may be possible to reinvent how microelectronics are made using a two step process: (1) Synthesizing modular, nanometer-scale components -- transistors, sensors, and other devices -- and suspending them in a liquid "ink" for storage or transport; (2) Using a 3D-printer-like machine to create circuits by placing and wiring the components. Developments in nanotechnology, colloidal chemistry, precision additive manufacturing, and computer vision suggest this new process is possible. Herein, we describe a roadmap to these nanomodular electronics, which could enable a "fab in a box" and make fabricating microelectronics as straightforward as printing this document.
abstract_zh: 有可能通过两步过程重新发明微电子产品的制造方式：（1）合成模块化、纳米级组件——晶体管、传感器和其他设备——并将它们悬浮在液体“墨水”中进行存储或运输； (2) 使用类似 3D 打印机的机器通过放置和接线元件来创建电路。纳米技术、胶体化学、精密增材制造和计算机视觉的发展表明这种新工艺是可能的。在这里，我们描述了这些纳米模块化电子产品的路线图，它可以实现“盒子里的工厂”，并使微电子产品的制造像打印本文档一样简单。

AI.tldr: 提出一种两步法制造纳米模块化电子的路线图，通过合成纳米组件并使用3D打印技术进行电路组装
AI.motivation: 传统微电子制造复杂且成本高，需更简单的方法实现快速、低成本的电子制造
AI.method: 利用纳米技术合成纳米组件，结合胶体化学、3D打印和计算机视觉技术进行电路组装
AI.result: 提出实现纳米模块化电子的可行技术路径，并展示其潜在应用
AI.conclusion: 该方法可能推动电子制造变革，实现类似打印的微电子制造，降低门槛并促进创新

search_text: Nanomodular Electronics 纳米模块化电子产品 It may be possible to reinvent how microelectronics are made using a two step process: (1) Synthesizing modular, nanometer-scale components -- transistors, sensors, and other devices -- and suspending them in a liquid "ink" for storage or transport; (2) Using a 3D-printer-like machine to create circuits by placing and wiring the components. Developments in nanotechnology, colloidal chemistry, precision additive manufacturing, and computer vision suggest this new process is possible. Herein, we describe a roadmap to these nanomodular electronics, which could enable a "fab in a box" and make fabricating microelectronics as straightforward as printing this document. 有可能通过两步过程重新发明微电子产品的制造方式：（1）合成模块化、纳米级组件——晶体管、传感器和其他设备——并将它们悬浮在液体“墨水”中进行存储或运输； (2) 使用类似 3D 打印机的机器通过放置和接线元件来创建电路。纳米技术、胶体化学、精密增材制造和计算机视觉的发展表明这种新工艺是可能的。在这里，我们描述了这些纳米模块化电子产品的路线图，它可以实现“盒子里的工厂”，并使微电子产品的制造像打印本文档一样简单。 提出一种两步法制造纳米模块化电子的路线图，通过合成纳米组件并使用3D打印技术进行电路组装 Michael Filler,Benjamin Reinhardt cs.CY,cs.AR,cs.ET

authors_text: Changsheng Lv,Mengshi Qi,Xia Li,Zhengyuan Yang,Huadong Ma
title: SGFormer: Semantic Graph Transformer for Point Cloud-based 3D Scene Graph Generation
title_zh: SGFormer：用于基于点云的 3D 场景图生成的语义图转换器
comment: To be published in Thirty-Eighth AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence
comments: To be published in Thirty-Eighth AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence
abstract: In this paper, we propose a novel model called SGFormer, Semantic Graph TransFormer for point cloud-based 3D scene graph generation. The task aims to parse a point cloud-based scene into a semantic structural graph, with the core challenge of modeling the complex global structure. Existing methods based on graph convolutional networks (GCNs) suffer from the over-smoothing dilemma and can only propagate information from limited neighboring nodes. In contrast, SGFormer uses Transformer layers as the base building block to allow global information passing, with two types of newly-designed layers tailored for the 3D scene graph generation task. Specifically, we introduce the graph embedding layer to best utilize the global information in graph edges while maintaining comparable computation costs. Furthermore, we propose the semantic injection layer to leverage linguistic knowledge from large-scale language model (i.e., ChatGPT), to enhance objects' visual features. We benchmark our SGFormer on the established 3DSSG dataset and achieve a 40.94% absolute improvement in relationship prediction's R@50 and an 88.36% boost on the subset with complex scenes over the state-of-the-art. Our analyses further show SGFormer's superiority in the long-tail and zero-shot scenarios. Our source code is available at https://github.com/Andy20178/SGFormer.
summary: In this paper, we propose a novel model called SGFormer, Semantic Graph TransFormer for point cloud-based 3D scene graph generation. The task aims to parse a point cloud-based scene into a semantic structural graph, with the core challenge of modeling the complex global structure. Existing methods based on graph convolutional networks (GCNs) suffer from the over-smoothing dilemma and can only propagate information from limited neighboring nodes. In contrast, SGFormer uses Transformer layers as the base building block to allow global information passing, with two types of newly-designed layers tailored for the 3D scene graph generation task. Specifically, we introduce the graph embedding layer to best utilize the global information in graph edges while maintaining comparable computation costs. Furthermore, we propose the semantic injection layer to leverage linguistic knowledge from large-scale language model (i.e., ChatGPT), to enhance objects' visual features. We benchmark our SGFormer on the established 3DSSG dataset and achieve a 40.94% absolute improvement in relationship prediction's R@50 and an 88.36% boost on the subset with complex scenes over the state-of-the-art. Our analyses further show SGFormer's superiority in the long-tail and zero-shot scenarios. Our source code is available at https://github.com/Andy20178/SGFormer.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 SGFormer（语义图 TransFormer）的新颖模型，用于基于点云的 3D 场景图生成。该任务旨在将基于点云的场景解析为语义结构图，其核心挑战是对复杂的全局结构进行建模。现有的基于图卷积网络（GCN）的方法存在过度平滑的困境，并且只能从有限的相邻节点传播信息。相比之下，SGFormer 使用 Transformer 层作为基础构建块来允许全局信息传递，并有两种类型的新设计层专为 3D 场景图生成任务而定制。具体来说，我们引入图嵌入层来最好地利用图边缘中的全局信息，同时保持可比较的计算成本。此外，我们提出语义注入层来利用大规模语言模型（即 ChatGPT）中的语言知识来增强对象的视觉特征。我们在已建立的 3DSSG 数据集上对 SGFormer 进行基准测试，与最先进的技术相比，关系预测的 R@50 绝对提高了 40.94%，复杂场景子集提高了 88.36%。我们的分析进一步显示了 SGFormer 在长尾和零样本场景中的优越性。我们的源代码位于 https://github.com/Andy20178/SGFormer。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SGFormer模型，用于基于点云的3D场景图生成任务，旨在将点云场景解析为语义结构图。
AI.motivation: 现有基于图卷积网络的方法存在过度平滑问题且仅能传播局部邻域信息，难以建模复杂全局结构。
AI.method: 采用Transformer层作为基础模块，设计图嵌入层（利用全局图边信息）和语义注入层（融合ChatGPT语言模型知识）。
AI.result: 在3DSSG数据集上关系预测R@50指标绝对提升40.94%，复杂场景子集提升88.36%，长尾和零样本场景表现优异。
AI.conclusion: SGFormer通过全局信息交互和语义增强，在3D场景图生成任务中显著优于现有方法。

The task aims to parse a point cloud-based scene into a semantic structural graph, with the core challenge of modeling the complex global structure. Existing methods based on graph convolutional networks (GCNs) suffer from the over-smoothing dilemma and can only propagate information from limited neighboring nodes. In contrast, SGFormer uses Transformer layers as the base building block to allow global information passing, with two types of newly-designed layers tailored for the 3D scene graph generation task. Specifically, we introduce the graph embedding layer to best utilize the global information in graph edges while maintaining comparable computation costs. Furthermore, we propose the semantic injection layer to leverage linguistic knowledge from large-scale language model (i.e., ChatGPT), to enhance objects' visual features. We benchmark our SGFormer on the established 3DSSG dataset and achieve a 40.94% absolute improvement in relationship prediction's R@50 and an 88.36% boost on the subset with complex scenes over the state-of-the-art. Our analyses further show SGFormer's superiority in the long-tail and zero-shot scenarios. authors_text: Keigo Habara,Ellen Hidemi Fukuda,Nobuo Yamashita
title: Convergence analysis and acceleration of the smoothing methods for solving extensive-form games
title_zh: 解决扩展型博弈的平滑方法的收敛性分析和加速
abstract: The extensive-form game has been studied considerably in recent years. It can represent games with multiple decision points and incomplete information, and hence it is helpful in formulating games with uncertain inputs, such as poker. We consider an extended-form game with two players and zero-sum, i.e., the sum of their payoffs is always zero. In such games, the problem of finding the optimal strategy can be formulated as a bilinear saddle-point problem. This formulation grows huge depending on the size of the game, since it has variables representing the strategies at all decision points for each player. To solve such large-scale bilinear saddle-point problems, the excessive gap technique (EGT), a smoothing method, has been studied. This method generates a sequence of approximate solutions whose error is guaranteed to converge at $\mathcal{O}(1/k)$, where $k$ is the number of iterations. However, it has the disadvantage of having poor theoretical bounds on the error related to the game size. This makes it inapplicable to large games. Our goal is to improve the smoothing method for solving extensive-form games so that it can be applied to large-scale games. To this end, we make two contributions in this work. First, we slightly modify the strongly convex function used in the smoothing method in order to improve the theoretical bounds related to the game size. Second, we propose a heuristic called centering trick, which allows the smoothing method to be combined with other methods and consequently accelerates the convergence in practice. As a result, we combine EGT with CFR+, a state-of-the-art method for extensive-form games, to achieve good performance in games where conventional smoothing methods do not perform well. The proposed smoothing method is shown to have the potential to solve large games in practice.
summary: The extensive-form game has been studied considerably in recent years. It can represent games with multiple decision points and incomplete information, and hence it is helpful in formulating games with uncertain inputs, such as poker. We consider an extended-form game with two players and zero-sum, i.e., the sum of their payoffs is always zero. In such games, the problem of finding the optimal strategy can be formulated as a bilinear saddle-point problem. This formulation grows huge depending on the size of the game, since it has variables representing the strategies at all decision points for each player. To solve such large-scale bilinear saddle-point problems, the excessive gap technique (EGT), a smoothing method, has been studied. This method generates a sequence of approximate solutions whose error is guaranteed to converge at $\mathcal{O}(1/k)$, where $k$ is the number of iterations. However, it has the disadvantage of having poor theoretical bounds on the error related to the game size. This makes it inapplicable to large games. Our goal is to improve the smoothing method for solving extensive-form games so that it can be applied to large-scale games. To this end, we make two contributions in this work. First, we slightly modify the strongly convex function used in the smoothing method in order to improve the theoretical bounds related to the game size. Second, we propose a heuristic called centering trick, which allows the smoothing method to be combined with other methods and consequently accelerates the convergence in practice. As a result, we combine EGT with CFR+, a state-of-the-art method for extensive-form games, to achieve good performance in games where conventional smoothing methods do not perform well. The proposed smoothing method is shown to have the potential to solve large games in practice.
abstract_zh: 近年来，广泛形式博弈得到了广泛的研究。它可以表示具有多个决策点和不完整信息的游戏，因此有助于制定具有不确定输入的游戏，例如扑克。我们考虑一个有两个玩家的扩展形式的零和博弈，即他们的收益之和始终为零。在此类博弈中，寻找最优策略的问题可以表述为双线性鞍点问题。这个公式会根据游戏的规模而变得很大，因为它具有代表每个玩家在所有决策点的策略的变量。为了解决此类大规模双线性鞍点问题，人们研究了一种平滑方法——过度间隙技术（EGT）。该方法生成一系列近似解，其误差保证收敛于 $\mathcal{O}(1/k)$，其中 $k$ 是迭代次数。然而，它的缺点是与游戏大小相关的误差的理论界限较差。这使得它不适用于大型游戏。我们的目标是改进解决扩展型博弈的平滑方法，使其能够应用于大型博弈。为此，我们在这项工作中做出了两项贡献。首先，我们稍微修改平滑方法中使用的强凸函数，以提高与游戏规模相关的理论界限。其次，我们提出了一种称为中心技巧的启发式方法，它允许将平滑方法与其他方法结合起来，从而加速实践中的收敛。因此，我们将 EGT 与 CFR+（一种用于扩展形式游戏的最先进方法）相结合，以在传统平滑方法表现不佳的游戏中获得良好的性能。所提出的平滑方法被证明具有解决实践中大型博弈的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在改进求解大规模扩展型博弈的平滑方法，以提高其理论界和实际收敛速度。
AI.motivation: 现有平滑方法（如EGT）在处理大规模博弈时存在理论误差界与博弈规模相关性差的问题，难以有效解决大型博弈。
AI.method: 通过修改平滑方法中使用的强凸函数以改善理论界，并提出一种称为'中心化技巧'的启发式方法，结合CFR+算法加速收敛。
AI.result: 改进后的平滑方法在大型博弈中展现出良好的性能，能够有效解决传统方法难以处理的场景。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的改进方法在理论分析和实际应用中均显示出解决大规模扩展型博弈的潜力。

Our goal is to improve the smoothing method for solving extensive-form games so that it can be applied to large-scale games. To this end, we make two contributions in this work. First, we slightly modify the strongly convex function used in the smoothing method in order to improve the theoretical bounds related to the game size. Second, we propose a heuristic called centering trick, which allows the smoothing method to be combined with other methods and consequently accelerates the convergence in practice. As a result, we combine EGT with CFR+, a state-of-the-art method for extensive-form games, to achieve good performance in games where conventional smoothing methods do not perform well. The proposed smoothing method is shown to have the potential to solve large games in practice. 近年来，广泛形式博弈得到了广泛的研究。它可以表示具有多个决策点和不完整信息的游戏，因此有助于制定具有不确定输入的游戏，例如扑克。我们考虑一个有两个玩家的扩展形式的零和博弈，即他们的收益之和始终为零。在此类博弈中，寻找最优策略的问题可以表述为双线性鞍点问题。这个公式会根据游戏的规模而变得很大，因为它具有代表每个玩家在所有决策点的策略的变量。为了解决此类大规模双线性鞍点问题，人们研究了一种平滑方法——过度间隙技术（EGT）。该方法生成一系列近似解，其误差保证收敛于 $\mathcal{O}(1/k)$，其中 $k$ 是迭代次数。然而，它的缺点是与游戏大小相关的误差的理论界限较差。这使得它不适用于大型游戏。我们的目标是改进解决扩展型博弈的平滑方法，使其能够应用于大型博弈。为此，我们在这项工作中做出了两项贡献。首先，我们稍微修改平滑方法中使用的强凸函数，以提高与游戏规模相关的理论界限。其次，我们提出了一种称为中心技巧的启发式方法，它允许将平滑方法与其他方法结合起来，从而加速实践中的收敛。因此，我们将 EGT 与 CFR+（一种用于扩展形式游戏的最先进方法）相结合，以在传统平滑方法表现不佳的游戏中获得良好的性能。所提出的平滑方法被证明具有解决实践中大型博弈的潜力。 本文旨在改进求解大规模扩展型博弈的平滑方法，以提高其理论界和实际收敛速度。 Keigo Habara,Ellen Hidemi Fukuda,Nobuo Yamashita cs.GT,cs.AI

authors_text: Emil Riis Hansen,Thomas Dyhre Nielsen,Thomas Mulvad,Mads Nibe Strausholm,Tomer Sagi,Katja Hose
title: Hospitalization Length of Stay Prediction using Patient Event Sequences
title_zh: 使用患者事件序列预测住院时间
abstract: Predicting patients hospital length of stay (LOS) is essential for improving resource allocation and supporting decision-making in healthcare organizations. This paper proposes a novel approach for predicting LOS by modeling patient information as sequences of events. Specifically, we present a transformer-based model, termed Medic-BERT (M-BERT), for LOS prediction using the unique features describing patients medical event sequences. We performed empirical experiments on a cohort of more than 45k emergency care patients from a large Danish hospital. Experimental results show that M-BERT can achieve high accuracy on a variety of LOS problems and outperforms traditional nonsequence-based machine learning approaches.
summary: Predicting patients hospital length of stay (LOS) is essential for improving resource allocation and supporting decision-making in healthcare organizations. This paper proposes a novel approach for predicting LOS by modeling patient information as sequences of events. Specifically, we present a transformer-based model, termed Medic-BERT (M-BERT), for LOS prediction using the unique features describing patients medical event sequences. We performed empirical experiments on a cohort of more than 45k emergency care patients from a large Danish hospital. Experimental results show that M-BERT can achieve high accuracy on a variety of LOS problems and outperforms traditional nonsequence-based machine learning approaches.
abstract_zh: 预测患者的住院时间 (LOS) 对于改善医疗机构的资源分配和支持决策至关重要。本文提出了一种通过将患者信息建模为事件序列来预测 LOS 的新方法。具体来说，我们提出了一种基于变压器的模型，称为 Medic-BERT (M-BERT)，使用描述患者医疗事件序列的独特特征进行 LOS 预测。我们对来自丹麦一家大型医院的超过 45,000 名急诊患者进行了实证实验。实验结果表明，M-BERT 可以在各种 LOS 问题上实现高精度，并且优于传统的基于非序列的机器学习方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于患者事件序列的住院时间预测方法，利用Transformer模型Medic-BERT进行建模。
AI.motivation: 预测住院时间对优化医疗资源分配和决策支持至关重要，传统方法未能充分利用患者事件序列的时序信息。
AI.method: 提出基于Transformer的Medic-BERT模型，通过建模患者医疗事件序列的时序特征进行LOS预测。
AI.result: 实验表明，M-BERT在多种LOS预测任务中准确率较高，优于传统非序列机器学习方法。
AI.conclusion: Medic-BERT模型能有效捕捉时序信息，为医疗资源管理提供有力工具。

authors_text: Ahmed H. Shahin,Yan Zhuang,Noha El-Zehiry
title: From Sparse to Precise: A Practical Editing Approach for Intracardiac Echocardiography Segmentation
title_zh: 从稀疏到精确：心内超声心动图分割的实用编辑方法
abstract: Accurate and safe catheter ablation procedures for patients with atrial fibrillation require precise segmentation of cardiac structures in Intracardiac Echocardiography (ICE) imaging. Prior studies have suggested methods that employ 3D geometry information from the ICE transducer to create a sparse ICE volume by placing 2D frames in a 3D grid, enabling training of 3D segmentation models. However, the resulting 3D masks from these models can be inaccurate and may lead to serious clinical complications due to the sparse sampling in ICE data, frames misalignment, and cardiac motion. To address this issue, we propose an interactive editing framework that allows users to edit segmentation output by drawing scribbles on a 2D frame. The user interaction is mapped to the 3D grid and utilized to execute an editing step that modifies the segmentation in the vicinity of the interaction while preserving the previous segmentation away from the interaction. Furthermore, our framework accommodates multiple edits to the segmentation output in a sequential manner without compromising previous edits. This paper presents a novel loss function and a novel evaluation metric specifically designed for editing. Results from cross-validation and testing indicate that our proposed loss function outperforms standard losses and training strategies in terms of segmentation quality and following user input. Additionally, we show quantitatively and qualitatively that subsequent edits do not compromise previous edits when using our method, as opposed to standard segmentation losses. Overall, our approach enhances the accuracy of the segmentation while avoiding undesired changes away from user interactions and without compromising the quality of previously edited regions, leading to better patient outcomes.
summary: Accurate and safe catheter ablation procedures for patients with atrial fibrillation require precise segmentation of cardiac structures in Intracardiac Echocardiography (ICE) imaging. Prior studies have suggested methods that employ 3D geometry information from the ICE transducer to create a sparse ICE volume by placing 2D frames in a 3D grid, enabling training of 3D segmentation models. However, the resulting 3D masks from these models can be inaccurate and may lead to serious clinical complications due to the sparse sampling in ICE data, frames misalignment, and cardiac motion. To address this issue, we propose an interactive editing framework that allows users to edit segmentation output by drawing scribbles on a 2D frame. The user interaction is mapped to the 3D grid and utilized to execute an editing step that modifies the segmentation in the vicinity of the interaction while preserving the previous segmentation away from the interaction. Furthermore, our framework accommodates multiple edits to the segmentation output in a sequential manner without compromising previous edits. This paper presents a novel loss function and a novel evaluation metric specifically designed for editing. Results from cross-validation and testing indicate that our proposed loss function outperforms standard losses and training strategies in terms of segmentation quality and following user input. Additionally, we show quantitatively and qualitatively that subsequent edits do not compromise previous edits when using our method, as opposed to standard segmentation losses. Overall, our approach enhances the accuracy of the segmentation while avoiding undesired changes away from user interactions and without compromising the quality of previously edited regions, leading to better patient outcomes.
abstract_zh: 对房颤患者进行准确、安全的导管消融手术需要在心内超声心动图 (ICE) 成像中精确分割心脏结构。先前的研究提出了利用来自 ICE 传感器的 3D 几何信息通过将 2D 框架放置在 3D 网格中来创建稀疏 ICE 体积的方法，从而能够训练 3D 分割模型。然而，这些模型生成的 3D 掩模可能不准确，并且由于 ICE 数据采样稀疏、帧未对准和心脏运动，可能会导致严重的临床并发症。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个交互式编辑框架，允许用户通过在 2D 框架上绘制涂鸦来编辑分段输出。用户交互被映射到3D网格并用于执行编辑步骤，该编辑步骤修改交互附近的分段，同时保留远离交互的先前分段。此外，我们的框架可以按顺序对分段输出进行多次编辑，而不会影响之前的编辑。本文提出了一种专门为编辑设计的新颖的损失函数和新颖的评估指标。交叉验证和测试的结果表明，我们提出的损失函数在分割质量和后续用户输入方面优于标准损失和训练策略。此外，我们定量和定性地表明，与标准分割损失相反，使用我们的方法时，后续编辑不会影响之前的编辑。总体而言，我们的方法提高了分割的准确性，同时避免了用户交互带来的不良变化，并且不影响先前编辑区域的质量，从而带来更好的患者治疗结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种交互式编辑框架，通过用户在2D帧上的涂鸦修正3D心脏结构分割结果，提升介入式超声心动图（ICE）分割的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于稀疏ICE数据的3D分割方法因采样稀疏、帧错位和心脏运动导致分割不准确，可能引发临床并发症，需引入用户交互修正机制。
AI.method: 设计交互式编辑框架，将用户2D涂鸦映射至3D网格，局部修正分割结果而不影响其他区域，并提出专用损失函数与评估指标支持多轮编辑。
AI.result: 交叉验证与测试表明，新损失函数在分割质量及遵循用户输入方面优于传统方法，且后续编辑不会破坏先前修正区域。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过精准交互修正提升分割准确性，避免非交互区域的意外改变，从而改善患者治疗效果。

search_text: From Sparse to Precise: A Practical Editing Approach for Intracardiac Echocardiography Segmentation 从稀疏到精确：心内超声心动图分割的实用编辑方法 Accurate and safe catheter ablation procedures for patients with atrial fibrillation require precise segmentation of cardiac structures in Intracardiac Echocardiography (ICE) imaging. Furthermore, our framework accommodates multiple edits to the segmentation output in a sequential manner without compromising previous edits. This paper presents a novel loss function and a novel evaluation metric specifically designed for editing. Results from cross-validation and testing indicate that our proposed loss function outperforms standard losses and training strategies in terms of segmentation quality and following user input. Additionally, we show quantitatively and qualitatively that subsequent edits do not compromise previous edits when using our method, as opposed to standard segmentation losses. authors_text: Yinpeng Dong,Caixin Kang,Jinlai Zhang,Zijian Zhu,Yikai Wang,Xiao Yang,Hang Su,Xingxing Wei,Jun Zhu
title: Benchmarking Robustness of 3D Object Detection to Common Corruptions in Autonomous Driving
title_zh: 针对自动驾驶中常见损坏的 3D 物体检测鲁棒性进行基准测试
abstract: 3D object detection is an important task in autonomous driving to perceive the surroundings. Despite the excellent performance, the existing 3D detectors lack the robustness to real-world corruptions caused by adverse weathers, sensor noises, etc., provoking concerns about the safety and reliability of autonomous driving systems. To comprehensively and rigorously benchmark the corruption robustness of 3D detectors, in this paper we design 27 types of common corruptions for both LiDAR and camera inputs considering real-world driving scenarios. By synthesizing these corruptions on public datasets, we establish three corruption robustness benchmarks -- KITTI-C, nuScenes-C, and Waymo-C. Then, we conduct large-scale experiments on 24 diverse 3D object detection models to evaluate their corruption robustness. Based on the evaluation results, we draw several important findings, including: 1) motion-level corruptions are the most threatening ones that lead to significant performance drop of all models; 2) LiDAR-camera fusion models demonstrate better robustness; 3) camera-only models are extremely vulnerable to image corruptions, showing the indispensability of LiDAR point clouds. We release the benchmarks and codes at https://github.com/kkkcx/3D_Corruptions_AD. We hope that our benchmarks and findings can provide insights for future research on developing robust 3D object detection models.
summary: 3D object detection is an important task in autonomous driving to perceive the surroundings. Despite the excellent performance, the existing 3D detectors lack the robustness to real-world corruptions caused by adverse weathers, sensor noises, etc., provoking concerns about the safety and reliability of autonomous driving systems. To comprehensively and rigorously benchmark the corruption robustness of 3D detectors, in this paper we design 27 types of common corruptions for both LiDAR and camera inputs considering real-world driving scenarios. By synthesizing these corruptions on public datasets, we establish three corruption robustness benchmarks -- KITTI-C, nuScenes-C, and Waymo-C. Then, we conduct large-scale experiments on 24 diverse 3D object detection models to evaluate their corruption robustness. Based on the evaluation results, we draw several important findings, including: 1) motion-level corruptions are the most threatening ones that lead to significant performance drop of all models; 2) LiDAR-camera fusion models demonstrate better robustness; 3) camera-only models are extremely vulnerable to image corruptions, showing the indispensability of LiDAR point clouds. We release the benchmarks and codes at https://github.com/kkkcx/3D_Corruptions_AD. We hope that our benchmarks and findings can provide insights for future research on developing robust 3D object detection models.
abstract_zh: 3D物体检测是自动驾驶感知周围环境的一项重要任务。尽管性能优异，但现有的 3D 探测器缺乏对恶劣天气、传感器噪声等引起的现实世界损坏的鲁棒性，引发了人们对自动驾驶系统安全性和可靠性的担忧。为了全面、严格地对 3D 检测器的损坏鲁棒性进行基准测试，在本文中，我们考虑到现实世界的驾驶场景，为 LiDAR 和摄像头输入设计了 27 种常见的损坏。通过综合公共数据集上的这些腐败，我们建立了三个腐败鲁棒性基准——KITTI-C、nuScenes-C 和 Waymo-C。然后，我们对 24 个不同的 3D 对象检测模型进行大规模实验，以评估它们的损坏鲁棒性。根据评估结果，我们得出了几个重要的发现，包括：1）运动级损坏是最有威胁的，导致所有模型的性能显着下降； 2）LiDAR-相机融合模型表现出更好的鲁棒性； 3）仅使用相机的模型极易受到图像损坏的影响，这表明 LiDAR 点云的重要性。我们在 https://github.com/kkkcx/3D_Corruptions_AD 发布了基准测试和代码。我们希望我们的基准测试和研究结果能够为未来开发稳健的 3D 对象检测模型的研究提供见解。

AI.tldr: 该论文设计了三种3D目标检测鲁棒性基准测试，评估自动驾驶场景下不同模型对常见干扰的抵抗能力。
AI.motivation: 现有3D检测器在恶劣天气和传感器噪声等现实干扰下表现不足，影响自动驾驶系统的安全性和可靠性。
AI.method: 合成27种真实场景的LiDAR和摄像头输入干扰，构建KITTI-C/nuScenes-C/Waymo-C基准，测试24种3D检测模型的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 运动级干扰对所有模型性能影响最大，LiDAR-摄像头融合模型更鲁棒，纯摄像头模型易受图像干扰。
AI.conclusion: 提出的基准和发现可为未来开发鲁棒的3D检测模型提供研究方向和评估依据。
