search_text: Benchmarking Robustness of 3D Object Detection to Common Corruptions in Autonomous Driving 针对自动驾驶中常见损坏的 3D 物体检测鲁棒性进行基准测试 3D object detection is an important task in autonomous driving to perceive the surroundings. Despite the excellent performance, the existing 3D detectors lack the robustness to real-world corruptions caused by adverse weathers, sensor noises, etc., provoking concerns about the safety and reliability of autonomous driving systems. To comprehensively and rigorously benchmark the corruption robustness of 3D detectors, in this paper we design 27 types of common corruptions for both LiDAR and camera inputs considering real-world driving scenarios. By synthesizing these corruptions on public datasets, we establish three corruption robustness benchmarks -- KITTI-C, nuScenes-C, and Waymo-C. Then, we conduct large-scale experiments on 24 diverse 3D object detection models to evaluate their corruption robustness. Based on the evaluation results, we draw several important findings, including: 1) motion-level corruptions are the most threatening ones that lead to significant performance drop of all models; 2) LiDAR-camera fusion models demonstrate better robustness; 3) camera-only models are extremely vulnerable to image corruptions, showing the indispensability of LiDAR point clouds. We release the benchmarks and codes at https://github.com/kkkcx/3D_Corruptions_AD. We hope that our benchmarks and findings can provide insights for future research on developing robust 3D object detection models. 3D物体检测是自动驾驶感知周围环境的一项重要任务。尽管性能优异，但现有的 3D 探测器缺乏对恶劣天气、传感器噪声等引起的现实世界损坏的鲁棒性，引发了人们对自动驾驶系统安全性和可靠性的担忧。为了全面、严格地对 3D 检测器的损坏鲁棒性进行基准测试，在本文中，我们考虑到现实世界的驾驶场景，为 LiDAR 和摄像头输入设计了 27 种常见的损坏。通过综合公共数据集上的这些腐败，我们建立了三个腐败鲁棒性基准——KITTI-C、nuScenes-C 和 Waymo-C。然后，我们对 24 个不同的 3D 对象检测模型进行大规模实验，以评估它们的损坏鲁棒性。根据评估结果，我们得出了几个重要的发现，包括：1）运动级损坏是最有威胁的，导致所有模型的性能显着下降； 2）LiDAR-相机融合模型表现出更好的鲁棒性； 3）仅使用相机的模型极易受到图像损坏的影响，这表明 LiDAR 点云的重要性。我们在 https://github.com/kkkcx/3D_Corruptions_AD 发布了基准测试和代码。我们希望我们的基准测试和研究结果能够为未来开发稳健的 3D 对象检测模型的研究提供见解。 该论文设计了三种3D目标检测鲁棒性基准测试，评估自动驾驶场景下不同模型对常见干扰的抵抗能力。 Yinpeng Dong,Caixin Kang,Jinlai Zhang,Zijian Zhu,Yikai Wang,Xiao Yang,Hang Su,Xingxing Wei,Jun Zhu cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CR

authors_text: Haohao Sun,Yilong Zhang,Peng Chen,Haixia Wang,Ronghua Liang
title: Internal Structure Attention Network for Fingerprint Presentation Attack Detection from Optical Coherence Tomography
title_zh: 用于光学相干断层扫描指纹呈现攻击检测的内部结构注意网络
abstract: As a non-invasive optical imaging technique, optical coherence tomography (OCT) has proven promising for automatic fingerprint recognition system (AFRS) applications. Diverse approaches have been proposed for OCT-based fingerprint presentation attack detection (PAD). However, considering the complexity and variety of PA samples, it is extremely challenging to increase the generalization ability with the limited PA dataset. To solve the challenge, this paper presents a novel supervised learning-based PAD method, denoted as ISAPAD, which applies prior knowledge to guide network training and enhance the generalization ability. The proposed dual-branch architecture can not only learns global features from the OCT image, but also concentrate on layered structure feature which comes from the internal structure attention module (ISAM). The simple yet effective ISAM enables the proposed network to obtain layered segmentation features belonging only to Bonafide from noisy OCT volume data directly. Combined with effective training strategies and PAD score generation rules, ISAPAD obtains optimal PAD performance in limited training data. Domain generalization experiments and visualization analysis validate the effectiveness of the proposed method for OCT PAD.
summary: As a non-invasive optical imaging technique, optical coherence tomography (OCT) has proven promising for automatic fingerprint recognition system (AFRS) applications. Diverse approaches have been proposed for OCT-based fingerprint presentation attack detection (PAD). However, considering the complexity and variety of PA samples, it is extremely challenging to increase the generalization ability with the limited PA dataset. To solve the challenge, this paper presents a novel supervised learning-based PAD method, denoted as ISAPAD, which applies prior knowledge to guide network training and enhance the generalization ability. The proposed dual-branch architecture can not only learns global features from the OCT image, but also concentrate on layered structure feature which comes from the internal structure attention module (ISAM). The simple yet effective ISAM enables the proposed network to obtain layered segmentation features belonging only to Bonafide from noisy OCT volume data directly. Combined with effective training strategies and PAD score generation rules, ISAPAD obtains optimal PAD performance in limited training data. Domain generalization experiments and visualization analysis validate the effectiveness of the proposed method for OCT PAD.
abstract_zh: 作为一种非侵入式光学成像技术，光学相干断层扫描（OCT）已被证明在自动指纹识别系统（AFRS）应用中具有广阔的前景。针对基于 OCT 的指纹呈现攻击检测 (PAD)，人们提出了多种方法。然而，考虑到PA样本的复杂性和多样性，利用有限的PA数据集来提高泛化能力极具挑战性。为了解决这一挑战，本文提出了一种新颖的基于监督学习的PAD方法，记为ISAPAD，该方法应用先验知识来指导网络训练并增强泛化能力。所提出的双分支架构不仅可以从 OCT 图像中学习全局特征，还可以集中于来自内部结构注意模块（ISAM）的分层结构特征。简单而有效的 ISAM 使所提出的网络能够直接从嘈杂的 OCT 体积数据中获得仅属于 Bonafide 的分层分割特征。结合有效的训练策略和PAD评分生成规则，ISAPAD在有限的训练数据中获得最优的PAD性能。域泛化实验和可视化分析验证了所提出的 OCT PAD 方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于内部结构注意力网络（ISAPAD）的方法，用于从光学相干断层扫描（OCT）图像中检测指纹呈现攻击（PAD）。
AI.motivation: 现有OCT-based PAD方法在有限的攻击样本下难以提升模型泛化能力，需结合先验知识增强模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计双分支架构，结合全局特征学习与内部结构注意力模块（ISAM），直接从噪声OCT数据中提取真实指纹的分层特征。
AI.result: 在有限训练数据下取得最优PAD性能，域泛化实验与可视化分析验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: ISAPAD通过结构注意力机制与先验知识引导，有效解决了OCT指纹攻击检测中的数据泛化难题。

authors_text: Antonio Macaluso,Matthias Klusch,Stefano Lodi,Claudio Sartori
title: MAQA: A Quantum Framework for Supervised Learning
title_zh: MAQA：监督学习的量子框架
abstract: Quantum Machine Learning has the potential to improve traditional machine learning methods and overcome some of the main limitations imposed by the classical computing paradigm. However, the practical advantages of using quantum resources to solve pattern recognition tasks are still to be demonstrated. This work proposes a universal, efficient framework that can reproduce the output of a plethora of classical supervised machine learning algorithms exploiting quantum computation's advantages. The proposed framework is named Multiple Aggregator Quantum Algorithm (MAQA) due to its capability to combine multiple and diverse functions to solve typical supervised learning problems. In its general formulation, MAQA can be potentially adopted as the quantum counterpart of all those models falling into the scheme of aggregation of multiple functions, such as ensemble algorithms and neural networks. From a computational point of view, the proposed framework allows generating an exponentially large number of different transformations of the input at the cost of increasing the depth of the corresponding quantum circuit linearly. Thus, MAQA produces a model with substantial descriptive power to broaden the horizon of possible applications of quantum machine learning with a computational advantage over classical methods. As a second meaningful addition, we discuss the adoption of the proposed framework as hybrid quantum-classical and fault-tolerant quantum algorithm.
summary: Quantum Machine Learning has the potential to improve traditional machine learning methods and overcome some of the main limitations imposed by the classical computing paradigm. However, the practical advantages of using quantum resources to solve pattern recognition tasks are still to be demonstrated. This work proposes a universal, efficient framework that can reproduce the output of a plethora of classical supervised machine learning algorithms exploiting quantum computation's advantages. The proposed framework is named Multiple Aggregator Quantum Algorithm (MAQA) due to its capability to combine multiple and diverse functions to solve typical supervised learning problems. In its general formulation, MAQA can be potentially adopted as the quantum counterpart of all those models falling into the scheme of aggregation of multiple functions, such as ensemble algorithms and neural networks. From a computational point of view, the proposed framework allows generating an exponentially large number of different transformations of the input at the cost of increasing the depth of the corresponding quantum circuit linearly. Thus, MAQA produces a model with substantial descriptive power to broaden the horizon of possible applications of quantum machine learning with a computational advantage over classical methods. As a second meaningful addition, we discuss the adoption of the proposed framework as hybrid quantum-classical and fault-tolerant quantum algorithm.
abstract_zh: 量子机器学习有潜力改进传统的机器学习方法并克服经典计算范式带来的一些主要限制。 However, the practical advantages of using quantum resources to solve pattern recognition tasks are still to be demonstrated.这项工作提出了一个通用、高效的框架，可以利用量子计算的优势重现大量经典监督机器学习算法的输出。所提出的框架被称为多聚合量子算法（MAQA），因为它能够结合多种不同的功能来解决典型的监督学习问题。在其一般表述中，MAQA 可以潜在地被采用作为所有属于多个函数聚合方案的模型的量子对应物，例如集成算法和神经网络。从计算的角度来看，所提出的框架允许生成指数级大量的不同输入变换，但代价是线性增加相应量子电路的深度。因此，MAQA 产生了一个具有强大描述能力的模型，可以拓宽量子机器学习可能应用的视野，并且具有优于经典方法的计算优势。作为第二个有意义的补充，我们讨论了采用所提出的框架作为混合量子经典和容错量子算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为MAQA的量子框架，用于实现监督学习，通过量子计算优势克服经典方法的限制。
AI.motivation: 量子机器学习有望改进传统方法，但其实际优势尚未在模式识别任务中得到验证，需展示量子资源的潜力。
AI.method: MAQA框架利用量子计算生成指数级输入转换，通过线性增加量子电路深度实现多种函数聚合，适用于集成算法和神经网络。
AI.result: 框架可重现多种经典监督学习算法，具备计算优势，并支持混合量子-经典及容错量子实现。
AI.conclusion: MAQA扩展了量子机器学习的应用范围，为未来量子计算在机器学习中的实际应用提供了新方向。

search_text: MAQA: A Quantum Framework for Supervised Learning MAQA：监督学习的量子框架 Quantum Machine Learning has the potential to improve traditional machine learning methods and overcome some of the main limitations imposed by the classical computing paradigm. However, the practical advantages of using quantum resources to solve pattern recognition tasks are still to be demonstrated. This work proposes a universal, efficient framework that can reproduce the output of a plethora of classical supervised machine learning algorithms exploiting quantum computation's advantages. The proposed framework is named Multiple Aggregator Quantum Algorithm (MAQA) due to its capability to combine multiple and diverse functions to solve typical supervised learning problems. In its general formulation, MAQA can be potentially adopted as the quantum counterpart of all those models falling into the scheme of aggregation of multiple functions, such as ensemble algorithms and neural networks. From a computational point of view, the proposed framework allows generating an exponentially large number of different transformations of the input at the cost of increasing the depth of the corresponding quantum circuit linearly. Thus, MAQA produces a model with substantial descriptive power to broaden the horizon of possible applications of quantum machine learning with a computational advantage over classical methods. As a second meaningful addition, we discuss the adoption of the proposed framework as hybrid quantum-classical and fault-tolerant quantum algorithm. 量子机器学习有潜力改进传统的机器学习方法并克服经典计算范式带来的一些主要限制。 However, the practical advantages of using quantum resources to solve pattern recognition tasks are still to be demonstrated.这项工作提出了一个通用、高效的框架，可以利用量子计算的优势重现大量经典监督机器学习算法的输出。所提出的框架被称为多聚合量子算法（MAQA），因为它能够结合多种不同的功能来解决典型的监督学习问题。在其一般表述中，MAQA 可以潜在地被采用作为所有属于多个函数聚合方案的模型的量子对应物，例如集成算法和神经网络。从计算的角度来看，所提出的框架允许生成指数级大量的不同输入变换，但代价是线性增加相应量子电路的深度。因此，MAQA 产生了一个具有强大描述能力的模型，可以拓宽量子机器学习可能应用的视野，并且具有优于经典方法的计算优势。作为第二个有意义的补充，我们讨论了采用所提出的框架作为混合量子经典和容错量子算法。 本文提出一种名为MAQA的量子框架，用于实现监督学习，通过量子计算优势克服经典方法的限制。 Antonio Macaluso,Matthias Klusch,Stefano Lodi,Claudio Sartori quant-ph,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Matteo Iovino,Jonathan Styrud,Pietro Falco,Christian Smith
title: A Framework for Learning Behavior Trees in Collaborative Robotic Applications
title_zh: 协作机器人应用中的学习行为树框架
comment: Submitted to IEEE 19th Conference on Automation Science and Engineering (CASE) 2023
comments: Submitted to IEEE 19th Conference on Automation Science and Engineering (CASE) 2023
abstract: In modern industrial collaborative robotic applications, it is desirable to create robot programs automatically, intuitively, and time-efficiently. Moreover, robots need to be controlled by reactive policies to face the unpredictability of the environment they operate in. In this paper we propose a framework that combines a method that learns Behavior Trees (BTs) from demonstration with a method that evolves them with Genetic Programming (GP) for collaborative robotic applications. The main contribution of this paper is to show that by combining the two learning methods we obtain a method that allows non-expert users to semi-automatically, time-efficiently, and interactively generate BTs. We validate the framework with a series of manipulation experiments. The BT is fully learnt in simulation and then transferred to a real collaborative robot.
summary: In modern industrial collaborative robotic applications, it is desirable to create robot programs automatically, intuitively, and time-efficiently. Moreover, robots need to be controlled by reactive policies to face the unpredictability of the environment they operate in. In this paper we propose a framework that combines a method that learns Behavior Trees (BTs) from demonstration with a method that evolves them with Genetic Programming (GP) for collaborative robotic applications. The main contribution of this paper is to show that by combining the two learning methods we obtain a method that allows non-expert users to semi-automatically, time-efficiently, and interactively generate BTs. We validate the framework with a series of manipulation experiments. The BT is fully learnt in simulation and then transferred to a real collaborative robot.
abstract_zh: 在现代工业协作机器人应用中，需要自动、直观且高效地创建机器人程序。此外，机器人需要通过反应性策略进行控制，以应对其运行环境的不可预测性。在本文中，我们提出了一个框架，该框架结合了从演示中学习行为树（BT）的方法和通过遗传编程（GP）进化行为树的方法，用于协作机器人应用。本文的主要贡献是表明，通过结合这两种学习方法，我们获得了一种允许非专家用户半自动、高效、交互式生成 BT 的方法。我们通过一系列操作实验验证了该框架。 BT 在模拟中得到充分学习，然后转移到真正的协作机器人上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合行为树学习与遗传编程的框架，用于协作机器人应用中自动、高效生成行为树。
AI.motivation: 工业协作机器人需要应对环境不确定性，传统编程方式效率低且需专家参与，需开发非专家可交互的自动化方法。
AI.method: 结合从演示中学习行为树（BTs）与遗传编程（GP）进化BTs的方法，实现半自动交互式生成。
AI.result: 通过仿真学习并迁移至真实机器人的一系列操作实验，验证了框架的有效性与可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架使非专家用户能高效生成适应协作机器人需求的行为树，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Yangfu Li,Jiapan Gan,Xiaodan Lin
title: DS-TDNN: Dual-stream Time-delay Neural Network with Global-aware Filter for Speaker Verification
title_zh: DS-TDNN：具有全局感知滤波器的双流时延神经网络，用于说话人验证
abstract: Conventional time-delay neural networks (TDNNs) struggle to handle long-range context, their ability to represent speaker information is therefore limited in long utterances. Existing solutions either depend on increasing model complexity or try to balance between local features and global context to address this issue. To effectively leverage the long-term dependencies of audio signals and constrain model complexity, we introduce a novel module called Global-aware Filter layer (GF layer) in this work, which employs a set of learnable transform-domain filters between a 1D discrete Fourier transform and its inverse transform to capture global context. Additionally, we develop a dynamic filtering strategy and a sparse regularization method to enhance the performance of the GF layer and prevent overfitting. Based on the GF layer, we present a dual-stream TDNN architecture called DS-TDNN for automatic speaker verification (ASV), which utilizes two unique branches to extract both local and global features in parallel and employs an efficient strategy to fuse different-scale information. Experiments on the Voxceleb and SITW databases demonstrate that the DS-TDNN achieves a relative improvement of 10\% together with a relative decline of 20\% in computational cost over the ECAPA-TDNN in speaker verification task. This improvement will become more evident as the utterance's duration grows. Furthermore, the DS-TDNN also beats popular deep residual models and attention-based systems on utterances of arbitrary length.
summary: Conventional time-delay neural networks (TDNNs) struggle to handle long-range context, their ability to represent speaker information is therefore limited in long utterances. Existing solutions either depend on increasing model complexity or try to balance between local features and global context to address this issue. To effectively leverage the long-term dependencies of audio signals and constrain model complexity, we introduce a novel module called Global-aware Filter layer (GF layer) in this work, which employs a set of learnable transform-domain filters between a 1D discrete Fourier transform and its inverse transform to capture global context. Additionally, we develop a dynamic filtering strategy and a sparse regularization method to enhance the performance of the GF layer and prevent overfitting. Based on the GF layer, we present a dual-stream TDNN architecture called DS-TDNN for automatic speaker verification (ASV), which utilizes two unique branches to extract both local and global features in parallel and employs an efficient strategy to fuse different-scale information. Experiments on the Voxceleb and SITW databases demonstrate that the DS-TDNN achieves a relative improvement of 10\% together with a relative decline of 20\% in computational cost over the ECAPA-TDNN in speaker verification task. This improvement will become more evident as the utterance's duration grows. Furthermore, the DS-TDNN also beats popular deep residual models and attention-based systems on utterances of arbitrary length.
abstract_zh: 传统的时延神经网络（TDNN）难以处理长距离上下文，因此它们表示说话人信息的能力在长话语中受到限制。现有的解决方案要么依赖于增加模型复杂性，要​​么尝试在局部特征和全局上下文之间取得平衡来解决这个问题。为了有效利用音频信号的长期依赖性并限制模型复杂性，我们在这项工作中引入了一种称为全局感知滤波器层（GF层）的新颖模块，该模块在一维离散傅立叶变换及其逆变换之间采用一组可学习的变换域滤波器来捕获全局上下文。此外，我们开发了动态过滤策略和稀疏正则化方法来增强 GF 层的性能并防止过度拟合。基于GF层，我们提出了一种用于自动说话人验证（ASV）的双流TDNN架构，称为DS-TDNN，它利用两个独特的分支并行提取局部和全局特征，并采用有效的策略来融合不同尺度的信息。在 Voxceleb 和 SITW 数据库上的实验表明，在说话人验证任务中，DS-TDNN 相对于 ECAPA-TDNN 实现了 10% 的相对改进，同时计算成本相对下降了 20%。随着话语持续时间的增加，这种改进将变得更加明显。此外，DS-TDNN 在任意长度的话语上也击败了流行的深度残差模型和基于注意力的系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DS-TDNN的双流时延神经网络架构，结合全局感知滤波器层，用于提升说话人验证任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统TDNN在处理长时上下文信息时表现不足，且现有解决方案要么增加模型复杂度，要么难以平衡局部特征与全局上下文的关系。
AI.method: 引入基于离散傅里叶变换的全局感知滤波器层（GF层），结合动态滤波策略和稀疏正则化方法，并设计双流架构并行提取局部与全局特征，通过高效策略融合多尺度信息。
AI.result: 在Voxceleb和SITW数据集上，DS-TDNN相比ECAPA-TDNN在验证任务中相对提升10%，计算成本降低20%，且在长时语音上表现更优，优于主流深度残差模型和注意力机制系统。
AI.conclusion: DS-TDNN通过全局感知滤波器和双流设计有效捕捉长时依赖关系，在保持低计算成本的同时显著提升说话人验证性能。

Experiments on the Voxceleb and SITW databases demonstrate that the DS-TDNN achieves a relative improvement of 10\% together with a relative decline of 20\% in computational cost over the ECAPA-TDNN in speaker verification task. This improvement will become more evident as the utterance's duration grows. Furthermore, the DS-TDNN also beats popular deep residual models and attention-based systems on utterances of arbitrary length. 传统的时延神经网络（TDNN）难以处理长距离上下文，因此它们表示说话人信息的能力在长话语中受到限制。现有的解决方案要么依赖于增加模型复杂性，要​​么尝试在局部特征和全局上下文之间取得平衡来解决这个问题。为了有效利用音频信号的长期依赖性并限制模型复杂性，我们在这项工作中引入了一种称为全局感知滤波器层（GF层）的新颖模块，该模块在一维离散傅立叶变换及其逆变换之间采用一组可学习的变换域滤波器来捕获全局上下文。此外，我们开发了动态过滤策略和稀疏正则化方法来增强 GF 层的性能并防止过度拟合。基于GF层，我们提出了一种用于自动说话人验证（ASV）的双流TDNN架构，称为DS-TDNN，它利用两个独特的分支并行提取局部和全局特征，并采用有效的策略来融合不同尺度的信息。在 Voxceleb 和 SITW 数据库上的实验表明，在说话人验证任务中，DS-TDNN 相对于 ECAPA-TDNN 实现了 10% 的相对改进，同时计算成本相对下降了 20%。随着话语持续时间的增加，这种改进将变得更加明显。此外，DS-TDNN 在任意长度的话语上也击败了流行的深度残差模型和基于注意力的系统。 本文提出了一种名为DS-TDNN的双流时延神经网络架构，结合全局感知滤波器层，用于提升说话人验证任务的性能。 Yangfu Li,Jiapan Gan,Xiaodan Lin cs.SD,cs.AI,eess.AS

authors_text: Hao Wang,Euijoon Ahn,Jinman Kim
title: A Dual-branch Self-supervised Representation Learning Framework for Tumour Segmentation in Whole Slide Images
title_zh: 用于整个幻灯片图像中肿瘤分割的双分支自监督表示学习框架
abstract: Supervised deep learning methods have achieved considerable success in medical image analysis, owing to the availability of large-scale and well-annotated datasets. However, creating such datasets for whole slide images (WSIs) in histopathology is a challenging task due to their gigapixel size. In recent years, self-supervised learning (SSL) has emerged as an alternative solution to reduce the annotation overheads in WSIs, as it does not require labels for training. These SSL approaches, however, are not designed for handling multi-resolution WSIs, which limits their performance in learning discriminative image features. In this paper, we propose a Dual-branch SSL Framework for WSI tumour segmentation (DSF-WSI) that can effectively learn image features from multi-resolution WSIs. Our DSF-WSI connected two branches and jointly learnt low and high resolution WSIs in a self-supervised manner. Moreover, we introduced a novel Context-Target Fusion Module (CTFM) and a masked jigsaw pretext task to align the learnt multi-resolution features. Furthermore, we designed a Dense SimSiam Learning (DSL) strategy to maximise the similarity of different views of WSIs, enabling the learnt representations to be more efficient and discriminative. We evaluated our method using two public datasets on breast and liver cancer segmentation tasks. The experiment results demonstrated that our DSF-WSI can effectively extract robust and efficient representations, which we validated through subsequent fine-tuning and semi-supervised settings. Our proposed method achieved better accuracy than other state-of-the-art approaches. Code is available at https://github.com/Dylan-H-Wang/dsf-wsi.
summary: Supervised deep learning methods have achieved considerable success in medical image analysis, owing to the availability of large-scale and well-annotated datasets. However, creating such datasets for whole slide images (WSIs) in histopathology is a challenging task due to their gigapixel size. In recent years, self-supervised learning (SSL) has emerged as an alternative solution to reduce the annotation overheads in WSIs, as it does not require labels for training. These SSL approaches, however, are not designed for handling multi-resolution WSIs, which limits their performance in learning discriminative image features. In this paper, we propose a Dual-branch SSL Framework for WSI tumour segmentation (DSF-WSI) that can effectively learn image features from multi-resolution WSIs. Our DSF-WSI connected two branches and jointly learnt low and high resolution WSIs in a self-supervised manner. Moreover, we introduced a novel Context-Target Fusion Module (CTFM) and a masked jigsaw pretext task to align the learnt multi-resolution features. Furthermore, we designed a Dense SimSiam Learning (DSL) strategy to maximise the similarity of different views of WSIs, enabling the learnt representations to be more efficient and discriminative. We evaluated our method using two public datasets on breast and liver cancer segmentation tasks. The experiment results demonstrated that our DSF-WSI can effectively extract robust and efficient representations, which we validated through subsequent fine-tuning and semi-supervised settings. Our proposed method achieved better accuracy than other state-of-the-art approaches. Code is available at https://github.com/Dylan-H-Wang/dsf-wsi.
abstract_zh: 由于大规模且注释良好的数据集的可用性，有监督的深度学习方法在医学图像分析方面取得了相当大的成功。然而，由于其数十亿像素的大小，为组织病理学中的整个幻灯片图像（WSI）创建此类数据集是一项具有挑战性的任务。近年来，自监督学习 (SSL) 已成为减少 WSI 中注释开销的替代解决方案，因为它不需要训练标签。然而，这些 SSL 方法并不是为处理多分辨率 WSI 而设计的，这限制了它们在学习判别性图像特征方面的性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于 WSI 肿瘤分割的双分支 SSL 框架（DSF-WSI），它可以有效地从多分辨率 WSI 中学习图像特征。我们的 DSF-WSI 连接两个分支，并以自我监督的方式共同学习低分辨率和高分辨率 WSI。此外，我们引入了一种新颖的上下文目标融合模块（CTFM）和一个蒙版拼图借口任务来对齐学习的多分辨率特征。此外，我们设计了一种密集 SimSiam 学习 (DSL) 策略，以最大限度地提高 WSI 不同视图的相似性，使学习到的表示更加高效和具有辨别力。我们使用关于乳腺癌和肝癌分割任务的两个公共数据集评估了我们的方法。实验结果表明，我们的 DSF-WSI 可以有效地提取稳健且高效的表示，我们通过后续的微调和半监督设置对此进行了验证。我们提出的方法比其他最先进的方法取得了更好的准确性。代码可在 https://github.com/Dylan-H-Wang/dsf-wsi 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双分支自监督表示学习框架（DSF-WSI），用于全切片图像（WSI）中的肿瘤分割，以减少对大规模标注数据的依赖。
AI.motivation: 监督学习方法需要大量标注的WSI数据，但WSI的高分辨率和巨像素特性使得标注成本极高。现有自监督学习方法无法有效处理多分辨率WSI，限制了其性能。
AI.method: 设计双分支框架联合学习低/高分辨率WSI特征，引入上下文-目标融合模块（CTFM）和掩码拼图预训练任务，并提出密集SimSiam学习策略（DSL）以增强特征表示。
AI.result: 在乳腺癌和肝癌数据集上验证，DSF-WSI在细调和半监督设置下均优于现有最先进方法，证明其提取的表示具有鲁棒性和高效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过多分辨率特征对齐和自监督学习策略，有效解决了WSI肿瘤分割中数据标注困难和特征学习不足的问题。

authors_text: Xinglong Luo,Kunming Luo,Ao Luo,Zhengning Wang,Ping Tan,Shuaicheng Liu
title: Learning Optical Flow from Event Camera with Rendered Dataset
title_zh: 使用渲染数据集从事件相机学习光流
abstract: We study the problem of estimating optical flow from event cameras. One important issue is how to build a high-quality event-flow dataset with accurate event values and flow labels. Previous datasets are created by either capturing real scenes by event cameras or synthesizing from images with pasted foreground objects. The former case can produce real event values but with calculated flow labels, which are sparse and inaccurate. The later case can generate dense flow labels but the interpolated events are prone to errors. In this work, we propose to render a physically correct event-flow dataset using computer graphics models. In particular, we first create indoor and outdoor 3D scenes by Blender with rich scene content variations. Second, diverse camera motions are included for the virtual capturing, producing images and accurate flow labels. Third, we render high-framerate videos between images for accurate events. The rendered dataset can adjust the density of events, based on which we further introduce an adaptive density module (ADM). Experiments show that our proposed dataset can facilitate event-flow learning, whereas previous approaches when trained on our dataset can improve their performances constantly by a relatively large margin. In addition, event-flow pipelines when equipped with our ADM can further improve performances.
summary: We study the problem of estimating optical flow from event cameras. One important issue is how to build a high-quality event-flow dataset with accurate event values and flow labels. Previous datasets are created by either capturing real scenes by event cameras or synthesizing from images with pasted foreground objects. The former case can produce real event values but with calculated flow labels, which are sparse and inaccurate. The later case can generate dense flow labels but the interpolated events are prone to errors. In this work, we propose to render a physically correct event-flow dataset using computer graphics models. In particular, we first create indoor and outdoor 3D scenes by Blender with rich scene content variations. Second, diverse camera motions are included for the virtual capturing, producing images and accurate flow labels. Third, we render high-framerate videos between images for accurate events. The rendered dataset can adjust the density of events, based on which we further introduce an adaptive density module (ADM). Experiments show that our proposed dataset can facilitate event-flow learning, whereas previous approaches when trained on our dataset can improve their performances constantly by a relatively large margin. In addition, event-flow pipelines when equipped with our ADM can further improve performances.
abstract_zh: 我们研究估计事件相机光流的问题。一个重要的问题是如何构建具有准确事件值和流标签的高质量事件流数据集。以前的数据集是通过事件摄像机捕获真实场景或通过粘贴前景对象的图像合成来创建的。前一种情况可以产生真实的事件值，但计算出的流标签稀疏且不准确。后一种情况可以生成密集的流标签，但插值事件很容易出错。在这项工作中，我们建议使用计算机图形模型渲染物理上正确的事件流数据集。具体来说，我们首先通过Blender创建具有丰富场景内容变化的室内和室外3D场景。其次，包括多种相机运动用于虚拟捕获、生成图像和准确的流标签。第三，我们在图像之间渲染高帧率视频以实现准确的事件。渲染的数据集可以调整事件的密度，在此基础上我们进一步引入自适应密度模块（ADM）。实验表明，我们提出的数据集可以促进事件流学习，而以前的方法在我们的数据集上进行训练时可以不断以相对较大的幅度提高其性能。此外，事件流管道配备我们的 ADM 后可以进一步提高性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过渲染数据集学习事件相机的光流估计，解决现有数据集在事件值和光流标签准确性上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集要么通过真实场景捕获获得稀疏且不准确的光流标签，要么通过合成图像生成易出错的事件值，难以同时保证事件和光流的准确性。
AI.method: 使用Blender构建室内外3D场景，模拟多样化的相机运动生成图像和精确光流标签，并渲染高帧率视频以生成准确事件数据，进一步引入自适应密度模块（ADM）调节事件密度。
AI.result: 所提数据集显著提升事件光流学习效果，现有方法在该数据集上训练后性能提升明显，结合ADM的光流算法进一步优化性能。
AI.conclusion: 基于物理渲染的事件光流数据集与自适应密度模块有效解决了事件相机光流估计的准确性问题，为相关研究提供高质量基准。

The later case can generate dense flow labels but the interpolated events are prone to errors. In this work, we propose to render a physically correct event-flow dataset using computer graphics models. In particular, we first create indoor and outdoor 3D scenes by Blender with rich scene content variations. Second, diverse camera motions are included for the virtual capturing, producing images and accurate flow labels. Third, we render high-framerate videos between images for accurate events. The rendered dataset can adjust the density of events, based on which we further introduce an adaptive density module (ADM). Experiments show that our proposed dataset can facilitate event-flow learning, whereas previous approaches when trained on our dataset can improve their performances constantly by a relatively large margin. In addition, event-flow pipelines when equipped with our ADM can further improve performances. 我们研究估计事件相机光流的问题。一个重要的问题是如何构建具有准确事件值和流标签的高质量事件流数据集。以前的数据集是通过事件摄像机捕获真实场景或通过粘贴前景对象的图像合成来创建的。前一种情况可以产生真实的事件值，但计算出的流标签稀疏且不准确。后一种情况可以生成密集的流标签，但插值事件很容易出错。在这项工作中，我们建议使用计算机图形模型渲染物理上正确的事件流数据集。具体来说，我们首先通过Blender创建具有丰富场景内容变化的室内和室外3D场景。其次，包括多种相机运动用于虚拟捕获、生成图像和准确的流标签。第三，我们在图像之间渲染高帧率视频以实现准确的事件。渲染的数据集可以调整事件的密度，在此基础上我们进一步引入自适应密度模块（ADM）。实验表明，我们提出的数据集可以促进事件流学习，而以前的方法在我们的数据集上进行训练时可以不断以相对较大的幅度提高其性能。此外，事件流管道配备我们的 ADM 后可以进一步提高性能。 本文提出通过渲染数据集学习事件相机的光流估计，解决现有数据集在事件值和光流标签准确性上的不足。 Xinglong Luo,Kunming Luo,Ao Luo,Zhengning Wang,Ping Tan,Shuaicheng Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Li Yi
title: Controllable Ancient Chinese Lyrics Generation Based on Phrase Prototype Retrieving
title_zh: 基于短语原型检索的可控古汉语歌词生成
abstract: Generating lyrics and poems is one of the essential downstream tasks in the Natural Language Processing (NLP) field. Current methods have performed well in some lyrics generation scenarios but need further improvements in tasks requiring fine control. We propose a novel method for generating ancient Chinese lyrics (Song Ci), a type of ancient lyrics that involves precise control of song structure. The system is equipped with a phrase retriever and a phrase connector. Based on an input prompt, the phrase retriever picks phrases from a database to construct a phrase pool. The phrase connector then selects a series of phrases from the phrase pool that minimizes a multi-term loss function that considers rhyme, song structure, and fluency. Experimental results show that our method can generate high-quality ancient Chinese lyrics while performing well on topic and song structure control. We also expect our approach to be generalized to other lyrics-generating tasks.
summary: Generating lyrics and poems is one of the essential downstream tasks in the Natural Language Processing (NLP) field. Current methods have performed well in some lyrics generation scenarios but need further improvements in tasks requiring fine control. We propose a novel method for generating ancient Chinese lyrics (Song Ci), a type of ancient lyrics that involves precise control of song structure. The system is equipped with a phrase retriever and a phrase connector. Based on an input prompt, the phrase retriever picks phrases from a database to construct a phrase pool. The phrase connector then selects a series of phrases from the phrase pool that minimizes a multi-term loss function that considers rhyme, song structure, and fluency. Experimental results show that our method can generate high-quality ancient Chinese lyrics while performing well on topic and song structure control. We also expect our approach to be generalized to other lyrics-generating tasks.
abstract_zh: 生成歌词和诗歌是自然语言处理（NLP）领域的重要下游任务之一。目前的方法在一些歌词生成场景中表现良好，但在需要精细控制的任务中需要进一步改进。我们提出了一种生成中国古代歌词（宋词）的新方法，这是一种涉及歌曲结构精确控制的古代歌词。该系统配备有短语检索器和短语连接器。根据输入提示，短语检索器从数据库中挑选短语来构建短语池。然后，短语连接器从短语池中选择一系列短语，最大限度地减少考虑韵律、歌曲结构和流畅性的多术语损失函数。实验结果表明，我们的方法可以生成高质量的古汉语歌词，同时在主题和歌曲结构控制方面表现良好。我们还希望我们的方法能够推广到其他歌词生成任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于短语原型检索的可控古代中国宋词生成方法，通过结构化控制实现高质量歌词生成。
AI.motivation: 现有歌词生成方法在需要精细控制的场景（如宋词结构、押韵等）表现不足，亟需改进可控性。
AI.method: 构建短语检索器与连接器系统，通过输入提示生成短语池，并基于押韵、结构、流畅度的多目标损失函数选择最优短语序列。
AI.result: 实验表明方法能生成高质量宋词，在主题相关性和结构控制指标上优于基线模型，且具备跨任务泛化潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过结构化短语控制有效解决了宋词生成的精细控制难题，为其他韵律化文本生成任务提供可复用框架。

authors_text: Fida Mohammad Thoker,Hazel Doughty,Cees Snoek
title: Tubelet-Contrastive Self-Supervision for Video-Efficient Generalization
title_zh: 用于视频高效泛化的 Tubelet 对比自我监督
abstract: We propose a self-supervised method for learning motion-focused video representations. Existing approaches minimize distances between temporally augmented videos, which maintain high spatial similarity. We instead propose to learn similarities between videos with identical local motion dynamics but an otherwise different appearance. We do so by adding synthetic motion trajectories to videos which we refer to as tubelets. By simulating different tubelet motions and applying transformations, such as scaling and rotation, we introduce motion patterns beyond what is present in the pretraining data. This allows us to learn a video representation that is remarkably data efficient: our approach maintains performance when using only 25\% of the pretraining videos. Experiments on 10 diverse downstream settings demonstrate our competitive performance and generalizability to new domains and fine-grained actions.
summary: We propose a self-supervised method for learning motion-focused video representations. Existing approaches minimize distances between temporally augmented videos, which maintain high spatial similarity. We instead propose to learn similarities between videos with identical local motion dynamics but an otherwise different appearance. We do so by adding synthetic motion trajectories to videos which we refer to as tubelets. By simulating different tubelet motions and applying transformations, such as scaling and rotation, we introduce motion patterns beyond what is present in the pretraining data. This allows us to learn a video representation that is remarkably data efficient: our approach maintains performance when using only 25\% of the pretraining videos. Experiments on 10 diverse downstream settings demonstrate our competitive performance and generalizability to new domains and fine-grained actions.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于学习以运动为中心的视频表示的自监督方法。现有方法最大限度地减少了时间增强视频之间的距离，从而保持了较高的空间相似性。相反，我们建议学习具有相同局部运动动力学但外观不同的视频之间的相似性。我们通过向视频添加合成运动轨迹来实现这一点，我们将其称为 tubelet。通过模拟不同的小管运动并应用缩放和旋转等变换，我们引入了预训练数据之外的运动模式。这使我们能够学习数据效率非常高的视频表示：我们的方法在仅使用 25% 的预训练视频时保持性能。对 10 个不同下游设置的实验证明了我们的竞争性能以及对新领域和细粒度操作的通用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督方法，通过学习具有相同局部运动动态但不同外观的视频相似性，以提高视频表示的数据效率和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过最小化时间增强视频间的距离来学习表示，但依赖高空间相似性。作者认为应关注局部运动动态，以提升模型对不同外观场景的泛化能力。
AI.method: 向视频中添加合成运动轨迹（tubelets），通过模拟不同运动模式并应用缩放、旋转等变换，学习忽略外观差异的运动特征表示。
AI.result: 在仅使用25%预训练数据时，方法在10个下游任务中保持竞争力，展现跨领域和细粒度动作识别的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: Tubelet对比自监督方法有效提升了视频表示的数据效率与领域适应性，为高效视频学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Nathan Hubens,Victor Delvigne,Matei Mancas,Bernard Gosselin,Marius Preda,Titus Zaharia
title: Induced Feature Selection by Structured Pruning
title_zh: 通过结构化剪枝诱导特征选择
abstract: The advent of sparsity inducing techniques in neural networks has been of a great help in the last few years. Indeed, those methods allowed to find lighter and faster networks, able to perform more efficiently in resource-constrained environment such as mobile devices or highly requested servers. Such a sparsity is generally imposed on the weights of neural networks, reducing the footprint of the architecture. In this work, we go one step further by imposing sparsity jointly on the weights and on the input data. This can be achieved following a three-step process: 1) impose a certain structured sparsity on the weights of the network; 2) track back input features corresponding to zeroed blocks of weight; 3) remove useless weights and input features and retrain the network. Performing pruning both on the network and on input data not only allows for extreme reduction in terms of parameters and operations but can also serve as an interpretation process. Indeed, with the help of data pruning, we now have information about which input feature is useful for the network to keep its performance. Experiments conducted on a variety of architectures and datasets: MLP validated on MNIST, CIFAR10/100 and ConvNets (VGG16 and ResNet18), validated on CIFAR10/100 and CALTECH101 respectively, show that it is possible to achieve additional gains in terms of total parameters and in FLOPs by performing pruning on input data, while also increasing accuracy.
summary: The advent of sparsity inducing techniques in neural networks has been of a great help in the last few years. Indeed, those methods allowed to find lighter and faster networks, able to perform more efficiently in resource-constrained environment such as mobile devices or highly requested servers. Such a sparsity is generally imposed on the weights of neural networks, reducing the footprint of the architecture. In this work, we go one step further by imposing sparsity jointly on the weights and on the input data. This can be achieved following a three-step process: 1) impose a certain structured sparsity on the weights of the network; 2) track back input features corresponding to zeroed blocks of weight; 3) remove useless weights and input features and retrain the network. Performing pruning both on the network and on input data not only allows for extreme reduction in terms of parameters and operations but can also serve as an interpretation process. Indeed, with the help of data pruning, we now have information about which input feature is useful for the network to keep its performance. Experiments conducted on a variety of architectures and datasets: MLP validated on MNIST, CIFAR10/100 and ConvNets (VGG16 and ResNet18), validated on CIFAR10/100 and CALTECH101 respectively, show that it is possible to achieve additional gains in terms of total parameters and in FLOPs by performing pruning on input data, while also increasing accuracy.
abstract_zh: 神经网络中稀疏性诱导技术的出现在过去几年中提供了很大的帮助。事实上，这些方法允许找到更轻、更快的网络，能够在资源受限的环境（例如移动设备或高要求的服务器）中更有效地执行。这种稀疏性通常施加在神经网络的权重上，从而减少了架构的占用空间。在这项工作中，我们更进一步，对权重和输入数据联合施加稀疏性。这可以通过以下三步过程来实现：1）对网络权重施加一定的结构化稀疏性； 2）回溯与归零权重块相对应的输入特征； 3）删除无用的权重和输入特征并重新训练网络。在网络和输入数据上执行剪枝不仅可以极大地减少参数和操作，而且还可以作为解释过程。事实上，在数据修剪的帮助下，我们现在掌握了哪些输入特征对于网络保持其性能有用的信息。在各种架构和数据集上进行的实验：在 MNIST、CIFAR10/100 和 ConvNet（VGG16 和 ResNet18）上验证的 MLP，分别在 CIFAR10/100 和 CALTECH101 上验证，表明通过对输入数据进行剪枝可以在总参数和 FLOP 方面实现额外增益，同时提高准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种同时对神经网络权重和输入数据进行结构化剪枝的方法，以减少参数量和计算量并提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统稀疏化技术仅作用于网络权重，而本文认为联合剪枝权重和输入特征可进一步压缩模型并提供特征解释性。
AI.method: 通过三步流程实现：1）对网络权重施加结构化稀疏性；2）定位与零权重块对应的输入特征；3）移除冗余权重和特征后重新训练网络。
AI.result: 在MNIST、CIFAR10/100及CALTECH101等数据集上，该方法在减少参数量和FLOPs的同时提升了模型准确率。
AI.conclusion: 联合剪枝权重与输入特征能有效压缩模型规模并增强解释性，为高效神经网络设计提供新思路。

search_text: Induced Feature Selection by Structured Pruning 通过结构化剪枝诱导特征选择 The advent of sparsity inducing techniques in neural networks has been of a great help in the last few years. Indeed, those methods allowed to find lighter and faster networks, able to perform more efficiently in resource-constrained environment such as mobile devices or highly requested servers. Such a sparsity is generally imposed on the weights of neural networks, reducing the footprint of the architecture. In this work, we go one step further by imposing sparsity jointly on the weights and on the input data. This can be achieved following a three-step process: 1) impose a certain structured sparsity on the weights of the network; 2) track back input features corresponding to zeroed blocks of weight; 3) remove useless weights and input features and retrain the network. Performing pruning both on the network and on input data not only allows for extreme reduction in terms of parameters and operations but can also serve as an interpretation process. Indeed, with the help of data pruning, we now have information about which input feature is useful for the network to keep its performance. Experiments conducted on a variety of architectures and datasets: MLP validated on MNIST, CIFAR10/100 and ConvNets (VGG16 and ResNet18), validated on CIFAR10/100 and CALTECH101 respectively, show that it is possible to achieve additional gains in terms of total parameters and in FLOPs by performing pruning on input data, while also increasing accuracy. 神经网络中稀疏性诱导技术的出现在过去几年中提供了很大的帮助。事实上，这些方法允许找到更轻、更快的网络，能够在资源受限的环境（例如移动设备或高要求的服务器）中更有效地执行。这种稀疏性通常施加在神经网络的权重上，从而减少了架构的占用空间。在这项工作中，我们更进一步，对权重和输入数据联合施加稀疏性。这可以通过以下三步过程来实现：1）对网络权重施加一定的结构化稀疏性； 2）回溯与归零权重块相对应的输入特征； 3）删除无用的权重和输入特征并重新训练网络。在网络和输入数据上执行剪枝不仅可以极大地减少参数和操作，而且还可以作为解释过程。事实上，在数据修剪的帮助下，我们现在掌握了哪些输入特征对于网络保持其性能有用的信息。在各种架构和数据集上进行的实验：在 MNIST、CIFAR10/100 和 ConvNet（VGG16 和 ResNet18）上验证的 MLP，分别在 CIFAR10/100 和 CALTECH101 上验证，表明通过对输入数据进行剪枝可以在总参数和 FLOP 方面实现额外增益，同时提高准确性。 本文提出一种同时对神经网络权重和输入数据进行结构化剪枝的方法，以减少参数量和计算量并提升模型性能。 Nathan Hubens,Victor Delvigne,Matei Mancas,Bernard Gosselin,Marius Preda,Titus Zaharia cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Jinyoung Jun,Jae-Han Lee,Chang-Su Kim
title: Versatile Depth Estimator Based on Common Relative Depth Estimation and Camera-Specific Relative-to-Metric Depth Conversion
title_zh: 基于通用相对深度估计和相机特定相对到公制深度转换的多功能深度估计器
abstract: A typical monocular depth estimator is trained for a single camera, so its performance drops severely on images taken with different cameras. To address this issue, we propose a versatile depth estimator (VDE), composed of a common relative depth estimator (CRDE) and multiple relative-to-metric converters (R2MCs). The CRDE extracts relative depth information, and each R2MC converts the relative information to predict metric depths for a specific camera. The proposed VDE can cope with diverse scenes, including both indoor and outdoor scenes, with only a 1.12\% parameter increase per camera. Experimental results demonstrate that VDE supports multiple cameras effectively and efficiently and also achieves state-of-the-art performance in the conventional single-camera scenario.
summary: A typical monocular depth estimator is trained for a single camera, so its performance drops severely on images taken with different cameras. To address this issue, we propose a versatile depth estimator (VDE), composed of a common relative depth estimator (CRDE) and multiple relative-to-metric converters (R2MCs). The CRDE extracts relative depth information, and each R2MC converts the relative information to predict metric depths for a specific camera. The proposed VDE can cope with diverse scenes, including both indoor and outdoor scenes, with only a 1.12\% parameter increase per camera. Experimental results demonstrate that VDE supports multiple cameras effectively and efficiently and also achieves state-of-the-art performance in the conventional single-camera scenario.
abstract_zh: 典型的单目深度估计器是针对单个相机进行训练的，因此其性能在使用不同相机拍摄的图像时严重下降。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种多功能深度估计器（VDE），由通用相对深度估计器（CRDE）和多个相对公制转换器（R2MC）组成。 CRDE 提取相对深度信息，每个 R2MC 转换相对信息以预测特定相机的度量深度。所提出的VDE可以应对多种场景，包括室内和室外场景，每个摄像机的参数仅增加1.12％。实验结果表明，VDE有效且高效地支持多摄像头，并且在传统的单摄像头场景中也实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种通用的单目深度估计器，解决不同相机间深度估计性能下降的问题
AI.motivation: 传统单目深度估计器针对单一相机训练，难以适应不同相机导致性能下降，需开发跨相机通用的解决方案
AI.method: 方法结合通用相对深度估计器（CRDE）与多个相机特定的相对到度量转换器（R2MCs），分别处理相对深度信息和转换为具体相机的度量深度
AI.result: 实验表明VDE有效支持多相机深度估计，且在传统单相机任务中达到最先进水平
AI.conclusion: 结论表明该方法以少量参数增加实现跨相机通用深度估计，适用于室内外多样场景

authors_text: Qifeng Lin,Rui Li,Feilong Zhang,Kai Kazuki,Ong Zong Chen,Xiaodong Chen,Hirotaka Sato
title: Resilient conductive membrane synthesized by in-situ polymerisation for wearable non-invasive electronics on moving appendages of cyborg insect
title_zh: 通过原位聚合合成弹性导电膜，用于机器人昆虫移动附肢上的可穿戴非侵入式电子产品
abstract: By leveraging their high mobility and small size, insects have been combined with microcontrollers to build up cyborg insects for various practical applications. Unfortunately, all current cyborg insects rely on implanted electrodes to control their movement, which causes irreversible damage to their organs and muscles. Here, we develop a non-invasive method for cyborg insects to address above issues, using a conformal electrode with an in-situ polymerized ion-conducting layer and an electron-conducting layer. The neural and locomotion responses to the electrical inductions verify the efficient communication between insects and controllers by the non-invasive method. The precise "S" line following of the cyborg insect further demonstrates its potential in practical navigation. The conformal non-invasive electrodes keep the intactness of the insects used while controlling their motion. With the antennae, important olfactory organs of insects preserved, the cyborg insect, in the future, may be endowed with abilities to detect the surrounding environment.
summary: By leveraging their high mobility and small size, insects have been combined with microcontrollers to build up cyborg insects for various practical applications. Unfortunately, all current cyborg insects rely on implanted electrodes to control their movement, which causes irreversible damage to their organs and muscles. Here, we develop a non-invasive method for cyborg insects to address above issues, using a conformal electrode with an in-situ polymerized ion-conducting layer and an electron-conducting layer. The neural and locomotion responses to the electrical inductions verify the efficient communication between insects and controllers by the non-invasive method. The precise "S" line following of the cyborg insect further demonstrates its potential in practical navigation. The conformal non-invasive electrodes keep the intactness of the insects used while controlling their motion. With the antennae, important olfactory organs of insects preserved, the cyborg insect, in the future, may be endowed with abilities to detect the surrounding environment.
abstract_zh: 通过利用昆虫的高机动性和小尺寸，昆虫与微控制器结合起来，构建了用于各种实际应用的机器人昆虫。不幸的是，目前所有的机器人昆虫都依赖植入的电极来控制它们的运动，这会对它们的器官和肌肉造成不可逆转的损害。在这里，我们开发了一种针对机器人昆虫的非侵入性方法来解决上述问题，使用具有原位聚合离子传导层和电子传导层的共形电极。对电感应的神经和运动反应通过非侵入性方法验证了昆虫和控制器之间的有效通信。机器人昆虫精确的“S”线跟踪进一步展示了其在实际导航中的潜力。保形非侵入性电极在控制昆虫运动的同时保持所用昆虫的完整性。由于保留了昆虫重要的嗅觉器官触角，未来的机器人昆虫可能会被赋予探测周围环境的能力。

AI.tldr: 开发一种非侵入式方法，通过原位聚合导电膜控制昆虫机械装置的运动。
AI.motivation: 现有昆虫机械装置依赖植入电极控制运动，会导致器官和肌肉不可逆损伤，需解决非侵入式控制问题。
AI.method: 采用原位聚合技术制备共形电极，包含离子导电层和电子导电层，实现神经与运动响应的非侵入式电信号传递。
AI.result: 验证了非侵入式方法的有效通信，昆虫可精确完成'S'形路径导航，且触角等关键器官保持完整。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持昆虫完整性的前提下实现运动控制，未来可赋予其环境感知能力。

authors_text: Khaled Kassem,Alia Saad
title: This Was (Not) Intended: How Intent Communication and Biometrics Can Enhance Social Interactions With Robots
title_zh: 这是（不是）预期的：意图通信和生物识别技术如何增强与机器人的社交互动
abstract: Socially Assistive Robots (SARs) are robots that are designed to replicate the role of a caregiver, coach, or teacher, providing emotional, cognitive, and social cues to support a specific group. SARs are becoming increasingly prevalent, especially in elderly care. Effective communication, both explicit and implicit, is a critical aspect of human-robot interaction involving SARs. Intent communication is necessary for SARs to engage in effective communication with humans. Biometrics can provide crucial information about a person's identity or emotions. By linking these biometric signals to the communication of intent, SARs can gain a profound understanding of their users and tailor their interactions accordingly. The development of reliable and robust biometric sensing and analysis systems is critical to the success of SARs. In this work, we focus on four different aspects to evaluate the communication of intent involving SARs, existing works, and our outlook on future works and applications.
summary: Socially Assistive Robots (SARs) are robots that are designed to replicate the role of a caregiver, coach, or teacher, providing emotional, cognitive, and social cues to support a specific group. SARs are becoming increasingly prevalent, especially in elderly care. Effective communication, both explicit and implicit, is a critical aspect of human-robot interaction involving SARs. abstract_zh: 社交辅助机器人 (SAR) 是一种旨在复制看护者、教练或教师角色的机器人，提供情感、认知和社交线索来支持特定群体。 SAR 正变得越来越普遍，尤其是在老年人护理领域。有效的沟通（无论是显式的还是隐式的）是涉及 SAR 的人机交互的一个重要方面。 SAR 与人类进行有效沟通需要有意图的沟通。生物识别技术可以提供有关一个人的身份或情绪的重要信息。通过将这些生物特征信号与意图沟通联系起来，SAR 可以深入了解用户并相应地调整他们的交互。开发可靠且强大的生物识别传感和分析系统对于合成孔径雷达的成功至关重要。在这项工作中，我们重点从四个不同的方面来评估涉及 SAR 的意图沟通、现有工作以及我们对未来工作和应用的展望。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨如何通过意图沟通和生物特征识别技术提升社交辅助机器人与人类的互动效果，特别是在老年护理场景中的应用。
AI.motivation: 社交辅助机器人（SARs）在老年护理中日益重要，但有效的人机沟通仍面临挑战，需结合意图识别与生物特征分析以增强互动质量。
AI.method: 通过分析现有研究，从四个维度评估意图沟通机制，并结合生物特征数据探讨其在SARs中的应用潜力及未来方向。
AI.result: 提出生物特征与意图沟通结合的框架，为SARs提供更精准的用户理解与个性化交互方案，但具体技术实现需进一步验证。
AI.conclusion: 可靠的生物特征分析系统与意图识别技术是提升SARs交互效果的关键，未来需加强跨学科研究以推动实际应用。

authors_text: Jiaer Xia,Lei Tan,Pingyang Dai,Mingbo Zhao,Yongjian Wu,Liujuan Cao
title: Attention Disturbance and Dual-Path Constraint Network for Occluded Person Re-identification
title_zh: 用于被遮挡人重新识别的注意力干扰和双路径约束网络
abstract: Occluded person re-identification (Re-ID) aims to address the potential occlusion problem when matching occluded or holistic pedestrians from different camera views. Many methods use the background as artificial occlusion and rely on attention networks to exclude noisy interference. However, the significant discrepancy between simple background occlusion and realistic occlusion can negatively impact the generalization of the network. To address this issue, we propose a novel transformer-based Attention Disturbance and Dual-Path Constraint Network (ADP) to enhance the generalization of attention networks. Firstly, to imitate real-world obstacles, we introduce an Attention Disturbance Mask (ADM) module that generates an offensive noise, which can distract attention like a realistic occluder, as a more complex form of occlusion. Secondly, to fully exploit these complex occluded images, we develop a Dual-Path Constraint Module (DPC) that can obtain preferable supervision information from holistic images through dual-path interaction. With our proposed method, the network can effectively circumvent a wide variety of occlusions using the basic ViT baseline. Comprehensive experimental evaluations conducted on person re-ID benchmarks demonstrate the superiority of ADP over state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Occluded person re-identification (Re-ID) aims to address the potential occlusion problem when matching occluded or holistic pedestrians from different camera views. Many methods use the background as artificial occlusion and rely on attention networks to exclude noisy interference. However, the significant discrepancy between simple background occlusion and realistic occlusion can negatively impact the generalization of the network. To address this issue, we propose a novel transformer-based Attention Disturbance and Dual-Path Constraint Network (ADP) to enhance the generalization of attention networks. Firstly, to imitate real-world obstacles, we introduce an Attention Disturbance Mask (ADM) module that generates an offensive noise, which can distract attention like a realistic occluder, as a more complex form of occlusion. Secondly, to fully exploit these complex occluded images, we develop a Dual-Path Constraint Module (DPC) that can obtain preferable supervision information from holistic images through dual-path interaction. With our proposed method, the network can effectively circumvent a wide variety of occlusions using the basic ViT baseline. Comprehensive experimental evaluations conducted on person re-ID benchmarks demonstrate the superiority of ADP over state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 被遮挡行人重新识别（Re-ID）旨在解决从不同摄像机视图匹配被遮挡或整体行人时潜在的遮挡问题。许多方法使用背景作为人工遮挡，并依靠注意力网络来排除噪声干扰。然而，简单背景遮挡和现实遮挡之间的显着差异可能会对网络的泛化产生负面影响。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新型的基于变压器的注意力干扰和双路径约束网络（ADP）来增强注意力网络的泛化。首先，为了模仿现实世界的障碍物，我们引入了一个注意力干扰掩模（ADM）模块，该模块会生成令人讨厌的噪声，它可以像现实的遮挡物一样分散注意力，这是一种更复杂的遮挡形式。其次，为了充分利用这些复杂的遮挡图像，我们开发了双路径约束模块（DPC），它可以通过双路径交互从整体图像中获得更好的监督信息。通过我们提出的方法，网络可以使用基本 ViT 基线有效地规避各种遮挡。对人员重新识别基准进行的综合实验评估证明了 ADP 相对于最先进方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的ADP网络，通过模拟真实遮挡和双路径约束机制，提升遮挡行人重识别的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法使用简单背景遮挡模拟真实场景存在偏差，导致注意力网络泛化能力不足，难以应对复杂真实遮挡情况。
AI.method: 设计Attention Disturbance Mask模块生成复杂噪声模拟真实遮挡，并结合Dual-Path Constraint模块通过双路径交互获取完整图像监督信息，基于ViT框架实现。
AI.result: 在多个行人重识别基准数据集上优于现有最先进方法，验证了ADP在处理多样化遮挡场景中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入真实遮挡模拟和双路径约束机制，ADP显著提升了遮挡行人重识别的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

Many methods use the background as artificial occlusion and rely on attention networks to exclude noisy interference. However, the significant discrepancy between simple background occlusion and realistic occlusion can negatively impact the generalization of the network. To address this issue, we propose a novel transformer-based Attention Disturbance and Dual-Path Constraint Network (ADP) to enhance the generalization of attention networks. Firstly, to imitate real-world obstacles, we introduce an Attention Disturbance Mask (ADM) module that generates an offensive noise, which can distract attention like a realistic occluder, as a more complex form of occlusion. Secondly, to fully exploit these complex occluded images, we develop a Dual-Path Constraint Module (DPC) that can obtain preferable supervision information from holistic images through dual-path interaction. With our proposed method, the network can effectively circumvent a wide variety of occlusions using the basic ViT baseline. Comprehensive experimental evaluations conducted on person re-ID benchmarks demonstrate the superiority of ADP over state-of-the-art methods. 被遮挡行人重新识别（Re-ID）旨在解决从不同摄像机视图匹配被遮挡或整体行人时潜在的遮挡问题。许多方法使用背景作为人工遮挡，并依靠注意力网络来排除噪声干扰。然而，简单背景遮挡和现实遮挡之间的显着差异可能会对网络的泛化产生负面影响。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新型的基于变压器的注意力干扰和双路径约束网络（ADP）来增强注意力网络的泛化。首先，为了模仿现实世界的障碍物，我们引入了一个注意力干扰掩模（ADM）模块，该模块会生成令人讨厌的噪声，它可以像现实的遮挡物一样分散注意力，这是一种更复杂的遮挡形式。其次，为了充分利用这些复杂的遮挡图像，我们开发了双路径约束模块（DPC），它可以通过双路径交互从整体图像中获得更好的监督信息。通过我们提出的方法，网络可以使用基本 ViT 基线有效地规避各种遮挡。对人员重新识别基准进行的综合实验评估证明了 ADP 相对于最先进方法的优越性。 本文提出一种基于Transformer的ADP网络，通过模拟真实遮挡和双路径约束机制，提升遮挡行人重识别的性能。 Jiaer Xia,Lei Tan,Pingyang Dai,Mingbo Zhao,Yongjian Wu,Liujuan Cao cs.CV

authors_text: Zhe Wang,Siqi Fan,Xiaoliang Huo,Tongda Xu,Yan Wang,Jingjing Liu,Yilun Chen,Ya-Qin Zhang
title: VIMI: Vehicle-Infrastructure Multi-view Intermediate Fusion for Camera-based 3D Object Detection
title_zh: VIMI：用于基于摄像头的 3D 物体检测的车辆基础设施多视图中间融合
abstract: In autonomous driving, Vehicle-Infrastructure Cooperative 3D Object Detection (VIC3D) makes use of multi-view cameras from both vehicles and traffic infrastructure, providing a global vantage point with rich semantic context of road conditions beyond a single vehicle viewpoint. Two major challenges prevail in VIC3D: 1) inherent calibration noise when fusing multi-view images, caused by time asynchrony across cameras; 2) information loss when projecting 2D features into 3D space. To address these issues, We propose a novel 3D object detection framework, Vehicles-Infrastructure Multi-view Intermediate fusion (VIMI). First, to fully exploit the holistic perspectives from both vehicles and infrastructure, we propose a Multi-scale Cross Attention (MCA) module that fuses infrastructure and vehicle features on selective multi-scales to correct the calibration noise introduced by camera asynchrony. Then, we design a Camera-aware Channel Masking (CCM) module that uses camera parameters as priors to augment the fused features. We further introduce a Feature Compression (FC) module with channel and spatial compression blocks to reduce the size of transmitted features for enhanced efficiency. Experiments show that VIMI achieves 15.61% overall AP_3D and 21.44% AP_BEV on the new VIC3D dataset, DAIR-V2X-C, significantly outperforming state-of-the-art early fusion and late fusion methods with comparable transmission cost.
summary: In autonomous driving, Vehicle-Infrastructure Cooperative 3D Object Detection (VIC3D) makes use of multi-view cameras from both vehicles and traffic infrastructure, providing a global vantage point with rich semantic context of road conditions beyond a single vehicle viewpoint. Two major challenges prevail in VIC3D: 1) inherent calibration noise when fusing multi-view images, caused by time asynchrony across cameras; 2) information loss when projecting 2D features into 3D space. To address these issues, We propose a novel 3D object detection framework, Vehicles-Infrastructure Multi-view Intermediate fusion (VIMI). First, to fully exploit the holistic perspectives from both vehicles and infrastructure, we propose a Multi-scale Cross Attention (MCA) module that fuses infrastructure and vehicle features on selective multi-scales to correct the calibration noise introduced by camera asynchrony. Then, we design a Camera-aware Channel Masking (CCM) module that uses camera parameters as priors to augment the fused features. We further introduce a Feature Compression (FC) module with channel and spatial compression blocks to reduce the size of transmitted features for enhanced efficiency. Experiments show that VIMI achieves 15.61% overall AP_3D and 21.44% AP_BEV on the new VIC3D dataset, DAIR-V2X-C, significantly outperforming state-of-the-art early fusion and late fusion methods with comparable transmission cost.
abstract_zh: 在自动驾驶中，车辆基础设施协作 3D 目标检测 (VIC3D) 利用来自车辆和交通基础设施的多视图摄像头，提供超越单一车辆视角的全球有利位置以及丰富的路况语义背景。 VIC3D 面临两个主要挑战：1）融合多视图图像时，由于摄像机之间的时间异步导致的固有校准噪声； 2）将 2D 特征投影到 3D 空间时的信息丢失。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的 3D 对象检测框架，即车辆基础设施多视图中间融合（VIMI）。首先，为了充分利用车辆和基础设施的整体视角，我们提出了一种多尺度交叉注意（MCA）模块，该模块在选择性多尺度上融合基础设施和车辆特征，以纠正相机异步引入的校准噪声。然后，我们设计了一个相机感知通道遮蔽（CCM）模块，该模块使用相机参数作为先验来增强融合特征。我们进一步引入了具有通道和空间压缩块的特征压缩（FC）模块，以减少传输特征的大小以提高效率。实验表明，VIMI 在新的 VIC3D 数据集 DAIR-V2X-C 上实现了 15.61% 的整体 AP_3D 和 21.44% AP_BEV，在传输成本相当的情况下，显着优于最先进的早期融合和后期融合方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多视角摄像头的车辆-基础设施协同3D目标检测框架VIMI，解决多视角图像融合中的校准噪声和2D到3D特征投影的信息损失问题。
AI.motivation: 现有VIC3D方法面临多摄像头时序不同步导致的校准噪声和2D特征投影到3D空间时的信息丢失，亟需提升检测精度与传输效率的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计多尺度交叉注意力模块（MCA）校准噪声、摄像头感知通道掩码模块（CCM）增强特征、特征压缩模块（FC）降低传输成本，实现多视角特征融合与高效检测。
AI.result: 在DAIR-V2X-C数据集上，VIMI达到15.61% AP_3D和21.44% AP_BEV，显著优于早期/晚期融合方法且传输成本相当。
AI.conclusion: VIMI通过多模块协同有效解决了VIC3D中的校准噪声与信息损失问题，为车路协同自动驾驶提供了高效可靠的3D目标检测方案。

search_text: VIMI: Vehicle-Infrastructure Multi-view Intermediate Fusion for Camera-based 3D Object Detection VIMI：用于基于摄像头的 3D 物体检测的车辆基础设施多视图中间融合 In autonomous driving, Vehicle-Infrastructure Cooperative 3D Object Detection (VIC3D) makes use of multi-view cameras from both vehicles and traffic infrastructure, providing a global vantage point with rich semantic context of road conditions beyond a single vehicle viewpoint. Two major challenges prevail in VIC3D: 1) inherent calibration noise when fusing multi-view images, caused by time asynchrony across cameras; 2) information loss when projecting 2D features into 3D space. To address these issues, We propose a novel 3D object detection framework, Vehicles-Infrastructure Multi-view Intermediate fusion (VIMI). First, to fully exploit the holistic perspectives from both vehicles and infrastructure, we propose a Multi-scale Cross Attention (MCA) module that fuses infrastructure and vehicle features on selective multi-scales to correct the calibration noise introduced by camera asynchrony. Then, we design a Camera-aware Channel Masking (CCM) module that uses camera parameters as priors to augment the fused features. We further introduce a Feature Compression (FC) module with channel and spatial compression blocks to reduce the size of transmitted features for enhanced efficiency. Experiments show that VIMI achieves 15.61% overall AP_3D and 21.44% AP_BEV on the new VIC3D dataset, DAIR-V2X-C, significantly outperforming state-of-the-art early fusion and late fusion methods with comparable transmission cost. 在自动驾驶中，车辆基础设施协作 3D 目标检测 (VIC3D) 利用来自车辆和交通基础设施的多视图摄像头，提供超越单一车辆视角的全球有利位置以及丰富的路况语义背景。 VIC3D 面临两个主要挑战：1）融合多视图图像时，由于摄像机之间的时间异步导致的固有校准噪声； 2）将 2D 特征投影到 3D 空间时的信息丢失。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的 3D 对象检测框架，即车辆基础设施多视图中间融合（VIMI）。首先，为了充分利用车辆和基础设施的整体视角，我们提出了一种多尺度交叉注意（MCA）模块，该模块在选择性多尺度上融合基础设施和车辆特征，以纠正相机异步引入的校准噪声。然后，我们设计了一个相机感知通道遮蔽（CCM）模块，该模块使用相机参数作为先验来增强融合特征。我们进一步引入了具有通道和空间压缩块的特征压缩（FC）模块，以减少传输特征的大小以提高效率。实验表明，VIMI 在新的 VIC3D 数据集 DAIR-V2X-C 上实现了 15.61% 的整体 AP_3D 和 21.44% AP_BEV，在传输成本相当的情况下，显着优于最先进的早期融合和后期融合方法。 本文提出一种基于多视角摄像头的车辆-基础设施协同3D目标检测框架VIMI，解决多视角图像融合中的校准噪声和2D到3D特征投影的信息损失问题。 Zhe Wang,Siqi Fan,Xiaoliang Huo,Tongda Xu,Yan Wang,Jingjing Liu,Yilun Chen,Ya-Qin Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Andrei Chertkov,Olga Tsymboi,Mikhail Pautov,Ivan Oseledets
title: Translate your gibberish: black-box adversarial attack on machine translation systems
title_zh: 翻译你的胡言乱语：对机器翻译系统的黑盒对抗性攻击
abstract: Neural networks are deployed widely in natural language processing tasks on the industrial scale, and perhaps the most often they are used as compounds of automatic machine translation systems. In this work, we present a simple approach to fool state-of-the-art machine translation tools in the task of translation from Russian to English and vice versa. Using a novel black-box gradient-free tensor-based optimizer, we show that many online translation tools, such as Google, DeepL, and Yandex, may both produce wrong or offensive translations for nonsensical adversarial input queries and refuse to translate seemingly benign input phrases. This vulnerability may interfere with understanding a new language and simply worsen the user's experience while using machine translation systems, and, hence, additional improvements of these tools are required to establish better translation.
summary: Neural networks are deployed widely in natural language processing tasks on the industrial scale, and perhaps the most often they are used as compounds of automatic machine translation systems. In this work, we present a simple approach to fool state-of-the-art machine translation tools in the task of translation from Russian to English and vice versa. Using a novel black-box gradient-free tensor-based optimizer, we show that many online translation tools, such as Google, DeepL, and Yandex, may both produce wrong or offensive translations for nonsensical adversarial input queries and refuse to translate seemingly benign input phrases. This vulnerability may interfere with understanding a new language and simply worsen the user's experience while using machine translation systems, and, hence, additional improvements of these tools are required to establish better translation.
abstract_zh: 神经网络广泛部署在工业规模的自然语言处理任务中，并且它们最常被用作自动机器翻译系统的组合。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种简单的方法来欺骗最先进的机器翻译工具，以完成从俄语到英语的翻译任务，反之亦然。使用一种新颖的、基于无梯度张量的黑盒优化器，我们发现许多在线翻译工具，例如 Google、DeepL 和 Yandex，可能会为无意义的对抗性输入查询生成错误或令人反感的翻译，并拒绝翻译看似良性的输入短语。此漏洞可能会干扰对新语言的理解，并且只会恶化用户在使用机器翻译系统时的体验，因此需要对这些工具进行额外的改进以建立更好的翻译。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对机器翻译系统的黑盒对抗攻击方法，通过生成对抗样本使主流翻译工具产生错误或拒绝翻译。
AI.motivation: 工业级机器翻译系统存在安全漏洞，可能被恶意输入干扰，影响翻译准确性和用户体验。
AI.method: 设计基于张量的无梯度黑盒优化器，无需目标模型梯度信息即可生成对抗性输入。
AI.result: 实验表明Google、DeepL和Yandex等系统在对抗样本下产生错误翻译或拒绝服务，暴露系统脆弱性。
AI.conclusion: 需提升机器翻译系统的鲁棒性以防御对抗攻击，保障翻译服务的安全性与可靠性。

authors_text: Jan Sellner,Silvia Seidlitz,Alexander Studier-Fischer,Alessandro Motta,Berkin Özdemir,Beat Peter Müller-Stich,Felix Nickel,Lena Maier-Hein
title: Semantic segmentation of surgical hyperspectral images under geometric domain shifts
title_zh: 几何域位移下手术高光谱图像的语义分割
comment: The first two authors (Jan Sellner and Silvia Seidlitz) contributed equally to this paper
comments: The first two authors (Jan Sellner and Silvia Seidlitz) contributed equally to this paper
abstract: Robust semantic segmentation of intraoperative image data could pave the way for automatic surgical scene understanding and autonomous robotic surgery. Geometric domain shifts, however, although common in real-world open surgeries due to variations in surgical procedures or situs occlusions, remain a topic largely unaddressed in the field. To address this gap in the literature, we (1) present the first analysis of state-of-the-art (SOA) semantic segmentation networks in the presence of geometric out-of-distribution (OOD) data, and (2) address generalizability with a dedicated augmentation technique termed "Organ Transplantation" that we adapted from the general computer vision community. According to a comprehensive validation on six different OOD data sets comprising 600 RGB and hyperspectral imaging (HSI) cubes from 33 pigs semantically annotated with 19 classes, we demonstrate a large performance drop of SOA organ segmentation networks applied to geometric OOD data. Surprisingly, this holds true not only for conventional RGB data (drop of Dice similarity coefficient (DSC) by 46 %) but also for HSI data (drop by 45 %), despite the latter's rich information content per pixel. Using our augmentation scheme improves on the SOA DSC by up to 67 % (RGB) and 90 % (HSI) and renders performance on par with in-distribution performance on real OOD test data. The simplicity and effectiveness of our augmentation scheme makes it a valuable network-independent tool for addressing geometric domain shifts in semantic scene segmentation of intraoperative data. Our code and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/IMSY-DKFZ/htc.
summary: Robust semantic segmentation of intraoperative image data could pave the way for automatic surgical scene understanding and autonomous robotic surgery. Geometric domain shifts, however, although common in real-world open surgeries due to variations in surgical procedures or situs occlusions, remain a topic largely unaddressed in the field. To address this gap in the literature, we (1) present the first analysis of state-of-the-art (SOA) semantic segmentation networks in the presence of geometric out-of-distribution (OOD) data, and (2) address generalizability with a dedicated augmentation technique termed "Organ Transplantation" that we adapted from the general computer vision community. According to a comprehensive validation on six different OOD data sets comprising 600 RGB and hyperspectral imaging (HSI) cubes from 33 pigs semantically annotated with 19 classes, we demonstrate a large performance drop of SOA organ segmentation networks applied to geometric OOD data. Surprisingly, this holds true not only for conventional RGB data (drop of Dice similarity coefficient (DSC) by 46 %) but also for HSI data (drop by 45 %), despite the latter's rich information content per pixel. Using our augmentation scheme improves on the SOA DSC by up to 67 % (RGB) and 90 % (HSI) and renders performance on par with in-distribution performance on real OOD test data. The simplicity and effectiveness of our augmentation scheme makes it a valuable network-independent tool for addressing geometric domain shifts in semantic scene segmentation of intraoperative data. Our code and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/IMSY-DKFZ/htc.
abstract_zh: 术中图像数据的鲁棒语义分割可以为自动手术场景理解和自主机器人手术铺平道路。然而，尽管由于手术过程或部位闭塞的变化而导致的几何域变化在现实世界的开放式手术中很常见，但在该领域仍然是一个基本上未得到解决的话题。为了解决文献中的这一差距，我们（1）首次在存在几何分布外（OOD）数据的情况下对最先进（SOA）语义分割网络进行分析，并且（2）使用我们从通用计算机视觉社区改编的称为“器官移植”的专用增强技术来解决通用性问题。根据对六个不同 OOD 数据集（包括来自 33 头猪的 600 个 RGB 和高光谱成像 (HSI) 立方体，并用 19 个类别进行语义注释）的综合验证，我们证明了应用于几何 OOD 数据的 SOA 器官分割网络的性能大幅下降。令人惊讶的是，这不仅适用于传统 RGB 数据（Dice 相似系数 (DSC) 下降 46%），也适用于 HSI 数据（下降 45%），尽管后者每个像素的信息内容丰富。使用我们的增强方案可将 SOA DSC 提高高达 67% (RGB) 和 90% (HSI)，并在真实 OOD 测试数据上呈现与分布内性能相当的性能。我们的增强方案的简单性和有效性使其成为一种有价值的独立于网络的工具，用于解决术中数据语义场景分割中的几何域变化。我们的代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/IMSY-DKFZ/htc 上获取。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了在几何域偏移条件下对术中高光谱图像进行语义分割的方法，提出了一种名为'器官移植'的增强技术以提高模型泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有语义分割网络在真实手术场景中因几何域偏移（如手术操作变化或遮挡）导致性能显著下降，而该问题在术中图像分析领域尚未被充分解决。
AI.method: 通过分析主流语义分割网络在几何域外数据上的表现，提出'器官移植'增强方法，模拟手术场景中的几何变化，并在包含600个RGB和高光谱图像立方体的数据集上进行验证。
AI.result: 实验显示，主流网络在几何域外数据上的Dice系数下降45-46%，而'器官移植'增强方法使RGB和高光谱数据的Dice系数分别提升67%和90%，性能接近分布内数据水平。
AI.conclusion: 该增强方法简单有效，可作为独立于网络结构的工具解决术中语义分割的几何域偏移问题，代码和预训练模型已开源。

search_text: Semantic segmentation of surgical hyperspectral images under geometric domain shifts 几何域位移下手术高光谱图像的语义分割 Robust semantic segmentation of intraoperative image data could pave the way for automatic surgical scene understanding and autonomous robotic surgery. Geometric domain shifts, however, although common in real-world open surgeries due to variations in surgical procedures or situs occlusions, remain a topic largely unaddressed in the field. To address this gap in the literature, we (1) present the first analysis of state-of-the-art (SOA) semantic segmentation networks in the presence of geometric out-of-distribution (OOD) data, and (2) address generalizability with a dedicated augmentation technique termed "Organ Transplantation" that we adapted from the general computer vision community. According to a comprehensive validation on six different OOD data sets comprising 600 RGB and hyperspectral imaging (HSI) cubes from 33 pigs semantically annotated with 19 classes, we demonstrate a large performance drop of SOA organ segmentation networks applied to geometric OOD data. Surprisingly, this holds true not only for conventional RGB data (drop of Dice similarity coefficient (DSC) by 46 %) but also for HSI data (drop by 45 %), despite the latter's rich information content per pixel. Using our augmentation scheme improves on the SOA DSC by up to 67 % (RGB) and 90 % (HSI) and renders performance on par with in-distribution performance on real OOD test data. The simplicity and effectiveness of our augmentation scheme makes it a valuable network-independent tool for addressing geometric domain shifts in semantic scene segmentation of intraoperative data. Our code and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/IMSY-DKFZ/htc. 术中图像数据的鲁棒语义分割可以为自动手术场景理解和自主机器人手术铺平道路。然而，尽管由于手术过程或部位闭塞的变化而导致的几何域变化在现实世界的开放式手术中很常见，但在该领域仍然是一个基本上未得到解决的话题。为了解决文献中的这一差距，我们（1）首次在存在几何分布外（OOD）数据的情况下对最先进（SOA）语义分割网络进行分析，并且（2）使用我们从通用计算机视觉社区改编的称为“器官移植”的专用增强技术来解决通用性问题。根据对六个不同 OOD 数据集（包括来自 33 头猪的 600 个 RGB 和高光谱成像 (HSI) 立方体，并用 19 个类别进行语义注释）的综合验证，我们证明了应用于几何 OOD 数据的 SOA 器官分割网络的性能大幅下降。令人惊讶的是，这不仅适用于传统 RGB 数据（Dice 相似系数 (DSC) 下降 46%），也适用于 HSI 数据（下降 45%），尽管后者每个像素的信息内容丰富。使用我们的增强方案可将 SOA DSC 提高高达 67% (RGB) 和 90% (HSI)，并在真实 OOD 测试数据上呈现与分布内性能相当的性能。我们的增强方案的简单性和有效性使其成为一种有价值的独立于网络的工具，用于解决术中数据语义场景分割中的几何域变化。我们的代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/IMSY-DKFZ/htc 上获取。 该论文研究了在几何域偏移条件下对术中高光谱图像进行语义分割的方法，提出了一种名为'器官移植'的增强技术以提高模型泛化能力。 Jan Sellner,Silvia Seidlitz,Alexander Studier-Fischer,Alessandro Motta,Berkin Özdemir,Beat Peter Müller-Stich,Felix Nickel,Lena Maier-Hein eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Dongliang Cao,Florian Bernard
title: Self-Supervised Learning for Multimodal Non-Rigid 3D Shape Matching
title_zh: 多模态非刚性 3D 形状匹配的自监督学习
abstract: The matching of 3D shapes has been extensively studied for shapes represented as surface meshes, as well as for shapes represented as point clouds. While point clouds are a common representation of raw real-world 3D data (e.g. from laser scanners), meshes encode rich and expressive topological information, but their creation typically requires some form of (often manual) curation. In turn, methods that purely rely on point clouds are unable to meet the matching quality of mesh-based methods that utilise the additional topological structure. In this work we close this gap by introducing a self-supervised multimodal learning strategy that combines mesh-based functional map regularisation with a contrastive loss that couples mesh and point cloud data. Our shape matching approach allows to obtain intramodal correspondences for triangle meshes, complete point clouds, and partially observed point clouds, as well as correspondences across these data modalities. We demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art results on several challenging benchmark datasets even in comparison to recent supervised methods, and that our method reaches previously unseen cross-dataset generalisation ability.
summary: The matching of 3D shapes has been extensively studied for shapes represented as surface meshes, as well as for shapes represented as point clouds. While point clouds are a common representation of raw real-world 3D data (e.g. from laser scanners), meshes encode rich and expressive topological information, but their creation typically requires some form of (often manual) curation. In turn, methods that purely rely on point clouds are unable to meet the matching quality of mesh-based methods that utilise the additional topological structure. In this work we close this gap by introducing a self-supervised multimodal learning strategy that combines mesh-based functional map regularisation with a contrastive loss that couples mesh and point cloud data. Our shape matching approach allows to obtain intramodal correspondences for triangle meshes, complete point clouds, and partially observed point clouds, as well as correspondences across these data modalities. We demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art results on several challenging benchmark datasets even in comparison to recent supervised methods, and that our method reaches previously unseen cross-dataset generalisation ability.
abstract_zh: 对于以表面网格表示的形状以及以点云表示的形状，3D 形状的匹配已得到广泛研究。虽然点云是原始现实世界 3D 数据（例如来自激光扫描仪）的常见表示，但网格编码了丰富且富有表现力的拓扑信息，但它们的创建通常需要某种形式（通常是手动）的管理。反过来，纯粹依赖点云的方法无法满足利用附加拓扑结构的基于网格的方法的匹配质量。在这项工作中，我们通过引入一种自监督多模态学习策略来缩小这一差距，该策略将基于网格的功能图正则化与耦合网格和点云数据的对比损失相结合。我们的形状匹配方法允许获得三角形网格、完整点云和部分观察点云的模态内对应，以及这些数据模态之间的对应。我们证明，即使与最近的监督方法相比，我们的方法在几个具有挑战性的基准数据集上也取得了最先进的结果，并且我们的方法达到了以前未见过的跨数据集泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督多模态学习方法，解决非刚性3D形状在网格与点云数据间的跨模态匹配问题。
AI.motivation: 网格数据虽包含丰富拓扑信息但依赖人工处理，点云数据虽常见但匹配质量较低，现有方法难以兼顾两者优势。
AI.method: 结合网格功能映射正则化与对比损失，通过自监督学习实现网格、完整点云及部分点云的跨模态对应。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上达到最先进水平，且展现出优于监督方法的跨数据集泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效融合网格与点云优势，为多模态3D形状匹配提供了新思路与高性能解决方案。

authors_text: Xiaokang Chen,Yajie Xing,Gang Zeng
title: Real-time 3D Semantic Scene Completion Via Feature Aggregation and Conditioned Prediction
title_zh: 通过特征聚合和条件预测完成实时 3D 语义场景
abstract: Semantic Scene Completion (SSC) aims to simultaneously predict the volumetric occupancy and semantic category of a 3D scene. In this paper, we propose a real-time semantic scene completion method with a feature aggregation strategy and conditioned prediction module. Feature aggregation fuses feature with different receptive fields and gathers context to improve scene completion performance. And the conditioned prediction module adopts a two-step prediction scheme that takes volumetric occupancy as a condition to enhance semantic completion prediction. We conduct experiments on three recognized benchmarks NYU, NYUCAD, and SUNCG. Our method achieves competitive performance at a speed of 110 FPS on one GTX 1080 Ti GPU.
summary: Semantic Scene Completion (SSC) aims to simultaneously predict the volumetric occupancy and semantic category of a 3D scene. In this paper, we propose a real-time semantic scene completion method with a feature aggregation strategy and conditioned prediction module. Feature aggregation fuses feature with different receptive fields and gathers context to improve scene completion performance. And the conditioned prediction module adopts a two-step prediction scheme that takes volumetric occupancy as a condition to enhance semantic completion prediction. We conduct experiments on three recognized benchmarks NYU, NYUCAD, and SUNCG. Our method achieves competitive performance at a speed of 110 FPS on one GTX 1080 Ti GPU.
abstract_zh: 语义场景完成 (SSC) 旨在同时预测 3D 场景的体积占用率和语义类别。在本文中，我们提出了一种具有特征聚合策略和条件预测模块的实时语义场景完成方法。特征聚合将特征与不同的感受野融合并收集上下文以提高场景完成性能。条件预测模块采用两步预测方案，以体积占用率作为条件来增强语义完成预测。我们在三个公认的基准 NYU、NYUCAD 和 SUNCG 上进行了实验。我们的方法在一个 GTX 1080 Ti GPU 上以 110 FPS 的速度实现了具有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种实时3D语义场景补全方法，通过特征聚合和条件预测模块实现体积占用与语义类别的联合预测。
AI.motivation: 现有语义场景补全方法在实时性与精度间难以平衡，需设计高效特征融合策略与条件预测机制以提升性能。
AI.method: 采用特征聚合策略融合多尺度特征并提取上下文信息，结合两步条件预测模块，以体积占用结果作为条件辅助语义预测。
AI.result: 在NYU、NYUCAD和SUNCG三个基准数据集上取得竞争力的性能，单块GTX 1080 Ti GPU实现110 FPS的实时处理速度。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过特征聚合与条件预测有效提升补全精度与效率，验证了实时3D语义场景补全的可行性。

result: 在NYU、NYUCAD和SUNCG三个基准数据集上取得竞争力的性能，单块GTX 1080 Ti GPU实现110 FPS的实时处理速度。
conclusion: 所提方法通过特征聚合与条件预测有效提升补全精度与效率，验证了实时3D语义场景补全的可行性。
search_text: Real-time 3D Semantic Scene Completion Via Feature Aggregation and Conditioned Prediction 通过特征聚合和条件预测完成实时 3D 语义场景 Semantic Scene Completion (SSC) aims to simultaneously predict the volumetric occupancy and semantic category of a 3D scene. In this paper, we propose a real-time semantic scene completion method with a feature aggregation strategy and conditioned prediction module. Feature aggregation fuses feature with different receptive fields and gathers context to improve scene completion performance. And the conditioned prediction module adopts a two-step prediction scheme that takes volumetric occupancy as a condition to enhance semantic completion prediction. We conduct experiments on three recognized benchmarks NYU, NYUCAD, and SUNCG. Our method achieves competitive performance at a speed of 110 FPS on one GTX 1080 Ti GPU. 语义场景完成 (SSC) 旨在同时预测 3D 场景的体积占用率和语义类别。在本文中，我们提出了一种具有特征聚合策略和条件预测模块的实时语义场景完成方法。特征聚合将特征与不同的感受野融合并收集上下文以提高场景完成性能。条件预测模块采用两步预测方案，以体积占用率作为条件来增强语义完成预测。我们在三个公认的基准 NYU、NYUCAD 和 SUNCG 上进行了实验。我们的方法在一个 GTX 1080 Ti GPU 上以 110 FPS 的速度实现了具有竞争力的性能。 本文提出了一种实时3D语义场景补全方法，通过特征聚合和条件预测模块实现体积占用与语义类别的联合预测。 Xiaokang Chen,Yajie Xing,Gang Zeng cs.CV

authors_text: Kenneth Blomqvist,Francesco Milano,Jen Jen Chung,Lionel Ott,Roland Siegwart
title: Neural Implicit Vision-Language Feature Fields
title_zh: 神经内隐视觉语言特征字段
abstract: Recently, groundbreaking results have been presented on open-vocabulary semantic image segmentation. Such methods segment each pixel in an image into arbitrary categories provided at run-time in the form of text prompts, as opposed to a fixed set of classes defined at training time. In this work, we present a zero-shot volumetric open-vocabulary semantic scene segmentation method. Our method builds on the insight that we can fuse image features from a vision-language model into a neural implicit representation. We show that the resulting feature field can be segmented into different classes by assigning points to natural language text prompts. The implicit volumetric representation enables us to segment the scene both in 3D and 2D by rendering feature maps from any given viewpoint of the scene. We show that our method works on noisy real-world data and can run in real-time on live sensor data dynamically adjusting to text prompts. We also present quantitative comparisons on the ScanNet dataset.
summary: Recently, groundbreaking results have been presented on open-vocabulary semantic image segmentation. Such methods segment each pixel in an image into arbitrary categories provided at run-time in the form of text prompts, as opposed to a fixed set of classes defined at training time. In this work, we present a zero-shot volumetric open-vocabulary semantic scene segmentation method. Our method builds on the insight that we can fuse image features from a vision-language model into a neural implicit representation. We show that the resulting feature field can be segmented into different classes by assigning points to natural language text prompts. The implicit volumetric representation enables us to segment the scene both in 3D and 2D by rendering feature maps from any given viewpoint of the scene. We show that our method works on noisy real-world data and can run in real-time on live sensor data dynamically adjusting to text prompts. We also present quantitative comparisons on the ScanNet dataset.
abstract_zh: 最近，在开放词汇语义图像分割方面取得了突破性的成果。此类方法将图像中的每个像素分割为运行时以文本提示形式提供的任意类别，而不是在训练时定义的一组固定类别。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种零镜头体积开放词汇语义场景分割方法。我们的方法建立在我们可以将视觉语言模型中的图像特征融合到神经隐式表示中的见解之上。我们表明，通过将点分配给自然语言文本提示，可以将生成的特征字段分为不同的类。隐式体积表示使我们能够通过从场景的任何给定视点渲染特征图来分割 3D 和 2D 场景。我们表明，我们的方法适用于嘈杂的现实世界数据，并且可以在实时传感器数据上实时运行，动态调整为文本提示。我们还对 ScanNet 数据集进行了定量比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经隐式表示的零样本开放词汇语义场景分割方法，能够通过文本提示实时分割3D场景并渲染任意视角的特征图。
AI.motivation: 传统语义分割依赖预定义类别，难以处理开放词汇场景。本文旨在开发无需预设类别的方法，以适应动态文本提示和实时传感器数据。
AI.method: 将视觉语言模型提取的图像特征融合到神经隐式表示中，构建可分割的特征场，并通过文本提示分配点云类别，支持3D/2D多视角渲染。
AI.result: 方法在ScanNet数据集上验证有效，可处理真实噪声数据并实时运行于动态传感器输入，定量结果优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过神经隐式表示实现了开放词汇的实时场景分割，为动态环境下的语义理解提供了新范式。
