authors_text: Qiang Qu,Xiaoming Chen,Yuk Ying Chung,Weidong Cai
title: LFACon: Introducing Anglewise Attention to No-Reference Quality Assessment in Light Field Space
title_zh: LFACon：将角度注意力引入光场空间中的无参考质量评估
comment: Accepted for IEEE VR 2023 (TVCG Special Issues) (Early Access)
comments: Accepted for IEEE VR 2023 (TVCG Special Issues) (Early Access)
abstract: Light field imaging can capture both the intensity information and the direction information of light rays. It naturally enables a six-degrees-of-freedom viewing experience and deep user engagement in virtual reality. Compared to 2D image assessment, light field image quality assessment (LFIQA) needs to consider not only the image quality in the spatial domain but also the quality consistency in the angular domain. However, there is a lack of metrics to effectively reflect the angular consistency and thus the angular quality of a light field image (LFI). Furthermore, the existing LFIQA metrics suffer from high computational costs due to the excessive data volume of LFIs. In this paper, we propose a novel concept of "anglewise attention" by introducing a multihead self-attention mechanism to the angular domain of an LFI. This mechanism better reflects the LFI quality. In particular, we propose three new attention kernels, including anglewise self-attention, anglewise grid attention, and anglewise central attention. These attention kernels can realize angular self-attention, extract multiangled features globally or selectively, and reduce the computational cost of feature extraction. By effectively incorporating the proposed kernels, we further propose our light field attentional convolutional neural network (LFACon) as an LFIQA metric. Our experimental results show that the proposed LFACon metric significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art LFIQA metrics. For the majority of distortion types, LFACon attains the best performance with lower complexity and less computational time.
summary: Light field imaging can capture both the intensity information and the direction information of light rays. It naturally enables a six-degrees-of-freedom viewing experience and deep user engagement in virtual reality. Compared to 2D image assessment, light field image quality assessment (LFIQA) needs to consider not only the image quality in the spatial domain but also the quality consistency in the angular domain. However, there is a lack of metrics to effectively reflect the angular consistency and thus the angular quality of a light field image (LFI). Furthermore, the existing LFIQA metrics suffer from high computational costs due to the excessive data volume of LFIs. In this paper, we propose a novel concept of "anglewise attention" by introducing a multihead self-attention mechanism to the angular domain of an LFI. This mechanism better reflects the LFI quality. In particular, we propose three new attention kernels, including anglewise self-attention, anglewise grid attention, and anglewise central attention. These attention kernels can realize angular self-attention, extract multiangled features globally or selectively, and reduce the computational cost of feature extraction. By effectively incorporating the proposed kernels, we further propose our light field attentional convolutional neural network (LFACon) as an LFIQA metric. Our experimental results show that the proposed LFACon metric significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art LFIQA metrics. For the majority of distortion types, LFACon attains the best performance with lower complexity and less computational time.
abstract_zh: 光场成像可以同时捕获光线的强度信息和方向信息。它自然地实现了六自由度的观看体验和虚拟现实中的深度用户参与。与二维图像评估相比，光场图像质量评估（LFIQA）不仅需要考虑空间域的图像质量，还需要考虑角度域的质量一致性。然而，缺乏有效反映角度一致性以及光场图像（LFI）的角度质量的指标。此外，由于 LFI 的数据量过多，现有的 LFIQA 指标计算成本很高。在本文中，我们通过向 LFI 的角度域引入多头自注意力机制，提出了“角度注意力”的新概念。这种机制更好地体现了LFI的质量。特别是，我们提出了三个新的注意力内核，包括角度自注意力、角度网格注意力和角度中心注意力。这些注意力核可以实现角度自注意力，全局或选择性地提取多角度特征，并降低特征提取的计算成本。通过有效地结合所提出的内核，我们进一步提出了我们的光场注意力卷积神经网络（LFACon）作为 LFIQA 指标。我们的实验结果表明，所提出的 LFACon 指标显着优于最先进的 LFIQA 指标。对于大多数失真类型，LFACon 以较低的复杂度和较少的计算时间获得最佳性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LFACon方法，通过引入角度注意力机制解决光场图像质量评估中的角度一致性问题，并降低计算成本。
AI.motivation: 现有光场图像质量评估方法缺乏有效反映角度一致性的指标，且计算成本高，难以满足实际需求。
AI.method: 引入多头自注意力机制，设计角度自注意力、角度网格注意力和角度中心注意力三种核，构建光场注意力卷积神经网络（LFACon）。
AI.result: 实验表明，LFACon在多数失真类型下优于现有方法，具有更低的复杂度和计算时间。
AI.conclusion: 角度注意力机制有效提升了光场图像质量评估性能，为低复杂度高质量评估提供了新思路。

authors_text: Heather Doig,Oscar Pizarro,Stefan B. Williams
title: Improved Benthic Classification using Resolution Scaling and SymmNet Unsupervised Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 使用分辨率缩放和 SymmNet 无监督域适应改进底栖分类
comment: 7 pages, 6 figures. Accepted to IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2023, London UK
comments: 7 pages, 6 figures. Accepted to IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2023, London UK
abstract: Autonomous Underwater Vehicles (AUVs) conduct regular visual surveys of marine environments to characterise and monitor the composition and diversity of the benthos. The use of machine learning classifiers for this task is limited by the low numbers of annotations available and the many fine-grained classes involved. In addition to these challenges, there are domain shifts between image sets acquired during different AUV surveys due to changes in camera systems, imaging altitude, illumination and water column properties leading to a drop in classification performance for images from a different survey where some or all these elements may have changed. This paper proposes a framework to improve the performance of a benthic morphospecies classifier when used to classify images from a different survey compared to the training data. We adapt the SymmNet state-of-the-art Unsupervised Domain Adaptation method with an efficient bilinear pooling layer and image scaling to normalise spatial resolution, and show improved classification accuracy. We test our approach on two datasets with images from AUV surveys with different imaging payloads and locations. The results show that generic domain adaptation can be enhanced to produce a significant increase in accuracy for images from an AUV survey that differs from the training images.
summary: Autonomous Underwater Vehicles (AUVs) conduct regular visual surveys of marine environments to characterise and monitor the composition and diversity of the benthos. The use of machine learning classifiers for this task is limited by the low numbers of annotations available and the many fine-grained classes involved. In addition to these challenges, there are domain shifts between image sets acquired during different AUV surveys due to changes in camera systems, imaging altitude, illumination and water column properties leading to a drop in classification performance for images from a different survey where some or all these elements may have changed. This paper proposes a framework to improve the performance of a benthic morphospecies classifier when used to classify images from a different survey compared to the training data. We adapt the SymmNet state-of-the-art Unsupervised Domain Adaptation method with an efficient bilinear pooling layer and image scaling to normalise spatial resolution, and show improved classification accuracy. We test our approach on two datasets with images from AUV surveys with different imaging payloads and locations. The results show that generic domain adaptation can be enhanced to produce a significant increase in accuracy for images from an AUV survey that differs from the training images.
abstract_zh: 自主水下航行器（AUV）定期对海洋环境进行目视调查，以表征和监测底栖生物的组成和多样性。机器学习分类器在该任务中的使用受到可用注释数量较少和涉及的许多细粒度类的限制。除了这些挑战之外，由于相机系统、成像高度、照明和水柱特性的变化，在不同 AUV 调查期间获取的图像集之间还存在域变化，导致来自不同调查的图像的分类性能下降，其中部分或全部这些元素可能已经发生了变化。本文提出了一个框架，用于提高底栖形态种类分类器在对来自不同调查的图像（与训练数据相比）进行分类时的性能。我们采用 SymmNet 最先进的无监督域适应方法，采用高效的双线性池层和图像缩放来标准化空间分辨率，并显示出更高的分类精度。我们在两个数据集上测试我们的方法，这些数据集来自具有不同成像有效载荷和位置的 AUV 勘测图像。结果表明，可以增强通用域适应，从而显着提高 AUV 调查中与训练图像不同的图像的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的底栖生物分类框架，通过分辨率缩放和SymmNet无监督领域自适应方法解决AUV图像领域差异导致的分类性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 现有机器学习分类器因标注数据不足、细粒度类别多及AUV调查间存在相机系统、光照等差异导致的领域偏移，难以有效分类不同调查采集的底栖生物图像。
AI.method: 结合SymmNet无监督领域自适应方法，引入高效双线性池化层并采用图像缩放标准化空间分辨率，以增强分类器对不同领域数据的适应能力。
AI.result: 在两个包含不同成像设备和地点的AUV数据集上测试，结果显示该方法显著提升了与训练数据领域不同的测试图像分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: 通过优化领域自适应方法，可有效提升AUV跨调查底栖生物图像分类性能，为实际海洋监测提供更鲁棒的解决方案。

search_text: Improved Benthic Classification using Resolution Scaling and SymmNet Unsupervised Domain Adaptation 使用分辨率缩放和 SymmNet 无监督域适应改进底栖分类 Autonomous Underwater Vehicles (AUVs) conduct regular visual surveys of marine environments to characterise and monitor the composition and diversity of the benthos. The use of machine learning classifiers for this task is limited by the low numbers of annotations available and the many fine-grained classes involved. In addition to these challenges, there are domain shifts between image sets acquired during different AUV surveys due to changes in camera systems, imaging altitude, illumination and water column properties leading to a drop in classification performance for images from a different survey where some or all these elements may have changed. This paper proposes a framework to improve the performance of a benthic morphospecies classifier when used to classify images from a different survey compared to the training data. We adapt the SymmNet state-of-the-art Unsupervised Domain Adaptation method with an efficient bilinear pooling layer and image scaling to normalise spatial resolution, and show improved classification accuracy. We test our approach on two datasets with images from AUV surveys with different imaging payloads and locations. The results show that generic domain adaptation can be enhanced to produce a significant increase in accuracy for images from an AUV survey that differs from the training images. 自主水下航行器（AUV）定期对海洋环境进行目视调查，以表征和监测底栖生物的组成和多样性。机器学习分类器在该任务中的使用受到可用注释数量较少和涉及的许多细粒度类的限制。除了这些挑战之外，由于相机系统、成像高度、照明和水柱特性的变化，在不同 AUV 调查期间获取的图像集之间还存在域变化，导致来自不同调查的图像的分类性能下降，其中部分或全部这些元素可能已经发生了变化。本文提出了一个框架，用于提高底栖形态种类分类器在对来自不同调查的图像（与训练数据相比）进行分类时的性能。我们采用 SymmNet 最先进的无监督域适应方法，采用高效的双线性池层和图像缩放来标准化空间分辨率，并显示出更高的分类精度。我们在两个数据集上测试我们的方法，这些数据集来自具有不同成像有效载荷和位置的 AUV 勘测图像。结果表明，可以增强通用域适应，从而显着提高 AUV 调查中与训练图像不同的图像的准确性。 本文提出一种改进的底栖生物分类框架，通过分辨率缩放和SymmNet无监督领域自适应方法解决AUV图像领域差异导致的分类性能下降问题。 Heather Doig,Oscar Pizarro,Stefan B. authors_text: Nicky Zimmerman,Matteo Sodano,Elias Marks,Jens Behley,Cyrill Stachniss
title: Constructing Metric-Semantic Maps using Floor Plan Priors for Long-Term Indoor Localization
title_zh: 使用平面图先验构建度量语义地图以进行长期室内定位
abstract: Object-based maps are relevant for scene understanding since they integrate geometric and semantic information of the environment, allowing autonomous robots to robustly localize and interact with on objects. In this paper, we address the task of constructing a metric-semantic map for the purpose of long-term object-based localization. We exploit 3D object detections from monocular RGB frames for both, the object-based map construction, and for globally localizing in the constructed map. To tailor the approach to a target environment, we propose an efficient way of generating 3D annotations to finetune the 3D object detection model. We evaluate our map construction in an office building, and test our long-term localization approach on challenging sequences recorded in the same environment over nine months. The experiments suggest that our approach is suitable for constructing metric-semantic maps, and that our localization approach is robust to long-term changes. Both, the mapping algorithm and the localization pipeline can run online on an onboard computer. We release an open-source C++/ROS implementation of our approach.
summary: Object-based maps are relevant for scene understanding since they integrate geometric and semantic information of the environment, allowing autonomous robots to robustly localize and interact with on objects. In this paper, we address the task of constructing a metric-semantic map for the purpose of long-term object-based localization. We exploit 3D object detections from monocular RGB frames for both, the object-based map construction, and for globally localizing in the constructed map. To tailor the approach to a target environment, we propose an efficient way of generating 3D annotations to finetune the 3D object detection model. We evaluate our map construction in an office building, and test our long-term localization approach on challenging sequences recorded in the same environment over nine months. The experiments suggest that our approach is suitable for constructing metric-semantic maps, and that our localization approach is robust to long-term changes. Both, the mapping algorithm and the localization pipeline can run online on an onboard computer. We release an open-source C++/ROS implementation of our approach.
abstract_zh: 基于对象的地图与场景理解相关，因为它们集成了环境的几何和语义信息，使自主机器人能够稳健地定位对象并与之交互。在本文中，我们解决了构建度量语义图的任务，以实现长期基于对象的定位。我们利用单目 RGB 帧的 3D 对象检测来构建基于对象的地图，并在构建的地图中进行全局定位。为了根据目标环境定制该方法，我们提出了一种生成 3D 注释以微调 3D 对象检测模型的有效方法。我们评估了我们在办公楼中的地图构建，并在九个月的相同环境中记录的具有挑战性的序列上测试了我们的长期定位方法。实验表明，我们的方法适合构建度量语义地图，并且我们的定位方法对长期变化具有鲁棒性。映射算法和定位管道都可以在机载计算机上在线运行。我们发布了我们方法的开源 C++/ROS 实现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用平面图先验构建度量语义地图的方法，以实现长期室内定位。
AI.motivation: 基于对象的地图能够整合环境的几何和语义信息，有助于自主机器人进行鲁棒的定位和交互。然而，长期室内定位面临环境变化和地图更新的挑战。
AI.method: 本文利用单目RGB帧的3D目标检测进行基于对象的地图构建和全局定位，并提出一种高效的生成3D注释的方法来微调3D目标检测模型。
AI.result: 在办公楼环境中评估了地图构建方法，并在九个月内记录的具有挑战性的序列上测试了长期定位方法，实验表明该方法适用于构建度量语义地图，并且定位方法对长期变化具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 本文的方法能够在线运行，并且提供了开放源代码实现，适用于长期室内定位任务。

authors_text: Junjie Ye,Changhong Fu,Ziang Cao,Shan An,Guangze Zheng,Bowen Li
title: Tracker Meets Night: A Transformer Enhancer for UAV Tracking
title_zh: 跟踪器遇见夜晚：无人机跟踪的 Transformer 增强器
comment: ef:IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters, 2022, vol. 7 No. 2
comments: ef:IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters, 2022, vol. 7 No. 2
abstract: Most previous progress in object tracking is realized in daytime scenes with favorable illumination. State-of-the-arts can hardly carry on their superiority at night so far, thereby considerably blocking the broadening of visual tracking-related unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) applications. To realize reliable UAV tracking at night, a spatial-channel Transformer-based low-light enhancer (namely SCT), which is trained in a novel task-inspired manner, is proposed and plugged prior to tracking approaches. To achieve semantic-level low-light enhancement targeting the high-level task, the novel spatial-channel attention module is proposed to model global information while preserving local context. In the enhancement process, SCT denoises and illuminates nighttime images simultaneously through a robust non-linear curve projection. Moreover, to provide a comprehensive evaluation, we construct a challenging nighttime tracking benchmark, namely DarkTrack2021, which contains 110 challenging sequences with over 100 K frames in total. Evaluations on both the public UAVDark135 benchmark and the newly constructed DarkTrack2021 benchmark show that the task-inspired design enables SCT with significant performance gains for nighttime UAV tracking compared with other top-ranked low-light enhancers. Real-world tests on a typical UAV platform further verify the practicability of the proposed approach. The DarkTrack2021 benchmark and the code of the proposed approach are publicly available at https://github.com/vision4robotics/SCT.
summary: Most previous progress in object tracking is realized in daytime scenes with favorable illumination. State-of-the-arts can hardly carry on their superiority at night so far, thereby considerably blocking the broadening of visual tracking-related unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) applications. To realize reliable UAV tracking at night, a spatial-channel Transformer-based low-light enhancer (namely SCT), which is trained in a novel task-inspired manner, is proposed and plugged prior to tracking approaches. To achieve semantic-level low-light enhancement targeting the high-level task, the novel spatial-channel attention module is proposed to model global information while preserving local context. In the enhancement process, SCT denoises and illuminates nighttime images simultaneously through a robust non-linear curve projection. Moreover, to provide a comprehensive evaluation, we construct a challenging nighttime tracking benchmark, namely DarkTrack2021, which contains 110 challenging sequences with over 100 K frames in total. Evaluations on both the public UAVDark135 benchmark and the newly constructed DarkTrack2021 benchmark show that the task-inspired design enables SCT with significant performance gains for nighttime UAV tracking compared with other top-ranked low-light enhancers. Real-world tests on a typical UAV platform further verify the practicability of the proposed approach. The DarkTrack2021 benchmark and the code of the proposed approach are publicly available at https://github.com/vision4robotics/SCT.
abstract_zh: 之前物体跟踪的大部分进展都是在光照良好的白天场景中实现的。迄今为止，最先进的技术很难在夜间发挥其优势，从而极大地阻碍了与视觉跟踪相关的无人机（UAV）应用的拓宽。为了实现夜间可靠的无人机跟踪，提出了一种基于空间通道 Transformer 的低光增强器（即 SCT），该增强器以新颖的任务启发方式进行训练，并在跟踪方法之前插入。为了实现针对高级任务​​的语义级低光增强，提出了新颖的空间通道注意模块来对全局信息进行建模，同时保留局部上下文。在增强过程中，SCT 通过稳健的非线性曲线投影同时对夜间图像进行降噪和照明。此外，为了提供全面的评估，我们构建了一个具有挑战性的夜间跟踪基准，即 DarkTrack2021，其中包含 110 个具有挑战性的序列，总共超过 100 K 帧。对公共 UAVDark135 基准测试和新构建的 DarkTrack2021 基准测试的评估表明，与其他排名靠前的低光增强器相比，受任务启发的设计使 SCT 在夜间无人机跟踪方面具有显着的性能提升。在典型无人机平台上的实际测试进一步验证了所提出方法的实用性。 DarkTrack2021 基准测试和所提出方法的代码可在 https://github.com/vision4robotics/SCT 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的低光增强方法SCT，用于提升夜间无人机（UAV）跟踪性能。
AI.motivation: 现有跟踪方法在夜间低光环境下表现不佳，限制了无人机视觉跟踪应用的扩展，需针对性改进夜间图像增强技术。
AI.method: 设计空间-通道注意力模块（SCT），结合非线性曲线投影实现去噪与光照增强，并构建DarkTrack2021基准数据集进行评估。
AI.result: 在UAVDark135和DarkTrack2021基准测试中，SCT显著优于其他低光增强方法，实际无人机平台验证了其可行性。
AI.conclusion: SCT通过任务驱动的设计有效提升夜间跟踪性能，同时为夜间跟踪研究提供新基准数据集。

search_text: Tracker Meets Night: A Transformer Enhancer for UAV Tracking 跟踪器遇见夜晚：无人机跟踪的 Transformer 增强器 Most previous progress in object tracking is realized in daytime scenes with favorable illumination. State-of-the-arts can hardly carry on their superiority at night so far, thereby considerably blocking the broadening of visual tracking-related unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) applications. To realize reliable UAV tracking at night, a spatial-channel Transformer-based low-light enhancer (namely SCT), which is trained in a novel task-inspired manner, is proposed and plugged prior to tracking approaches. To achieve semantic-level low-light enhancement targeting the high-level task, the novel spatial-channel attention module is proposed to model global information while preserving local context. In the enhancement process, SCT denoises and illuminates nighttime images simultaneously through a robust non-linear curve projection. Moreover, to provide a comprehensive evaluation, we construct a challenging nighttime tracking benchmark, namely DarkTrack2021, which contains 110 challenging sequences with over 100 K frames in total. Evaluations on both the public UAVDark135 benchmark and the newly constructed DarkTrack2021 benchmark show that the task-inspired design enables SCT with significant performance gains for nighttime UAV tracking compared with other top-ranked low-light enhancers. Real-world tests on a typical UAV platform further verify the practicability of the proposed approach. The DarkTrack2021 benchmark and the code of the proposed approach are publicly available at https://github.com/vision4robotics/SCT. 之前物体跟踪的大部分进展都是在光照良好的白天场景中实现的。迄今为止，最先进的技术很难在夜间发挥其优势，从而极大地阻碍了与视觉跟踪相关的无人机（UAV）应用的拓宽。为了实现夜间可靠的无人机跟踪，提出了一种基于空间通道 Transformer 的低光增强器（即 SCT），该增强器以新颖的任务启发方式进行训练，并在跟踪方法之前插入。为了实现针对高级任务​​的语义级低光增强，提出了新颖的空间通道注意模块来对全局信息进行建模，同时保留局部上下文。在增强过程中，SCT 通过稳健的非线性曲线投影同时对夜间图像进行降噪和照明。此外，为了提供全面的评估，我们构建了一个具有挑战性的夜间跟踪基准，即 DarkTrack2021，其中包含 110 个具有挑战性的序列，总共超过 100 K 帧。对公共 UAVDark135 基准测试和新构建的 DarkTrack2021 基准测试的评估表明，与其他排名靠前的低光增强器相比，受任务启发的设计使 SCT 在夜间无人机跟踪方面具有显着的性能提升。在典型无人机平台上的实际测试进一步验证了所提出方法的实用性。 DarkTrack2021 基准测试和所提出方法的代码可在 https://github.com/vision4robotics/SCT 上公开获取。 本文提出一种基于Transformer的低光增强方法SCT，用于提升夜间无人机（UAV）跟踪性能。 Junjie Ye,Changhong Fu,Ziang Cao,Shan An,Guangze Zheng,Bowen Li cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Haibin Yu,Yuxuan Hu,Yao Qian,Ma Jin,Linquan Liu,Shujie Liu,Yu Shi,Yanmin Qian,Edward Lin,Michael Zeng
title: Code-Switching Text Generation and Injection in Mandarin-English ASR
title_zh: 普通话-英语 ASR 中的语码转换文本生成和注入
abstract: Code-switching speech refers to a means of expression by mixing two or more languages within a single utterance. Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) with End-to-End (E2E) modeling for such speech can be a challenging task due to the lack of data. In this study, we investigate text generation and injection for improving the performance of an industry commonly-used streaming model, Transformer-Transducer (T-T), in Mandarin-English code-switching speech recognition. We first propose a strategy to generate code-switching text data and then investigate injecting generated text into T-T model explicitly by Text-To-Speech (TTS) conversion or implicitly by tying speech and text latent spaces. Experimental results on the T-T model trained with a dataset containing 1,800 hours of real Mandarin-English code-switched speech show that our approaches to inject generated code-switching text significantly boost the performance of T-T models, i.e., 16% relative Token-based Error Rate (TER) reduction averaged on three evaluation sets, and the approach of tying speech and text latent spaces is superior to that of TTS conversion on the evaluation set which contains more homogeneous data with the training set.
summary: Code-switching speech refers to a means of expression by mixing two or more languages within a single utterance. Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) with End-to-End (E2E) modeling for such speech can be a challenging task due to the lack of data. In this study, we investigate text generation and injection for improving the performance of an industry commonly-used streaming model, Transformer-Transducer (T-T), in Mandarin-English code-switching speech recognition. We first propose a strategy to generate code-switching text data and then investigate injecting generated text into T-T model explicitly by Text-To-Speech (TTS) conversion or implicitly by tying speech and text latent spaces. Experimental results on the T-T model trained with a dataset containing 1,800 hours of real Mandarin-English code-switched speech show that our approaches to inject generated code-switching text significantly boost the performance of T-T models, i.e., 16% relative Token-based Error Rate (TER) reduction averaged on three evaluation sets, and the approach of tying speech and text latent spaces is superior to that of TTS conversion on the evaluation set which contains more homogeneous data with the training set.
abstract_zh: 语码转换语音是指在单个话语中混合两种或多种语言的表达方式。由于缺乏数据，对此类语音进行端到端 (E2E) 建模的自动语音识别 (ASR) 可能是一项具有挑战性的任务。在本研究中，我们研究了文本生成和注入，以提高行业常用流模型 Transformer-Transducer (T-T) 在普通话-英语代码转换语音识别中的性能。我们首先提出一种生成语码转换文本数据的策略，然后研究通过文本到语音 (TTS) 转换显式地将生成的文本注入到 T-T 模型中，或者通过绑定语音和文本潜在空间隐式地将生成的文本注入到 T-T 模型中。使用包含 1,800 小时的真实普通话-英语语码转换语音的数据集训练的 T-T 模型的实验结果表明，我们注入生成的语码转换文本的方法显着提高了 T-T 模型的性能，即在三个评估集上平均相对基于令牌的错误率 (TER) 降低了 16%，并且将语音和文本潜在空间绑定的方法优于评估集上的 TTS 转换方法，评估集包含与训练集更同质的数据。

AI.tldr: 本文研究通过生成并注入中英代码切换文本数据，提升端到端语音识别模型在混合语言场景下的性能。
AI.motivation: 代码切换语音因语言混合导致数据稀缺，现有模型在识别时面临准确率下降的挑战，需探索数据增强方法。
AI.method: 提出代码切换文本生成策略，通过TTS转换显式注入文本，或绑定语音与文本潜在空间隐式注入，优化Transformer-Transducer模型。
AI.result: 在包含1800小时真实数据的测试集上，注入方法使TER平均降低16%，其中潜在空间绑定方法在数据同质性高的测试集表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 生成代码切换文本并注入模型能显著提升识别效果，潜在空间绑定方法较TTS转换更具优势。

authors_text: Junyang Chen,Xiaoyu Xian,Zhijing Yang,Tianshui Chen,Yongyi Lu,Yukai Shi,Jinshan Pan,Liang Lin
title: Open-World Pose Transfer via Sequential Test-Time Adaption
title_zh: 通过顺序测试时间适应进行开放世界姿势转移
comment: We call for a solid pose transfer model that can handle open-world instances beyond a specific dataset
comments: We call for a solid pose transfer model that can handle open-world instances beyond a specific dataset
abstract: Pose transfer aims to transfer a given person into a specified posture, has recently attracted considerable attention. A typical pose transfer framework usually employs representative datasets to train a discriminative model, which is often violated by out-of-distribution (OOD) instances. Recently, test-time adaption (TTA) offers a feasible solution for OOD data by using a pre-trained model that learns essential features with self-supervision. However, those methods implicitly make an assumption that all test distributions have a unified signal that can be learned directly. In open-world conditions, the pose transfer task raises various independent signals: OOD appearance and skeleton, which need to be extracted and distributed in speciality. To address this point, we develop a SEquential Test-time Adaption (SETA). In the test-time phrase, SETA extracts and distributes external appearance texture by augmenting OOD data for self-supervised training. To make non-Euclidean similarity among different postures explicit, SETA uses the image representations derived from a person re-identification (Re-ID) model for similarity computation. By addressing implicit posture representation in the test-time sequentially, SETA greatly improves the generalization performance of current pose transfer models. In our experiment, we first show that pose transfer can be applied to open-world applications, including Tiktok reenactment and celebrity motion synthesis.
summary: Pose transfer aims to transfer a given person into a specified posture, has recently attracted considerable attention. A typical pose transfer framework usually employs representative datasets to train a discriminative model, which is often violated by out-of-distribution (OOD) instances. Recently, test-time adaption (TTA) offers a feasible solution for OOD data by using a pre-trained model that learns essential features with self-supervision. However, those methods implicitly make an assumption that all test distributions have a unified signal that can be learned directly. In open-world conditions, the pose transfer task raises various independent signals: OOD appearance and skeleton, which need to be extracted and distributed in speciality. To address this point, we develop a SEquential Test-time Adaption (SETA). In the test-time phrase, SETA extracts and distributes external appearance texture by augmenting OOD data for self-supervised training. To make non-Euclidean similarity among different postures explicit, SETA uses the image representations derived from a person re-identification (Re-ID) model for similarity computation. By addressing implicit posture representation in the test-time sequentially, SETA greatly improves the generalization performance of current pose transfer models. In our experiment, we first show that pose transfer can be applied to open-world applications, including Tiktok reenactment and celebrity motion synthesis.
abstract_zh: 姿势转移旨在将给定的人转移到指定的姿势，最近引起了相当大的关注。典型的姿势转移框架通常使用代表性数据集来训练判别模型，这通常会被分布外（OOD）实例所违反。最近，测试时间适应（TTA）通过使用预先训练的模型，通过自我监督学习基本特征，为 OOD 数据提供了一种可行的解决方案。然而，这些方法隐含地假设所有测试分布都有一个可以直接学习的统一信号。在开放世界条件下，姿态转移任务会产生各种独立信号：OOD 外观和骨架，需要专门提取和分发。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了顺序测试时间适应（SETA）。在测试阶段，SETA 通过增强 OOD 数据来提取和分配外观纹理以进行自监督训练。为了明确不同姿势之间的非欧几里得相似性，SETA 使用从人物重新识别 (Re-ID) 模型导出的图像表示来进行相似性计算。通过按顺序解决测试时间中的隐式姿势表示，SETA 极大地提高了当前姿势迁移模型的泛化性能。在我们的实验中，我们首先证明姿势迁移可以应用于开放世界应用，包括 Tiktok 重演和名人动作合成。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SETA的顺序测试时适应方法，用于解决开放世界姿态迁移中测试数据分布与训练数据不一致的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有测试时适应方法假设所有测试分布具有统一信号，但开放世界场景下存在独立的外观和骨骼信号，需针对性提取和分布。
AI.method: SETA通过增强不可知分布数据进行自监督训练，提取外部外观纹理，并利用行人重识别模型计算姿态相似性，顺序处理测试时隐式姿态表示。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在Tiktok重演和名人动作合成等开放世界应用中显著提升了姿态迁移模型的泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: SETA通过顺序处理开放世界中的多源信号，有效解决了姿态迁移模型在未知分布数据下的适应性问题。

search_text: Open-World Pose Transfer via Sequential Test-Time Adaption 通过顺序测试时间适应进行开放世界姿势转移 Pose transfer aims to transfer a given person into a specified posture, has recently attracted considerable attention. A typical pose transfer framework usually employs representative datasets to train a discriminative model, which is often violated by out-of-distribution (OOD) instances. Recently, test-time adaption (TTA) offers a feasible solution for OOD data by using a pre-trained model that learns essential features with self-supervision. However, those methods implicitly make an assumption that all test distributions have a unified signal that can be learned directly. In open-world conditions, the pose transfer task raises various independent signals: OOD appearance and skeleton, which need to be extracted and distributed in speciality. To address this point, we develop a SEquential Test-time Adaption (SETA). In the test-time phrase, SETA extracts and distributes external appearance texture by augmenting OOD data for self-supervised training. To make non-Euclidean similarity among different postures explicit, SETA uses the image representations derived from a person re-identification (Re-ID) model for similarity computation. By addressing implicit posture representation in the test-time sequentially, SETA greatly improves the generalization performance of current pose transfer models. In our experiment, we first show that pose transfer can be applied to open-world applications, including Tiktok reenactment and celebrity motion synthesis. 姿势转移旨在将给定的人转移到指定的姿势，最近引起了相当大的关注。典型的姿势转移框架通常使用代表性数据集来训练判别模型，这通常会被分布外（OOD）实例所违反。最近，测试时间适应（TTA）通过使用预先训练的模型，通过自我监督学习基本特征，为 OOD 数据提供了一种可行的解决方案。然而，这些方法隐含地假设所有测试分布都有一个可以直接学习的统一信号。在开放世界条件下，姿态转移任务会产生各种独立信号：OOD 外观和骨架，需要专门提取和分发。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了顺序测试时间适应（SETA）。在测试阶段，SETA 通过增强 OOD 数据来提取和分配外观纹理以进行自监督训练。为了明确不同姿势之间的非欧几里得相似性，SETA 使用从人物重新识别 (Re-ID) 模型导出的图像表示来进行相似性计算。通过按顺序解决测试时间中的隐式姿势表示，SETA 极大地提高了当前姿势迁移模型的泛化性能。在我们的实验中，我们首先证明姿势迁移可以应用于开放世界应用，包括 Tiktok 重演和名人动作合成。 本文提出了一种名为SETA的顺序测试时适应方法，用于解决开放世界姿态迁移中测试数据分布与训练数据不一致的问题。 Junyang Chen,Xiaoyu Xian,Zhijing Yang,Tianshui Chen,Yongyi Lu,Yukai Shi,Jinshan Pan,Liang Lin cs.CV

authors_text: Ege Özsoy,Felix Holm,Mahdi Saleh,Tobias Czempiel,Chantal Pellegrini,Nassir Navab,Benjamin Busam
title: Location-Free Scene Graph Generation
title_zh: 与位置无关的场景图生成
abstract: Scene Graph Generation (SGG) is a visual understanding task, aiming to describe a scene as a graph of entities and their relationships with each other. Existing works rely on location labels in form of bounding boxes or segmentation masks, increasing annotation costs and limiting dataset expansion. Recognizing that many applications do not require location data, we break this dependency and introduce location-free scene graph generation (LF-SGG). This new task aims at predicting instances of entities, as well as their relationships, without the explicit calculation of their spatial localization. To objectively evaluate the task, the predicted and ground truth scene graphs need to be compared. We solve this NP-hard problem through an efficient branching algorithm. Additionally, we design the first LF-SGG method, Pix2SG, using autoregressive sequence modeling. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on three scene graph generation datasets as well as two downstream tasks, image retrieval and visual question answering, and show that our approach is competitive to existing methods while not relying on location cues.
summary: Scene Graph Generation (SGG) is a visual understanding task, aiming to describe a scene as a graph of entities and their relationships with each other. Existing works rely on location labels in form of bounding boxes or segmentation masks, increasing annotation costs and limiting dataset expansion. Recognizing that many applications do not require location data, we break this dependency and introduce location-free scene graph generation (LF-SGG). This new task aims at predicting instances of entities, as well as their relationships, without the explicit calculation of their spatial localization. To objectively evaluate the task, the predicted and ground truth scene graphs need to be compared. We solve this NP-hard problem through an efficient branching algorithm. Additionally, we design the first LF-SGG method, Pix2SG, using autoregressive sequence modeling. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on three scene graph generation datasets as well as two downstream tasks, image retrieval and visual question answering, and show that our approach is competitive to existing methods while not relying on location cues.
abstract_zh: 场景图生成（SGG）是一项视觉理解任务，旨在将场景描述为实体及其相互关系的图。现有的工作依赖于边界框或分割掩模形式的位置标签，增加了注释成本并限制了数据集扩展。认识到许多应用程序不需要位置数据，我们打破了这种依赖性并引入了位置无关场景图生成（LF-SGG）。这项新任务旨在预测实体的实例及其关系，而无需显式计算其空间定位。为了客观地评估任务，需要比较预测场景图和地面真实场景图。我们通过有效的分支算法解决这个 NP 难题。此外，我们使用自回归序列建模设计了第一个 LF-SGG 方法 Pix2SG。我们证明了我们的方法在三个场景图生成数据集以及两个下游任务（图像检索和视觉问答）上的有效性，并表明我们的方法在不依赖位置线索的情况下比现有方法具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需依赖位置信息的场景图生成方法（LF-SGG），通过自回归序列建模预测实体及其关系。
AI.motivation: 现有场景图生成方法依赖位置标签（如边界框）导致标注成本高且限制数据集扩展，而实际应用中常无需位置信息。
AI.method: 设计首个LF-SGG方法Pix2SG，采用自回归序列建模，并利用高效分支算法解决场景图对比的NP难问题。
AI.result: 在三个场景图生成数据集及两个下游任务（图像检索、视觉问答）中验证了方法有效性，效果与现有方法相当。
AI.conclusion: 证明LF-SGG在不依赖位置信息的情况下仍能有效生成场景图，为相关应用提供新思路。

authors_text: Bolaji Yusuf,Aditya Gourav,Ankur Gandhe,Ivan Bulyko
title: On-the-fly Text Retrieval for End-to-End ASR Adaptation
title_zh: 用于端到端 ASR 适应的动态文本检索
comment: Accepted to ICASSP 2023; Appendix added to include ablations that could not fit into the conference 4-page limit
comments: Accepted to ICASSP 2023; Appendix added to include ablations that could not fit into the conference 4-page limit
abstract: End-to-end speech recognition models are improved by incorporating external text sources, typically by fusion with an external language model. Such language models have to be retrained whenever the corpus of interest changes. Furthermore, since they store the entire corpus in their parameters, rare words can be challenging to recall. In this work, we propose augmenting a transducer-based ASR model with a retrieval language model, which directly retrieves from an external text corpus plausible completions for a partial ASR hypothesis. These completions are then integrated into subsequent predictions by an adapter, which is trained once, so that the corpus of interest can be switched without incurring the computational overhead of retraining. Our experiments show that the proposed model significantly improves the performance of a transducer baseline on a pair of question-answering datasets. Further, it outperforms shallow fusion on recognition of named entities by about 7 relative; when the two are combined, the relative improvement increases to 13%.
summary: End-to-end speech recognition models are improved by incorporating external text sources, typically by fusion with an external language model. Such language models have to be retrained whenever the corpus of interest changes. Furthermore, since they store the entire corpus in their parameters, rare words can be challenging to recall. In this work, we propose augmenting a transducer-based ASR model with a retrieval language model, which directly retrieves from an external text corpus plausible completions for a partial ASR hypothesis. These completions are then integrated into subsequent predictions by an adapter, which is trained once, so that the corpus of interest can be switched without incurring the computational overhead of retraining. Our experiments show that the proposed model significantly improves the performance of a transducer baseline on a pair of question-answering datasets. Further, it outperforms shallow fusion on recognition of named entities by about 7 relative; when the two are combined, the relative improvement increases to 13%.
abstract_zh: 通过合并外部文本源（通常是与外部语言模型融合）来改进端到端语音识别模型。每当感兴趣的语料库发生变化时，就必须重新训练此类语言模型。此外，由于它们将整个语料库存储在参数中，因此罕见的单词可能很难记住。在这项工作中，我们建议使用检索语言模型来增强基于转换器的 ASR 模型，该模型直接从外部文本语料库中检索部分 ASR 假设的合理补全。然后，这些完成结果通过适配器集成到后续预测中，该适配器经过一次训练，以便可以切换感兴趣的语料库，而不会产生重新训练的计算开销。我们的实验表明，所提出的模型显着提高了传感器基线在一对问答数据集上的性能。此外，它在识别命名实体方面优于浅层融合约 7 个相关项；当两者结合起来时，相对改进增加到 13%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需重新训练即可通过实时文本检索增强端到端语音识别（ASR）模型的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统方法通过融合外部语言模型改进ASR，但需重新训练且难以处理罕见词；现有模型参数存储全部语料，灵活性差。
AI.method: 基于转录器的ASR模型引入检索语言模型，直接从外部语料库检索候选补全，并通过一次性训练的适配器整合至预测过程。
AI.result: 在问答数据集上显著优于基线模型，命名实体识别相对提升7%，结合传统方法后提升达13%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过检索机制有效利用外部文本，兼顾性能与适应性，为动态语料场景提供高效解决方案。

authors_text: Haoyu Wang,Shaoli Huang,Fang Zhao,Chun Yuan,Ying Shan
title: HMC: Hierarchical Mesh Coarsening for Skeleton-free Motion Retargeting
title_zh: HMC：用于无骨架运动重定向的分层网格粗化
abstract: We present a simple yet effective method for skeleton-free motion retargeting. Previous methods transfer motion between high-resolution meshes, failing to preserve the inherent local-part motions in the mesh. Addressing this issue, our proposed method learns the correspondence in a coarse-to-fine fashion by integrating the retargeting process with a mesh-coarsening pipeline. First, we propose a mesh-coarsening module that coarsens the mesh representations for better motion transfer. This module improves the ability to handle small-part motion and preserves the local motion interdependence between neighboring mesh vertices. Furthermore, we leverage a hierarchical refinement procedure to complement missing mesh details by gradually improving the low-resolution mesh output with a higher-resolution one. We evaluate our method on several well-known 3D character datasets, and it yields an average improvement of 25% on point-wise mesh euclidean distance (PMD) against the start-of-art method. Moreover, our qualitative results show that our method is significantly helpful in preserving the moving consistency of different body parts on the target character due to disentangling body-part structures and mesh details in a hierarchical way.
summary: We present a simple yet effective method for skeleton-free motion retargeting. Previous methods transfer motion between high-resolution meshes, failing to preserve the inherent local-part motions in the mesh. Addressing this issue, our proposed method learns the correspondence in a coarse-to-fine fashion by integrating the retargeting process with a mesh-coarsening pipeline. First, we propose a mesh-coarsening module that coarsens the mesh representations for better motion transfer. This module improves the ability to handle small-part motion and preserves the local motion interdependence between neighboring mesh vertices. Furthermore, we leverage a hierarchical refinement procedure to complement missing mesh details by gradually improving the low-resolution mesh output with a higher-resolution one. We evaluate our method on several well-known 3D character datasets, and it yields an average improvement of 25% on point-wise mesh euclidean distance (PMD) against the start-of-art method. Moreover, our qualitative results show that our method is significantly helpful in preserving the moving consistency of different body parts on the target character due to disentangling body-part structures and mesh details in a hierarchical way.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种简单而有效的无骨架运动重定向方法。以前的方法在高分辨率网格之间传递运动，无法保留网格中固有的局部运动。为了解决这个问题，我们提出的方法通过将重定向过程与网格粗化管道集成，以从粗到细的方式学习对应关系。首先，我们提出了一个网格粗化模块，可以粗化网格表示以实现更好的运动传递。该模块提高了处理小部分运动的能力，并保留了相邻网格顶点之间的局部运动相互依赖性。此外，我们利用分层细化程序通过使用更高分辨率的网格输出逐步改进低分辨率网格输出来补充缺失的网格细节。我们在几个著名的 3D 角色数据集上评估我们的方法，与最先进的方法相比，它在逐点网格欧氏距离 (PMD) 上平均提高了 25%。此外，我们的定性结果表明，由于以分层方式解开身体部位结构和网格细节，我们的方法对于保持目标角色上不同身体部位的移动一致性非常有帮助。

AI.motivation: 现有方法在高分辨率网格间转移运动时无法保留局部部件的运动特性，导致运动失真。
AI.method: 设计网格粗化模块与层次化细化流程，通过自上而下方式学习网格对应关系，解耦身体结构与细节信息。
AI.result: 在多个3D角色数据集上实现点-wise网格欧氏距离指标平均提升25%，显著改善身体部位运动一致性。
AI.conclusion: 层次化网格粗化方法有效解决了无骨骼运动重定向中的局部运动保持问题，优于现有技术。

search_text: HMC: Hierarchical Mesh Coarsening for Skeleton-free Motion Retargeting HMC：用于无骨架运动重定向的分层网格粗化 We present a simple yet effective method for skeleton-free motion retargeting. Previous methods transfer motion between high-resolution meshes, failing to preserve the inherent local-part motions in the mesh. Addressing this issue, our proposed method learns the correspondence in a coarse-to-fine fashion by integrating the retargeting process with a mesh-coarsening pipeline. First, we propose a mesh-coarsening module that coarsens the mesh representations for better motion transfer. This module improves the ability to handle small-part motion and preserves the local motion interdependence between neighboring mesh vertices. Furthermore, we leverage a hierarchical refinement procedure to complement missing mesh details by gradually improving the low-resolution mesh output with a higher-resolution one. We evaluate our method on several well-known 3D character datasets, and it yields an average improvement of 25% on point-wise mesh euclidean distance (PMD) against the start-of-art method. Moreover, our qualitative results show that our method is significantly helpful in preserving the moving consistency of different body parts on the target character due to disentangling body-part structures and mesh details in a hierarchical way. 我们提出了一种简单而有效的无骨架运动重定向方法。以前的方法在高分辨率网格之间传递运动，无法保留网格中固有的局部运动。为了解决这个问题，我们提出的方法通过将重定向过程与网格粗化管道集成，以从粗到细的方式学习对应关系。首先，我们提出了一个网格粗化模块，可以粗化网格表示以实现更好的运动传递。该模块提高了处理小部分运动的能力，并保留了相邻网格顶点之间的局部运动相互依赖性。此外，我们利用分层细化程序通过使用更高分辨率的网格输出逐步改进低分辨率网格输出来补充缺失的网格细节。我们在几个著名的 3D 角色数据集上评估我们的方法，与最先进的方法相比，它在逐点网格欧氏距离 (PMD) 上平均提高了 25%。此外，我们的定性结果表明，由于以分层方式解开身体部位结构和网格细节，我们的方法对于保持目标角色上不同身体部位的移动一致性非常有帮助。 本文提出一种无骨骼运动重定向方法HMC，通过层次化网格粗化技术提升运动迁移效果。 Haoyu Wang,Shaoli Huang,Fang Zhao,Chun Yuan,Ying Shan cs.CV,cs.GR

authors_text: Cagri Gungor,Adriana Kovashka
title: Boosting Weakly Supervised Object Detection using Fusion and Priors from Hallucinated Depth
title_zh: 使用融合和来自幻觉深度的先验来增强弱监督目标检测
abstract: Despite recent attention and exploration of depth for various tasks, it is still an unexplored modality for weakly-supervised object detection (WSOD). We propose an amplifier method for enhancing the performance of WSOD by integrating depth information. Our approach can be applied to any WSOD method based on multiple-instance learning, without necessitating additional annotations or inducing large computational expenses. Our proposed method employs a monocular depth estimation technique to obtain hallucinated depth information, which is then incorporated into a Siamese WSOD network using contrastive loss and fusion. By analyzing the relationship between language context and depth, we calculate depth priors to identify the bounding box proposals that may contain an object of interest. These depth priors are then utilized to update the list of pseudo ground-truth boxes, or adjust the confidence of per-box predictions. Our proposed method is evaluated on six datasets (COCO, PASCAL VOC, Conceptual Captions, Clipart1k, Watercolor2k, and Comic2k) by implementing it on top of two state-of-the-art WSOD methods, and we demonstrate a substantial enhancement in performance.
summary: Despite recent attention and exploration of depth for various tasks, it is still an unexplored modality for weakly-supervised object detection (WSOD). We propose an amplifier method for enhancing the performance of WSOD by integrating depth information. Our approach can be applied to any WSOD method based on multiple-instance learning, without necessitating additional annotations or inducing large computational expenses. Our proposed method employs a monocular depth estimation technique to obtain hallucinated depth information, which is then incorporated into a Siamese WSOD network using contrastive loss and fusion. By analyzing the relationship between language context and depth, we calculate depth priors to identify the bounding box proposals that may contain an object of interest. These depth priors are then utilized to update the list of pseudo ground-truth boxes, or adjust the confidence of per-box predictions. Our proposed method is evaluated on six datasets (COCO, PASCAL VOC, Conceptual Captions, Clipart1k, Watercolor2k, and Comic2k) by implementing it on top of two state-of-the-art WSOD methods, and we demonstrate a substantial enhancement in performance.
abstract_zh: 尽管最近对各种任务的深度进行了关注和探索，但它仍然是弱监督目标检测（WSOD）的一种未经探索的模式。我们提出了一种通过集成深度信息来增强 WSOD 性能的放大器方法。我们的方法可以应用于任何基于多实例学习的 WSOD 方法，不需要额外的注释或引起大量的计算开销。我们提出的方法采用单目深度估计技术来获取幻觉深度信息，然后使用对比损失和融合将其合并到 Siamese WSOD 网络中。通过分析语言上下文和深度之间的关系，我们计算深度先验来识别可能包含感兴趣对象的边界框建议。然后利用这些深度先验来更新伪真实框列表，或调整每个框预测的置信度。我们提出的方法通过在两种最先进的 WSOD 方法之上实施，在六个数据集（COCO、PASCAL VOC、Conceptual Captions、Clipart1k、Watercolor2k 和 Comic2k）上进行了评估，并且我们证明了性能的显着增强。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用幻觉深度信息融合与先验知识增强弱监督目标检测性能的方法。
AI.motivation: 深度信息在弱监督目标检测中尚未被有效利用，现有方法难以充分整合多模态信息以提升检测精度。
AI.method: 采用单目深度估计生成幻觉深度，结合Siamese网络与对比损失进行特征融合，并通过语言-深度关联分析计算深度先验以优化伪标签与预测置信度。
AI.result: 在COCO、PASCAL VOC等六个数据集上，基于两种先进WSOD方法的实验均取得显著性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过有效融合深度信息与语言先验，在无需额外标注或计算开销的前提下，为弱监督目标检测提供了通用性增强方案。

authors_text: Ya Jing,Tao Kong
title: Learning to Explore Informative Trajectories and Samples for Embodied Perception
title_zh: 学习探索具身感知的信息轨迹和样本
comment: To be published in IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), 2023
comments: To be published in IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), 2023
abstract: We are witnessing significant progress on perception models, specifically those trained on large-scale internet images. However, efficiently generalizing these perception models to unseen embodied tasks is insufficiently studied, which will help various relevant applications (e.g., home robots). Unlike static perception methods trained on pre-collected images, the embodied agent can move around in the environment and obtain images of objects from any viewpoints. Therefore, efficiently learning the exploration policy and collection method to gather informative training samples is the key to this task. To do this, we first build a 3D semantic distribution map to train the exploration policy self-supervised by introducing the semantic distribution disagreement and the semantic distribution uncertainty rewards. Note that the map is generated from multi-view observations and can weaken the impact of misidentification from an unfamiliar viewpoint. Our agent is then encouraged to explore the objects with different semantic distributions across viewpoints, or uncertain semantic distributions. With the explored informative trajectories, we propose to select hard samples on trajectories based on the semantic distribution uncertainty to reduce unnecessary observations that can be correctly identified. Experiments show that the perception model fine-tuned with our method outperforms the baselines trained with other exploration policies. Further, we demonstrate the robustness of our method in real-robot experiments.
summary: We are witnessing significant progress on perception models, specifically those trained on large-scale internet images. However, efficiently generalizing these perception models to unseen embodied tasks is insufficiently studied, which will help various relevant applications (e.g., home robots). Unlike static perception methods trained on pre-collected images, the embodied agent can move around in the environment and obtain images of objects from any viewpoints. Therefore, efficiently learning the exploration policy and collection method to gather informative training samples is the key to this task. To do this, we first build a 3D semantic distribution map to train the exploration policy self-supervised by introducing the semantic distribution disagreement and the semantic distribution uncertainty rewards. Note that the map is generated from multi-view observations and can weaken the impact of misidentification from an unfamiliar viewpoint. Our agent is then encouraged to explore the objects with different semantic distributions across viewpoints, or uncertain semantic distributions. With the explored informative trajectories, we propose to select hard samples on trajectories based on the semantic distribution uncertainty to reduce unnecessary observations that can be correctly identified. Experiments show that the perception model fine-tuned with our method outperforms the baselines trained with other exploration policies. Further, we demonstrate the robustness of our method in real-robot experiments.
abstract_zh: 我们正在见证感知模型的重大进展，特别是那些接受大规模互联网图像训练的模型。然而，将这些感知模型有效地推广到看不见的具体任务的研究还不够充分，这将有助于各种相关应用（例如家庭机器人）。与在预先收集的图像上训练的静态感知方法不同，具体代理可以在环境中移动并从任何角度获取物体的图像。因此，有效地学习探索策略和收集方法来收集信息丰富的训练样本是这项任务的关键。为此，我们首先构建一个 3D 语义分布图，通过引入语义分布不一致和语义分布不确定性奖励来训练自监督的探索策略。 Note that the map is generated from multi-view observations and can weaken the impact of misidentification from an unfamiliar viewpoint.然后鼓励我们的代理探索跨视点具有不同语义分布或不确定语义分布的对象。通过探索信息丰富的轨迹，我们建议根据语义分布的不确定性来选择轨迹上的硬样本，以减少可以正确识别的不必要的观察。实验表明，用我们的方法微调的感知模型优于用其他探索策略训练的基线。此外，我们在真实机器人实验中证明了我们的方法的稳健性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种学习探索信息轨迹和样本的方法，以提升具身感知模型在未见过任务中的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管基于大规模互联网图像的感知模型取得进展，但将其高效泛化到未见过的具身任务（如家庭机器人）仍缺乏研究，而具身代理需要通过移动获取多视角信息以提升感知效果。
AI.method: 构建3D语义分布图，通过语义分布分歧和不确定性奖励自监督训练探索策略；基于轨迹语义不确定性筛选困难样本，减少冗余观测。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用该方法微调的感知模型优于其他探索策略的基线方法，并在真实机器人实验中验证了鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过有效探索策略和样本选择机制，显著提升了具身感知模型在新任务中的性能和适应性。

search_text: Learning to Explore Informative Trajectories and Samples for Embodied Perception 学习探索具身感知的信息轨迹和样本 We are witnessing significant progress on perception models, specifically those trained on large-scale internet images. However, efficiently generalizing these perception models to unseen embodied tasks is insufficiently studied, which will help various relevant applications (e.g., home robots). Unlike static perception methods trained on pre-collected images, the embodied agent can move around in the environment and obtain images of objects from any viewpoints. Therefore, efficiently learning the exploration policy and collection method to gather informative training samples is the key to this task. To do this, we first build a 3D semantic distribution map to train the exploration policy self-supervised by introducing the semantic distribution disagreement and the semantic distribution uncertainty rewards. Note that the map is generated from multi-view observations and can weaken the impact of misidentification from an unfamiliar viewpoint. Our agent is then encouraged to explore the objects with different semantic distributions across viewpoints, or uncertain semantic distributions. With the explored informative trajectories, we propose to select hard samples on trajectories based on the semantic distribution uncertainty to reduce unnecessary observations that can be correctly identified. Experiments show that the perception model fine-tuned with our method outperforms the baselines trained with other exploration policies. Further, we demonstrate the robustness of our method in real-robot experiments. 我们正在见证感知模型的重大进展，特别是那些接受大规模互联网图像训练的模型。然而，将这些感知模型有效地推广到看不见的具体任务的研究还不够充分，这将有助于各种相关应用（例如家庭机器人）。与在预先收集的图像上训练的静态感知方法不同，具体代理可以在环境中移动并从任何角度获取物体的图像。因此，有效地学习探索策略和收集方法来收集信息丰富的训练样本是这项任务的关键。为此，我们首先构建一个 3D 语义分布图，通过引入语义分布不一致和语义分布不确定性奖励来训练自监督的探索策略。 Note that the map is generated from multi-view observations and can weaken the impact of misidentification from an unfamiliar viewpoint.然后鼓励我们的代理探索跨视点具有不同语义分布或不确定语义分布的对象。通过探索信息丰富的轨迹，我们建议根据语义分布的不确定性来选择轨迹上的硬样本，以减少可以正确识别的不必要的观察。实验表明，用我们的方法微调的感知模型优于用其他探索策略训练的基线。此外，我们在真实机器人实验中证明了我们的方法的稳健性。 本文提出一种学习探索信息轨迹和样本的方法，以提升具身感知模型在未见过任务中的泛化能力。 Ya Jing,Tao Kong cs.RO,cs.CV

authors_text: Gašper Beguš,Andrej Leban,Shane Gero
title: Approaching an unknown communication system by latent space exploration and causal inference
title_zh: 通过潜在空间探索和因果推理来接近未知的通信系统
comment: 25 pages, 23 figures; new format and section layout (moved some sections to the appendix), added replication experiments, updated references: to a subsequent experimental validation of the work, as well as to related methodological work
comments: 25 pages, 23 figures; new format and section layout (moved some sections to the appendix), added replication experiments, updated references: to a subsequent experimental validation of the work, as well as to related methodological work
abstract: This paper proposes a methodology for discovering meaningful properties in data by exploring the latent space of unsupervised deep generative models. We combine manipulation of individual latent variables to extreme values with methods inspired by causal inference into an approach we call causal disentanglement with extreme values (CDEV) and show that this method yields insights for model interpretability. With this, we can test for what properties of unknown data the model encodes as meaningful, using it to glean insight into the communication system of sperm whales (Physeter macrocephalus), one of the most intriguing and understudied animal communication systems. The network architecture used has been shown to learn meaningful representations of speech; here, it is used as a learning mechanism to decipher the properties of another vocal communication system in which case we have no ground truth. The proposed methodology suggests that sperm whales encode information using the number of clicks in a sequence, the regularity of their timing, and audio properties such as the spectral mean and the acoustic regularity of the sequences. Some of these findings are consistent with existing hypotheses, while others are proposed for the first time. We also argue that our models uncover rules that govern the structure of units in the communication system and apply them while generating innovative data not shown during training. This paper suggests that an interpretation of the outputs of deep neural networks with causal inference methodology can be a viable strategy for approaching data about which little is known and presents another case of how deep learning can limit the hypothesis space. Finally, the proposed approach can be extended to other architectures and datasets.
summary: This paper proposes a methodology for discovering meaningful properties in data by exploring the latent space of unsupervised deep generative models. We combine manipulation of individual latent variables to extreme values with methods inspired by causal inference into an approach we call causal disentanglement with extreme values (CDEV) and show that this method yields insights for model interpretability. With this, we can test for what properties of unknown data the model encodes as meaningful, using it to glean insight into the communication system of sperm whales (Physeter macrocephalus), one of the most intriguing and understudied animal communication systems. The network architecture used has been shown to learn meaningful representations of speech; here, it is used as a learning mechanism to decipher the properties of another vocal communication system in which case we have no ground truth. The proposed methodology suggests that sperm whales encode information using the number of clicks in a sequence, the regularity of their timing, and audio properties such as the spectral mean and the acoustic regularity of the sequences. Some of these findings are consistent with existing hypotheses, while others are proposed for the first time. We also argue that our models uncover rules that govern the structure of units in the communication system and apply them while generating innovative data not shown during training. This paper suggests that an interpretation of the outputs of deep neural networks with causal inference methodology can be a viable strategy for approaching data about which little is known and presents another case of how deep learning can limit the hypothesis space. Finally, the proposed approach can be extended to other architectures and datasets.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种通过探索无监督深度生成模型的潜在空间来发现数据中有意义的属性的方法。我们将个体潜在变量对极值的操纵与受因果推理启发的方法结合起来，形成一种我们称之为极值因果解缠（CDEV）的方法，并表明该方法为模型可解释性提供了见解。有了这个，我们可以测试模型编码的未知数据的哪些属性是有意义的，用它来深入了解抹香鲸（Physeter macrocephalus）的通信系统，这是最有趣和研究不足的动物通信系统之一。所使用的网络架构已被证明可以学习有意义的语音表示；在这里，它被用作一种学习机制来破译另一个声音通信系统的属性，在这种情况下我们没有基本事实。所提出的方法表明，抹香鲸使用序列中的点击次数、时间规律性以及音频属性（例如序列的频谱平均值和声学规律性）来编码信息。其中一些发现与现有假设一致，而另一些则是首次提出。我们还认为，我们的模型揭示了控制通信系统中单元结构的规则，并在生成训练期间未显示的创新数据时应用它们。本文提出，用因果推理方法解释深度神经网络的输出可能是处理鲜为人知的数据的可行策略，并提出了深度学习如何限制假设空间的另一个案例。最后，所提出的方法可以扩展到其他架构和数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合潜在空间探索与因果推理的方法，用于解析未知通信系统（如抹香鲸叫声）的潜在特征。
AI.motivation: 针对缺乏标注数据的未知通信系统（如动物声学），传统方法难以提取有效特征，需通过无监督模型挖掘潜在规律。
AI.method: 设计因果分离与极端值分析（CDEV）方法，通过操控生成模型潜在变量的极端值并结合因果推理，推断通信系统的潜在编码规则。
AI.result: 发现抹香鲸通信中信息编码依赖点击序列数量、时间规律性及频谱特征，部分结果验证现有假说，部分提出新观点。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为解读未知数据提供了可扩展框架，展示了深度学习结合因果推理在限制假设空间中的潜力，适用于其他复杂系统分析。

authors_text: Andreas Wiedholz,Stefanie Wucherer,Simon Dietrich
title: Semantic 3D scene segmentation for robotic assembly process execution
title_zh: 用于机器人装配流程执行的语义 3D 场景分割
abstract: Adapting robot programmes to changes in the environment is a well-known industry problem, and it is the reason why many tedious tasks are not automated in small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs). A semantic world model of a robot's previously unknown environment created from point clouds is one way for these companies to automate assembly tasks that are typically performed by humans. The semantic segmentation of point clouds for robot manipulators or cobots in industrial environments has received little attention due to a lack of suitable datasets. This paper describes a pipeline for creating synthetic point clouds for specific use cases in order to train a model for point cloud semantic segmentation. We show that models trained with our data achieve high per-class accuracy (> 90%) for semantic point cloud segmentation on unseen real-world data. Our approach is applicable not only to the 3D camera used in training data generation but also to other depth cameras based on different technologies. The application tested in this work is a industry-related peg-in-the-hole process. With our approach the necessity of user assistance during a robot's commissioning can be reduced to a minimum.
summary: Adapting robot programmes to changes in the environment is a well-known industry problem, and it is the reason why many tedious tasks are not automated in small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs). A semantic world model of a robot's previously unknown environment created from point clouds is one way for these companies to automate assembly tasks that are typically performed by humans. The semantic segmentation of point clouds for robot manipulators or cobots in industrial environments has received little attention due to a lack of suitable datasets. This paper describes a pipeline for creating synthetic point clouds for specific use cases in order to train a model for point cloud semantic segmentation. We show that models trained with our data achieve high per-class accuracy (> 90%) for semantic point cloud segmentation on unseen real-world data. Our approach is applicable not only to the 3D camera used in training data generation but also to other depth cameras based on different technologies. The application tested in this work is a industry-related peg-in-the-hole process. With our approach the necessity of user assistance during a robot's commissioning can be reduced to a minimum.
abstract_zh: 让机器人程序适应环境的变化是一个众所周知的行业问题，这也是中小企业（SME）中许多繁琐的任务没有实现自动化的原因。从点云创建机器人以前未知的环境的语义世界模型是这些公司自动化通常由人类执行的装配任务的一种方法。由于缺乏合适的数据集，工业环境中机器人操纵器或协作机器人的点云语义分割很少受到关注。本文描述了一种为特定用例创建合成点云的管道，以便训练点云语义分割模型。我们表明，使用我们的数据训练的模型在未见过的真实数据上实现了语义点云分割的高每类精度（> 90％）。我们的方法不仅适用于训练数据生成中使用的 3D 相机，还适用于基于不同技术的其他深度相机。这项工作中测试的应用程序是与行业相关的固定过程。通过我们的方法，可以将机器人调试期间用户协助的必要性降至最低。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于语义的3D场景分割方法，用于机器人装配过程的执行，通过生成合成点云数据训练模型以实现对未知环境的自动分割。
AI.motivation: 中小企业因环境适应性问题难以自动化装配任务，而现有方法缺乏适用于工业场景的点云语义分割数据集，需开发新方法降低人工干预需求。
AI.method: 构建合成点云数据集训练语义分割模型，并验证其在不同深度相机技术及工业装配场景（如插孔工艺）中的泛化能力。
AI.result: 模型在未见的真实世界数据上达到每类超过90%的分割准确率，且适用于多种深度相机技术。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效减少机器人调试阶段的人工干预，为中小企业自动化装配提供可行的语义3D建模解决方案。

conclusion: 该方法有效减少机器人调试阶段的人工干预，为中小企业自动化装配提供可行的语义3D建模解决方案。
search_text: Semantic 3D scene segmentation for robotic assembly process execution 用于机器人装配流程执行的语义 3D 场景分割 Adapting robot programmes to changes in the environment is a well-known industry problem, and it is the reason why many tedious tasks are not automated in small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs). A semantic world model of a robot's previously unknown environment created from point clouds is one way for these companies to automate assembly tasks that are typically performed by humans. The semantic segmentation of point clouds for robot manipulators or cobots in industrial environments has received little attention due to a lack of suitable datasets. This paper describes a pipeline for creating synthetic point clouds for specific use cases in order to train a model for point cloud semantic segmentation. We show that models trained with our data achieve high per-class accuracy (> 90%) for semantic point cloud segmentation on unseen real-world data. Our approach is applicable not only to the 3D camera used in training data generation but also to other depth cameras based on different technologies. The application tested in this work is a industry-related peg-in-the-hole process. With our approach the necessity of user assistance during a robot's commissioning can be reduced to a minimum. 让机器人程序适应环境的变化是一个众所周知的行业问题，这也是中小企业（SME）中许多繁琐的任务没有实现自动化的原因。从点云创建机器人以前未知的环境的语义世界模型是这些公司自动化通常由人类执行的装配任务的一种方法。由于缺乏合适的数据集，工业环境中机器人操纵器或协作机器人的点云语义分割很少受到关注。本文描述了一种为特定用例创建合成点云的管道，以便训练点云语义分割模型。我们表明，使用我们的数据训练的模型在未见过的真实数据上实现了语义点云分割的高每类精度（> 90％）。我们的方法不仅适用于训练数据生成中使用的 3D 相机，还适用于基于不同技术的其他深度相机。这项工作中测试的应用程序是与行业相关的固定过程。通过我们的方法，可以将机器人调试期间用户协助的必要性降至最低。 本文提出一种基于语义的3D场景分割方法，用于机器人装配过程的执行，通过生成合成点云数据训练模型以实现对未知环境的自动分割。 Andreas Wiedholz,Stefanie Wucherer,Simon Dietrich cs.RO

authors_text: Leran Ma,Ke Chen,Mingfu Shao
title: On the Maximal Independent Sets of $k$-mers with the Edit Distance
title_zh: 关于具有编辑距离的$k$聚体的最大独立集
abstract: In computational biology, $k$-mers and edit distance are fundamental concepts. However, little is known about the metric space of all $k$-mers equipped with the edit distance. In this work, we explore the structure of the $k$-mer space by studying its maximal independent sets (MISs). An MIS is a sparse sketch of all $k$-mers with nice theoretical properties, and therefore admits critical applications in clustering, indexing, hashing, and sketching large-scale sequencing data, particularly those with high error-rates. Finding an MIS is a challenging problem, as the size of a $k$-mer space grows geometrically with respect to $k$. We propose three algorithms for this problem. The first and the most intuitive one uses a greedy strategy. The second method implements two techniques to avoid redundant comparisons by taking advantage of the locality-property of the $k$-mer space and the estimated bounds on the edit distance. The last algorithm avoids expensive calculations of the edit distance by translating the edit distance into the shortest path in a specifically designed graph. These algorithms are implemented and the calculated MISs of $k$-mer spaces and their statistical properties are reported and analyzed for $k$ up to 15. Source code is freely available at https://github.com/Shao-Group/kmerspace .
summary: In computational biology, $k$-mers and edit distance are fundamental concepts. However, little is known about the metric space of all $k$-mers equipped with the edit distance. In this work, we explore the structure of the $k$-mer space by studying its maximal independent sets (MISs). An MIS is a sparse sketch of all $k$-mers with nice theoretical properties, and therefore admits critical applications in clustering, indexing, hashing, and sketching large-scale sequencing data, particularly those with high error-rates. Finding an MIS is a challenging problem, as the size of a $k$-mer space grows geometrically with respect to $k$. We propose three algorithms for this problem. The first and the most intuitive one uses a greedy strategy. The second method implements two techniques to avoid redundant comparisons by taking advantage of the locality-property of the $k$-mer space and the estimated bounds on the edit distance. The last algorithm avoids expensive calculations of the edit distance by translating the edit distance into the shortest path in a specifically designed graph. These algorithms are implemented and the calculated MISs of $k$-mer spaces and their statistical properties are reported and analyzed for $k$ up to 15. Source code is freely available at https://github.com/Shao-Group/kmerspace .
abstract_zh: 在计算生物学中，$k$-mers 和编辑距离是基本概念。然而，我们对所有配备编辑距离的 $k$-mers 的度量空间知之甚少。在这项工作中，我们通过研究 $k$-mer 空间的最大独立集 (MIS) 来探索其结构。 MIS 是所有 $k$-mers 的稀疏草图，具有良好的理论特性，因此允许在聚类、索引、散列和草图大规模测序数据（尤其是那些具有高错误率的数据）方面进行关键应用。寻找 MIS 是一个具有挑战性的问题，因为 $k$ 聚体空间的大小相对于 $k$ 呈几何级数增长。我们针对这个问题提出了三种算法。第一个也是最直观的一个使用贪婪策略。第二种方法通过利用 $k$-mer 空间的局部性属性和编辑距离的估计边界来实现两种技术来避免冗余比较。最后一种算法通过将编辑距离转换为专门设计的图中的最短路径，避免了昂贵的编辑距离计算。这些算法已实现，并且报告并分析了 $k$-mer 空间的计算 MIS 及其统计属性，并分析了 $k$ 最多 15 个。源代码可在 https://github.com/Shao-Group/kmerspace 上免费获取。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在编辑距离下k-mer空间的最大独立集（MIS）的结构及其计算方法。
AI.motivation: k-mer空间的结构对计算生物学中的数据处理至关重要，而MIS作为稀疏表示具有理论优势，但其计算面临高复杂度挑战。
AI.method: 提出三种算法：基于贪心策略的直观方法、利用局部性与编辑距离界限减少冗余比较的优化方法、将编辑距离转化为图最短路径的高效计算方法。
AI.result: 实现了算法并分析了k≤15时的MIS统计特性，源代码开源。
AI.conclusion: 所提算法有效生成MIS，为高错误率测序数据的处理提供了理论支持与实用工具。

authors_text: Phani Krishna Uppala,Abhishek Bamotra,Raj Kolamuri
title: Dynamic Object Removal for Effective Slam
title_zh: 动态物体移除以实现有效的猛击
abstract: This research paper focuses on the problem of dynamic objects and their impact on effective motion planning and localization. The paper proposes a two-step process to address this challenge, which involves finding the dynamic objects in the scene using a Flow-based method and then using a deep Video inpainting algorithm to remove them. The study aims to test the validity of this approach by comparing it with baseline results using two state-of-the-art SLAM algorithms, ORB-SLAM2 and LSD, and understanding the impact of dynamic objects and the corresponding trade-offs. The proposed approach does not require any significant modifications to the baseline SLAM algorithms, and therefore, the computational effort required remains unchanged. The paper presents a detailed analysis of the results obtained and concludes that the proposed method is effective in removing dynamic objects from the scene, leading to improved SLAM performance.
summary: This research paper focuses on the problem of dynamic objects and their impact on effective motion planning and localization. The paper proposes a two-step process to address this challenge, which involves finding the dynamic objects in the scene using a Flow-based method and then using a deep Video inpainting algorithm to remove them. The study aims to test the validity of this approach by comparing it with baseline results using two state-of-the-art SLAM algorithms, ORB-SLAM2 and LSD, and understanding the impact of dynamic objects and the corresponding trade-offs. The proposed approach does not require any significant modifications to the baseline SLAM algorithms, and therefore, the computational effort required remains unchanged. The paper presents a detailed analysis of the results obtained and concludes that the proposed method is effective in removing dynamic objects from the scene, leading to improved SLAM performance.
abstract_zh: 本研究论文重点关注动态对象问题及其对有效运动规划和定位的影响。该论文提出了一个两步过程来解决这一挑战，其中包括使用基于流的方法查找场景中的动态对象，然后使用深度视频修复算法将其删除。该研究旨在通过将其与使用两种最先进的 SLAM 算法 ORB-SLAM2 和 LSD 的基线结果进行比较来测试该方法的有效性，并了解动态物体的影响和相应的权衡。所提出的方法不需要对基线 SLAM 算法进行任何重大修改，因此所需的计算工作量保持不变。本文对所获得的结果进行了详细分析，并得出结论：所提出的方法可以有效地从场景中去除动态对象，从而提高 SLAM 性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种动态对象移除方法，以提高SLAM（同步定位与地图构建）的有效性。
AI.motivation: 动态对象会影响SLAM的运动规划和定位效果，因此需要一种有效的方法来移除这些对象以提升SLAM性能。
AI.method: 本文采用两步方法：首先使用基于流的方法检测动态对象，然后使用深度视频修复算法移除这些对象。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在不显著修改现有SLAM算法的情况下，能够有效移除动态对象并提高SLAM性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在移除动态对象和提升SLAM性能方面是有效的，且对现有算法的计算负担没有显著增加。

authors_text: Xiaoyu Yang,Qiujia Li,Chao Zhang,Philip C. Woodland
title: Knowledge Distillation from Multiple Foundation Models for End-to-End Speech Recognition
title_zh: 从端到端语音识别的多个基础模型中提取知识
abstract: Although large foundation models pre-trained by self-supervised learning have achieved state-of-the-art performance in many tasks including automatic speech recognition (ASR), knowledge distillation (KD) is often required in practice to transfer the knowledge learned by large teacher models into much smaller student models with affordable computation and memory costs. This paper proposes a novel two-stage KD framework to distil the knowledge from multiple speech foundation models as teachers into a single student neural transducer model for ASR. In the first stage, the student model encoder is pre-trained using the embeddings extracted from multiple teacher models. In the second stage, the student encoder is fine-tuned with the audio-text pairs based on the ASR task. Experiments on the LibriSpeech 100-hour subset show that the proposed KD framework improves the performance of both streaming and non-streaming student models when using only one teacher. The performance of the student model can be further enhanced when multiple teachers are used jointly, achieving word error rate reductions (WERRs) of 17.5% and 10.6%. Our proposed framework can be combined with other existing KD methods to achieve further improvements. Further WERRs were obtained by incorporating extra unlabelled data during encoder pre-training, leading to a total relative WERR of 55.0% on the non-streaming student model.
summary: Although large foundation models pre-trained by self-supervised learning have achieved state-of-the-art performance in many tasks including automatic speech recognition (ASR), knowledge distillation (KD) is often required in practice to transfer the knowledge learned by large teacher models into much smaller student models with affordable computation and memory costs. This paper proposes a novel two-stage KD framework to distil the knowledge from multiple speech foundation models as teachers into a single student neural transducer model for ASR. In the first stage, the student model encoder is pre-trained using the embeddings extracted from multiple teacher models. In the second stage, the student encoder is fine-tuned with the audio-text pairs based on the ASR task. Experiments on the LibriSpeech 100-hour subset show that the proposed KD framework improves the performance of both streaming and non-streaming student models when using only one teacher. The performance of the student model can be further enhanced when multiple teachers are used jointly, achieving word error rate reductions (WERRs) of 17.5% and 10.6%. Our proposed framework can be combined with other existing KD methods to achieve further improvements. Further WERRs were obtained by incorporating extra unlabelled data during encoder pre-training, leading to a total relative WERR of 55.0% on the non-streaming student model.
abstract_zh: 尽管通过自监督学习预训练的大型基础模型已经在包括自动语音识别（ASR）在内的许多任务中取得了最先进的性能，但在实践中通常需要知识蒸馏（KD），将大型教师模型学到的知识转移到更小的学生模型中，并具有可负担的计算和内存成本。本文提出了一种新颖的两阶段 KD 框架，将教师的多个语音基础模型中的知识提炼为 ASR 的单个学生神经换能器模型。在第一阶段，使用从多个教师模型中提取的嵌入对学生模型编码器进行预训练。在第二阶段，学生编码器根据 ASR 任务使用音频文本对进行微调。 LibriSpeech 100 小时子集上的实验表明，所提出的 KD 框架在仅使用一名教师时提高了流式和非流式学生模型的性能。当联合使用多个教师时，学生模型的性能可以进一步增强，实现单词错误率（WERR）分别降低 17.5% 和 10.6%。我们提出的框架可以与其他现有的 KD 方法相结合，以实现进一步的改进。通过在编码器预训练期间合并额外的未标记数据来获得进一步的 WERR，从而使非流式学生模型的总相对 WERR 达到 55.0%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种两阶段知识蒸馏框架，将多个语音基础模型的知识迁移至单个小学生模型，以提升端到端语音识别性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管大模型在语音识别中表现优异，但计算和内存成本高，需通过知识蒸馏将大模型知识转移到更小模型中以实现实际应用。
AI.method: 两阶段框架：第一阶段用多个教师模型的嵌入预训练学生编码器；第二阶段基于ASR任务对编码器进行微调，并结合未标记数据进一步优化。
AI.result: 在LibriSpeech 100小时数据集上，单教师模型WERR降低17.5%（流式）和10.6%（非流式），多教师联合使用使非流式模型总WERR降低55.0%。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效提升学生模型性能，支持与其他蒸馏方法结合，并通过多教师协作和未标记数据利用实现显著改进。

search_text: Knowledge Distillation from Multiple Foundation Models for End-to-End Speech Recognition 从端到端语音识别的多个基础模型中提取知识 Although large foundation models pre-trained by self-supervised learning have achieved state-of-the-art performance in many tasks including automatic speech recognition (ASR), knowledge distillation (KD) is often required in practice to transfer the knowledge learned by large teacher models into much smaller student models with affordable computation and memory costs. This paper proposes a novel two-stage KD framework to distil the knowledge from multiple speech foundation models as teachers into a single student neural transducer model for ASR. In the first stage, the student model encoder is pre-trained using the embeddings extracted from multiple teacher models. In the second stage, the student encoder is fine-tuned with the audio-text pairs based on the ASR task. Experiments on the LibriSpeech 100-hour subset show that the proposed KD framework improves the performance of both streaming and non-streaming student models when using only one teacher. The performance of the student model can be further enhanced when multiple teachers are used jointly, achieving word error rate reductions (WERRs) of 17.5% and 10.6%. Our proposed framework can be combined with other existing KD methods to achieve further improvements. Further WERRs were obtained by incorporating extra unlabelled data during encoder pre-training, leading to a total relative WERR of 55.0% on the non-streaming student model. 尽管通过自监督学习预训练的大型基础模型已经在包括自动语音识别（ASR）在内的许多任务中取得了最先进的性能，但在实践中通常需要知识蒸馏（KD），将大型教师模型学到的知识转移到更小的学生模型中，并具有可负担的计算和内存成本。本文提出了一种新颖的两阶段 KD 框架，将教师的多个语音基础模型中的知识提炼为 ASR 的单个学生神经换能器模型。在第一阶段，使用从多个教师模型中提取的嵌入对学生模型编码器进行预训练。在第二阶段，学生编码器根据 ASR 任务使用音频文本对进行微调。 LibriSpeech 100 小时子集上的实验表明，所提出的 KD 框架在仅使用一名教师时提高了流式和非流式学生模型的性能。当联合使用多个教师时，学生模型的性能可以进一步增强，实现单词错误率（WERR）分别降低 17.5% 和 10.6%。我们提出的框架可以与其他现有的 KD 方法相结合，以实现进一步的改进。通过在编码器预训练期间合并额外的未标记数据来获得进一步的 WERR，从而使非流式学生模型的总相对 WERR 达到 55.0%。 本文提出一种两阶段知识蒸馏框架，将多个语音基础模型的知识迁移至单个小学生模型，以提升端到端语音识别性能。 Xiaoyu Yang,Qiujia Li,Chao Zhang,Philip C. Woodland eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Zhifeng Wang,Jialong Yao,Chunyan Zeng,Wanxuan Wu,Hongmin Xu,Yang Yang
title: Learning Behavior Recognition in Smart Classroom with Multiple Students Based on YOLOv5
title_zh: 基于YOLOv5的智慧课堂多人学习行为识别
abstract: Deep learning-based computer vision technology has grown stronger in recent years, and cross-fertilization using computer vision technology has been a popular direction in recent years. The use of computer vision technology to identify students' learning behavior in the classroom can reduce the workload of traditional teachers in supervising students in the classroom, and ensure greater accuracy and comprehensiveness. However, existing student learning behavior detection systems are unable to track and detect multiple targets precisely, and the accuracy of learning behavior recognition is not high enough to meet the existing needs for the accurate recognition of student behavior in the classroom. To solve this problem, we propose a YOLOv5s network structure based on you only look once (YOLO) algorithm to recognize and analyze students' classroom behavior in this paper. Firstly, the input images taken in the smart classroom are pre-processed. Then, the pre-processed image is fed into the designed YOLOv5 networks to extract deep features through convolutional layers, and the Squeeze-and-Excitation (SE) attention detection mechanism is applied to reduce the weight of background information in the recognition process. Finally, the extracted features are classified by the Feature Pyramid Networks (FPN) and Path Aggregation Network (PAN) structures. Multiple groups of experiments were performed to compare with traditional learning behavior recognition methods to validate the effectiveness of the proposed method. When compared with YOLOv4, the proposed method is able to improve the mAP performance by 11%.
summary: Deep learning-based computer vision technology has grown stronger in recent years, and cross-fertilization using computer vision technology has been a popular direction in recent years. The use of computer vision technology to identify students' learning behavior in the classroom can reduce the workload of traditional teachers in supervising students in the classroom, and ensure greater accuracy and comprehensiveness. However, existing student learning behavior detection systems are unable to track and detect multiple targets precisely, and the accuracy of learning behavior recognition is not high enough to meet the existing needs for the accurate recognition of student behavior in the classroom. To solve this problem, we propose a YOLOv5s network structure based on you only look once (YOLO) algorithm to recognize and analyze students' classroom behavior in this paper. Firstly, the input images taken in the smart classroom are pre-processed. Then, the pre-processed image is fed into the designed YOLOv5 networks to extract deep features through convolutional layers, and the Squeeze-and-Excitation (SE) attention detection mechanism is applied to reduce the weight of background information in the recognition process. Finally, the extracted features are classified by the Feature Pyramid Networks (FPN) and Path Aggregation Network (PAN) structures. Multiple groups of experiments were performed to compare with traditional learning behavior recognition methods to validate the effectiveness of the proposed method. When compared with YOLOv4, the proposed method is able to improve the mAP performance by 11%.
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习的计算机视觉技术近年来不断发展壮大，利用计算机视觉技术的交叉融合是近年来的热门方向。利用计算机视觉技术识别学生在课堂上的学习行为，可以减轻传统教师在课堂上监督学生的工作量，并保证更大的准确性和全面性。然而，现有的学生学习行为检测系统无法对多个目标进行精确跟踪检测，学习行为识别的准确率不够高，无法满足现有课堂上学生行为准确识别的需求。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种基于you only Look Once（YOLO）算法的YOLOv5s网络结构来识别和分析学生的课堂行为。首先，对智慧教室拍摄的输入图像进行预处理。然后，将预处理的图像输入到设计的YOLOv5网络中，通过卷积层提取深层特征，并应用挤压和激励（SE）注意力检测机制来减少识别过程中背景信息的权重。最后，通过特征金字塔网络（FPN）和路径聚合网络（PAN）结构对提取的特征进行分类。通过多组实验与传统学习行为识别方法进行比较，验证了所提方法的有效性。与YOLOv4相比，该方法能够将mAP性能提高11%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于YOLOv5的多学生课堂学习行为识别方法，解决现有系统在多目标跟踪和识别精度不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有学生行为检测系统无法精确跟踪多目标且识别准确率不足，需提升课堂行为识别的精度与全面性。
AI.method: 设计YOLOv5s网络结构，结合SE注意力机制抑制背景干扰，并通过FPN与PAN结构分类提取的特征。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法较YOLOv4提升mAP性能11%，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效提升了多学生课堂行为识别的准确性，适用于智能教室场景。
