authors_text: Fan Cui,Liyong Guo,Quandong Wang,Peng Gao,Yujun Wang
title: Exploring Representation Learning for Small-Footprint Keyword Spotting
title_zh: 探索用于小足迹关键词识别的表示学习
abstract: In this paper, we investigate representation learning for low-resource keyword spotting (KWS). The main challenges of KWS are limited labeled data and limited available device resources. To address those challenges, we explore representation learning for KWS by self-supervised contrastive learning and self-training with pretrained model. First, local-global contrastive siamese networks (LGCSiam) are designed to learn similar utterance-level representations for similar audio samplers by proposed local-global contrastive loss without requiring ground-truth. Second, a self-supervised pretrained Wav2Vec 2.0 model is applied as a constraint module (WVC) to force the KWS model to learn frame-level acoustic representations. By the LGCSiam and WVC modules, the proposed small-footprint KWS model can be pretrained with unlabeled data. Experiments on speech commands dataset show that the self-training WVC module and the self-supervised LGCSiam module significantly improve accuracy, especially in the case of training on a small labeled dataset.
summary: In this paper, we investigate representation learning for low-resource keyword spotting (KWS). The main challenges of KWS are limited labeled data and limited available device resources. To address those challenges, we explore representation learning for KWS by self-supervised contrastive learning and self-training with pretrained model. First, local-global contrastive siamese networks (LGCSiam) are designed to learn similar utterance-level representations for similar audio samplers by proposed local-global contrastive loss without requiring ground-truth. Second, a self-supervised pretrained Wav2Vec 2.0 model is applied as a constraint module (WVC) to force the KWS model to learn frame-level acoustic representations. By the LGCSiam and WVC modules, the proposed small-footprint KWS model can be pretrained with unlabeled data. Experiments on speech commands dataset show that the self-training WVC module and the self-supervised LGCSiam module significantly improve accuracy, especially in the case of training on a small labeled dataset.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了低资源关键词识别（KWS）的表示学习。 KWS 的主要挑战是有限的标记数据和有限的可用设备资源。为了应对这些挑战，我们通过自我监督对比学习和预训练模型的自我训练来探索 KWS 的表示学习。首先，局部-全局对比暹罗网络（LGCSiam）旨在通过提出的局部-全局对比损失来学习相似音频采样器的相似话语级表示，而不需要真实值。其次，将自监督预训练 Wav2Vec 2.0 模型用作约束模块 (WVC)，以强制 KWS 模型学习帧级声学表示。通过 LGCSiam 和 WVC 模块，可以使用未标记的数据对所提出的小型 KWS 模型进行预训练。在语音命令数据集上的实验表明，自训练 WVC 模块和自监督 LGCSiam 模块显着提高了准确性，特别是在小型标记数据集上训练的情况下。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在有限数据和设备资源下，通过表示学习提升小规模关键词识别（KWS）性能的方法。
AI.motivation: 关键词识别面临标注数据稀缺和设备资源受限的挑战，需探索无需大量标注数据的高效学习方法。
AI.method: 设计局部-全局对比Siamese网络（LGCSiam）进行自监督学习，并引入预训练Wav2Vec 2.0作为约束模块（WVC），通过未标注数据预训练模型。
AI.result: 在语音指令数据集上，所提方法在小规模标注数据下显著提升准确率，验证了自监督学习和预训练模块的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 结合自监督对比学习和预训练模型约束，可有效提升小资源KWS性能，为实际部署提供可行方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究了在有限数据和设备资源下，通过表示学习提升小规模关键词识别（KWS）性能的方法。
ai_content.motivation: 关键词识别面临标注数据稀缺和设备资源受限的挑战，需探索无需大量标注数据的高效学习方法。
ai_content.method: 设计局部-全局对比Siamese网络（LGCSiam）进行自监督学习，并引入预训练Wav2Vec 2.0作为约束模块（WVC），通过未标注数据预训练模型。
ai_content.result: 在语音指令数据集上，所提方法在小规模标注数据下显著提升准确率，验证了自监督学习和预训练模块的有效性。
ai_content.conclusion: 结合自监督对比学习和预训练模型约束，可有效提升小资源KWS性能，为实际部署提供可行方案。

search_text: Exploring Representation Learning for Small-Footprint Keyword Spotting 探索用于小足迹关键词识别的表示学习 In this paper, we investigate representation learning for low-resource keyword spotting (KWS). The main challenges of KWS are limited labeled data and limited available device resources. To address those challenges, we explore representation learning for KWS by self-supervised contrastive learning and self-training with pretrained model. First, local-global contrastive siamese networks (LGCSiam) are designed to learn similar utterance-level representations for similar audio samplers by proposed local-global contrastive loss without requiring ground-truth. Second, a self-supervised pretrained Wav2Vec 2.0 model is applied as a constraint module (WVC) to force the KWS model to learn frame-level acoustic representations. By the LGCSiam and WVC modules, the proposed small-footprint KWS model can be pretrained with unlabeled data. Experiments on speech commands dataset show that the self-training WVC module and the self-supervised LGCSiam module significantly improve accuracy, especially in the case of training on a small labeled dataset. 在本文中，我们研究了低资源关键词识别（KWS）的表示学习。 KWS 的主要挑战是有限的标记数据和有限的可用设备资源。为了应对这些挑战，我们通过自我监督对比学习和预训练模型的自我训练来探索 KWS 的表示学习。首先，局部-全局对比暹罗网络（LGCSiam）旨在通过提出的局部-全局对比损失来学习相似音频采样器的相似话语级表示，而不需要真实值。其次，将自监督预训练 Wav2Vec 2.0 模型用作约束模块 (WVC)，以强制 KWS 模型学习帧级声学表示。通过 LGCSiam 和 WVC 模块，可以使用未标记的数据对所提出的小型 KWS 模型进行预训练。在语音命令数据集上的实验表明，自训练 WVC 模块和自监督 LGCSiam 模块显着提高了准确性，特别是在小型标记数据集上训练的情况下。 本文研究了在有限数据和设备资源下，通过表示学习提升小规模关键词识别（KWS）性能的方法。 Fan Cui,Liyong Guo,Quandong Wang,Peng Gao,Yujun Wang cs.SD,cs.CL,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Jeongwhan Choi,Noseong Park
title: Graph Neural Rough Differential Equations for Traffic Forecasting
title_zh: 用于交通预测的图神经粗微分方程
comment: Accepted to ACM Transactions on Intelligent Systems and Technology (ACM TIST). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2112.03558
comments: Accepted to ACM Transactions on Intelligent Systems and Technology (ACM TIST). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2112.03558
abstract: Traffic forecasting is one of the most popular spatio-temporal tasks in the field of machine learning. A prevalent approach in the field is to combine graph convolutional networks and recurrent neural networks for the spatio-temporal processing. There has been fierce competition and many novel methods have been proposed. In this paper, we present the method of spatio-temporal graph neural rough differential equation (STG-NRDE). Neural rough differential equations (NRDEs) are a breakthrough concept for processing time-series data. Their main concept is to use the log-signature transform to convert a time-series sample into a relatively shorter series of feature vectors. We extend the concept and design two NRDEs: one for the temporal processing and the other for the spatial processing. After that, we combine them into a single framework. We conduct experiments with 6 benchmark datasets and 27 baselines. STG-NRDE shows the best accuracy in all cases, outperforming all those 27 baselines by non-trivial margins.
summary: Traffic forecasting is one of the most popular spatio-temporal tasks in the field of machine learning. A prevalent approach in the field is to combine graph convolutional networks and recurrent neural networks for the spatio-temporal processing. There has been fierce competition and many novel methods have been proposed. In this paper, we present the method of spatio-temporal graph neural rough differential equation (STG-NRDE). Neural rough differential equations (NRDEs) are a breakthrough concept for processing time-series data. Their main concept is to use the log-signature transform to convert a time-series sample into a relatively shorter series of feature vectors. We extend the concept and design two NRDEs: one for the temporal processing and the other for the spatial processing. After that, we combine them into a single framework. We conduct experiments with 6 benchmark datasets and 27 baselines. STG-NRDE shows the best accuracy in all cases, outperforming all those 27 baselines by non-trivial margins.
abstract_zh: 流量预测是机器学习领域最流行的时空任务之一。该领域流行的方法是将图卷积网络和递归神经网络结合起来进行时空处理。竞争非常激烈，许多新颖的方法被提出。在本文中，我们提出了时空图神经粗糙微分方程（STG-NRDE）方法。神经粗微分方程 (NRDE) 是处理时间序列数据的突破性概念。他们的主要概念是使用对数签名变换将时间序列样本转换为相对较短的特征向量序列。我们扩展了这一概念并设计了两种 NRDE：一种用于时间处理，另一种用于空间处理。之后，我们将它们组合成一个框架。我们使用 6 个基准数据集和 27 个基线进行实验。 STG-NRDE 在所有情况下都显示出最佳准确性，以显着的优势优于所有这 27 个基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图神经粗糙微分方程（STG-NRDE）的交通预测方法，通过结合时间与空间处理模块提升预测准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有交通预测方法在处理复杂时空依赖关系时存在局限性，需探索更高效的时序与空间特征提取机制。
AI.method: 设计两种神经粗糙微分方程（NRDE）分别处理时间序列和空间图结构，通过log-signature变换提取特征并整合为统一框架。
AI.result: 在6个基准数据集和27个基线方法对比中，STG-NRDE在所有场景下均取得最优预测精度，优势显著。
AI.conclusion: STG-NRDE通过创新性结合图神经网络与粗糙微分方程，有效提升了交通预测的准确性，为时空建模提供了新思路。

authors_text: Lilang Lin,Jiahang Zhang,Jiaying Liu
title: Actionlet-Dependent Contrastive Learning for Unsupervised Skeleton-Based Action Recognition
title_zh: 用于无监督基于骨架的动作识别的动作依赖对比学习
comment: Accepted by CVPR2023 (Highlight). The project page is at https://langlandslin.github.io/projects/ActCLR/
comments: Accepted by CVPR2023 (Highlight). The project page is at https://langlandslin.github.io/projects/ActCLR/
abstract: The self-supervised pretraining paradigm has achieved great success in skeleton-based action recognition. However, these methods treat the motion and static parts equally, and lack an adaptive design for different parts, which has a negative impact on the accuracy of action recognition. To realize the adaptive action modeling of both parts, we propose an Actionlet-Dependent Contrastive Learning method (ActCLR). The actionlet, defined as the discriminative subset of the human skeleton, effectively decomposes motion regions for better action modeling. In detail, by contrasting with the static anchor without motion, we extract the motion region of the skeleton data, which serves as the actionlet, in an unsupervised manner. Then, centering on actionlet, a motion-adaptive data transformation method is built. Different data transformations are applied to actionlet and non-actionlet regions to introduce more diversity while maintaining their own characteristics. Meanwhile, we propose a semantic-aware feature pooling method to build feature representations among motion and static regions in a distinguished manner. Extensive experiments on NTU RGB+D and PKUMMD show that the proposed method achieves remarkable action recognition performance. More visualization and quantitative experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. Our project website is available at https://langlandslin.github.io/projects/ActCLR/
summary: The self-supervised pretraining paradigm has achieved great success in skeleton-based action recognition. However, these methods treat the motion and static parts equally, and lack an adaptive design for different parts, which has a negative impact on the accuracy of action recognition. To realize the adaptive action modeling of both parts, we propose an Actionlet-Dependent Contrastive Learning method (ActCLR). The actionlet, defined as the discriminative subset of the human skeleton, effectively decomposes motion regions for better action modeling. In detail, by contrasting with the static anchor without motion, we extract the motion region of the skeleton data, which serves as the actionlet, in an unsupervised manner. Then, centering on actionlet, a motion-adaptive data transformation method is built. Different data transformations are applied to actionlet and non-actionlet regions to introduce more diversity while maintaining their own characteristics. Meanwhile, we propose a semantic-aware feature pooling method to build feature representations among motion and static regions in a distinguished manner. Extensive experiments on NTU RGB+D and PKUMMD show that the proposed method achieves remarkable action recognition performance. More visualization and quantitative experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. Our project website is available at https://langlandslin.github.io/projects/ActCLR/
abstract_zh: 自监督预训练范式在基于骨架的动作识别方面取得了巨大成功。然而，这些方法对运动和静态部分一视同仁，缺乏针对不同部分的自适应设计，这对动作识别的准确性产生了负面影响。为了实现这两个部分的自适应动作建模，我们提出了一种依赖动作的对比学习方法（ActCLR）。 Actionlet 被定义为人体骨骼的判别子集，可以有效地分解运动区域以实现更好的动作建模。具体来说，通过与没有运动的静态锚点进行对比，我们以无监督的方式提取了骨架数据的运动区域，该区域作为actionlet。然后，以actionlet为中心，建立了运动自适应数据变换方法。对actionlet和非actionlet区域应用不同的数据转换，以在保持其自身特性的同时引入更多多样性。同时，我们提出了一种语义感知特征池方法，以区分运动和静态区域之间的特征表示。在 NTU RGB+D 和 PKUMMD 上的大量实验表明，该方法取得了显着的动作识别性能。更多的可视化和定量实验证明了我们方法的有效性。我们的项目网站位于 https://langlandslin.github.io/projects/ActCLR/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于动作片段依赖的对比学习方法（ActCLR），用于无监督骨骼动作识别，通过区分运动和静态部分提升识别精度。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督预训练方法对骨骼的运动和静态部分同等对待，缺乏对不同部分的自适应设计，影响动作识别准确性。
AI.method: 定义动作片段（actionlet）为骨骼的判别子集，通过对比静态锚点提取运动区域；构建运动自适应数据变换方法，对动作片段与非动作片段区域应用不同变换；提出语义感知特征池化方法区分运动与静态区域特征。
AI.result: 在NTU RGB+D和PKUMMD数据集上取得显著动作识别性能，可视化与定量实验验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: ActCLR通过自适应建模运动与静态部分，有效提升了无监督骨骼动作识别的性能。

Our project website is available at https://langlandslin.github.io/projects/ActCLR/ 自监督预训练范式在基于骨架的动作识别方面取得了巨大成功。然而，这些方法对运动和静态部分一视同仁，缺乏针对不同部分的自适应设计，这对动作识别的准确性产生了负面影响。为了实现这两个部分的自适应动作建模，我们提出了一种依赖动作的对比学习方法（ActCLR）。 Actionlet 被定义为人体骨骼的判别子集，可以有效地分解运动区域以实现更好的动作建模。具体来说，通过与没有运动的静态锚点进行对比，我们以无监督的方式提取了骨架数据的运动区域，该区域作为actionlet。然后，以actionlet为中心，建立了运动自适应数据变换方法。对actionlet和非actionlet区域应用不同的数据转换，以在保持其自身特性的同时引入更多多样性。同时，我们提出了一种语义感知特征池方法，以区分运动和静态区域之间的特征表示。在 NTU RGB+D 和 PKUMMD 上的大量实验表明，该方法取得了显着的动作识别性能。更多的可视化和定量实验证明了我们方法的有效性。我们的项目网站位于 https://langlandslin.github.io/projects/ActCLR/ 本文提出了一种基于动作片段依赖的对比学习方法（ActCLR），用于无监督骨骼动作识别，通过区分运动和静态部分提升识别精度。 Lilang Lin,Jiahang Zhang,Jiaying Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Thien Hoang Nguyen,Shenghai Yuan,Lihua Xie
title: VR-SLAM: A Visual-Range Simultaneous Localization and Mapping System using Monocular Camera and Ultra-wideband Sensors
title_zh: VR-SLAM：使用单目相机和超宽带传感器的视觉范围同步定位和建图系统
abstract: In this work, we propose a simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) system using a monocular camera and Ultra-wideband (UWB) sensors. Our system, referred to as VRSLAM, is a multi-stage framework that leverages the strengths and compensates for the weaknesses of each sensor. Firstly, we introduce a UWB-aided 7 degree-of-freedom (scale factor, 3D position, and 3D orientation) global alignment module to initialize the visual odometry (VO) system in the world frame defined by the UWB anchors. This module loosely fuses up-to-scale VO and ranging data using either a quadratically constrained quadratic programming (QCQP) or nonlinear least squares (NLS) algorithm based on whether a good initial guess is available. Secondly, we provide an accompanied theoretical analysis that includes the derivation and interpretation of the Fisher Information Matrix (FIM) and its determinant. Thirdly, we present UWBaided bundle adjustment (UBA) and UWB-aided pose graph optimization (UPGO) modules to improve short-term odometry accuracy, reduce long-term drift as well as correct any alignment and scale errors. Extensive simulations and experiments show that our solution outperforms UWB/camera-only and previous approaches, can quickly recover from tracking failure without relying on visual relocalization, and can effortlessly obtain a global map even if there are no loop closures.
summary: In this work, we propose a simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) system using a monocular camera and Ultra-wideband (UWB) sensors. Our system, referred to as VRSLAM, is a multi-stage framework that leverages the strengths and compensates for the weaknesses of each sensor. Firstly, we introduce a UWB-aided 7 degree-of-freedom (scale factor, 3D position, and 3D orientation) global alignment module to initialize the visual odometry (VO) system in the world frame defined by the UWB anchors. This module loosely fuses up-to-scale VO and ranging data using either a quadratically constrained quadratic programming (QCQP) or nonlinear least squares (NLS) algorithm based on whether a good initial guess is available. Secondly, we provide an accompanied theoretical analysis that includes the derivation and interpretation of the Fisher Information Matrix (FIM) and its determinant. Thirdly, we present UWBaided bundle adjustment (UBA) and UWB-aided pose graph optimization (UPGO) modules to improve short-term odometry accuracy, reduce long-term drift as well as correct any alignment and scale errors. Extensive simulations and experiments show that our solution outperforms UWB/camera-only and previous approaches, can quickly recover from tracking failure without relying on visual relocalization, and can effortlessly obtain a global map even if there are no loop closures.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种使用单目相机和超宽带（UWB）传感器的同步定位和建图（SLAM）系统。我们的系统称为 VRSLAM，是一个多级框架，可以利用每个传感器的优点并弥补其缺点。首先，我们引入了 UWB 辅助的 7 自由度（比例因子、3D 位置和 3D 方向）全局对齐模块，以在 UWB 锚点定义的世界框架中初始化视觉里程计（VO）系统。该模块根据良好的初始猜测是否可用，使用二次约束二次规划 (QCQP) 或非线性最小二乘 (NLS) 算法松散地融合大规模 VO 和测距数据。其次，我们提供了附带的理论分析，包括费舍尔信息矩阵（FIM）及其行列式的推导和解释。第三，我们提出了 UWBaided 束调整（UBA）和 UWB 辅助位姿图优化（UPGO）模块，以提高短期里程计精度，减少长期漂移以及纠正任何对齐和比例误差。大量的模拟和实验表明，我们的解决方案优于仅使用 UWB/相机和以前的方法，可以快速从跟踪失败中恢复，而无需依赖视觉重定位，并且即使没有闭环也可以轻松获得全局地图。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合单目相机和超宽带（UWB）传感器的视觉-范围同时定位与地图构建（SLAM）系统，名为VR-SLAM。
AI.motivation: 单目相机和UWB传感器各有优缺点，单目相机缺乏尺度信息，而UWB传感器在复杂环境中可能受到干扰，因此需要一种融合两者优势的SLAM系统。
AI.method: 该系统采用多阶段框架，包括UWB辅助的7自由度全局对齐模块、UWB辅助的捆绑调整（UBA）和姿态图优化（UPGO）模块，以提高短期里程计精度、减少长期漂移并校正对齐和尺度误差。
AI.result: 实验和仿真表明，该方法优于仅使用UWB或相机的方法以及先前方法，能够在没有视觉重定位的情况下快速恢复跟踪失败，并在无环闭合的情况下轻松获得全局地图。
AI.conclusion: VR-SLAM通过融合单目相机和UWB传感器的优势，显著提高了SLAM系统的性能和鲁棒性。

authors_text: Shuai Wang,Daoan Zhang,Zipei Yan,Jianguo Zhang,Rui Li
title: Feature Alignment and Uniformity for Test Time Adaptation
title_zh: 测试时间适应的特征对齐和均匀性
abstract: Test time adaptation (TTA) aims to adapt deep neural networks when receiving out of distribution test domain samples. In this setting, the model can only access online unlabeled test samples and pre-trained models on the training domains. We first address TTA as a feature revision problem due to the domain gap between source domains and target domains. After that, we follow the two measurements alignment and uniformity to discuss the test time feature revision. For test time feature uniformity, we propose a test time self-distillation strategy to guarantee the consistency of uniformity between representations of the current batch and all the previous batches. For test time feature alignment, we propose a memorized spatial local clustering strategy to align the representations among the neighborhood samples for the upcoming batch. To deal with the common noisy label problem, we propound the entropy and consistency filters to select and drop the possible noisy labels. To prove the scalability and efficacy of our method, we conduct experiments on four domain generalization benchmarks and four medical image segmentation tasks with various backbones. Experiment results show that our method not only improves baseline stably but also outperforms existing state-of-the-art test time adaptation methods. Code is available at \href{https://github.com/SakurajimaMaiii/TSD}{https://github.com/SakurajimaMaiii/TSD}.
summary: Test time adaptation (TTA) aims to adapt deep neural networks when receiving out of distribution test domain samples. In this setting, the model can only access online unlabeled test samples and pre-trained models on the training domains. We first address TTA as a feature revision problem due to the domain gap between source domains and target domains. After that, we follow the two measurements alignment and uniformity to discuss the test time feature revision. For test time feature uniformity, we propose a test time self-distillation strategy to guarantee the consistency of uniformity between representations of the current batch and all the previous batches. For test time feature alignment, we propose a memorized spatial local clustering strategy to align the representations among the neighborhood samples for the upcoming batch. To deal with the common noisy label problem, we propound the entropy and consistency filters to select and drop the possible noisy labels. To prove the scalability and efficacy of our method, we conduct experiments on four domain generalization benchmarks and four medical image segmentation tasks with various backbones. Experiment results show that our method not only improves baseline stably but also outperforms existing state-of-the-art test time adaptation methods. Code is available at \href{https://github.com/SakurajimaMaiii/TSD}{https://github.com/SakurajimaMaiii/TSD}.
abstract_zh: Test time adaptation (TTA) aims to adapt deep neural networks when receiving out of distribution test domain samples. In this setting, the model can only access online unlabeled test samples and pre-trained models on the training domains. We first address TTA as a feature revision problem due to the domain gap between source domains and target domains. After that, we follow the two measurements alignment and uniformity to discuss the test time feature revision.对于测试时间特征均匀性，我们提出了一种测试时间自蒸馏策略，以保证当前批次和所有先前批次的表示之间的一致性。对于测试时特征对齐，我们提出了一种记忆的空间局部聚类策略，以对齐即将到来的批次的邻域样本之间的表示。 To deal with the common noisy label problem, we propound the entropy and consistency filters to select and drop the possible noisy labels.为了证明我们方法的可扩展性和有效性，我们对四个领域泛化基准和四个具有不同主干的医学图像分割任务进行了实验。实验结果表明，我们的方法不仅稳定地提高了基线，而且优于现有最先进的测试时间适应方法。 Code is available at \href{https://github.com/SakurajimaMaiii/TSD}{https://github.com/SakurajimaMaiii/TSD}.

AI.tldr: 本文研究测试时适应（TTA）问题，通过特征对齐与统一性策略解决源域与目标域间的分布差异。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在测试时面对分布外样本时适应能力不足，需在不依赖标签的情况下调整预训练模型以提升性能。
AI.method: 提出测试时自蒸馏策略保证特征统一性，结合记忆化空间局部聚类实现对齐，并引入熵与一致性过滤器处理噪声标签。
AI.result: 在四个领域泛化基准和四个医学图像分割任务中，方法稳定提升基线性能，优于现有最先进TTA方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过特征对齐与统一性策略有效解决测试时适应问题，具有良好的可扩展性与实际应用价值。

authors_text: Min Zhang,Jintang Xue,Pranav Kadam,Hardik Prajapati,Shan Liu,C. -C. Jay Kuo
title: A Tiny Machine Learning Model for Point Cloud Object Classification
title_zh: 用于点云对象分类的小型机器学习模型
abstract: The design of a tiny machine learning model, which can be deployed in mobile and edge devices, for point cloud object classification is investigated in this work. To achieve this objective, we replace the multi-scale representation of a point cloud object with a single-scale representation for complexity reduction, and exploit rich 3D geometric information of a point cloud object for performance improvement. The proposed solution is named Green-PointHop due to its low computational complexity. We evaluate the performance of Green-PointHop on ModelNet40 and ScanObjectNN two datasets. Green-PointHop has a model size of 64K parameters. It demands 2.3M floating-point operations (FLOPs) to classify a ModelNet40 object of 1024 down-sampled points. Its classification performance gaps against the state-of-the-art DGCNN method are 3% and 7% for ModelNet40 and ScanObjectNN, respectively. On the other hand, the model size and inference complexity of DGCNN are 42X and 1203X of those of Green-PointHop, respectively.
summary: The design of a tiny machine learning model, which can be deployed in mobile and edge devices, for point cloud object classification is investigated in this work. To achieve this objective, we replace the multi-scale representation of a point cloud object with a single-scale representation for complexity reduction, and exploit rich 3D geometric information of a point cloud object for performance improvement. The proposed solution is named Green-PointHop due to its low computational complexity. We evaluate the performance of Green-PointHop on ModelNet40 and ScanObjectNN two datasets. Green-PointHop has a model size of 64K parameters. It demands 2.3M floating-point operations (FLOPs) to classify a ModelNet40 object of 1024 down-sampled points. Its classification performance gaps against the state-of-the-art DGCNN method are 3% and 7% for ModelNet40 and ScanObjectNN, respectively. On the other hand, the model size and inference complexity of DGCNN are 42X and 1203X of those of Green-PointHop, respectively.
abstract_zh: 这项工作研究了可部署在移动和边缘设备中用于点云对象分类的微型机器学习模型的设计。为了实现这一目标，我们用单尺度表示替换点云对象的多尺度表示以降低复杂性，并利用点云对象丰富的 3D 几何信息来提高性能。由于计算复杂度较低，所提出的解决方案被命名为 Green-PointHop。我们评估了 Green-PointHop 在 ModelNet40 和 ScanObjectNN 两个数据集上的性能。 Green-PointHop 的模型大小为 64K 个参数。它需要 230 万次浮点运算 (FLOP) 来对具有 1024 个下采样点的 ModelNet40 对象进行分类。 ModelNet40 和 ScanObjectNN 与最先进的 DGCNN 方法的分类性能差距分别为 3% 和 7%。另一方面，DGCNN 的模型大小和推理复杂度分别是 Green-PointHop 的 42 倍和 1203 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种轻量级机器学习模型Green-PointHop，用于在移动和边缘设备上进行点云对象分类。
AI.motivation: 现有点云分类模型计算复杂度高，难以部署在资源受限的移动和边缘设备中，需在保持性能的同时显著降低模型复杂度。
AI.method: 通过将点云的多尺度表示替换为单尺度表示以减少复杂度，并利用丰富的3D几何信息提升性能，构建参数量为64K、计算量为2.3M FLOPs的Green-PointHop模型。
AI.result: 在ModelNet40和ScanObjectNN数据集上，Green-PointHop分类准确率分别比DGCNN低3%和7%，但模型大小和计算复杂度仅为DGCNN的1/42和1/1203。
AI.conclusion: Green-PointHop在保持较高分类性能的同时实现了显著的轻量化，适合部署在移动和边缘设备中。

authors_text: Fan Cui,Liyong Guo,Lang He,Jiyao Liu,ErCheng Pei,Yujun Wang,Dongmei Jiang
title: Relate auditory speech to EEG by shallow-deep attention-based network
title_zh: 通过基于浅层-深层注意的网络将听觉语音与脑电图联系起来
abstract: Electroencephalography (EEG) plays a vital role in detecting how brain responses to different stimulus. In this paper, we propose a novel Shallow-Deep Attention-based Network (SDANet) to classify the correct auditory stimulus evoking the EEG signal. It adopts the Attention-based Correlation Module (ACM) to discover the connection between auditory speech and EEG from global aspect, and the Shallow-Deep Similarity Classification Module (SDSCM) to decide the classification result via the embeddings learned from the shallow and deep layers. Moreover, various training strategies and data augmentation are used to boost the model robustness. Experiments are conducted on the dataset provided by Auditory EEG challenge (ICASSP Signal Processing Grand Challenge 2023). Results show that the proposed model has a significant gain over the baseline on the match-mismatch track.
summary: Electroencephalography (EEG) plays a vital role in detecting how brain responses to different stimulus. In this paper, we propose a novel Shallow-Deep Attention-based Network (SDANet) to classify the correct auditory stimulus evoking the EEG signal. It adopts the Attention-based Correlation Module (ACM) to discover the connection between auditory speech and EEG from global aspect, and the Shallow-Deep Similarity Classification Module (SDSCM) to decide the classification result via the embeddings learned from the shallow and deep layers. Moreover, various training strategies and data augmentation are used to boost the model robustness. Experiments are conducted on the dataset provided by Auditory EEG challenge (ICASSP Signal Processing Grand Challenge 2023). Results show that the proposed model has a significant gain over the baseline on the match-mismatch track.
abstract_zh: 脑电图 (EEG) 在检测大脑对不同刺激的反应方面发挥着至关重要的作用。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于浅深注意力的网络（SDANet）来对引起脑电图信号的正确听觉刺激进行分类。它采用基于注意力的相关模块（ACM）从全局角度发现听觉语音和脑电图之间的联系，并采用浅深相似性分类模块（SDSCM）通过从浅层和深层学习的嵌入来决定分类结果。此外，使用各种训练策略和数据增强来提高模型的鲁棒性。在听觉脑电图挑战（ICASSP 信号处理大挑战 2023）提供的数据集上进行了实验。结果表明，所提出的模型在匹配-不匹配轨道上比基线有显着的增益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于浅层-深层注意力机制的网络（SDANet），用于通过脑电图（EEG）信号分类正确的听觉刺激。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在利用EEG信号关联听觉语音时存在特征提取不充分的问题，需通过注意力机制和多层级特征融合提升分类性能。
AI.method: 设计了注意力相关模块（ACM）从全局视角关联语音与EEG，并通过浅层-深层相似性分类模块（SDSCM）结合浅层与深层特征进行分类，同时采用多种训练策略和数据增强技术。
AI.result: 在Auditory EEG挑战数据集的match-mismatch任务中，SDANet相比基线模型显著提升了分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: SDANet通过全局注意力机制与多层级特征融合有效捕捉了听觉刺激与EEG的关联，为脑机接口任务提供了新思路。

authors_text: Chang Yu,Xiangyu Zhu,Xiaomei Zhang,Zhaoxiang Zhang,Zhen Lei
title: Graphics Capsule: Learning Hierarchical 3D Face Representations from 2D Images
title_zh: Graphics Capsule：从 2D 图像学习分层 3D 人脸表示
abstract: The function of constructing the hierarchy of objects is important to the visual process of the human brain. Previous studies have successfully adopted capsule networks to decompose the digits and faces into parts in an unsupervised manner to investigate the similar perception mechanism of neural networks. However, their descriptions are restricted to the 2D space, limiting their capacities to imitate the intrinsic 3D perception ability of humans. In this paper, we propose an Inverse Graphics Capsule Network (IGC-Net) to learn the hierarchical 3D face representations from large-scale unlabeled images. The core of IGC-Net is a new type of capsule, named graphics capsule, which represents 3D primitives with interpretable parameters in computer graphics (CG), including depth, albedo, and 3D pose. Specifically, IGC-Net first decomposes the objects into a set of semantic-consistent part-level descriptions and then assembles them into object-level descriptions to build the hierarchy. The learned graphics capsules reveal how the neural networks, oriented at visual perception, understand faces as a hierarchy of 3D models. Besides, the discovered parts can be deployed to the unsupervised face segmentation task to evaluate the semantic consistency of our method. Moreover, the part-level descriptions with explicit physical meanings provide insight into the face analysis that originally runs in a black box, such as the importance of shape and texture for face recognition. Experiments on CelebA, BP4D, and Multi-PIE demonstrate the characteristics of our IGC-Net.
summary: The function of constructing the hierarchy of objects is important to the visual process of the human brain. Previous studies have successfully adopted capsule networks to decompose the digits and faces into parts in an unsupervised manner to investigate the similar perception mechanism of neural networks. However, their descriptions are restricted to the 2D space, limiting their capacities to imitate the intrinsic 3D perception ability of humans. In this paper, we propose an Inverse Graphics Capsule Network (IGC-Net) to learn the hierarchical 3D face representations from large-scale unlabeled images. The core of IGC-Net is a new type of capsule, named graphics capsule, which represents 3D primitives with interpretable parameters in computer graphics (CG), including depth, albedo, and 3D pose. Specifically, IGC-Net first decomposes the objects into a set of semantic-consistent part-level descriptions and then assembles them into object-level descriptions to build the hierarchy. The learned graphics capsules reveal how the neural networks, oriented at visual perception, understand faces as a hierarchy of 3D models. Besides, the discovered parts can be deployed to the unsupervised face segmentation task to evaluate the semantic consistency of our method. Moreover, the part-level descriptions with explicit physical meanings provide insight into the face analysis that originally runs in a black box, such as the importance of shape and texture for face recognition. Experiments on CelebA, BP4D, and Multi-PIE demonstrate the characteristics of our IGC-Net.
abstract_zh: 构建物体层次结构的功能对于人脑的视觉过程很重要。先前的研究已成功采用胶囊网络以无监督的方式将数字和面部分解为多个部分，以研究神经网络的类似感知机制。然而，它们的描述仅限于 2D 空间，限制了它们模仿人类内在 3D 感知能力的能力。在本文中，我们提出了一种逆图形胶囊网络（IGC-Net）来从大规模未标记图像中学习分层 3D 人脸表示。 IGC-Net的核心是一种新型胶囊，称为图形胶囊，它表示具有计算机图形学（CG）中可解释参数的3D基元，包括深度、反照率和3D姿态。具体来说，IGC-Net首先将对象分解为一组语义一致的部分级描述，然后将它们组装成对象级描述以构建层次结构。学习到的图形胶囊揭示了面向视觉感知的神经网络如何将面部理解为 3D 模型的层次结构。此外，发现的部分可以部署到无监督人脸分割任务中，以评估我们方法的语义一致性。此外，具有明确物理意义的部件级描述可以深入了解最初在黑匣子中运行的人脸分析，例如形状和纹理对于人脸识别的重要性。在 CelebA、BP4D 和 Multi-PIE 上的实验证明了我们的 IGC-Net 的特性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种逆向图形胶囊网络（IGC-Net），通过2D图像学习层次化的3D人脸表示，利用图形学参数（深度、反照率、3D姿态）构建可解释的胶囊模块。
AI.motivation: 传统胶囊网络在2D空间分解对象结构，无法模拟人类对3D物体的感知能力，限制了对人脸等复杂对象的层次化理解。
AI.method: 设计新型图形胶囊模块，通过语义一致的部件级描述构建层次化3D人脸表示，并在CelebA等数据集上验证部件分割与人脸识别性能。
AI.result: 实验表明IGC-Net能有效分解人脸部件并重建3D结构，部件描述可应用于无监督分割任务，揭示形状与纹理对人脸识别的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过可解释的3D胶囊表示提升了神经网络对人脸的层次化感知能力，为黑箱型人脸分析提供了物理意义的解释框架。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种逆向图形胶囊网络（IGC-Net），通过2D图像学习层次化的3D人脸表示，利用图形学参数（深度、反照率、3D姿态）构建可解释的胶囊模块。
ai_content.motivation: 传统胶囊网络在2D空间分解对象结构，无法模拟人类对3D物体的感知能力，限制了对人脸等复杂对象的层次化理解。
ai_content.method: 设计新型图形胶囊模块，通过语义一致的部件级描述构建层次化3D人脸表示，并在CelebA等数据集上验证部件分割与人脸识别性能。

search_text: Graphics Capsule: Learning Hierarchical 3D Face Representations from 2D Images Graphics Capsule：从 2D 图像学习分层 3D 人脸表示 The function of constructing the hierarchy of objects is important to the visual process of the human brain. Previous studies have successfully adopted capsule networks to decompose the digits and faces into parts in an unsupervised manner to investigate the similar perception mechanism of neural networks. However, their descriptions are restricted to the 2D space, limiting their capacities to imitate the intrinsic 3D perception ability of humans. In this paper, we propose an Inverse Graphics Capsule Network (IGC-Net) to learn the hierarchical 3D face representations from large-scale unlabeled images. The core of IGC-Net is a new type of capsule, named graphics capsule, which represents 3D primitives with interpretable parameters in computer graphics (CG), including depth, albedo, and 3D pose. Specifically, IGC-Net first decomposes the objects into a set of semantic-consistent part-level descriptions and then assembles them into object-level descriptions to build the hierarchy. The learned graphics capsules reveal how the neural networks, oriented at visual perception, understand faces as a hierarchy of 3D models. Besides, the discovered parts can be deployed to the unsupervised face segmentation task to evaluate the semantic consistency of our method. Moreover, the part-level descriptions with explicit physical meanings provide insight into the face analysis that originally runs in a black box, such as the importance of shape and texture for face recognition. Experiments on CelebA, BP4D, and Multi-PIE demonstrate the characteristics of our IGC-Net. 构建物体层次结构的功能对于人脑的视觉过程很重要。先前的研究已成功采用胶囊网络以无监督的方式将数字和面部分解为多个部分，以研究神经网络的类似感知机制。然而，它们的描述仅限于 2D 空间，限制了它们模仿人类内在 3D 感知能力的能力。在本文中，我们提出了一种逆图形胶囊网络（IGC-Net）来从大规模未标记图像中学习分层 3D 人脸表示。 IGC-Net的核心是一种新型胶囊，称为图形胶囊，它表示具有计算机图形学（CG）中可解释参数的3D基元，包括深度、反照率和3D姿态。具体来说，IGC-Net首先将对象分解为一组语义一致的部分级描述，然后将它们组装成对象级描述以构建层次结构。学习到的图形胶囊揭示了面向视觉感知的神经网络如何将面部理解为 3D 模型的层次结构。此外，发现的部分可以部署到无监督人脸分割任务中，以评估我们方法的语义一致性。此外，具有明确物理意义的部件级描述可以深入了解最初在黑匣子中运行的人脸分析，例如形状和纹理对于人脸识别的重要性。在 CelebA、BP4D 和 Multi-PIE 上的实验证明了我们的 IGC-Net 的特性。 本文提出一种逆向图形胶囊网络（IGC-Net），通过2D图像学习层次化的3D人脸表示，利用图形学参数（深度、反照率、3D姿态）构建可解释的胶囊模块。 Chang Yu,Xiangyu Zhu,Xiaomei Zhang,Zhaoxiang Zhang,Zhen Lei cs.CV

authors_text: Weibo Mao,Chenxin Xu,Qi Zhu,Siheng Chen,Yanfeng Wang
title: Leapfrog Diffusion Model for Stochastic Trajectory Prediction
title_zh: 用于随机轨迹预测的蛙跳扩散模型
abstract: To model the indeterminacy of human behaviors, stochastic trajectory prediction requires a sophisticated multi-modal distribution of future trajectories. Emerging diffusion models have revealed their tremendous representation capacities in numerous generation tasks, showing potential for stochastic trajectory prediction. However, expensive time consumption prevents diffusion models from real-time prediction, since a large number of denoising steps are required to assure sufficient representation ability. To resolve the dilemma, we present LEapfrog Diffusion model (LED), a novel diffusion-based trajectory prediction model, which provides real-time, precise, and diverse predictions. The core of the proposed LED is to leverage a trainable leapfrog initializer to directly learn an expressive multi-modal distribution of future trajectories, which skips a large number of denoising steps, significantly accelerating inference speed. Moreover, the leapfrog initializer is trained to appropriately allocate correlated samples to provide a diversity of predicted future trajectories, significantly improving prediction performances. Extensive experiments on four real-world datasets, including NBA/NFL/SDD/ETH-UCY, show that LED consistently improves performance and achieves 23.7%/21.9% ADE/FDE improvement on NFL. The proposed LED also speeds up the inference 19.3/30.8/24.3/25.1 times compared to the standard diffusion model on NBA/NFL/SDD/ETH-UCY, satisfying real-time inference needs. Code is available at https://github.com/MediaBrain-SJTU/LED.
summary: To model the indeterminacy of human behaviors, stochastic trajectory prediction requires a sophisticated multi-modal distribution of future trajectories. Emerging diffusion models have revealed their tremendous representation capacities in numerous generation tasks, showing potential for stochastic trajectory prediction. However, expensive time consumption prevents diffusion models from real-time prediction, since a large number of denoising steps are required to assure sufficient representation ability. To resolve the dilemma, we present LEapfrog Diffusion model (LED), a novel diffusion-based trajectory prediction model, which provides real-time, precise, and diverse predictions. The core of the proposed LED is to leverage a trainable leapfrog initializer to directly learn an expressive multi-modal distribution of future trajectories, which skips a large number of denoising steps, significantly accelerating inference speed. Moreover, the leapfrog initializer is trained to appropriately allocate correlated samples to provide a diversity of predicted future trajectories, significantly improving prediction performances. Extensive experiments on four real-world datasets, including NBA/NFL/SDD/ETH-UCY, show that LED consistently improves performance and achieves 23.7%/21.9% ADE/FDE improvement on NFL. The proposed LED also speeds up the inference 19.3/30.8/24.3/25.1 times compared to the standard diffusion model on NBA/NFL/SDD/ETH-UCY, satisfying real-time inference needs. Code is available at https://github.com/MediaBrain-SJTU/LED.
abstract_zh: 为了模拟人类行为的不确定性，随机轨迹预测需要未来轨迹的复杂多模态分布。新兴的扩散模型在众多生成任务中展现了其巨大的表示能力，显示出随机轨迹预测的潜力。然而，昂贵的时间消耗阻碍了扩散模型的实时预测，因为需要大量的去噪步骤来确保足够的表示能力。为了解决这个困境，我们提出了LEapfrog Diffusion model (LED)，这是一种新颖的基于扩散的轨迹预测模型，它提供实时、精确和多样化的预测。所提出的 LED 的核心是利用可训练的蛙跳初始化器来直接学习未来轨迹的表达多模态分布，这跳过了大量的去噪步骤，显着加快了推理速度。此外，跨越式初始化器经过训练可以适当地分配相关样本，以提供预测未来轨迹的多样性，从而显着提高预测性能。对四个真实世界数据集（包括 NBA/NFL/SDD/ETH-UCY）的广泛实验表明，LED 持续提高性能，并在 NFL 上实现 23.7%/21.9% ADE/FDE 改进。与 NBA/NFL/SDD/ETH-UCY 上的标准扩散模型相比，所提出的 LED 的推理速度也提高了 19.3/30.8/24.3/25.1 倍，满足实时推理需求。代码可在 https://github.com/MediaBrain-SJTU/LED 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于扩散模型的实时随机轨迹预测方法LED，通过跳过去噪步骤实现高效多模态预测。
AI.motivation: 传统扩散模型因需大量去噪步骤导致推理速度慢，难以满足实时轨迹预测需求。
AI.method: 设计可训练的Leapfrog初始化器直接学习多模态分布，跳过多数去噪步骤并优化样本分配策略。
AI.result: 在NBA/NFL/SDD/ETH-UCY数据集上实现19.3-30.8倍加速，NFL数据集ADE/FDE指标提升23.7%/21.9%。
AI.conclusion: LED通过创新的跳跃机制有效平衡了预测精度、多样性与实时性需求。

authors_text: Xiaoqi Zhao,Hongpeng Jia,Youwei Pang,Long Lv,Feng Tian,Lihe Zhang,Weibing Sun,Huchuan Lu
title: M$^{2}$SNet: Multi-scale in Multi-scale Subtraction Network for Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: M$^{2}$SNet：用于医学图像分割的多尺度减法网络
abstract: Accurate medical image segmentation is critical for early medical diagnosis. Most existing methods are based on U-shape structure and use element-wise addition or concatenation to fuse different level features progressively in decoder. However, both the two operations easily generate plenty of redundant information, which will weaken the complementarity between different level features, resulting in inaccurate localization and blurred edges of lesions. To address this challenge, we propose a general multi-scale in multi-scale subtraction network (M$^{2}$SNet) to finish diverse segmentation from medical image. Specifically, we first design a basic subtraction unit (SU) to produce the difference features between adjacent levels in encoder. Next, we expand the single-scale SU to the intra-layer multi-scale SU, which can provide the decoder with both pixel-level and structure-level difference information. Then, we pyramidally equip the multi-scale SUs at different levels with varying receptive fields, thereby achieving the inter-layer multi-scale feature aggregation and obtaining rich multi-scale difference information. In addition, we build a training-free network ``LossNet'' to comprehensively supervise the task-aware features from bottom layer to top layer, which drives our multi-scale subtraction network to capture the detailed and structural cues simultaneously. Without bells and whistles, our method performs favorably against most state-of-the-art methods under different evaluation metrics on eleven datasets of four different medical image segmentation tasks of diverse image modalities, including color colonoscopy imaging, ultrasound imaging, computed tomography (CT), and optical coherence tomography (OCT). The source code can be available at https://github.com/Xiaoqi-Zhao-DLUT/MSNet.
summary: Accurate medical image segmentation is critical for early medical diagnosis. Most existing methods are based on U-shape structure and use element-wise addition or concatenation to fuse different level features progressively in decoder. However, both the two operations easily generate plenty of redundant information, which will weaken the complementarity between different level features, resulting in inaccurate localization and blurred edges of lesions. To address this challenge, we propose a general multi-scale in multi-scale subtraction network (M$^{2}$SNet) to finish diverse segmentation from medical image. Specifically, we first design a basic subtraction unit (SU) to produce the difference features between adjacent levels in encoder. Next, we expand the single-scale SU to the intra-layer multi-scale SU, which can provide the decoder with both pixel-level and structure-level difference information. Then, we pyramidally equip the multi-scale SUs at different levels with varying receptive fields, thereby achieving the inter-layer multi-scale feature aggregation and obtaining rich multi-scale difference information. In addition, we build a training-free network ``LossNet'' to comprehensively supervise the task-aware features from bottom layer to top layer, which drives our multi-scale subtraction network to capture the detailed and structural cues simultaneously. Without bells and whistles, our method performs favorably against most state-of-the-art methods under different evaluation metrics on eleven datasets of four different medical image segmentation tasks of diverse image modalities, including color colonoscopy imaging, ultrasound imaging, computed tomography (CT), and optical coherence tomography (OCT). The source code can be available at https://github.com/Xiaoqi-Zhao-DLUT/MSNet.
abstract_zh: 准确的医学图像分割对于早期医学诊断至关重要。大多数现有方法基于U形结构，并使用逐元素加法或串联在解码器中逐步融合不同级别的特征。然而，这两种操作都容易产生大量冗余信息，从而削弱不同级别特征之间的互补性，导致病灶定位不准确和边缘模糊。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种通用的多尺度减法网络（M$^{2}$SNet）来完成医学图像的多样化分割。具体来说，我们首先设计一个基本减法单元（SU）来产生编码器中相邻级别之间的差异特征。接下来，我们将单尺度 SU 扩展到层内多尺度 SU，它可以为解码器提供像素级和结构级差异信息。然后，我们金字塔式地为不同层次的多尺度SU配备不同的感受野，从而实现层间多尺度特征聚合并获得丰富的多尺度差异信息。此外，我们构建了一个免训练网络“LossNet”来全面监督从底层到顶层的任务感知特征，这驱动我们的多尺度减法网络同时捕获细节和结构线索。没有花里胡哨的东西，我们的方法在不同的评估指标下，在不同图像模态的四种不同医学图像分割任务的 11 个数据集上表现优于大多数最先进的方法，包括彩色结肠镜成像、超声成像、计算机断层扫描 (CT) 和光学相干断层扫描 (OCT)。源代码可以在 https://github.com/Xiaoqi-Zhao-DLUT/MSNet 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多尺度减法网络（M²SNet），用于解决医学图像分割中因特征冗余导致的定位不准确和边缘模糊问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于U型结构的方法通过逐元素相加或拼接融合特征，易产生冗余信息，削弱多尺度特征的互补性，导致分割精度下降。
AI.method: 设计基础减法单元（SU）提取编码器相邻层级的差异特征，扩展为层内多尺度SU以获取像素级和结构级差异信息，并通过金字塔结构实现跨层级多尺度特征聚合，结合无监督的LossNet强化特征学习。
AI.result: 在11个医学图像数据集（涵盖内窥镜、超声、CT、OCT等模态）上，该方法在多种评估指标下优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: M²SNet通过多尺度差异特征聚合与无监督监督机制，有效提升了医学图像分割的精度与鲁棒性。

search_text: M$^{2}$SNet: Multi-scale in Multi-scale Subtraction Network for Medical Image Segmentation M$^{2}$SNet：用于医学图像分割的多尺度减法网络 Accurate medical image segmentation is critical for early medical diagnosis. Most existing methods are based on U-shape structure and use element-wise addition or concatenation to fuse different level features progressively in decoder. However, both the two operations easily generate plenty of redundant information, which will weaken the complementarity between different level features, resulting in inaccurate localization and blurred edges of lesions. To address this challenge, we propose a general multi-scale in multi-scale subtraction network (M$^{2}$SNet) to finish diverse segmentation from medical image. Specifically, we first design a basic subtraction unit (SU) to produce the difference features between adjacent levels in encoder. Next, we expand the single-scale SU to the intra-layer multi-scale SU, which can provide the decoder with both pixel-level and structure-level difference information. Then, we pyramidally equip the multi-scale SUs at different levels with varying receptive fields, thereby achieving the inter-layer multi-scale feature aggregation and obtaining rich multi-scale difference information. In addition, we build a training-free network ``LossNet'' to comprehensively supervise the task-aware features from bottom layer to top layer, which drives our multi-scale subtraction network to capture the detailed and structural cues simultaneously. Without bells and whistles, our method performs favorably against most state-of-the-art methods under different evaluation metrics on eleven datasets of four different medical image segmentation tasks of diverse image modalities, including color colonoscopy imaging, ultrasound imaging, computed tomography (CT), and optical coherence tomography (OCT). The source code can be available at https://github.com/Xiaoqi-Zhao-DLUT/MSNet. 准确的医学图像分割对于早期医学诊断至关重要。大多数现有方法基于U形结构，并使用逐元素加法或串联在解码器中逐步融合不同级别的特征。然而，这两种操作都容易产生大量冗余信息，从而削弱不同级别特征之间的互补性，导致病灶定位不准确和边缘模糊。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种通用的多尺度减法网络（M$^{2}$SNet）来完成医学图像的多样化分割。具体来说，我们首先设计一个基本减法单元（SU）来产生编码器中相邻级别之间的差异特征。接下来，我们将单尺度 SU 扩展到层内多尺度 SU，它可以为解码器提供像素级和结构级差异信息。然后，我们金字塔式地为不同层次的多尺度SU配备不同的感受野，从而实现层间多尺度特征聚合并获得丰富的多尺度差异信息。此外，我们构建了一个免训练网络“LossNet”来全面监督从底层到顶层的任务感知特征，这驱动我们的多尺度减法网络同时捕获细节和结构线索。没有花里胡哨的东西，我们的方法在不同的评估指标下，在不同图像模态的四种不同医学图像分割任务的 11 个数据集上表现优于大多数最先进的方法，包括彩色结肠镜成像、超声成像、计算机断层扫描 (CT) 和光学相干断层扫描 (OCT)。源代码可以在 https://github.com/Xiaoqi-Zhao-DLUT/MSNet 获取。 本文提出一种多尺度减法网络（M²SNet），用于解决医学图像分割中因特征冗余导致的定位不准确和边缘模糊问题。 Xiaoqi Zhao,Hongpeng Jia,Youwei Pang,Long Lv,Feng Tian,Lihe Zhang,Weibing Sun,Huchuan Lu cs.CV

authors_text: Fushuo Huo,Wenchao Xu,Jingcai Guo,Haozhao Wang,Yunfeng Fan,Song Guo
title: Non-Exemplar Online Class-incremental Continual Learning via Dual-prototype Self-augment and Refinement
title_zh: 非样例网课——双原型自我增强和完善的增量持续学习
abstract: This paper investigates a new, practical, but challenging problem named Non-exemplar Online Class-incremental continual Learning (NO-CL), which aims to preserve the discernibility of base classes without buffering data examples and efficiently learn novel classes continuously in a single-pass (i.e., online) data stream. The challenges of this task are mainly two-fold: (1) Both base and novel classes suffer from severe catastrophic forgetting as no previous samples are available for replay. (2) As the online data can only be observed once, there is no way to fully re-train the whole model, e.g., re-calibrate the decision boundaries via prototype alignment or feature distillation. In this paper, we propose a novel Dual-prototype Self-augment and Refinement method (DSR) for NO-CL problem, which consists of two strategies: 1) Dual class prototypes: vanilla and high-dimensional prototypes are exploited to utilize the pre-trained information and obtain robust quasi-orthogonal representations rather than example buffers for both privacy preservation and memory reduction. 2) Self-augment and refinement: Instead of updating the whole network, we optimize high-dimensional prototypes alternatively with the extra projection module based on self-augment vanilla prototypes, through a bi-level optimization problem. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of the proposed DSR in NO-CL.
summary: This paper investigates a new, practical, but challenging problem named Non-exemplar Online Class-incremental continual Learning (NO-CL), which aims to preserve the discernibility of base classes without buffering data examples and efficiently learn novel classes continuously in a single-pass (i.e., online) data stream. The challenges of this task are mainly two-fold: (1) Both base and novel classes suffer from severe catastrophic forgetting as no previous samples are available for replay. (2) As the online data can only be observed once, there is no way to fully re-train the whole model, e.g., re-calibrate the decision boundaries via prototype alignment or feature distillation. In this paper, we propose a novel Dual-prototype Self-augment and Refinement method (DSR) for NO-CL problem, which consists of two strategies: 1) Dual class prototypes: vanilla and high-dimensional prototypes are exploited to utilize the pre-trained information and obtain robust quasi-orthogonal representations rather than example buffers for both privacy preservation and memory reduction. 2) Self-augment and refinement: Instead of updating the whole network, we optimize high-dimensional prototypes alternatively with the extra projection module based on self-augment vanilla prototypes, through a bi-level optimization problem. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of the proposed DSR in NO-CL.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了一个新的、实用的、但具有挑战性的问题，名为非样例在线类增量持续学习（NO-CL），其目的是在不缓冲数据示例的情况下保持基类的可辨别性，并在单通道（即在线）数据流中有效地连续学习新类。这项任务的挑战主要有两个方面：（1）基础类和新类都遭受严重的灾难性遗忘，因为没有以前的样本可用于重放。 （2）由于在线数据只能观察一次，因此无法完全重新训练整个模型，例如通过原型对齐或特征蒸馏重新校准决策边界。在本文中，我们针对 NO-CL 问题提出了一种新颖的双原型自增强和细化方法（DSR），该方法由两种策略组成：1）双类原型：利用普通和高维原型来利用预训练信息并获得鲁棒的准正交表示而不是示例缓冲区，以实现隐私保护和内存减少。 2）自增强和细化：我们不是更新整个网络，而是通过双层优化问题，使用基于自增强普通原型的额外投影模块来优化高维原型。大量实验证明了所提出的 DSR 在 NO-CL 中的有效性和优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究非示例在线类别增量持续学习（NO-CL）问题，旨在不存储数据示例的情况下，持续学习新类别并保持基础类别的区分性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在无示例回放时易发生灾难性遗忘，且在线数据单次观测无法通过重训练校准决策边界，需在隐私保护与内存效率下解决持续学习挑战。
AI.method: 提出双原型自增强与优化方法（DSR），包含：1）利用基础原型与高维原型生成鲁棒正交表示；2）通过自增强原型与投影模块的双层优化，交替优化高维原型。
AI.result: 实验验证DSR在NO-CL任务中优于现有方法，显著提升新旧类别识别性能。
AI.conclusion: DSR通过双原型机制与自优化策略，有效解决了无示例回放场景下的持续学习难题，为隐私敏感场景提供新思路。

authors_text: Chanjun Park,Hyeonseok Moon,Seolhwa Lee,Jaehyung Seo,Sugyeong Eo,Heuiseok Lim
title: Self-Improving-Leaderboard(SIL): A Call for Real-World Centric Natural Language Processing Leaderboards
title_zh: 自我改进排行榜（SIL）：呼吁以现实世界为中心的自然语言处理排行榜
abstract: Leaderboard systems allow researchers to objectively evaluate Natural Language Processing (NLP) models and are typically used to identify models that exhibit superior performance on a given task in a predetermined setting. However, we argue that evaluation on a given test dataset is just one of many performance indications of the model. In this paper, we claim leaderboard competitions should also aim to identify models that exhibit the best performance in a real-world setting. We highlight three issues with current leaderboard systems: (1) the use of a single, static test set, (2) discrepancy between testing and real-world application (3) the tendency for leaderboard-centric competition to be biased towards the test set. As a solution, we propose a new paradigm of leaderboard systems that addresses these issues of current leaderboard system. Through this study, we hope to induce a paradigm shift towards more real -world-centric leaderboard competitions.
summary: Leaderboard systems allow researchers to objectively evaluate Natural Language Processing (NLP) models and are typically used to identify models that exhibit superior performance on a given task in a predetermined setting. However, we argue that evaluation on a given test dataset is just one of many performance indications of the model. In this paper, we claim leaderboard competitions should also aim to identify models that exhibit the best performance in a real-world setting. We highlight three issues with current leaderboard systems: (1) the use of a single, static test set, (2) discrepancy between testing and real-world application (3) the tendency for leaderboard-centric competition to be biased towards the test set. As a solution, we propose a new paradigm of leaderboard systems that addresses these issues of current leaderboard system. Through this study, we hope to induce a paradigm shift towards more real -world-centric leaderboard competitions.
abstract_zh: 排行榜系统允许研究人员客观地评估自然语言处理 (NLP) 模型，通常用于识别在预定设置中对给定任务表现出卓越性能的模型。然而，我们认为对给定测试数据集的评估只是模型的众多性能指标之一。在本文中，我们声称排行榜竞赛还应该旨在确定在现实环境中表现出最佳性能的模型。我们强调当前排行榜系统的三个问题：（1）使用单个静态测试集，（2）测试与实际应用之间的差异（3）以排行榜为中心的竞争倾向于测试集。作为解决方案，我们提出了一种新的排行榜系统范例，可以解决当前排行榜系统的这些问题。通过这项研究，我们希望引发一种范式转变，转向更加以现实世界为中心的排行榜比赛。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的排行榜系统范式，旨在解决现有自然语言处理排行榜在真实世界应用中的不足，推动更贴近实际需求的模型评估体系。
AI.motivation: 当前排行榜系统依赖单一静态测试集，导致模型评估与实际应用场景脱节，且竞赛偏向优化测试集表现而非真实性能。
AI.method: 提出Self-Improving-Leaderboard(SIL)新范式，通过动态测试集、真实场景模拟和多维度评估指标，减少对单一测试集的依赖。
AI.result: 通过研究揭示现有排行榜局限性，并为构建现实导向的评估体系提供理论框架，呼吁学术界关注真实场景下的模型表现。
AI.conclusion: 需建立更贴近真实世界的NLP排行榜体系，推动模型研发从追求测试集性能转向实际应用效果，促进技术落地。

motivation: 当前排行榜系统依赖单一静态测试集，导致模型评估与实际应用场景脱节，且竞赛偏向优化测试集表现而非真实性能。
method: 提出Self-Improving-Leaderboard(SIL)新范式，通过动态测试集、真实场景模拟和多维度评估指标，减少对单一测试集的依赖。
result: 通过研究揭示现有排行榜局限性，并为构建现实导向的评估体系提供理论框架，呼吁学术界关注真实场景下的模型表现。
conclusion: 需建立更贴近真实世界的NLP排行榜体系，推动模型研发从追求测试集性能转向实际应用效果，促进技术落地。
search_text: Self-Improving-Leaderboard(SIL): A Call for Real-World Centric Natural Language Processing Leaderboards 自我改进排行榜（SIL）：呼吁以现实世界为中心的自然语言处理排行榜 Leaderboard systems allow researchers to objectively evaluate Natural Language Processing (NLP) models and are typically used to identify models that exhibit superior performance on a given task in a predetermined setting. However, we argue that evaluation on a given test dataset is just one of many performance indications of the model. In this paper, we claim leaderboard competitions should also aim to identify models that exhibit the best performance in a real-world setting. We highlight three issues with current leaderboard systems: (1) the use of a single, static test set, (2) discrepancy between testing and real-world application (3) the tendency for leaderboard-centric competition to be biased towards the test set. As a solution, we propose a new paradigm of leaderboard systems that addresses these issues of current leaderboard system. Through this study, we hope to induce a paradigm shift towards more real -world-centric leaderboard competitions. 排行榜系统允许研究人员客观地评估自然语言处理 (NLP) 模型，通常用于识别在预定设置中对给定任务表现出卓越性能的模型。然而，我们认为对给定测试数据集的评估只是模型的众多性能指标之一。在本文中，我们声称排行榜竞赛还应该旨在确定在现实环境中表现出最佳性能的模型。我们强调当前排行榜系统的三个问题：（1）使用单个静态测试集，（2）测试与实际应用之间的差异（3）以排行榜为中心的竞争倾向于测试集。作为解决方案，我们提出了一种新的排行榜系统范例，可以解决当前排行榜系统的这些问题。通过这项研究，我们希望引发一种范式转变，转向更加以现实世界为中心的排行榜比赛。 本文提出一种新的排行榜系统范式，旨在解决现有自然语言处理排行榜在真实世界应用中的不足，推动更贴近实际需求的模型评估体系。 Chanjun Park,Hyeonseok Moon,Seolhwa Lee,Jaehyung Seo,Sugyeong Eo,Heuiseok Lim cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Weihuang Liu,Xi Shen,Chi-Man Pun,Xiaodong Cun
title: Explicit Visual Prompting for Low-Level Structure Segmentations
title_zh: 低级结构分割的显式视觉提示
abstract: We consider the generic problem of detecting low-level structures in images, which includes segmenting the manipulated parts, identifying out-of-focus pixels, separating shadow regions, and detecting concealed objects. Whereas each such topic has been typically addressed with a domain-specific solution, we show that a unified approach performs well across all of them. We take inspiration from the widely-used pre-training and then prompt tuning protocols in NLP and propose a new visual prompting model, named Explicit Visual Prompting (EVP). Different from the previous visual prompting which is typically a dataset-level implicit embedding, our key insight is to enforce the tunable parameters focusing on the explicit visual content from each individual image, i.e., the features from frozen patch embeddings and the input's high-frequency components. The proposed EVP significantly outperforms other parameter-efficient tuning protocols under the same amount of tunable parameters (5.7% extra trainable parameters of each task). EVP also achieves state-of-the-art performances on diverse low-level structure segmentation tasks compared to task-specific solutions. Our code is available at: https://github.com/NiFangBaAGe/Explicit-Visual-Prompt.
summary: We consider the generic problem of detecting low-level structures in images, which includes segmenting the manipulated parts, identifying out-of-focus pixels, separating shadow regions, and detecting concealed objects. Whereas each such topic has been typically addressed with a domain-specific solution, we show that a unified approach performs well across all of them. We take inspiration from the widely-used pre-training and then prompt tuning protocols in NLP and propose a new visual prompting model, named Explicit Visual Prompting (EVP). Different from the previous visual prompting which is typically a dataset-level implicit embedding, our key insight is to enforce the tunable parameters focusing on the explicit visual content from each individual image, i.e., the features from frozen patch embeddings and the input's high-frequency components. The proposed EVP significantly outperforms other parameter-efficient tuning protocols under the same amount of tunable parameters (5.7% extra trainable parameters of each task). EVP also achieves state-of-the-art performances on diverse low-level structure segmentation tasks compared to task-specific solutions. Our code is available at: https://github.com/NiFangBaAGe/Explicit-Visual-Prompt.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑检测图像中低级结构的一般问题，其中包括分割操纵部分、识别失焦像素、分离阴影区域和检测隐藏对象。尽管每个此类主题通常都是通过特定于领域的解决方案来解决的，但我们表明，统一的方法在所有这些主题中都表现良好。我们从 NLP 中广泛使用的预训练和提示调整协议中汲取灵感，提出了一种新的视觉提示模型，称为显式视觉提示（EVP）。与之前的视觉提示（通常是数据集级隐式嵌入）不同，我们的关键见解是强制执行可调节参数，重点关注每个单独图像的显式视觉内容，即来自冻结补丁嵌入的特征和输入的高频分量。在相同数量的可调参数下（每个任务有 5.7% 的额外可训练参数），所提出的 EVP 显着优于其他参数高效的调整协议。与特定于任务的解决方案相比，EVP 还在各种低级结构分割任务上实现了最先进的性能。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/NiFangBaAGe/Explicit-Visual-Prompt。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为EVP的显式视觉提示方法，用于统一解决图像低级结构分割任务，包括分割篡改区域、识别失焦像素、分离阴影和检测隐藏物体。
AI.motivation: 传统方法通常为每个低级结构分割任务设计独立解决方案，缺乏统一性。受NLP中预训练加提示调优的启发，作者旨在开发一种参数高效的通用方法。
AI.method: 提出EVP模型，通过冻结块嵌入特征和利用输入图像高频成分作为显式视觉提示，将可调参数聚焦于具体图像内容，而非数据集级隐式嵌入。
AI.result: 在相同可调参数量（每个任务额外5.7%参数）下，EVP显著优于其他参数高效调优方法，并在多项低级结构分割任务中达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: EVP通过显式视觉提示机制，在保持参数效率的同时实现了跨任务的统一性能提升，为低级图像结构分割提供了有效通用方案。

authors_text: Xiaoyu Zhang,Yun-Hui Liu
title: Efficient Map Sparsification Based on 2D and 3D Discretized Grids
title_zh: 基于2D和3D离散网格的高效地图稀疏化
abstract: Localization in a pre-built map is a basic technique for robot autonomous navigation. Existing mapping and localization methods commonly work well in small-scale environments. As a map grows larger, however, more memory is required and localization becomes inefficient. To solve these problems, map sparsification becomes a practical necessity to acquire a subset of the original map for localization. Previous map sparsification methods add a quadratic term in mixed-integer programming to enforce a uniform distribution of selected landmarks, which requires high memory capacity and heavy computation. In this paper, we formulate map sparsification in an efficient linear form and select uniformly distributed landmarks based on 2D discretized grids. Furthermore, to reduce the influence of different spatial distributions between the mapping and query sequences, which is not considered in previous methods, we also introduce a space constraint term based on 3D discretized grids. The exhaustive experiments in different datasets demonstrate the superiority of the proposed methods in both efficiency and localization performance. The relevant codes will be released at https://github.com/fishmarch/SLAM_Map_Compression.
summary: Localization in a pre-built map is a basic technique for robot autonomous navigation. Existing mapping and localization methods commonly work well in small-scale environments. As a map grows larger, however, more memory is required and localization becomes inefficient. To solve these problems, map sparsification becomes a practical necessity to acquire a subset of the original map for localization. Previous map sparsification methods add a quadratic term in mixed-integer programming to enforce a uniform distribution of selected landmarks, which requires high memory capacity and heavy computation. In this paper, we formulate map sparsification in an efficient linear form and select uniformly distributed landmarks based on 2D discretized grids. Furthermore, to reduce the influence of different spatial distributions between the mapping and query sequences, which is not considered in previous methods, we also introduce a space constraint term based on 3D discretized grids. The exhaustive experiments in different datasets demonstrate the superiority of the proposed methods in both efficiency and localization performance. The relevant codes will be released at https://github.com/fishmarch/SLAM_Map_Compression.
abstract_zh: 预先构建的地图中的定位是机器人自主导航的基本技术。现有的地图绘制和定位方法通常在小规模环境中效果很好。然而，随着地图变大，需要更多内存，并且定位变得效率低下。为了解决这些问题，地图稀疏化成为获取原始地图的子集进行定位的实际需要。以前的地图稀疏化方法在混合整数规划中添加了二次项，以强制所选地标的均匀分布，这需要高内存容量和大量计算。在本文中，我们以有效的线性形式制定地图稀疏化，并基于二维离散网格选择均匀分布的地标。此外，为了减少映射序列和查询序列之间不同空间分布的影响，这是以前的方法中没有考虑到的，我们还引入了基于3D离散网格的空间约束项。不同数据集的详尽实验证明了所提出的方法在效率和定位性能方面的优越性。相关代码将在https://github.com/fishmarch/SLAM_Map_Compression发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于二维和三维离散网格的高效地图稀疏化方法，用于提升机器人自主导航中的定位效率。
AI.motivation: 随着地图规模的扩大，传统方法在内存和计算效率上面临挑战，因此需要一种高效的地图稀疏化方法以减少资源消耗并提高定位性能。
AI.method: 本文将地图稀疏化问题转化为线性形式，并基于二维离散网格选择均匀分布的地标，同时引入基于三维离散网格的空间约束项以减少映射序列与查询序列之间空间分布差异的影响。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，所提出的方法在不同数据集上均表现出优越的效率和定位性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的地图稀疏化方法在效率和定位性能上均优于现有方法，具有实际应用价值。

The relevant codes will be released at https://github.com/fishmarch/SLAM_Map_Compression. 预先构建的地图中的定位是机器人自主导航的基本技术。现有的地图绘制和定位方法通常在小规模环境中效果很好。然而，随着地图变大，需要更多内存，并且定位变得效率低下。为了解决这些问题，地图稀疏化成为获取原始地图的子集进行定位的实际需要。以前的地图稀疏化方法在混合整数规划中添加了二次项，以强制所选地标的均匀分布，这需要高内存容量和大量计算。在本文中，我们以有效的线性形式制定地图稀疏化，并基于二维离散网格选择均匀分布的地标。此外，为了减少映射序列和查询序列之间不同空间分布的影响，这是以前的方法中没有考虑到的，我们还引入了基于3D离散网格的空间约束项。不同数据集的详尽实验证明了所提出的方法在效率和定位性能方面的优越性。相关代码将在https://github.com/fishmarch/SLAM_Map_Compression发布。 本文提出了一种基于二维和三维离散网格的高效地图稀疏化方法，用于提升机器人自主导航中的定位效率。 Xiaoyu Zhang,Yun-Hui Liu cs.RO,cs.CV

authors_text: Zhao-Heng Yin,Binghao Huang,Yuzhe Qin,Qifeng Chen,Xiaolong Wang
title: Rotating without Seeing: Towards In-hand Dexterity through Touch
title_zh: 看不见的旋转：通过触摸实现手部灵巧
abstract: Tactile information plays a critical role in human dexterity. It reveals useful contact information that may not be inferred directly from vision. In fact, humans can even perform in-hand dexterous manipulation without using vision. Can we enable the same ability for the multi-finger robot hand? In this paper, we present Touch Dexterity, a new system that can perform in-hand object rotation using only touching without seeing the object. Instead of relying on precise tactile sensing in a small region, we introduce a new system design using dense binary force sensors (touch or no touch) overlaying one side of the whole robot hand (palm, finger links, fingertips). Such a design is low-cost, giving a larger coverage of the object, and minimizing the Sim2Real gap at the same time. We train an in-hand rotation policy using Reinforcement Learning on diverse objects in simulation. Relying on touch-only sensing, we can directly deploy the policy in a real robot hand and rotate novel objects that are not presented in training. Extensive ablations are performed on how tactile information help in-hand manipulation.Our project is available at https://touchdexterity.github.io.
summary: Tactile information plays a critical role in human dexterity. It reveals useful contact information that may not be inferred directly from vision. In fact, humans can even perform in-hand dexterous manipulation without using vision. Can we enable the same ability for the multi-finger robot hand? In this paper, we present Touch Dexterity, a new system that can perform in-hand object rotation using only touching without seeing the object. Instead of relying on precise tactile sensing in a small region, we introduce a new system design using dense binary force sensors (touch or no touch) overlaying one side of the whole robot hand (palm, finger links, fingertips). Such a design is low-cost, giving a larger coverage of the object, and minimizing the Sim2Real gap at the same time. We train an in-hand rotation policy using Reinforcement Learning on diverse objects in simulation. Relying on touch-only sensing, we can directly deploy the policy in a real robot hand and rotate novel objects that are not presented in training. Extensive ablations are performed on how tactile information help in-hand manipulation.Our project is available at https://touchdexterity.github.io.
abstract_zh: 触觉信息在人类的灵活性中起着至关重要的作用。它揭示了可能无法直接从视觉推断出的有用联系信息。事实上，人类甚至可以在不使用视觉的情况下进行手动灵巧操作。我们能否为多指机器人手提供同样的能力？在本文中，我们提出了 Touch Dexterity，这是一种新系统，可以仅使用触摸来执行手中的对象旋转，而无需看到对象。我们引入了一种新的系统设计，使用覆盖整个机器人手（手掌、手指链接、指尖）一侧的密集二元力传感器（触摸或无触摸），而不是依赖于小区域内的精确触觉传感。这样的设计成本低廉，可以提供更大的对象覆盖范围，同时最小化 Sim2Real 间隙。我们使用强化学习在模拟中的不同对象上训练手中的旋转策略。依靠仅触摸传感，我们可以直接在真实的机器人手中部署策略并旋转训练中未呈现的新物体。对触觉信息如何帮助手动操作进行了广泛的消融。我们的项目可在 https://touchdexterity.github.io 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种仅依赖触觉信息实现机械手在手中旋转物体的系统，无需视觉辅助。
AI.motivation: 人类可通过触觉完成无视觉的精细操作，但现有机械手依赖视觉或精确触觉传感，难以实现类似能力。
AI.method: 设计覆盖手掌、手指链接和指尖的密集二值力传感器阵列，结合强化学习在仿真环境中训练旋转策略。
AI.result: 成功在真实机械手上部署策略，实现训练未见物体的旋转，且通过消融实验证明触觉信息对操作的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 触觉驱动的系统可有效缩小仿真到现实的差距，为机械手实现无视觉的精细操作提供新思路。

authors_text: Chenxin Xu,Robby T. Tan,Yuhong Tan,Siheng Chen,Yu Guang Wang,Xinchao Wang,Yanfeng Wang
title: EqMotion: Equivariant Multi-agent Motion Prediction with Invariant Interaction Reasoning
title_zh: EqMotion：具有不变交互推理的等变多智能体运动预测
abstract: Learning to predict agent motions with relationship reasoning is important for many applications. In motion prediction tasks, maintaining motion equivariance under Euclidean geometric transformations and invariance of agent interaction is a critical and fundamental principle. However, such equivariance and invariance properties are overlooked by most existing methods. To fill this gap, we propose EqMotion, an efficient equivariant motion prediction model with invariant interaction reasoning. To achieve motion equivariance, we propose an equivariant geometric feature learning module to learn a Euclidean transformable feature through dedicated designs of equivariant operations. To reason agent's interactions, we propose an invariant interaction reasoning module to achieve a more stable interaction modeling. To further promote more comprehensive motion features, we propose an invariant pattern feature learning module to learn an invariant pattern feature, which cooperates with the equivariant geometric feature to enhance network expressiveness. We conduct experiments for the proposed model on four distinct scenarios: particle dynamics, molecule dynamics, human skeleton motion prediction and pedestrian trajectory prediction. Experimental results show that our method is not only generally applicable, but also achieves state-of-the-art prediction performances on all the four tasks, improving by 24.0/30.1/8.6/9.2%. Code is available at https://github.com/MediaBrain-SJTU/EqMotion.
summary: Learning to predict agent motions with relationship reasoning is important for many applications. In motion prediction tasks, maintaining motion equivariance under Euclidean geometric transformations and invariance of agent interaction is a critical and fundamental principle. However, such equivariance and invariance properties are overlooked by most existing methods. To fill this gap, we propose EqMotion, an efficient equivariant motion prediction model with invariant interaction reasoning. To achieve motion equivariance, we propose an equivariant geometric feature learning module to learn a Euclidean transformable feature through dedicated designs of equivariant operations. To reason agent's interactions, we propose an invariant interaction reasoning module to achieve a more stable interaction modeling. To further promote more comprehensive motion features, we propose an invariant pattern feature learning module to learn an invariant pattern feature, which cooperates with the equivariant geometric feature to enhance network expressiveness. We conduct experiments for the proposed model on four distinct scenarios: particle dynamics, molecule dynamics, human skeleton motion prediction and pedestrian trajectory prediction. Experimental results show that our method is not only generally applicable, but also achieves state-of-the-art prediction performances on all the four tasks, improving by 24.0/30.1/8.6/9.2%. Code is available at https://github.com/MediaBrain-SJTU/EqMotion.
abstract_zh: 学习通过关系推理来预测智能体运动对于许多应用来说非常重要。在运动预测任务中，保持欧几里德几何变换下的运动等变性和代理交互的不变性是一个关键和基本的原则。然而，大多数现有方法都忽略了这种等变性和不变性。为了填补这一空白，我们提出了 EqMotion，一种具有不变交互推理的高效等变运动预测模型。为了实现运动等变，我们提出了一种等变几何特征学习模块，通过专门的等变运算设计来学习欧几里德可变换特征。为了推理智能体的交互，我们提出了一个不变的交互推理模块来实现更稳定的交互建模。为了进一步促进更全面的运动特征，我们提出了一种不变模式特征学习模块来学习不变模式特征，它与等变几何特征配合以增强网络表达能力。我们在四种不同场景下对所提出的模型进行了实验：粒子动力学、分子动力学、人体骨骼运动预测和行人轨迹预测。实验结果表明，我们的方法不仅具有普遍适用性，而且在所有四个任务上都实现了最先进的预测性能，提高了 24.0/30.1/8.6/9.2%。代码可在 https://github.com/MediaBrain-SJTU/EqMotion 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EqMotion模型，通过保持欧几里得几何变换的等变性及交互不变性，实现多智能体运动预测。
AI.motivation: 现有方法忽视了运动预测中几何变换等变性与交互不变性的重要性，导致模型泛化能力不足。
AI.method: 设计等变几何特征学习模块、不变交互推理模块及不变模式特征学习模块，协同提升模型表达能力与预测稳定性。
AI.result: 在粒子动力学、分子动力学、人体骨骼运动及行人轨迹预测四类任务中均达到SOTA，性能提升24.0%/30.1%/8.6%/9.2%。
AI.conclusion: EqMotion通过融合等变与不变特性，证明了几何感知建模在多场景运动预测中的有效性与普适性。

authors_text: Roelien C. Timmer,Fech Scen Khoo,Megan Mark,Marcella Scoczynski Ribeiro Martins,Anamaria Berea,Gregory Renard,Kaylin Bugbee
title: NASA Science Mission Directorate Knowledge Graph Discovery
title_zh: NASA 科学任务理事会知识图发现
abstract: The size of the National Aeronautics and Space Administration (NASA) Science Mission Directorate (SMD) is growing exponentially, allowing researchers to make discoveries. However, making discoveries is challenging and time-consuming due to the size of the data catalogs, and as many concepts and data are indirectly connected. This paper proposes a pipeline to generate knowledge graphs (KGs) representing different NASA SMD domains. These KGs can be used as the basis for dataset search engines, saving researchers time and supporting them in finding new connections. We collected textual data and used several modern natural language processing (NLP) methods to create the nodes and the edges of the KGs. We explore the cross-domain connections, discuss our challenges, and provide future directions to inspire researchers working on similar challenges.
summary: The size of the National Aeronautics and Space Administration (NASA) Science Mission Directorate (SMD) is growing exponentially, allowing researchers to make discoveries. However, making discoveries is challenging and time-consuming due to the size of the data catalogs, and as many concepts and data are indirectly connected. This paper proposes a pipeline to generate knowledge graphs (KGs) representing different NASA SMD domains. These KGs can be used as the basis for dataset search engines, saving researchers time and supporting them in finding new connections. We collected textual data and used several modern natural language processing (NLP) methods to create the nodes and the edges of the KGs. We explore the cross-domain connections, discuss our challenges, and provide future directions to inspire researchers working on similar challenges.
abstract_zh: 美国国家航空航天局 (NASA) 科学任务理事会 (SMD) 的规模呈指数级增长，使研究人员能够不断取得发现。然而，由于数据目录的规模很大，而且许多概念和数据是间接联系的，因此发现是具有挑战性和耗时的。本文提出了一种生成代表不同 NASA SMD 领域的知识图 (KG) 的管道。这些知识图谱可以用作数据集搜索引擎的基础，节省研究人员的时间并支持他们寻找新的联系。我们收集文本数据并使用几种现代自然语言处理（NLP）方法来创建知识图谱的节点和边。我们探索跨领域的联系，讨论我们面临的挑战，并提供未来的方向，以激励研究人员应对类似的挑战。

AI.motivation: 随着NASA SMD数据量的指数级增长，研究人员面临数据目录庞大且概念间接连接的挑战，导致发现过程耗时且低效。
AI.method: 通过收集文本数据并应用现代自然语言处理（NLP）技术，构建知识图谱的节点与边，并探索跨领域连接。
AI.result: 成功生成了多个NASA SMD领域的知识图谱，为数据集搜索引擎提供基础，帮助研究人员节省时间并发现新关联。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效支持了NASA SMD数据的探索，同时讨论了现有挑战并提出未来研究方向，为类似领域提供参考。

search_text: NASA Science Mission Directorate Knowledge Graph Discovery NASA 科学任务理事会知识图发现 The size of the National Aeronautics and Space Administration (NASA) Science Mission Directorate (SMD) is growing exponentially, allowing researchers to make discoveries. However, making discoveries is challenging and time-consuming due to the size of the data catalogs, and as many concepts and data are indirectly connected. This paper proposes a pipeline to generate knowledge graphs (KGs) representing different NASA SMD domains. These KGs can be used as the basis for dataset search engines, saving researchers time and supporting them in finding new connections. We collected textual data and used several modern natural language processing (NLP) methods to create the nodes and the edges of the KGs. We explore the cross-domain connections, discuss our challenges, and provide future directions to inspire researchers working on similar challenges. 美国国家航空航天局 (NASA) 科学任务理事会 (SMD) 的规模呈指数级增长，使研究人员能够不断取得发现。然而，由于数据目录的规模很大，而且许多概念和数据是间接联系的，因此发现是具有挑战性和耗时的。本文提出了一种生成代表不同 NASA SMD 领域的知识图 (KG) 的管道。这些知识图谱可以用作数据集搜索引擎的基础，节省研究人员的时间并支持他们寻找新的联系。我们收集文本数据并使用几种现代自然语言处理（NLP）方法来创建知识图谱的节点和边。我们探索跨领域的联系，讨论我们面临的挑战，并提供未来的方向，以激励研究人员应对类似的挑战。 本文提出了一种生成知识图谱（KG）的流程，用于表示NASA科学任务 Directorate（SMD）的不同领域，以帮助研究人员更高效地发现数据间的关联。 Roelien C. authors_text: Ajaykrishnan E S,Soumen Maity,Abhishek Sahu,Saket Saurabh
title: An Improved Exact Algorithm for Knot-Free Vertex Deletion
title_zh: 一种改进的无结顶点删除精确算法
abstract: A knot $K$ in a directed graph $D$ is a strongly connected component of size at least two such that there is no arc $(u,v)$ with $u \in V(K)$ and $v\notin V(K)$. Given a directed graph $D=(V,E)$, we study Knot-Free Vertex Deletion (KFVD), where the goal is to remove the minimum number of vertices such that the resulting graph contains no knots. This problem naturally emerges from its application in deadlock resolution since knots are deadlocks in the OR-model of distributed computation. The fastest known exact algorithm in literature for KFVD runs in time $\mathcal{O}^\star(1.576^n)$. In this paper, we present an improved exact algorithm running in time $\mathcal{O}^\star(1.4549^n)$, where $n$ is the number of vertices in $D$. We also prove that the number of inclusion wise minimal knot-free vertex deletion sets is $\mathcal{O}^\star(1.4549^n)$ and construct a family of graphs with $Ω(1.4422^n)$ minimal knot-free vertex deletion sets
summary: A knot $K$ in a directed graph $D$ is a strongly connected component of size at least two such that there is no arc $(u,v)$ with $u \in V(K)$ and $v\notin V(K)$. Given a directed graph $D=(V,E)$, we study Knot-Free Vertex Deletion (KFVD), where the goal is to remove the minimum number of vertices such that the resulting graph contains no knots. This problem naturally emerges from its application in deadlock resolution since knots are deadlocks in the OR-model of distributed computation. The fastest known exact algorithm in literature for KFVD runs in time $\mathcal{O}^\star(1.576^n)$. In this paper, we present an improved exact algorithm running in time $\mathcal{O}^\star(1.4549^n)$, where $n$ is the number of vertices in $D$. We also prove that the number of inclusion wise minimal knot-free vertex deletion sets is $\mathcal{O}^\star(1.4549^n)$ and construct a family of graphs with $Ω(1.4422^n)$ minimal knot-free vertex deletion sets
abstract_zh: 有向图 $D$ 中的结 $K$ 是大小至少为 2 的强连通分量，因此不存在 $u \in V(K)$ 和 $v\notin V(K)$ 的弧 $(u,v)$。给定一个有向图 $D=(V,E)$，我们研究无结顶点删除 (KFVD)，其目标是删除最少数量的顶点，使得生成的图不包含结。这个问题自然地从其在死锁解决中的应用中出现，因为结是分布式计算的 OR 模型中的死锁。文献中已知最快的 KFVD 精确算法运行时间为 $\mathcal{O}^\star(1.576^n)$。在本文中，我们提出了一种在 $\mathcal{O}^\star(1.4549^n)$ 时间内运行的改进精确算法，其中 $n$ 是 $D$ 中的顶点数。我们还证明了包含明智的最小无结顶点删除集的数量为 $\mathcal{O}^\star(1.4549^n)$ 并构造了具有 $Ω(1.4422^n)$ 最小无结顶点删除集的图族

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的精确算法，用于解决有向图中无结点顶点删除问题（KFVD），以更高效地移除最小数量的顶点以消除所有结点。
AI.motivation: 结点在分布式计算的OR模型中对应死锁，解决KFVD问题对死锁预防具有重要意义。现有算法时间复杂度较高，需进一步优化。
AI.method: 通过设计更高效的分支策略和优化状态转移，改进现有精确算法，并结合组合数学方法分析最小解的数量上界。
AI.result: 将KFVD问题的精确算法时间复杂度从O*(1.576^n)提升至O*(1.4549^n)，并证明最小解数量的上界为O*(1.4549^n)，构造了Ω(1.4422^n)规模的最小解实例族。
AI.conclusion: 该算法在理论复杂度上实现了突破，为死锁检测与解决提供了更高效的工具，同时深化了对结点结构组合性质的理解。

authors_text: Shiyu Xu,Tianyuan Liu,Michael Wong,Dana Kulić,Akansel Cosgun
title: Rotating Objects via In-Hand Pivoting using Vision, Force and Touch
title_zh: 使用视觉、力和触摸通过手动旋转来旋转对象
abstract: We propose a robotic manipulation system that can pivot objects on a surface using vision, wrist force and tactile sensing. We aim to control the rotation of an object around the grip point of a parallel gripper by allowing rotational slip, while maintaining a desired wrist force profile. Our approach runs an end-effector position controller and a gripper width controller concurrently in a closed loop. The position controller maintains a desired force using vision and wrist force. The gripper controller uses tactile sensing to keep the grip firm enough to prevent translational slip, but loose enough to induce rotational slip. Our sensor-based control approach relies on matching a desired force profile derived from object dimensions and weight and vision-based monitoring of the object pose. The gripper controller uses tactile sensors to detect and prevent translational slip by tightening the grip when needed. Experimental results where the robot was tasked with rotating cuboid objects 90 degrees show that the multi-modal pivoting approach was able to rotate the objects without causing lift or slip, and was more energy-efficient compared to using a single sensor modality and to pick-and-place. While our work demonstrated the benefit of multi-modal sensing for the pivoting task, further work is needed to generalize our approach to any given object.
summary: We propose a robotic manipulation system that can pivot objects on a surface using vision, wrist force and tactile sensing. We aim to control the rotation of an object around the grip point of a parallel gripper by allowing rotational slip, while maintaining a desired wrist force profile. Our approach runs an end-effector position controller and a gripper width controller concurrently in a closed loop. The position controller maintains a desired force using vision and wrist force. The gripper controller uses tactile sensing to keep the grip firm enough to prevent translational slip, but loose enough to induce rotational slip. Our sensor-based control approach relies on matching a desired force profile derived from object dimensions and weight and vision-based monitoring of the object pose. The gripper controller uses tactile sensors to detect and prevent translational slip by tightening the grip when needed. Experimental results where the robot was tasked with rotating cuboid objects 90 degrees show that the multi-modal pivoting approach was able to rotate the objects without causing lift or slip, and was more energy-efficient compared to using a single sensor modality and to pick-and-place. While our work demonstrated the benefit of multi-modal sensing for the pivoting task, further work is needed to generalize our approach to any given object.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种机器人操纵系统，可以利用视觉、腕力和触觉感知在表面上旋转物体。我们的目标是通过允许旋转滑动来控制物体围绕平行夹具的抓握点的旋转，同时保持所需的手腕力分布。我们的方法在闭环中同时运行末端执行器位置控制器和夹具宽度控制器。位置控制器利用视觉和腕力维持所需的力。夹具控制器使用触觉传感来保持夹具足够牢固以防止平移滑动，但又足够松以引起旋转滑动。我们基于传感器的控制方法依赖于匹配从物体尺寸和重量得出的所需力分布以及基于视觉的物体姿态监控。夹具控制器使用触觉传感器来检测并通过在需要时收紧夹具来防止平移滑动。机器人负责将长方体物体旋转 90 度的实验结果表明，多模式枢转方法能够旋转物体而不会引起升力或滑动，并且与使用单一传感器模式和拾放相比更加节能。虽然我们的工作证明了多模态传感对于旋转任务的好处，但还需要进一步的工作来将我们的方法推广到任何给定的对象。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视觉、腕部力和触觉传感的机器人操作系统，用于通过手内旋转实现物体的旋转。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在旋转物体时容易导致滑动或提升，且单传感器方法效率较低，因此需要一种更高效、稳定的多模态传感控制方法。
AI.method: 该方法通过同时运行末端执行器的位置控制器和夹爪宽度控制器，结合视觉和力反馈控制旋转滑动，利用触觉传感确保夹持力足够防止平移滑动。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法成功实现了立方体物体90度旋转，且没有引起提升或滑动，相比单传感器方法更加节能。
AI.conclusion: 多模态传感方法在旋转任务中表现出优势，但仍需进一步研究以实现对任意物体的通用性。
