tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视觉、腕部力和触觉传感的机器人操作系统，用于通过手内旋转实现物体的旋转。
motivation: 传统方法在旋转物体时容易导致滑动或提升，且单传感器方法效率较低，因此需要一种更高效、稳定的多模态传感控制方法。
method: 该方法通过同时运行末端执行器的位置控制器和夹爪宽度控制器，结合视觉和力反馈控制旋转滑动，利用触觉传感确保夹持力足够防止平移滑动。
result: 实验表明，该方法成功实现了立方体物体90度旋转，且没有引起提升或滑动，相比单传感器方法更加节能。
conclusion: 多模态传感方法在旋转任务中表现出优势，但仍需进一步研究以实现对任意物体的通用性。
search_text: Rotating Objects via In-Hand Pivoting using Vision, Force and Touch 使用视觉、力和触摸通过手动旋转来旋转对象 We propose a robotic manipulation system that can pivot objects on a surface using vision, wrist force and tactile sensing. We aim to control the rotation of an object around the grip point of a parallel gripper by allowing rotational slip, while maintaining a desired wrist force profile. Our approach runs an end-effector position controller and a gripper width controller concurrently in a closed loop. The position controller maintains a desired force using vision and wrist force. The gripper controller uses tactile sensing to keep the grip firm enough to prevent translational slip, but loose enough to induce rotational slip. Our sensor-based control approach relies on matching a desired force profile derived from object dimensions and weight and vision-based monitoring of the object pose. The gripper controller uses tactile sensors to detect and prevent translational slip by tightening the grip when needed. Experimental results where the robot was tasked with rotating cuboid objects 90 degrees show that the multi-modal pivoting approach was able to rotate the objects without causing lift or slip, and was more energy-efficient compared to using a single sensor modality and to pick-and-place. While our work demonstrated the benefit of multi-modal sensing for the pivoting task, further work is needed to generalize our approach to any given object. 我们提出了一种机器人操纵系统，可以利用视觉、腕力和触觉感知在表面上旋转物体。我们的目标是通过允许旋转滑动来控制物体围绕平行夹具的抓握点的旋转，同时保持所需的手腕力分布。我们的方法在闭环中同时运行末端执行器位置控制器和夹具宽度控制器。位置控制器利用视觉和腕力维持所需的力。夹具控制器使用触觉传感来保持夹具足够牢固以防止平移滑动，但又足够松以引起旋转滑动。我们基于传感器的控制方法依赖于匹配从物体尺寸和重量得出的所需力分布以及基于视觉的物体姿态监控。夹具控制器使用触觉传感器来检测并通过在需要时收紧夹具来防止平移滑动。机器人负责将长方体物体旋转 90 度的实验结果表明，多模式枢转方法能够旋转物体而不会引起升力或滑动，并且与使用单一传感器模式和拾放相比更加节能。虽然我们的工作证明了多模态传感对于旋转任务的好处，但还需要进一步的工作来将我们的方法推广到任何给定的对象。 本文提出了一种基于视觉、腕部力和触觉传感的机器人操作系统，用于通过手内旋转实现物体的旋转。 Shiyu Xu,Tianyuan Liu,Michael Wong,Dana Kulić,Akansel Cosgun cs.RO

authors_text: Xingchen Li,Jun Xiao,Guikun Chen,Yinfu Feng,Yi Yang,An-an Liu,Long Chen
title: Decomposed Prototype Learning for Few-Shot Scene Graph Generation
title_zh: 用于少镜头场景图生成的分解原型学习
abstract: Today's scene graph generation (SGG) models typically require abundant manual annotations to learn new predicate types. Therefore, it is difficult to apply them to real-world applications with massive uncommon predicate categories whose annotations are hard to collect. In this paper, we focus on Few-Shot SGG (FSSGG), which encourages SGG models to be able to quickly transfer previous knowledge and recognize unseen predicates well with only a few examples. However, current methods for FSSGG are hindered by the high intra-class variance of predicate categories in SGG: On one hand, each predicate category commonly has multiple semantic meanings under different contexts. On the other hand, the visual appearance of relation triplets with the same predicate differs greatly under different subject-object compositions. Such great variance of inputs makes it hard to learn generalizable representation for each predicate category with current few-shot learning (FSL) methods. However, we found that this intra-class variance of predicates is highly related to the composed subjects and objects. To model the intra-class variance of predicates with subject-object context, we propose a novel Decomposed Prototype Learning (DPL) model for FSSGG. Specifically, we first construct a decomposable prototype space to capture diverse semantics and visual patterns of subjects and objects for predicates by decomposing them into multiple prototypes. Afterwards, we integrate these prototypes with different weights to generate query-adaptive predicate representation with more reliable semantics for each query sample. We conduct extensive experiments and compare with various baseline methods to show the effectiveness of our method.
summary: Today's scene graph generation (SGG) models typically require abundant manual annotations to learn new predicate types. Therefore, it is difficult to apply them to real-world applications with massive uncommon predicate categories whose annotations are hard to collect. In this paper, we focus on Few-Shot SGG (FSSGG), which encourages SGG models to be able to quickly transfer previous knowledge and recognize unseen predicates well with only a few examples. However, current methods for FSSGG are hindered by the high intra-class variance of predicate categories in SGG: On one hand, each predicate category commonly has multiple semantic meanings under different contexts. On the other hand, the visual appearance of relation triplets with the same predicate differs greatly under different subject-object compositions. Such great variance of inputs makes it hard to learn generalizable representation for each predicate category with current few-shot learning (FSL) methods. However, we found that this intra-class variance of predicates is highly related to the composed subjects and objects. To model the intra-class variance of predicates with subject-object context, we propose a novel Decomposed Prototype Learning (DPL) model for FSSGG. Specifically, we first construct a decomposable prototype space to capture diverse semantics and visual patterns of subjects and objects for predicates by decomposing them into multiple prototypes. Afterwards, we integrate these prototypes with different weights to generate query-adaptive predicate representation with more reliable semantics for each query sample. We conduct extensive experiments and compare with various baseline methods to show the effectiveness of our method.
abstract_zh: 当今的场景图生成（SGG）模型通常需要大量的手动注释来学习新的谓词类型。因此，很难将它们应用于具有大量不常见谓词类别且注释难以收集的实际应用程序。在本文中，我们重点研究少样本 SGG（FSSGG），它鼓励 SGG 模型能够快速迁移先前的知识，并仅通过几个例子就能很好地识别未见过的谓词。然而，当前的 FSSGG 方法受到 SGG 中谓词类别的高类内方差的阻碍：一方面，每个谓词类别在不同上下文下通常具有多种语义。另一方面，具有相同谓词的关系三元组在不同的主宾构成下的视觉表现有很大差异。输入的如此巨大的方差使得使用当前的小样本学习（FSL）方法很难学习每个谓词类别的泛化表示。然而，我们发现谓词的类内方差与所组成的主语和宾语高度相关。为了对具有主客体上下文的谓词的类内方差进行建模，我们提出了一种新颖的 FSSGG 分解原型学习（DPL）模型。具体来说，我们首先构建一个可分解的原型空间，通过将谓词分解为多个原型来捕获谓词的主语和宾语的不同语义和视觉模式。然后，我们将这些原型与不同的权重集成起来，为每个查询样本生成具有更可靠语义的查询自适应谓词表示。我们进行了大量的实验，并与各种基线方法进行比较，以证明我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出分解原型学习（DPL）方法，解决少样本场景图生成中谓词类内方差大的问题，提升模型对新谓词的识别能力。
AI.motivation: 现有场景图生成模型依赖大量标注数据，难以处理真实场景中罕见谓词类别，且少样本方法难以应对谓词在不同上下文中的语义和视觉差异。
AI.method: 构建可分解的原型空间，将谓词分解为多个语义和视觉原型，通过加权整合生成查询自适应的谓词表示，以建模主客体上下文中的类内方差。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上实验验证，DPL方法显著优于现有少样本场景图生成基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过分解原型学习建模谓词的上下文相关方差，有效提升了少样本场景图生成的性能。

authors_text: Yongyi Su,Xun Xu,Tianrui Li,Kui Jia
title: Revisiting Realistic Test-Time Training: Sequential Inference and Adaptation by Anchored Clustering Regularized Self-Training
title_zh: 重新审视现实的测试时训练：通过锚定聚类正则化自我训练进行顺序推理和适应
comment: Test-time training, Self-training. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2206.02721
comments: Test-time training, Self-training. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2206.02721
abstract: Deploying models on target domain data subject to distribution shift requires adaptation. Test-time training (TTT) emerges as a solution to this adaptation under a realistic scenario where access to full source domain data is not available, and instant inference on the target domain is required. Despite many efforts into TTT, there is a confusion over the experimental settings, thus leading to unfair comparisons. In this work, we first revisit TTT assumptions and categorize TTT protocols by two key factors. Among the multiple protocols, we adopt a realistic sequential test-time training (sTTT) protocol, under which we develop a test-time anchored clustering (TTAC) approach to enable stronger test-time feature learning. TTAC discovers clusters in both source and target domains and matches the target clusters to the source ones to improve adaptation. When source domain information is strictly absent (i.e. source-free) we further develop an efficient method to infer source domain distributions for anchored clustering. Finally, self-training~(ST) has demonstrated great success in learning from unlabeled data and we empirically figure out that applying ST alone to TTT is prone to confirmation bias. Therefore, a more effective TTT approach is introduced by regularizing self-training with anchored clustering, and the improved model is referred to as TTAC++. We demonstrate that, under all TTT protocols, TTAC++ consistently outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on five TTT datasets, including corrupted target domain, selected hard samples, synthetic-to-real adaptation and adversarially attacked target domain. We hope this work will provide a fair benchmarking of TTT methods, and future research should be compared within respective protocols.
summary: Deploying models on target domain data subject to distribution shift requires adaptation. Test-time training (TTT) emerges as a solution to this adaptation under a realistic scenario where access to full source domain data is not available, and instant inference on the target domain is required. Despite many efforts into TTT, there is a confusion over the experimental settings, thus leading to unfair comparisons. In this work, we first revisit TTT assumptions and categorize TTT protocols by two key factors. Among the multiple protocols, we adopt a realistic sequential test-time training (sTTT) protocol, under which we develop a test-time anchored clustering (TTAC) approach to enable stronger test-time feature learning. TTAC discovers clusters in both source and target domains and matches the target clusters to the source ones to improve adaptation. When source domain information is strictly absent (i.e. source-free) we further develop an efficient method to infer source domain distributions for anchored clustering. Finally, self-training~(ST) has demonstrated great success in learning from unlabeled data and we empirically figure out that applying ST alone to TTT is prone to confirmation bias. Therefore, a more effective TTT approach is introduced by regularizing self-training with anchored clustering, and the improved model is referred to as TTAC++. We demonstrate that, under all TTT protocols, TTAC++ consistently outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on five TTT datasets, including corrupted target domain, selected hard samples, synthetic-to-real adaptation and adversarially attacked target domain. We hope this work will provide a fair benchmarking of TTT methods, and future research should be compared within respective protocols.
abstract_zh: 在受分布变化影响的目标域数据上部署模型需要进行调整。在无法访问完整源域数据且需要对目标域进行即时推理的现实场景下，测试时训练 (TTT) 作为这种适应的解决方案而出现。尽管在 TTT 方面做出了很多努力，但实验设置仍存在混乱，从而导致不公平的比较。在这项工作中，我们首先重新审视 TTT 假设，并根据两个关键因素对 TTT 协议进行分类。在多个协议中，我们采用了现实的顺序测试时间训练（sTTT）协议，在该协议下我们开发了测试时间锚定聚类（TTAC）方法以实现更强的测试时间特征学习。 TTAC 发现源域和目标域中的集群，并将目标集群与源集群进行匹配以提高适应性。当源域信息严格不存在（即无源）时，我们进一步开发一种有效的方法来推断锚定聚类的源域分布。最后，自我训练~（ST）在从未标记数据中学习方面取得了巨大成功，我们根据经验发现，单独将 ST 应用于 TTT 很容易出现确认偏差。因此，通过锚定聚类正则化自训练，引入了一种更有效的TTT方法，改进后的模型被称为TTAC++。我们证明，在所有 TTT 协议下，TTAC++ 在五个 TTT 数据集上始终优于最先进的方法，包括损坏的目标域、选定的硬样本、合成到真实的适应和对抗性攻击的目标域。我们希望这项工作能够为 TTT 方法提供公平的基准测试，并且未来的研究应该在各自的协议内进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的测试时训练（TTT）方法TTAC++，通过锚定聚类正则化自训练，在目标域数据分布偏移的情况下提升模型适应性。
AI.motivation: 现有TTT方法因实验设置不统一导致不公平比较，且单独使用自训练易产生确认偏差，需设计更鲁棒的适应策略。
AI.method: 提出TTAC方法，通过源域和目标域聚类匹配提升适应性；在无源域信息时推断源分布；结合自训练与锚定聚类形成TTAC++，抑制确认偏差。
AI.result: TTAC++在五个TTT数据集（含损坏数据、合成到真实适配等）上均优于现有方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文为TTT方法提供了公平基准，未来研究应基于所提协议进行对比。

method: 提出TTAC方法，通过源域和目标域聚类匹配提升适应性；在无源域信息时推断源分布；结合自训练与锚定聚类形成TTAC++，抑制确认偏差。
result: TTAC++在五个TTT数据集（含损坏数据、合成到真实适配等）上均优于现有方法，验证了其有效性。
conclusion: 本文为TTT方法提供了公平基准，未来研究应基于所提协议进行对比。
search_text: Revisiting Realistic Test-Time Training: Sequential Inference and Adaptation by Anchored Clustering Regularized Self-Training 重新审视现实的测试时训练：通过锚定聚类正则化自我训练进行顺序推理和适应 Deploying models on target domain data subject to distribution shift requires adaptation. Test-time training (TTT) emerges as a solution to this adaptation under a realistic scenario where access to full source domain data is not available, and instant inference on the target domain is required. Despite many efforts into TTT, there is a confusion over the experimental settings, thus leading to unfair comparisons. In this work, we first revisit TTT assumptions and categorize TTT protocols by two key factors. Among the multiple protocols, we adopt a realistic sequential test-time training (sTTT) protocol, under which we develop a test-time anchored clustering (TTAC) approach to enable stronger test-time feature learning. TTAC discovers clusters in both source and target domains and matches the target clusters to the source ones to improve adaptation. When source domain information is strictly absent (i.e. source-free) we further develop an efficient method to infer source domain distributions for anchored clustering. Finally, self-training~(ST) has demonstrated great success in learning from unlabeled data and we empirically figure out that applying ST alone to TTT is prone to confirmation bias. Therefore, a more effective TTT approach is introduced by regularizing self-training with anchored clustering, and the improved model is referred to as TTAC++. We demonstrate that, under all TTT protocols, TTAC++ consistently outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on five TTT datasets, including corrupted target domain, selected hard samples, synthetic-to-real adaptation and adversarially attacked target domain. We hope this work will provide a fair benchmarking of TTT methods, and future research should be compared within respective protocols. 在受分布变化影响的目标域数据上部署模型需要进行调整。在无法访问完整源域数据且需要对目标域进行即时推理的现实场景下，测试时训练 (TTT) 作为这种适应的解决方案而出现。尽管在 TTT 方面做出了很多努力，但实验设置仍存在混乱，从而导致不公平的比较。在这项工作中，我们首先重新审视 TTT 假设，并根据两个关键因素对 TTT 协议进行分类。在多个协议中，我们采用了现实的顺序测试时间训练（sTTT）协议，在该协议下我们开发了测试时间锚定聚类（TTAC）方法以实现更强的测试时间特征学习。 TTAC 发现源域和目标域中的集群，并将目标集群与源集群进行匹配以提高适应性。当源域信息严格不存在（即无源）时，我们进一步开发一种有效的方法来推断锚定聚类的源域分布。最后，自我训练~（ST）在从未标记数据中学习方面取得了巨大成功，我们根据经验发现，单独将 ST 应用于 TTT 很容易出现确认偏差。因此，通过锚定聚类正则化自训练，引入了一种更有效的TTT方法，改进后的模型被称为TTAC++。我们证明，在所有 TTT 协议下，TTAC++ 在五个 TTT 数据集上始终优于最先进的方法，包括损坏的目标域、选定的硬样本、合成到真实的适应和对抗性攻击的目标域。我们希望这项工作能够为 TTT 方法提供公平的基准测试，并且未来的研究应该在各自的协议内进行比较。 本文提出了一种新的测试时训练（TTT）方法TTAC++，通过锚定聚类正则化自训练，在目标域数据分布偏移的情况下提升模型适应性。 Yongyi Su,Xun Xu,Tianrui Li,Kui Jia cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Soham Mehta,Anderson Rogers,Thomas Krendl Gilbert
title: Dynamic Documentation for AI Systems
title_zh: 人工智能系统的动态文档
abstract: AI documentation is a rapidly-growing channel for coordinating the design of AI technologies with policies for transparency and accessibility. Calls to standardize and enact documentation of algorithmic harms and impacts are now commonplace. However, documentation standards for AI remain inchoate, and fail to match the capabilities and social effects of increasingly impactful architectures such as Large Language Models (LLMs). In this paper, we show the limits of present documentation protocols, and argue for dynamic documentation as a new paradigm for understanding and evaluating AI systems. We first review canonical approaches to system documentation outside the context of AI, focusing on the complex history of Environmental Impact Statements (EISs). We next compare critical elements of the EIS framework to present challenges with algorithmic documentation, which have inherited the limitations of EISs without incorporating their strengths. These challenges are specifically illustrated through the growing popularity of Model Cards and two case studies of algorithmic impact assessment in China and Canada. Finally, we evaluate more recent proposals, including Reward Reports, as potential components of fully dynamic AI documentation protocols.
summary: AI documentation is a rapidly-growing channel for coordinating the design of AI technologies with policies for transparency and accessibility. Calls to standardize and enact documentation of algorithmic harms and impacts are now commonplace. However, documentation standards for AI remain inchoate, and fail to match the capabilities and social effects of increasingly impactful architectures such as Large Language Models (LLMs). In this paper, we show the limits of present documentation protocols, and argue for dynamic documentation as a new paradigm for understanding and evaluating AI systems. We first review canonical approaches to system documentation outside the context of AI, focusing on the complex history of Environmental Impact Statements (EISs). We next compare critical elements of the EIS framework to present challenges with algorithmic documentation, which have inherited the limitations of EISs without incorporating their strengths. These challenges are specifically illustrated through the growing popularity of Model Cards and two case studies of algorithmic impact assessment in China and Canada. Finally, we evaluate more recent proposals, including Reward Reports, as potential components of fully dynamic AI documentation protocols.
abstract_zh: 人工智能文档是一个快速增长的渠道，用于协调人工智能技术的设计与透明度和可访问性政策。现在，对算法危害和影响进行标准化和制定记录的呼声已很常见。然而，人工智能的文档标准仍然处于起步阶段，无法匹配大型语言模型 (LLM) 等影响力日益增强的架构的功能和社会影响。在本文中，我们展示了现有文档协议的局限性，并主张将动态文档作为理解和评估人工智能系统的新范例。我们首先回顾人工智能背景之外的系统文档规范方法，重点关注环境影响报告书 (EIS) 的复杂历史。接下来，我们比较 EIS 框架的关键要素，以提出算法文档的挑战，算法文档继承了 EIS 的局限性，但没有结合其优点。这些挑战通过模型卡的日益普及以及中国和加拿大算法影响评估的两个案例研究得到了具体说明。最后，我们评估了最近的提案，包括奖励报告，作为完全动态人工智能文档协议的潜在组成部分。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了当前AI系统文档标准的不足，并提出动态文档作为新范式以更好地理解和评估AI系统，特别是大型语言模型（LLMs）的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有AI文档标准未能匹配LLMs的能力和社会影响，需通过动态文档解决算法透明性与社会影响评估的不足。
AI.method: 通过回顾非AI领域的系统文档方法（如环境影响声明EISs），比较其与算法文档的挑战，并结合中国和加拿大的案例研究及新提案（如Reward Reports）进行分析。
AI.result: 指出现有文档协议的局限性，提出动态文档需融合EISs的优势，并评估了Reward Reports等新方法的潜在价值。
AI.conclusion: 动态文档作为新范式，能更全面评估AI系统的社会影响，需结合历史框架与新兴技术，推动标准化进程。
